## mUranE mudraNada munnuDi
idondu lEkhanagaLa sankalana. I hesarina nanna pustaka modala bArige
1970ralli prakaTavAgittu. anantara 1998ralli puttUrina kannaDa
sanghada mUlaka idu eraDanE mudraNavannu kanDittu. A eraDanE
mudraNadalli onderaDu hosa lEkhanagaLannu sErisidde, mattu uLidavu
gaLalli kelavu badalAvaNegaLannU mADidde. Iga I mUranE mudraNa
dalli bEre kelavu badalAvaNegaLannu mADiddEne, mattu halavu hosa
lEkhanagaLannU sErisiddEne.

bhASeyembudu namagella tIra paricitavAgiruva viSaya. namma
nAligeya tudiyallE kuNiyuvantaha vicitra tantra. Adare, adara
svarUpada kuritAgi nAvu sariyAgi tiLidiruvudakkintalU tappAgi kalpisi
konDiruvudE jAsti. bhASe I rIti atiparicitavAgiruva kAraNa, ivu
tappu kalpanegaLendu tiLisi hELuvudU bahaLa kaSTa. hIge hELalu
yatnisuva bhASAvijYAniya mAtige yArU bele koDuvudilla.
heccinavarigU avana mAtinalli nambikeyE baruvudilla.

I tappu kalpaneya phalavannu mAtra nAvellarU anubhavisuttiddEve.
rAjakIyadalli mAtravalla, namma dinanityada AguhOgugaLallU bhASA
samasye bEre bEre rUpagaLalli kANisikoLLuttide. idannu bageharisalu
yatnisuvavarella kaggattalalli taDakADuttiddAre. avara yatnagaLella I
samasyeyannu innaSTu bigigoLisuva hAge kANisuttide. bhASAmAdhyamada
viSayadalli, lipiviSayadalli (ittIcegina xkArada kate), mattu rAjya
gaLa gaDi viSayadalli I samasye anavaSyakavAgi AgAga vikAravAda
rUpavannu taLeyuvudu kANisuttide.

intaha halavu samasyegaLa mEle beLaku cellaballa lEkhanagaLannu I
sankalanadalli kANabahudu. illi nAlku rItiya lEkhanagaLive. bhASeya
svarUpaventadembudannu tiLisuvavugaLu Aru; bhASegU barahakkU
naDuviruva sambandhavEnu, avannu kalisuva vidhAnagaLalli lOpadOSa
gaLu Enive embudannu carcisuvavugaLu hanneraDu; kannaDa bhASeya
svarUpavannu tiLisikoDuvavugaLu aydu; mattu, bhAratadalli mattu

i

---

## munnuDi
prapancada itara bhAgagaLalli kANisuva bhASegaLa vayvidhyate entahadu
embudannu sUkSmavAgi varNisalu yatnisuvavugaLu ELu.

I sankalanadalli kANisuva lEkhanagaLalli kelavu sumAru naluvattu
varSagaLaSTu hindeyE prakaTavAdavugaLu; innu kelavu ittIcege prakaTa
vAdavugaLu; kelavu aprakaTita lEkhanagaLU idarallive. ivu pari
harisalu yatnisuva samasyegaLu mAtra ivattigU kANisikoLLuvantahavu
gaLE. bhASeya rAjakAraNigaLige, adhyApakarige, mattu bhASeya nijavAda
svarUpavEnembudannu tiLiya bayasuva Odugarige I sankalana rucisa
bahudu.

I pustakada mudraNakkAgi tamma 'baraha' emba hesarina tantrAmSa
vannu ucitavAgi baLasalu oppige koTTiruva SrI SESAdrivAsu
candraSEkharan avarige, andavAgi mudrisi koTTiruva SrISakti ilekTrik
pres‌na SrI rA. vem. SrInivAsa mUrti, mattu avara suputra SrI rA.
SrI. mOhana mUrti avarige, mattu idara mArATada hoNe
hottiruva atri buk senTarina SrI ji. en. aSOkavardhana avarige
nAnu AbhAri.

maysUru
mArc 20, 2002

Di. en. Sankara bhaT

LLa

---

## nAlkanE accina munnuDi
2002ralli mUraneya bArige accAgidda I pustakavannu Iga nAlkanE
bArige accu hAkisuttiddEne. idakkAgi vartamAna kAla, bhASeya
kalikege vyAkaraNada neravu, Tarki dESada lipikrAnti, kannaDakkondu
'hosa baraha' mattu bhASe mattu baraha emba aydu heccina
lEkhanagaLannu sErisiddEne; uLida lEkhanagaLallU kelavu
mArpADugaLannu mADiddEne. mattu modalidda nAlka bhAgagaLannu aydu
bhAgagaLalli anugoLisiddEne.

Adare, nanna ittIcegina pustakagaLa hAge, idaralli hosabarahavannu
baLasalu hOgilla. hosabarahadalli nanna olavu kaDimeyAdudu idakke
kAraNavalla; hosadAgi bareyuva pustakagaLallella adannE baLasuttiddEne.
ittIcege prakaTavAgiruva kannaDa barahada sollarime-1 pustakadallU
adannE baLasiddEne.

Adare, I pustakada mUraneya accu nAnu hosa barahavannu
Odugara mundirisuva modalE (2002ralli) horabandittu. Iga
adannu hosa barahakke mArpaDisabEkiddalli, adaralli baLakeyAgiruva
samskxta eravalugaLa eNikeyannU sAkaSTu kaDime mADabEkAguttade,
mattu idakkAgi heccu kaDime hosa pustakavondannu baredaSTE kelasa
mADabEkAguttade. idu nanna Igina kannaDa barahada sollarime
pustakada mundina bhAgagaLa baravaNigege taDeyoDDaballudAda kAraNa, A
kelasavannu kaygettikoLLalu hOgilla.

I lEkhanagaLalli kelavannu sumAru naluvattu varSagaLaSTu
hindeyE baredidde, mattu bEre kelavannu ittIcege barediddEne. I
dIrghavAda avadhiyalli bhASeya kuritu, mattu kannaDada kuritu nanna
tiLuvaLikeyalli halavu mArpADugaLunTAgive. ivu svalpa maTTige I
barahagaLallU kANisikoLLuttave. ivugaLalli ondakkondu tIra viruddha
gaLAgaballantaha vAkya illavE pArAgaLannu mAtra badalisiddEne.
uLidavugaLannu hAgeyE biTTiddEne.

5

## munnuDi
I pustakavannu andavAgi mudrisiruva SrISakti ilekTrik pres‌na SrI
rA. SrI. mOhana mUrti avarannu, idara mArATada hoNe
hottiruva atri buk senTarina SrI ji. en. aSOkavardhana avarannu,
mattu I pustakavannu siddhapaDisuvalli nanage halavu rItiya bembala
nIDiruva maDadi bhArati bhaT avarannu nAnilli nenapisabayasuttEne.

heggODu, sAgara
20 mE 2010

Di. en. Sankara bhaT

6

## bhAga ondubhASeya svarUpa

nAvu dinanityavU lIlAjAlavAgi baLasuttiruva I bhASe nammellarigU
tumbA paricitavAdudu. hAgAgi, adara viSayavAgi nammalli halavaru
ella tiLidavarante mAtanADuttAre. nijakkU namma nAligeya tudiyalli
kuNiyuva I bhASeya kuritu nAvu tiLiyadiruva mattu tappAgi
tiLidukonDiruva viSayagaLE heccu. halavu sandarbhagaLalli I
tiLuvaLikeyilladiruvudu mattu tappu tiLuvaLikeyiruvudu nammannu
mattu uLidavarannu bagebageya tondaregaLige oLapaDisuttade.

bhASeya kuritAgi nammalliruva I ajYAnada phalavannu nAvu elli
bEkiddarU kANabahudu. obba vyaktiya yOgyateyannu avana mAti
ninda aLeyuttEve. namagariyada bhASeyannADuvavarannu samSayadinda
nODuttEve. namma bhASeyannADuvavaru sikkidare avarannu nambi
sulabhavAgi mOsahOguttEve. bhASeya hesarinalli nammalli eSTella
hoDedATagaLu naDedilla? naDeyuttilla? Adare, ivella sariyE,
avaSyavE embudannu tALmeyinda parIkSisuvavaru mAtra bahaLa kaDime.

bhASAsahiSNute embudu nammalli beLeyabEkAdare, mukhyavAgi
bhASeya kuritu nammalliruva ajYAnavannu toDedu hAkuva avaSyakate
yide. bhASegaLalli kANisuva vayvidhyate bEre bEre kAraNagaLindAgi
avugaLalli taledOruva badalAvaNegaLa phala. Adare I vayvidhyate bhASe
gaLannADuva janara yOgyate, viSvAsArhate, buddhivantike, modalAduva
nnEnU pratibimbisuvudilla. ondE kuTumbada janaru dUradUrada
eraDu UrugaLalli paraspara samparkavillade halavu varSagaLaSTu kAla
uLidarAdare, avara bhASeyallU halavAru vyatyAsagaLu mUDibarade
iralAravu.

hIgiddarU, bhASe namma jIvanada ondu ati mukhya angavAgide.
hAgAgi, horagina prapancavannu nAvu hEge kANuttEve mattu
anubhavisuttEve embudara mEle svalpavAdarU namma bhASeya prabhAva
Agadiradu. haLadi baNNada kannaDakavannu dharisida vyaktige hEge ellA vastu


gaLU haLadi baNNadavAgi kANisuttaveyO hAgeyE ondu viSiSTavAda
bhASeyannADuvavarige horagina prapanca A bhASe adannu hEge tOri
suttadeyO hAge kANisuttade. namma AlOcane, anubhava ivella
bahaLamaTTige namma bhASeyallE naDeyuvuvAda kAraNa, ivugaLa
mElella namma bhASeya prabhAva iddE iruttade.

I ondu viSayavannu gamanadallirisikoLLadiddare, eraDu bEre
bEre bhASegaLannADuvavaroLage anavaSyakavAgi tappu tiLuvaLikegaLu tale
dOraballuvu. udAharaNegAgi, namma dESada ISAnya gaDipradESadalli
kanDubaruva halavAru samasyegaLige intaha bhASege sambandhisida ajYAna
mattu asahiSNutegaLU svalpamaTTige kAraNavAgiralu sAdhyavide.

namma bhASeya jYAna nammalli arivige eTakuvantahadu mattu
eTakadantahadu embudAgi eraDu bEre bEre staragaLalli sthApitavAgiru
ide. mAtanADuvAgalella nAvu nUrAru vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu
anavaratavAgi baLasuttiruttEve. I vyAkaraNa niyamagaLa jYAna namma
miduLinalli namma arivige eTakada sthitiyalli nelasiruttade. nAvu
ADuvantaha mAtannu gaNaka yantragaLu baLasuvante mADabEkiddalli
intaha nUrAru vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu kanDuhiDidu, avannella avuga
LoLage aLavaDisikoLLabEkAguttade. idarinda, namma dinanityada mAti
nallU intaha nUrAru niyamagaLa baLake namage tiLiyada hAge
naDeyuttiruttade emba viSaya spaSTavAguttade.

intaha arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAna mAtravallade arivige
eTakuva innondu rItiya vyAkaraNa jYAnavU nammallide. SAleyalli
nAvu kaliyuva vyAkaraNa jYAna intahadu. I arivige eTakuva
vyAkaraNa jYAnada sahAyadinda nAvu namma bhASeyalli halavu bageya
badalAvaNegaLannu mADikoLLaballevu. hosa hosa padagaLannu sxSTisi
adaralli baLasikoLLaballevu, mattu bEre bhASegaLinda namage bEkenisida
padagaLannu eravalAgi paDedukoLLaballevu. vAkyagaLa racaneyallU
sandarbhakke takkante, I vyAkaraNa jYAnada sahAyadinda, halakelavu
badalAvaNegaLannU nAvu mADikoLLaballevu.

Adare, kAladinda kAlakke namma bhASeyalli naDeyuva badalAvaNe
gaLalli heccinavU nammalliruva arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAnada
mUlaka naDeyuttave. avu yAra niyantraNakkU oLagAgade naDeyuva
badalAvaNegaLu. nirantaravAgi naDeyuva I badalAvaNegaLannu bhASA
panDitaru virOdhisuvarAdarU avannu taDeyuva Sakti yArigU illa.
nammalliruva arivige eTakuva vyAkaraNa jYAnada AdhArada mEle ivalli


kelavannu dUra irisuva prayatnavannEnO mADaballevu, Adare,
idarindAgi bhASe badalAgadiruvudilla. mAtina bhASe badalAguttA
iruttade, Adare barahada bhASe kelavu viSayagaLalli badalAgade uLidu
adakkU mAtina bhASegU naDuve kandakavondu ErpaDuttade.

nammalliruva I arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAna namage gottAgada
hAge namma dxSTikOnada mElU prabhAvavannu bIruttiruttade. I
viSayadalli vidvAmsaroLage bhinnAbhiprAyaviruvudEnO nija; Adare,
heccu heccu bhASegaLannu abhyAsa mADidantella I arivige eTakada
vyAkaraNa jYAnadalli bhASeyinda bhASege bahaLaSTu vayvidhyateyiralu
sAdhya emba viSaya beLakige baruttide. bhASeyembudu namma anubhava
mattu AlOcanA vidhAnagaLannu niyantrisaballudAdare, adaralli
kANisuva I vayvidhyateyU namma anubhava mattu AlOcanA
vidhAnagaLalli pratibimbitavAgaballudallavE?

bhASeya viSayavAgi nammalli beLedubandiruva ajYAnada svarUpa
entahadu embudannu I modalanE vibhAgada lEkhanagaLu paricaya
mADikoDuttave.

## 1.1 bhASegaLoLage kILu mElilla
sulabhavAda bhASe, kliSTavAda bhASe, kivigimpAda bhASe, kaThOravAda
bhASe, beLeyuttiruva bhASe, kADu bhASe endella bhASegaLa mEle
nUrAru viSESaNagaLannEnO nAvu hEruttEve; Adare, ivellavU
bhASeyannu kELuva illavE ADuva namma manassinalli mUDuva
viSESaNagaLallade bhASegaLoLage I rItiya kILumElilla. I mAtannu
bhASAvijYAnigaLu naDesiruva nUrAru samSOdhanegaLa AdhArada mEle
bareyalAgideyAdarU idannu heccinavarU sulabhadalli nambalArarembu
dantU nijavE.

## kaSTa-sulabha
yAva bhASeyU adannu tAynuDiyAgi ADuttiruvavarige kaSTavAgi
kANisuvudilla. bhASegaLallella kannaDavE atyanta sulabhavAdudu,
caynIs iddudarallella kaSTavAdudendu nAvEnO hELaballevu.
Adare, idE viSayavannu caynIs bhASeyannu ADuvavanobbanondige


hOgi kELi nODiri. Atanige khanDitavAgiyU kannaDakkinta jaynIsE
heccu sulabhavAda bhASeyendenisadiradu.

bAlyadalli nAvu ondu vidhavAda bhASeyannu ADalu kalitiruttEve.
A bhASegU, munde kaliyaliruva eraDaneya bhASegU naDuve
ententaha vyatyAsagaLive, mattu eSTu vyatyAsagaLive embudara mEle A
bhASe heccu illavE kaDime kliSTavAdudendu namage anisuttade.

kannaDa mattu tamiLu bhASegaLoLage halavAru viSayagaLalli sAmya
vide. hAgAgi, tamiLannu nAvu bahaLa sulabhavAgi kalitu artha
mADikoLLalu SaktarAguttEve. ingliSigU kannaDakkU naDuve intaha
samAnategaLu bahaLa kaDime. Adudarinda mUru nAlku varSa kalitarU
ingliS namma hiDitakke sikkuvudilla.

bhASeyondu sulabhavAdudu illavE kliSTavAdudu endenisalu
bEreyU kAraNagaLive. udAharaNegAgi, hindI bhaktarige adaralli
ondu vAkya sariyAgi ADalu bAradiddarU hindiginta sulabhavAda
bhASe jagattinalli yAvudU illavendu avaru sAruttiruttAre.

bhASeyondara mEle barediruva vyAkaraNa bahaLa kliSTavAgide
yAdarU A bhASe kliSTavAgideyendu adannu kaliyalu prayatnisu
vavarige anisaballudu. udAharaNegAgi, samskxta bhASeya mEle bahaLa
kliSTavAda, Adare atyanta uttamavAda vyAkaraNavannu siddhagoLisalAgide.
samskxta bhASeyannu I vyAkaraNada sahAyadinda kaliyalu prayatnisu
vavarige adu bahaLa kliSTavAda bhASeyendu anisadiradu.

kannaDakkU intahadE kliSTavAda vyAkaraNavannu tayArisi, adU
bahaLa kliSTavAda bhASeyendu adannu antaha vyAkaraNada mUlaka
kaliyalu prayatnisuvavarige annisuvante mADuvudu asAdhyavEnalla.

bhASegaLalliruva vibhaktigaLa sankhye, lingabhEdagaLu, padaniSpatti,
modalAda vyAkaraNAmSagaLa AdhArada mEle avugaLa sApEkSa kliSTate
yannu nirdharisalu bhASAvijYAnigaLu naDesida prayatnagaLellavU niSphala
vAgive. kaSTa, sulabha embudella vyaktiniSTha mAtra, bhASAniSTha
vallavendE I vidvAmsaru koneya nirdhArakke barabEkAyitu. ondu
bhASeya padaracane eSTondu sulabhavAgiruttadeyO adara vAkyaracane
aSTE kliSTavAgiyU iruvante kANisuttade. bhASegaLa ellA amSa
gaLannU oTTige gamanakke tegedukonDevAdare, kliSTateyalli avugaLoLage
heccu kaDimeyiralAradendE vidvAmsara abhiprAya.


## bhASeya impu
lAlitya, impu modalAdavugaLU vyaktiniSThavallade bhASAniSThavalla.
karnATaka sangItavannu kELi abhyAsavAgiruva dakSiNadavarige uttarAdi
sangItadalli impU illa, andavU illa. Adare uttarAdiyannu kELi
santOSapaDalu abhyAsavAdavarige karnATaka sangItadalli dakSiNadavarige
kANisuvantaha andavEnU kANisuvudilla.

bhASegaLallU hIgeyE. eLeya prAyadalli nAvu entaha samskAra
kkoLagAgiruvevO adannAdharisi ondu vidhada mAtu andavAgi
kELisuttade, mattu innondu vidhada mAtu karkaSavAgi kELisuttade.
sAmAnyavAgi ellarigU tammadE Ada tAynuDi kivigimpAgi kELisu
ttade.

## bhASeya beLavaNige
bhASegaLa mEle anavaSyakavAgi hEriruva innondu viSESaNavendare,
beLavaNige. bhAratada bhASegaLannella beLeyuttiruva bhASegaLendu kareyu
vudu rUDhi. I mAtannu rAjakAraNigaLu mAtravalla, vidvAmsarU
upayOgisuttiruvudu nijakkU SOcanIyavAda sangati. nijakkU
ivattu pracalitavAgiruva bhASegaLellavU pUrti beLediruva bhASegaLE.
avugaLalli kaDime beLedavugaLu mattu jAsti beLedavugaLu embudAgi
illavE prabuddhavAdavugaLu mattu aprabuddhavAdavugaLu embudAgi
vingaDisi hELuvudu asAdhya.

bhASegaLa huTTu hEgAgirabEkembudannu tiLiyalu vidvAmsaru
bahaLaSTu prayatna naDesiddAre mattu I viSayadalli halavAru grantha
gaLannu barediddAre. Adare I viSayadalli naDediruva vAda vivAda
gaLella niSpalagaLAgi uLididdu, I prayatnagaLellavU viphalagonDive.
atI hindinadennabahudAda bhASeyU Adhunika bhASeyaSTE prabuddha
vAgiruvante tOruvudE I vayphalyakke mukhya kAraNa.

prANigaLa illavE pakSigaLa kUginante mottamodalige kelavE kelavu
padagaLannoLagonDidda bhASe AmEle ondondAgi tanna padarASiyannu
beLesikonDu indina vistratavAda rUpavannu tALirabEkendu kelavaru
vAdisiruvarAdarU intaha vAdakke AdhAravEnU doretilla.


## girijanara bhASe
girijanara illavE kADujanara bhASegaLannu ardhambardhavAgi abhyAsa
mADida miSanarigaLu A bhASegaLalli halavAru kundukorategaLannu
kanDaru. avara matadante, I bhASegaLalli padagaLa sankhye kaDime; iruva
padagaLella kaNNige kANuva illavE kayge tagaluva vastugaLannaSTE
sUcisaballavallade avugaLa guNadharmagaLannu sUcisalAravu; A
bhASegaLa dhvanigaLu tIra kliSTavAdavugaLu, mattu avugaLa vyAkaraNagaLu
sAkaSTu balitukonDilla, ityAdi. anantara naDesiruva ALavAda abhyAsa
gaLu mAtra, ivellA abhiprAyagaLU tappembudannu spaSTavAgi tOrisi
koTTive.

udAharaNegAgi, pETeyalli vAsisuva janaru ayvattO, nUrO
maragiDagaLa hesarugaLannu aritiruvarAdare, girijanara mAtinalli intaha
hesarugaLa sankhye eraDu mUru sAviravAdarU irabahudu. pada
sampattu AyA bASeyannu baLasuva janara mukhya kasubannAdharisi bEre
bEre SAkhegaLalli vistarisiruttade. bestaravanobbana nenapinalliruvantaha
mInugaLa hesarugaLannu mattu avakke sambandhisiruva itara hesarugaLannu
sangrahisidare ondu padakOSavE siddhavAdItu. antU I ondu
viSayadalli yAva bhASeyannU kILendu kareyalu sAdhyavAgadu.

vyAkaraNada viSaya innondu tera. idara kliSTate illavE saraLate
beLavaNigeya vividha hantagaLannu sUcisuvudendu vAdisa horaTa
vidvAmsarella ondakkondu viruddhavAda hELikegaLannu koTTu nage
gIDAgiddAre. samskxtadante tIra kliSTavAda rUpAvaLigaLannu tOrisuva
bhASegaLE beLavaNigeya tuttatudiyannu muTTidavugaLendu hELu
vavarannu samskxtakkintalU nAlku pAlu jAsti rUpAvaLigaLannu
tOrisuva girijanara bhASegaLu dangugoLisive.

nAgarikarennisuva ingliS, phrenc modalAda janAngagaLa bhASe
gaLige I vikAsavAdadalli bahaLa keLagina sthAna doretItu! yAva
rItiya rUpAvaLigaLannU tOrisada 'sulabha'vAda bhASegaLE
beLavaNigeya tuttatudiyannu muTTidavugaLendu vAdisidalli, illU
nAgarikara bhASegaLannu mIri nillaballa girijanara bhASegaLive.

vyAkaraNagaLu beLavaNigeya bEre bEre hantagaLalliveyendu hELi,
idaralli bEre bEre vyAkaraNagaLa sApEkSa sthAnavEnembudannu nirdharisa
horaTa vidvAmsara prayatnavU hIge sampUrNavAgi niSpalagonDide
yendu hELabahudu. iduvarege bhASAvijYAnigaLa abhyAsakkoLagA


giruva ellA sAhajika bhASegaLa vyAkaraNagaLU paryAptagaLAgiyE
iruvudu kanDubandide. ivu talemArininda talemArige badalAguttira
bahudu, Adare, I badalAvaNeyannu beLavaNigeya hantagaLendu
kareyalu yAva AdhAravU iduvarege dorakilla.

## bhASe mattu vyAkaraNa
pratiyobba vyaktiyU tanna tAynuDiyannu kaliyuvAga oDahuTTidavara,
tAyitandeyara, mattu ATada geLeyara mAtugaLannu kELi kELi, avannu
artha mADikoLLalu mattu itararige arthavAguvante antahavE
mAtu gaLannu sxSTisikoLLalu atyanta paryAptavAda
'vyAkaraNa'vondannu racisikoLLabEkAguttade. I vyAkaraNavE A vyaktiya
bhASAjYAnavendu vidvAmsara abhiprAya. bhASeyannADuva vyakti
panDitanirali, pAmara nirali, nAgarikanirali, anAgarikanirali, intaha
paripUrNavAda vyAkaraNada sahAyavillade Atanige tanna bhASeyannu
upayOgisalu sAdhyavAgadu.

Adare, intahadondu vyAkaraNajYAna tannallideyendAgali, adara
svarUpaventadendAgali avanige tiLidilla. avanu mAtanADuvAga
nUrAru vyAkaraNa niyamagaLu baLakeyAguvuvAdarU, A niyamagaLu
entahavembudannu Ata vivarisi hELalAra. mAtanADuvAga avana
arivilladanteyE avana sahAyakke baruvante I vyAkaraNa jYAna avana
miduLinalli aDagi kuLitide.

tanna bhASeyalli iduvarege kELadE iddantaha mAtugaLannu racisi
ADidarU Ata arthamADikoLLaballa, mattu antaha mAtugaLannu Ata
tAnE racisikoLLaballa emba viSayadinda intahadondu vyAkaraNajYAna
avanalli iralEbEkendu nAvu UhisikoLLabEkAguttade. I vyAkaraNa
apUrNavAgiralAradu.

## 1.2 bhASegaLa huTTu-sAvu
maguvondu huTTi beLeyuttiruvante adara todalu nuDiyAgi huTTi,
beLedu, adu mudukanAgi sAyuvAga illavE bErAvudO kAraNa
dinda mUkanAguvAga naSisi hOguvantaha bhASe, ondu vidhadalli
adakke AdhAravAgiruvantaha vyaktiyondige huTTi sAyuvudendU


vAdisabahudu. Adare, A vyaktiyinda avana makkaLige, avarinda avara
makkaLige - hIge anavaratavAgi talemArininda talemArige sAguva idE
bhASe innondu vidhadalli naSvaravAgiruvudendU vAdisabahudu. bhASe
yondara huTTu-sAvugaLa praSne nijakkU iveraDu vAdagaLa naDuve
nintide.

yAvudE ondu bhASeyannu naSvaravAgisuvantaha ondu samAjada
nirantarate sAvu-nOvugaLindAgi kaDidu hOdalli, A samAjadoDane
adara bhASeyU naSTavAgi hOgalu sAdhyavideyembudannu gamanisa
bEku. udAharaNegAgi, amerikada mUla nivAsigaLalli baLakeyallidda
halavAru bhASegaLu A mUlanivAsigaLu nirnAmagonDAga avaroDa
neyE naSTavAgiruvudu kanDubaruttade. AsTrEliyAda mUla nivAsi
gaLallU idE paristhiti naDedide.

bhAratadallU halavAru guDDakADugaLalli vAsisuttidda janara bhASe
gaLu I rIti naSTavAgiruvudu, mattu naSTavAguttiruvudu kanDu
baruttide. ondu samAjavu tanna tAynuDiyannu biTTukoTTu
bErondu nuDiyannu baLasalu prArambhisidAgalU idE phalitAmSa
labhisuttade. udAharaNegAgi, dakSiNa kannaDa mattu uDupi jillegaLalli
vAsisuva koragaru tammadE Ada koraga emba bhASeyannADuttAre.
Adare, dakSiNa kannaDa jilleya dakSiNa bhAgadalli vAsisuva koragarella
tamma I koraga bhASeyannu biTTukoTTu tuLu bhASeyannE tamma
tAynuDi yannAgi aLavaDisikonDiddAre. uLidavarU idE dAri
hiDidalli, I koraga bhASe innonderaDu talemArugaLalli sampUrNa
vAgi naSisi hOgaballudu.

## tAynuDi
bhASegaLige kalpitavAgiruva innondu vidhada nASa illavE sAvige
samskxta bhASe atyuttama udAharaNe. sAmAnyavAgi pratiyondu
bhASeyallU halavAru prabhEdagaLu (upabhASegaLu) baLakeyalliruttave.
ivu bEre bEre pradESagaLalli pracalitavAgiruva prabhEdagaLirabahudu,
illavE bEre bEre jAtigaLalli athavA pangaDagaLalli pracalitavAgiruva
prabhEdagaLirabahudu. intaha prabhEdagaLalli yAvudAdarU ondu
prabhEdavu baravaNigeya prabhEdavendu parigaNisalpaTTu, sAhitya kxti
gaLalli baLakeyAguttade.


ADunuDiyAgi baLakeyAguva prabhEdagaLu kAladinda kAlakke
badalAgutta naDeyuvuvAdarU, I rIti baravaNigeyalli baLakeyAguva
prabhEda mAtra, bEre bEre kAraNagaLindAgi, kelavomme bahaLa kAlada
varegU jAsti badalAgade uLiyuvudide. A prabhEdadalli uttamavAda
sAhitya kxtigaLu racitavAgiddu, antaha kAryakke A prabhEdavannu
baLasuvudu anivAryavemba abhiprAya beLedu baruvudu intaha
kAraNagaLalli mukhyavAdudu.

kAlakramENa, ADunuDi mattu I barahada prabhEdagaLa naDuve avu
bEre bEre bhASegaLennuvallivaregU vyatyAsagaLErpaDuttave, mattu
krAntikArigaLa kayyalli I ADunuDiyU barahagaLalli baLakeyAga
toDaguttade. idara pariNAmavAgi, heccinavarigU sulabhadalli artha
vAguva ADunuDi haLeya kAladindalU pracAradallidda barahada
bhASeya sthAnavannu AkramisatoDaguttade. I AkramaNa sampUrNa
vAdAga, endare haLeya barahada prabhEdavannu baLasikoLLuvavara sankhye
kaDimeyAguttA hOgi, illavE illavennuvantAdAga, adu 'sattitu'
ennuva sthiti bandodaguttade.

samskxtada sthAnavannu adara ADunuDigaLAda prAkxta, hindi,
marAThi, gujarAti modalAdavugaLu AkramisikonDu, adannu barahadalli
(sAhitya racaneyalli) baLasuvavara sankhye kaDimeyAguttA hOguttide
yembudannE adu 'sAva'nnapputtideyendu varNisabahudu. idu
samskxta bhaktarige apriyavAgi kANisabahudAdarU nijavAda sangati.

## bhASeya huTTu
bhASegaLu hEge sattuhOgaballuvembudannu vivarisidaSTu sulabhavAgi
avu hEge huTTikoLLaballuvembudannu vivarisalu sAdhyavAgadu. ondu
bhASeyannu baLasuttiruva samAjavu bEre bEre kAraNagaLindAgi eraDu
bhinna bhinnavAda samAjagaLAgi oDedukonDAga, adu baLasuva
bhASeyU A eraDu samAjagaLalli bEre bEre dikkugaLalli badalAgutta
naDedu, konege eraDu bEre bEre bhASegaLAgi oDedukoLLalu
sAdhyavide. Adare, idarindAgi ondu bhASe eraDAyitendu hELa
bahudallade, hosadondu bhASe huTTikonDitendu vAdisuvudu kaSTa
sAdhya.

bhUmiya huTTannu mattu adaralliruva jIvarASigaLa vikAsavannu
susambaddhavAgi kalpisikoLLalu AturarAgiruvantaha jIva vijYAnigaLige


manuSyanalli mAtravE kANisikoLLuva bhASeyemba hesarina I viSiSTa
vAda samparka sAdhanavu hEge huTTikonDirabEkembudannu sariyAgi
pratipAdisalu sAdhyavAguvallivaregU samAdhAnavilla. I viSayadalli
huTTikonDiruva siddhAntagaLa mattu avugaLa mEle bareyalAgiruva
puTagaLa sankhyeyU I viSayaveSTu janapriyavAgittembudannu
spaSTavAgi sUcisuttade.

manuSyanalli mAtravE kANisuva I bhASe manuSyanu vikAsa
gonDu itara jIvigaLinda bErpaDuttidda samayadalli huTTikonDira
bEkendEnO vAdisabahudu. Adare bhASe bArada itara prANigaLalli
kANisikoLLuva yAva rItiya samparkasAdhanagaLU I huTTu hEgira
bahudembudannu tiLiyalu sahAyakavAguttilla.

bhASAvijYAnigaLU I viSayada mEle bahaLaSTu vAda vivAda
gaLannu naDesiddAre. makkaLalli, mudukaralli, santrastaralli, kivuDaralli,
bhASeyE bArada prANigaLalli -- hIge ellA kaDegaLallU bhASeya
ugamavannariyalu suLuhugaLEnAdarU doreyuvudE embudAgi
prayatnapaTTu huDukiddAre. mattu ivellA prayatnagaLU niSphalagaLAgu
tiruvudannu kanDu, I kelasa bhASAvijYAnigaLadE allavendu, athavA
idannu pUrtigoLisalu sAdhyavE illavendu halavu mandi vidvAmsaru
vAdisiddAre. I rItiya nirASAvAdakke kAraNavilla dilla.

## AdhAragaLa korate
indu baLakeyalliruva bhASegaLa AdhArada mEle, mattu namage
doretiruva atI prAcInavAda bhASAviSayaka avaSESagaLa AdhArada
mEle, halavAru mUlabhASegaLannu kalpisalAgide. Adare ivugaLalli
yAvudU Adhunika bhASegaLiginta avugaLa dhvaniyallAgali, vyAkaraNa
dallAgali svalpavU bhinnavAgilla. bhASeya ugamavu intaha kalpita
mUlagaLinda miliyagaTTale varSagaLaSTu hindinadAgirabEkembudE
idakke mukhya kAraNavirabahudu. A ugama hEgiddirabahudu embu
dannu UhisuvudakkU kUDa I kalpita mUlagaLalli sUcane doreyu
ttilla.

prapancadalliruva bEre bEre bhASegaLannu tulanAtmakavAgi abhyasisi,
bhASAvikAsada bEre bEre hantagaLalli avannu hancikoLLalu naDesida
prayatnagaLU idE rItiyalli niSpalagonDive. beLedantella ondu
bhASeya vyAkaraNa samskxta bhASeyalliruvante kliSTavAgutta naDeyuvu


dendu bhAvisuvavarige samskxtajanyagaLAda hindi, marAThi modalA
davugaLa illavE lyATin‌ninda beLedu banda phrenc, spyAniS
modalAdavugaLa vyAkaraNagaLu lalitavAguttiruvudu doDDa tale
nOvannE tandoDDide.

I vAdakke viruddhavAgi, bhASe beLedantella adara vyAkaraNa lalita
vAguttA hOguttadeyendu vAdisuvavarigU eduru nillaballa
nidarSanagaLu halavive. kliSTa-lalita embantaha viSESaNagaLu bhASegaLige
anvayisuvantahavE allavembudu Adhunika siddAntavAgiruvAga, I
mElina vAdagaLigella nijakkU yAva beleyU illa.

bhASeya ugamada kuritu vAdavivAdagaLannu naDesuttiruvavaralli
heccinavarU adu mottamodalige atyanta rUkSa rUpadalliddu, kramENa
adannADuva jana heccu heccu nAgarikarAdante avara bhASeyU
mellamellane pariSkxtagoLLutta indina viSiSTa rUpavannu taLedira
bEkendu bhAvisuttAre. bhASeya ugamavannu anukaraNAtmaka pada
gaLinda, prANigaLa kUgugaLinda, illavE bEre ati saraLavAda pada
gaLinda sAdhisalu ivaru prayatnisuttiruvudakke idE mukhya kAraNa.
Adare, jIvarASigaLa mattu avugaLa viSESaguNagaLa vikAsavu I rIti
sAvadhAnavAgi, svalpa svalpavE badalAgutta naDedirabEkendu vAdisuvu
dakke iduvarege yAva AdhAravU doretilla.

## dayvadattavAda vara
yAvudE ondu jIviya Antarika racaneyalli iddakkiddante viSiSTavAda
badalAvaNe naDedu, adu beLedubaruvAga hosa hosa cAturya
gaLannu kayvaSamADikoLLuvantaha navInavAdondu Saktiyannu paDedu
koLLalu sAdhyavide; mattu mAnavana vikAsadallAda intahadE ondu
Antarika badalAvaNeya phalavAgi bhASeyU huTTikonDirabahudendu
kelavaru samSOdhakaru abhiprAyapaDuttAre.

uNNuvudu, naDeyuvudu modalAda itara kAryagaLante
bhASeyU sAhajavAgi, vyaktiyobbana beLavaNigeya angavAgi mUDi
baruvantahadu, adannu yArU prayatna pUrvakavAgi kaliyabEkAgilla
mattu kalisabEkAgilla emba siddhAntavondannu I abhiprAyavannAdharisi
manDisalAgide. idu nijavAdare, bhASeyu mAnavanirmitavalla, dayva
dattavAdudu ennuva haLeya hELikeyu ondu maTTige sariyE endU
vAdisidantAdItu.


## 1.3 bhASegaLalli haLatu-hosatu
karNATakada karAvaLiya jillegaLalli nelesiruva havyaka, hAlakki, gavDa
modalAda kannaDavannADuva kelavu janAngagaLa mAtannu 'haLagannaDa'
vendu kareyuva kramavide. Adhunika barahada kannaDakkU I janara
mAtigU naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLu sumAru ondu sAvira varSagaLaSTu
hindina pampa-rannara kAlada kannaDavannu nenapige taruvudE idakke kAraNa
virabEku.

Adare, atyAdhunika kAladallE rUDhiyalliruva pracalita bhASArUpa
vondannu I rIti 'haLe'ya kAladdendu kareyuvudaralli SAstrIya
vAdantaha avcityavEnAdarU ideyE embudannu vicArisuvudu
avaSya.

## parivartaneya phala
kAladinda kAlakke bhASegaLu badalAguttA hOguvuvembudannu ellarU
ballaru. haLegannaDaviddaddu naDugannaDavAgiruvudu, mattu naDugannaDa
viddaddu hosagannaDavAgiruvudu idakkondu uttama udAharaNe. I
rIti parivartanegoLLuvAga, bhASeyalliruva padagaLa uccAraNeyalli
halavAru vyatyAsagaLu tOribaruttave. idallade, A bhASeya padagaLalli
kelavu rUDhiyinda biddu hOguttave, mattu avugaLa sthAnadalli hosa
hosa padagaLu nirmANagonDu rUDhige baruttave. nerehoreya bhASe
gaLindalU padagaLu eravalAgi bandu I bhASeyalli sErikoLLuttave.

hIge bEre bEre rItiyalli unTAguva badalAvaNegaLu ondu
pradESadalli naDeda hAge innondu pradESadalli naDeyuvudilla, ondu
jAtiyalli naDeda hAge innondu jAtiyalli naDeyuvudilla, ondu
pangaDadalli naDeda hAge innondu pangaDadalli naDeyuvudilla.
idarindAgi, Urininda Urige, jAtiyinda jAtige, mattu pangaDa
dinda pangaDakke ADumAtinalli vyatyAsagaLu mUDibaruttave.

haLegannaDada kAladinda hosagannaDada kAlakke barabEkAdare, intaha
halavAru badalAvaNegaLannu dATikonDu barabEku. I badalAvaNe
gaLalli kelavu iDI kannaDa nADannE vyApisikonDantahavugaLu. innu
kelavu kannaDa nADininda horage bEre bhASegaLigU habbidavugaLu. bEre


kelavu kannaDanADinoLage ondu pradESa, jAti illavE pangaDakke
mAtravE sambandhisiruvavugaLu.

udAharaNegAgi, haLegannaDa padagaLa Adiyalli baruva pakAravu
sumAru hattaneya SatamAnadalli hakAravAgi parivartitavAyitu. I
badalAvaNeya pariNAmavAgi, haLegannaDada pAl indu hAlu
endAgide, pattu embudu hattu endAgide, pOgu embudu
hOgu endAgide, peN embudu heNNu endAgide.

idE rItiyalli, haLegannaDadallidda a-La bhEda mattu a-ra
bhEdagaLu hosagannaDadalli illavAgive. Adare, ivugaLalli a-ra bhEda
kannaDada ellA prabhEdagaLallU naSTavAgilla. soligaru mattu baDagaru
baLasuva kannaDada prabhEdagaLalli I bhEda indigU uLidukonDide.

## karAvaLiyalli naDeyada badalAvaNegaLu
karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli mEle hELiruva badalAvaNegaLella
naDediveyAdarU, bEre kelavu badalAvaNegaLu naDedilla. udAharaNe
gAgi, kannaDada eraDu laghu akSaragaLiruva padagaLa modalaneya akSara
dalli baruva ekAra mattu okAragaLu, eraDaneya akSaradalli i illavE
u iddAga, anukramavAgi ikAra mattu ukAragaLAgi kannaDada heccina
prabhEdagaLallU badalAgive.

I badalAvaNeya pariNAmavAgi, hinde keDi endidda pada Iga kiDi
endAgide; beLe endiddudu biLiyAgide; kodi endiddudu kudi
yAgide, mattu sori endiddudu suriyAgide.

I badalAvaNe sumAru hattanE SatamAnada hottige naDedira
bEkendu vAdisalu SAsanagaLa AdhAravide. adakke hindina enTu-
ombattanE SatamAnada SAsanagaLalli edir 'idiru', pogu 'pugu >
hugu', tolu 'dana', periya 'hiriya' modalAda padarUpagaLu kANa
siguttiddu, avu I badalAvaNeyannu tOrisuttilla.

I badalAvaNe karAvaLiya havyaka, hAlakki, gavDa, modalAda kannaDa
prabhEdagaLallU naDedilla. udAharaNegAgi, havyaka kannaDadalli hosa
gannaDada biLi emba pada beLe endide, suli embudu soli endide,
uLi embudu baLi endide, mattu kuNi embudu koNi endide.
karAvaLiya itara kannaDa prabhEdagaLallU hIgeyE.


haLegannaDada eraDu rItiya padagaLallidda anusvAra hosagannaDada
eraDu bageya padagaLalli mAyavAgide. dAnTu embudu dATu
endAdudu, nAnTu embudu nATu endAdudu, illavE nUnku
embudu nUku endAdudu I badalAvaNegaLalli modalaneyadu;
mattu avunku embudu avuku endAdudu, tuLunku embudu
tuLuku endAdudu, kalinku embudu kaliku endAdudu, illavE
kADinge embudu kADige endAdudu eraDaneyadu.

karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli I eraDu rItiya padagaLallU
anusvAra lOpagonDilla. udAharaNegAgi, havyaka kannaDadalli
dAnTu, nUnku, kalinku, murunTu, kADinge modalAda padagaLu
mattu padarUpagaLu rUDhiyallive.

## karAvaLiyalli naDeda badalAvaNegaLu
intaha innU kelavu badalAvaNegaLu hosagannaDadalli, endare ivattina
barahada kannaDadalli naDediddu, karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLAda havyaka,
hAlakki, gavDa modalAdavugaLalli naDedilla. hIgenda mAtrakke, A
prabhEdagaLu 'haLeya'vendEnU siddhavAguvudilla. barahada kannaDada
hAge, mattu mElina badalAvaNegaLannu tOrisuva kannaDada itara
prabhEdagaLa hAge, I karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLU ivattu baLakeya
lliruvantaha 'hosa'gannaDagaLE.

idallade, bEre kelavu badalAvaNegaLu karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLalli
naDediddu, barahada kannaDadalli mattu itara kannaDada prabhEdagaLalli
naDedilla. udAharaNegAgi, padAdiya cakAra, jakAra, mattu gakAragaLa
anantara baruva akAravu havyakada halavu padagaLalli ekAravAgide,
Adare barahada kannaDadalli idu badalAgade hAgeyE uLidide.

I badalAvaNeya phalavAgi, hosagannaDada cappara embudu havyaka
dalli ceppara embudAgi kANisuttade, jari embudu jeri embudAgi
kANisuttade, mattu gadde embudu gedde embudAgi kANisuttade.

mUrakSarada padagaLalli modalinaveraDu laghuvAgiruvAga mUranE
akSara dvitvavAguvudu havyakadalli kANisuva, mattu barahada kannaDadalli
kANisadiruva innondu badalAvaNe. idarindAgi, barahada kannaDada
huDuku emba pada havyakadalli huDukku embudAgiyU, orate
emba pada oratte embudAgiyU, mattu hurupu emba pada
huruppu embudAgiyU kANisuttade.


## bahuvacanada pratyaya
I rIti kannaDada bEre bEre prabhEdagaLu avu tOrisuva badalAvaNe
gaLa maTTige bEre bErAgive. Adare, ivannAdharisi I prabhEdagaLannu
hosatu-haLatendu vingaDisuvudu mAtra sariyalla. havyakavu 'haLe
gannaDa'vendu adannu kELuvavarige anisuvudakke bahuvacana pratyaya
dalli naDeda (mattu naDeyadiruva) badalAvaNegaLu ondu mukhya
kAraNavennabahudu. I pratyaya haLegannaDadalli akArAnta padagaLa
munde 0gaL endittu. mara-marangaL, dESa, dESangaL moda
lAda padarUpagaLalli I pratyayada prayOgavannu kANabahudu.

Adhunika barahada kannaDadalli idara sonne mAyavAgi (mattu
koneya vyanjanakke ukAra sEri) maragaLu, dESagaLu embantaha
rUpagaLu siddhavAgive. idakke badalAgi, havyakadalli sonne uLidu
konDide, Adare LakAra mAyavAgide, mattu gakArada anantara baruva
akAra okAravAgi badalAgide. idarindAgi havyakadalli marango,
dESango embantaha rUpagaLu siddisive.

illi gamanisabEkAda viSayavEnendare, Adhunika barahada kannaDa
(illavE 'hosagannaDa') mattu Adhunika havyaka kannaDa - iveraDarallU
badalAvaNegaLu naDedive. Adare, ondaralli naDeda badalAvaNegaLu
innondaralli naDedilla. averaDarallU bEre bEre badalAvaNegaLu
naDedive aSTe.

hosagannaDavannu kELi abhyAsavAdavarige havyaka kannaDada bahuvacana
rUpadalli kANisuva sonneyannu kELidAga adu haLegannaDavira
bahudemba bhrame mUDuttade. Adare, baraha kannaDadalliruva mattu
havyaka kannaDadalli illadiruva LakAra baraha kannaDa haLeyadirabEkemba
bhrameyannu yAkO mUDisuttilla. baraha kannaDavannu modaligEnE
'hosa'gannaDavendu parigaNisiruvudE idakke kAraNavirabahudu.

## itara prabhEdagaLu
kannaDada itara prabhEdagaLannu gamanisidevAdare, avugaLallU idE rIti
kelavu badalAvaNegaLu heccige kANisuttave, mattu bEre kelavu
badalAvaNegaLu kANisuvudilla. udAharaNegAgi, maysUrina kelavu
prabhEdagaLalli padAdiya hakAragaLella biddu hOgive. hakki emba pada
akki endAgide, hAlu emba pada Alu endAgide, hELi emba pada
ELi endAgide.


ekArAntavAda dhAtugaLella I kannaDada prabhEdagaLalli ikArAnta
gaLAgive. bare, age, kare modalAdavugaLu idarindAgi bari, agi, kari
endAgive. Adare I kAraNakkAgi, maysUrina I prabhEdakkinta itara
prabhEdagaLu 'haLeya'vendu yArU vAdisuvudilla.

## padagaLa aLivu-uLivu
haLegannaDadallidda padagaLallU kelavu ondu prabhEdadalli uLidira
bahudu, mattu innondaralli aLidirabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, haLe
gannaDadallidda abbe (tAyi), kiccu (benki), pacce (hasiru) modalAda
padagaLu havyakadalli uLidive, mattu itara kannaDada prabhEdagaLalli
aLidive.

Adare, bEre kelavu padagaLu (udA: uguLu, teru, nOyu,
modalAdavugaLu) havyakadalli aLidive, mattu itara prabhEdagaLalli
uLidive. idarindAgi havyaka kannaDa ondu bhinnavAda prabhEdavendu siddha
vAguttadeyallade haLeyadendEnU siddavAguvudilla.

ondE bhASeyannADuva eraDu samAjagaLu eSTu samaya mattu
eSTu dUra ondarindondu bErAgiruttaveyO aSTaramaTTige
avugaLoLagina bhASAvyatyAsavU heccuttade. karAvaLiya kannaDigaru
uLida kannaDigarinda bErpaTTu sAvirakkintalU heccu varSagaLu kaLedira
bEkAddarinda, mattu I eraDu pradESagaLannu durgamavAda paScima
ghaTTagaLu bErpaDisuttidduvAddarinda, I eraDu pangaDagaLa nuDigaLu
bhinnabhinnavAgi beLedu bandive. idaralli haLetana-hosatanagaLa praSneyilla.

## 1.4 bhASA svAtantrya
konkaNi marAThiya prabhEdavE, athavA adakkinta bhinnavAda mattu
svatantravAda bhASeyE embudondu bahaLa maTTige kAvErisuva praSne.
bahaLa mandi idakke 'koneya' uttaravannu koDalu prayatnapaTTiruva
rAdarU I praSneyinnU praSneyAgiyE uLidide. mukhyavAgi rAja
kAraNigaLa maTTadallE naDediruva I vAda vivAdagaLeDeyalli halavAru
tarka vitarkagaLu mEleddive. ivugaLalli prastuta viSayakke svalpavU
sambandhavilladantaha vAdagaLE jAstiyAgiruvudarinda, avu 'kAva'
nnallade bErEnannU huTTisalAravu.


## lipiya bele
udAharaNegAgi, konkaNige tannadE Ada ondu lipiyillavAdudarinda,
adannu svatantravAda bhASeyendu parigaNisalu sAdhyavillavendu
vAdisuva mandi halavariddAre. karnATakadalli idannu kannaDa lipiyalli
bareyuttAre, gOvAdalli dEvanAgari illavE rOman lipiyalli
bareyuttAre, mattu kEraLadalli malayALa lipiyalli bareyuttAre.

Adare, ivara I tarkavannu oppikoLLalu sAdhyavideyAdare,
samskxta mattu hindI bhASegaLigiruva lipiginta bhinnavAda mattu tannadE
ennisikoLLabahudAda lipi marAThigU illavAdudarinda, adannU ondu
svatantra bhASeyendu hELalu sAdhyavAgadu. maNipuri bhASeyannu
bangAli lipiyayalli bareyalAguttade, mattu sindhi bhASeyannu
dEvanAgari, parsO-arEbik mattu rOman lipigaLalli bareya
lAguttade.

nijakkU nammalli bahaLa mandi bhASe mattu lipigaLoLagiruva
sambandhavannu sariyAgi artha mADikonDantilla. manuSyanigondu
phoTo iruva hAge bhASegondu lipi. phoTo tegesikoLLalillavemba
ondu kAraNakke mAtravE manuSyanobbana svAtantryakke illavE astitvakke
hEge dhakke baruvudillavO hAgeyE tannadE Ada lipiyillavemba
kAraNa mAtradinda bhASeyondara yOgyatege cyuti baruvudilla.

allade, jagattina lipigaLella mUrO nAlkO mUla lipigaLinda
beLedubandavugaLAddarinda, heccina bhASegaLU avu baLasuttiruva lipi
gaLannu ondalla ondu kAladalli bEre yAvudAdarondu bhASeyinda
eravalAgi paDedukonDiddiralE bEku. bhAratada lipigaLalli heccinavU
aSOkana kAlada brAhmI lipiyinda beLedu bandavugaLendu vidvAmsara
abhiprAyavide.

## sAhitya mattu bhASe
konkaNige niScitavAdondu sAhitya parampareyillavAddarinda adannu
svatantravAdondu bhASeyendu kareyalu sAdhyavillavendu vAdisuva
mandiyU kelavariddAre. Adare, I vAdavannu munde taruvavaru
bhASeya atI mukhyavAda kAryavEnembudannE maretantide. dinanityada
jIvanadalli obbana manassinalliruva ingitavannu innobbanige tiLisi
hELalu sAdhakavAgiruvantahadE bhASe. adannu baLasuttiruvavaru ibba
rirali, eraDu kOTi janarirali, sAhajavAgi beLedu bandiruva bhASe


gaLellavU I kAryavannu txptikaravAgi naDesaballuvu. I viSayadalli
samskxta mattu asamskxta janara bhASegaLoLage yAva vyatyAsavU
illa.

sAhitya racaneyembudu bhASegiruva amukhyavAda baLakegaLalli
ondu mAtra. manuSyanu tanna kaykAlugaLannu naDeyuvudu, uNNu
vudu, modalAda jIvanAvaSyaka kelasagaLige mAtravallade, kuNiyu
vudu, abhinayisuvudu modalAda kalAtmaka kAryagaLallU baLasikoLLa
ballanu.

hIgeyE, tanna bhASeyannU dinanityada vyavahAragaLalli mAtravallade
kate kaTTuvudu, kavite racisuvudu modalAda kalAtmaka kAryagaLallU
baLasikoLLaballanu. yAvudE ondu bhASeyalli intaha kalAtmaka kxti
gaLu racitavAgiveyE, athavA illavE embudu avannu racisaballa
vyaktigaLannu avalambisideyallade, avaru baLasuva bhASeyannalla.
pratibhAvantanAda vyakti yAva bhASeyannu kayge tegedukonDarU
adaralli mEru kxtigaLannu racisaballanu.

hAgAgi, bariya prabhEdavendu kareyabEkE, illavE svatantravAda
bhASeyendu parigaNisabEkE emba I praSnege uttara koDalu yAva
bhASeyallU AntarikavAda purAvegaLu sigalAravu. rAjakIya,
sAmAjika illavE cAritrika kAraNagaLindAgi bEre bEre bhASA
prabhEdagaLige bEre bEre rItiya mahatva labhisuttade.

hIge labhisida mahatvadindAgi, hosa hosa sannivESagaLalli prayukta
vAguvantaha sandarbhagaLu avugaLige baruttave. Adare, hIge viSiSTa
vAda kAryagaLalli prayuktavAgiveyAddarinda A bhASegaLallEnO
vaySiSTyavirabEkendu vAdisuvudakke mAtra antaha bhASegaLa abhyAsa
dinda iduvarege yAva AdhAravU doretilla.

## vyatyAsada parimANa
eraDu prabhEdagaLannu ondu bhASeya prabhEdagaLendu parigaNisuva
badalu, bEre bEre bhASegaLendu kareyalu avu eSTara maTTige bhinna
vAgirabEku embudu innondu praSne. idakkU kUDa, rAjakIya
illavE sAmAjika AdhAragaLa mEle uttara koDalu sAdhyavideyallade,
bhASAviSayaka AdhAragaLa mEle uttara koDalu sAdhyavAgadu.

udAharaNegAgi, hindi mattu urdugaLoLagina vyatyAsavannu
gamanisabahudu. kelavu viSiSTavAda padagaLannu biTTare, iveraDaroLage


bhASAviSayakavAda vyatyAsagaLEnU illa. AdarU rAjakIya mattu
sAmAjika kAraNagaLindAgi, mattu I eraDu bhASegaLige bhinna bhinnavAda
lipigaLiveyembudakkAgi, avannu bEre bEre bhASegaLendu parigaNisa
lAgide.

idakke vyatiriktavAgi, caynIs bhASeya prabhEdagaLAda mandArin,
kanTonIs modalAdavugaLa naDuve bahaLaSTu antaravide. avugaLalli
ondannu mAtanADuvavarige innondannu kELidAga svalpavU artha
vAgadu. AdarU avannella ondE bhASeya prabhEdagaLendu parigaNisa
lAguttide. idakke rAjakIya mattu lipi viSayaka AdhAragaLu mAtra
kAraNavallade, bhASA viSayaka AdhAragaLalla.

## cAritrika sambandha
konkaNi mattu marAThigaLoLage atyanta nikaTavAda cAritrika sambandha
vide. averaDU ondE mUladinda eraDu kavalugaLAgi oDedu
bandavugaLu. Adare, intaha cAritrika sambandhada AdhArada mEle avu
bhinna bhinna bhASegaLallavendu vAdisalu baruvudilla.

yAkendare, intahadE nikaTa sambandha bangAli mattu oDiyAgaLa
naDuve ide, tamiLu mattu malayALagaLa naDuveyU ide. Adare,
ivannu ondE bhASeya prabhEdagaLendu yArU vAdisuvudilla. illi
nAvu gamanisabEkAgiruva viSayavEnendare, eraDu samAjagaLalli
baLakeyalliruva mAtugaLu ondE nuDiya prabhEdagaLendu hELalu
avugaLa naDuve cAritrika sambandhaviralEbEku, endare averaDU ondE
nuDiyinda beLedubandirabEku. idallade, avu tumbA hattiravU
irabEku; Adare, mEle sUcisida hAge, eSTu hattira irabEku emba
praSnege sariyAda uttara koDuvudu kaSTa.

## prabhEdagaLa yOgyate
nijakkU konkaNi svatantra bhASeyE athavA marAThiya prabhEdavE
emba praSneya uttara konkaNiyannADuva konkaNigara kayyallide. tAvu
maneyallADuva mAtu sAhityaka bhASeyAgi virAjisabEkemba AkAnkSe
avarallideyAdare, avarE adannu A sthAnakke Erisaballaru.

idakke sAdhakavAgaballantaha Sakti illavE yOgyate konkaNigilla
vendu yArAdarU hELuvudiddare mAtra, antaha vAdavannu vayjYAnika


vAgiyE khanDisabahudu. yAkendare, sAhajavAgi talemArininda
talemArige sAgi bandiruva ellA bhASe mattu bhASAprabhEdagaLigU
intaha Antarika Sakti iddE iruttade. I viSayadalli bhASegaLoLage
kILumElilla. A Saktiyannu baLasi, uttamavAda sAhityaka kxtigaLannu A
bhASeyalli racisuvavaru adannADuva samAjadalli huTTi bandare sAku.

bhASegaLa caritreyalli I abhiprAyakke sAkaSTu nidarSanagaLU
doreyuttave. ondu kAladalli bariya hengasara mattu keLagina starada
janara bhASeyendu parigaNitavAgidda pAli mattu prAkxtagaLu bavddhara
mattu jaynara kayyalli kAvyagaLa racanegU SAstragaLa carcegU yOgya
venisuva nuDigaLAduvu.

avugaLindalE beLedu bandiruva bangAli, marAThi, hindi modalA
davugaLu ravIndranAtha, tuLasIdAsa modalAdavarindAgi indina
sAhityaka bhASegaLAgive. ondu kAladalli lyATin, phrenc‌gaLinda tuLisi
konDu, bahaLa hInAya sthitiyallidda ingliS bhASe indu
antarASTrIya bhASeyeniside. ivellA nidarSanagaLU bhASegaLannu kILu
-mElendu, svatantra-asvatantragaLendu vibhajisalu avugaLalli Antarika
vAda AdhAragaLEnU dorakalAravu embudannu spaSTamADikoDuttave.

## 1.5 bhASeyu tarkabaddhavEnu?
kannaDadalli mUru kAlagaLu, mUru vacanagaLu, enTu vibhaktigaLu
endella iveyendu varNisuttiruva namma vayyAkaraNigaLu bhASegaLella
tarkabaddhavAgi iruttave, illavE irabEku emba bhAvaneyanniTTu
konDantide. avaru mADida I tappinindAgi, vyAkaraNavembudu kannaDa
dalli kabbiNada kaDaleyAgide. kannaDadallillada enTu vibhaktigaLannu ive
yendu yArE hELali, kaliyuvudu asAdhya tAnE?

karNATakadalli mAtravalla, jagattina itara bhAgagaLallU vayyAkaraNi
gaLu I rItiya tappannu padE padE mADutta bandiddAre.

## kAlabhEda
kAlavembudu bhUta, vartamAna mattu bhaviSyat embudAgi mUru
vidhavendu vAdisabahudu. Adare, kAlada I vibhajane namma mAtige
sambandhisidudu: ondu ghaTaneyu adannu mAtina mUlaka tiLisi


hELuva samayadalli naDeyuttideyAdare adara kAla vartamAna; A
samayakkinta hindeyE adu naDedu hOgideyAdare adara kAla
bhUta; mattu adu A samayada anantara naDeyuvantahadAdare adara
kAla bhaviSyat. kAlavannu yAva rItiyallE Agali vibhajisabEkiddalli,
adakke I rIti ghaTaneyondara AdhAra bEkAguttade.

Adare I rIti mAtige sambandhisidante vingaDisi hELabahudAda
kAlabhEdavannu ellA bhASegaLU ondE rItiyAgi avugaLa kriyA
rUpagaLalli kANisabEkemba niyamavEnilla. kelavu bhASegaLu avugaLa
kriyArUpagaLalli kAlabhEdavannE tOrisuvudilla. namma dESada uttara
kkiruva maynmAr‌na barmIs bhASe intahadu. namma dESadallEnE
nAgAlEnDina kelavu bhASegaLallU (udA: khEjO bhASe) kAlabhEda
vannu tOrisuva kriyArUpagaLilla.

barmIs bhASeya kriyApadagaLalli avu tiLisuva ghaTaneya kAla
bhEdavannu sUcisuva badalu, avugaLa nayjateya kuritu mAtanADu
vavana anisikeyannu sUcisuttade. ondu ghaTane naDeyuvudu
illavE naDediruvudu nijavembudu Atana anisikeyAdare kriyApadada
ondu rUpavannu baLasalAguttade, mattu nijavallavembudu Atana
anisikeyAdare illavE A viSayadalli Atanige samSayavideyAdare
innondu rUpavannu baLasalAguttade.

kriyApadagaLalli kAlabhEdavannu tOrisuva bhASegaLU bEre bEre
bageyalli adannu tOrisaballuvu. udAharaNegAgi, antaha kelavu
bhASegaLalli kSaNika ghaTanegaLannu tiLisuva kriyApadagaLige vartamAna
rUpagaLiruvudilla.

kannaDadalli iru emba ondu kriyApadakke mAtra mUru
kAlarUpagaLive (iddAne, iruttAne mattu idda); Adare, kuDi,
tinnu, bILu, ODu modalAda uLida ellA kriyApadagaLigU eraDu
kAlarUpagaLu mAtra ive (kuDiyuttAne, kuDida; bILuttAne,
bidda). bILuvanu embantaha mUraneya rUpavU ideyendu
vyAkaraNa pustakagaLalli baredirabahudu (idakkanuguNavAgi iru emba
kriyApadakke iruvanu emba nAlkaneya rUpavannU koDabahudu);
Adare, I heccina rUpa kannaDadalli ondu heccina kAlarUpavAgi
baLakeyAguttilla.


## lingabhEda
prakxtiyalli lingavu pullinga, strIlinga, mattu napumsakalingavembudAgi
mUru vidhavAgideyendu vAdisabahudu. Adare idu bEre bEre
bhASegaLalli bEre bEre rItigaLalli vyaktavAguttade. avugaLalli kANisuva
lingabhEdakkU prakxtiyalliruva lingabhEdakkU yAva sambandhavU
illadiralu sAdhyavembudakke hindi, samskxta modalAda bhASegaLu
uttama udAharaNegaLu.

bhASegaLalli kANisuva lingabhEdagaLu sAmAnyavAgi nAmapadagaLa
vibhajanege sambandhisidavugaLu. ivugaLa sankhye mUrakkinta kaDimeyU
irabahudu, illavE jAstiyU irabahudu. banTU kuTumbakke sErida
Aphrikada kelavu bhASegaLalli nAmapadagaLu ippattakkintalU heccu 'linga
bhEda'gaLannu tOrisuttave.

## sarvanAmadalli vaySiSTya
namage paricitavAgiruva bhASegaLallella uttama, madhyama, mattu
prathama embudAgi mUru puruSabhEdagaLive. mAtanADuvavanu,
mAtannu kELuvavanu, mattu itararu embudAgi mAtige sambandhisi
dante mUvaru vyaktigaLannu sUcisuva I puruSa bhEda tarkabaddhavAdu
dendu namagEnO anisabahudu. Adare idakkinta heccina vayvidhyate
yannu tOrisuva bhASegaLU kelavive.

algonkiyan kuTumbakke sErida amerikAda kelavu bhASegaLalli
nAlkaneyadondu puruSavide. 'avanu avana (innobbana) tandeyannu
kareda' embantaha vAkyagaLalli baruva eraDu 'avanu'gaLannu I bhASe
gaLalli baruva eraDu prathama puruSagaLu pratyEkisuttave.

kannaDadalli nAvu emba padavannu 'nAvu mAtra', 'nAvu mattu
avaru', 'nAvu mattu nIvu', 'nAvu, nIvu, avaru, ellarU'
modalAda halavu bageya arthagaLalli baLasabahudu.

dakSiNa kannaDada havyakara mAtinalli nAvu emba padavannu ivu
gaLalli koneya eraDu arthagaLalli mAtra baLasalAguttade; 'nAvu
mAtra' illavE 'nAvu mattu avaru mAtra' embarthadalli engo
emba bErondu sarvanAmavannu baLasalAguttade. intahadE vyatyAsa
haLegannaDadallU ittu.


munDa kuTumbakke sErida bihArina santAli emba bhASeyalli
puruSa mattu vacanagaLa vyavasthe innaSTu kliSTavAgide. adaralli Ekavacana,
dvivacana mattu bahuvacanagaLembudAgi mUru vacanagaLiddu, dvivacana
dalli nAvibbaru, endare 'nAnu mattu avanu', 'nAnu mattu nInu',
'nIvibbaru', 'avaribbaru' embavannella bEre bEre sarvanAmagaLa
nnupayOgisi tiLisabahudu. bahuvacanadallU 'ninnannuLidu nAvu
mAtra', 'nAvella', 'nIvella', 'avarella' endella pratyEka pratyEkavAgi
tiLisabahudu.

## nAlku vacanagaLu
vacanagaLa sankhyeyAdarU hIgeyE. mUru vacanagaLiruvudarinda
samskxtakkondu vaySiSTya baruvudilla; eraDE iruvudarinda kannaDakke
kundU baruvudilla.

linnATOn dvIpadalli vAsisuva kADujanara bhASeyalli Ekavacana,
dvivacana, trivacana mattu bahuvacana embudAgi nAlku vacanagaLive.
phijiyan bhASeyalli halavaru embudannu sUcisuva bahuvacana
vallade, kelavaru embudannu sUcisuva innondu vacanavU ide.

idakke viruddhavAgi, mEksikOda tarahumara bhASeyalli Ekavacana
mattu bahuvacana emba bhEdavU kANisuvudilla. adaralli iruvudu
ondE vacana. bahutvavannu sUcisabEkAdAgalella I bhASeyannADuva
janaru sankhyeyannupayOgisuttAre.

## gaNanA paddhati
nammalli baLakeyalliruva daSamAmSa paddhatiyu atyanta tarkabaddhavAda
gaNanApaddhatiyendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaDuttAre. I abhiprAyadalli
tappEnU illa. Adare idakke namma bhASegaLu sankhyegaLalli daSamAmSa
paddhatiyannu baLasuttiruvudE kAraNavembudannu mareyabAradu.

ondu, eraDu, mUru embudAgi lekka hAkuvAga, nAvu namma
bhASegaLalli I eNikeyannu hattakke nillisi, anantara hannondu,
hanneraDu embudAgi mundakke hOguttEve, enTakke nillisi
enTondu, enTeraDu endAgalI illavE aydakke nillisi aydondu,
ayderaDu endAgalI mundakke hOguva aSTamAmSa illavE


pancamAmSa paddhatiyannu nAvu anusarisuvudilla. hAgAgi, daSamAmSa
paddhati namma bhASegaLa maTTige mAtra tarkabaddhavAdudu.

Adare, bhASegaLellavU eNikeyalli I rIti daSamAmSa paddhatiyannE
anusarisabEkendEnilla. aSTamAmSa paddhatiyannO pancamAmSa paddhati
yannU anusarisalU sAdhyavide, mattu intaha bhASegaLannADuvavarige
daSamAmSa gaNanApaddhati tarkabaddavAgalAradu.

udAharaNegAgi, assAmina bODO janAngadavaru tamma bhASe
yalli sankhyegaLannu nAlkakke nillisi anantara nAlkondu, nAlayraDu
embudAgi munduvariyuttAre. ivara bhASeyalli hattu ennabEkiddare
'eraDu nAlkugaLu mattu eraDu' endu hELabEku.

## eraDu niSEdhagaLiddarU niSEdhavE
eraDu niSEdha padagaLannu ondu vAkyadalli prayOgisidevAdare,
adakkiruva niSEdhArtha mAyavAgi ide emba artha baruttade emba
vAda (udAharaNegAgi, kannaDadalli illavendilla endare ide emba
artha baruttade embudu) namagEnO tarkabaddhavAgi tOrabahudu.
Adare phrenc mAtanADuvavanobbana hattira hOgi kELi nODidare,
idakke viruddhavAda abhiprAya dorakItu. eraDu niSEdhArthaka pada
gaLiddarU vAkyada artha niSEdhavAgiyE uLiyaballudendu Ata
vAdisabahudu. yAkendare, phrenc bhASeyalli intaha prayOgagaLu
kANasiguttave. tarkabaddhateyembudu bhASeyannavalambideyallade bhASe
adannavalambisilla.

## bhASeya svacchandate
jarmaniyavanobba hELidanante, 'I phrencaru nijakkU tIra vicitra
manuSyaru. yAkendare, avaru roTTiyannu DuvE endu kareyu
ttAre. idu huccutanavallade mattEnu? yArEnE kareyali, nija
vAgiyU adu brOT endu entaha humbanigU gottide'
(jarman bhASeyalli roTTige brOT endu hesaru).

bhASeya svacchandateyannu mElina kate bahaLa sundaravAgi vivarisu
ttade. ondu vastuvannu nAvu angi endu kareyuttEve. illi A vastu
vigU mattu angi emba padadalli baruva akAra, anusvAra, gakAra
illavE ikAragaLigU naDuve nEravAgi yAva tarada sambandhavU illa.


namma hiriyaru A vastuvannu angi endu karedaru, adannu kELi nAvU
hAgeyE kareyuttiddEve.

vastuvigU adannu hesarisuva padakkU naDuve sahajavAda sambandha
videyAdare, kannaDada angi embudu ingliS‌nalli SarT AgalAradu,
illavE hindiyalli kamIj AgalAradu. pada mattu arthagaLa
naDuviruva sambandha I rIti rUDhimUlavAdudu. I rUDhi illavE
parampare bhASeyinda bhASege bEre bErAgiruttade.

padagaLannu sErisi vAkyagaLannu mADuva kramavU idE rIti bhASe
yinda bhASege bEre bErAgiruttade. illU kUDa sAkaSTu vayvidhyatege
eDeyiddu, ondu bhASeya vyAkaraNa (endare vAkya racaneya vidhAna)
innondu bhASeya vyAkaraNakkinta tIra bhinnavAgiralu sAdhyavide.
idaralli ondu sari, innondu tappu illavE ondu innondakkinta
uttama endu vAdisuvudendare, mEle jarmaniyavanu phrAnsinavana
mAtannu hIgaLedantallade bErEnalla.

## 1.6 vartamAna kAla
kAlavembudu anavaratavAgi sAguttalE iruttade. adannu bEre bEre
tuNukugaLAgi oDeyalu, mattu A tuNukugaLannu bEre bEreyendu
gurutisalu kAladalli jaraguva ghaTanegaLannu nAvu baLasikoLLabEkAgu
ttade. gaDiyArada muLLugaLa calaneyannAdharisi kAlavannu nAvu sekenDu,
miniTu mattu ganTegaLAgi oDeyuttEve, mattu gaDiyAradalliruva
doDDa muLLu mattu saNNa muLLugaLu yAva ankeya munde nintive
embudannAdharisi, intiSTanE ganTeya intiSTanE miniTu embudAgi A
tuNukugaLallondannu gurutisuttEve.

idE rItiyalli sUryana calaneyannAdharisi kAlavannu dinagaLAgi
mattu dinada bhAgagaLAgi oDeyuttEve mattu A bhAgagaLannu beLagge,
madhyAhna, sanje, rAtri ityAdiyAgi gurutisuttEve. idallade, dina
gaLannu vAra, tingaLu mattu varSagaLalli jODisuttEve mattu avakke
tArIku, vAra, tingaLu mattu isavigaLa hesaru koTTu gurutisuttEve.

kAlavannu I rIti oDedu hesarisuva vidhAna hindina kAladalli
UrindUrige bEre bErAgittu. Adare Ivattu nAvella kayge vAcu


kaTTi, gODege kelenDar tUga hAki, prapancadalliruvavarellarU ondE
vidhAnavannanusarisuva hAgAgide.

## vyAkaraNadalli kAla
Adare, vyAkaraNadalli kANisuva kAlada vibhajane idakkinta tIrA bhinna
vAdudu, mattu bhASeyinda bhASegU bhinnavAgiruvantahadu. ellA
bhASegaLU ondE rItiya kAlavibhajaneyannu baLasidare uttama endu
nAvu bhAvisabahudu, Adare, hAge baLasuvante mADalu yArigU
sAdhyavAgadu.

idakke kAraNavEnendare, bhASeyannu baLasuvavarige tAvu tamma
bhASeyalli kAlada vibhajanegAgi entaha vidhAnavannu baLasuttiruttEve
embudE tiLidiruvudilla. adara baLake avara arivige eTakada rUpadalli
naDeyuttiruttade. vayyAkaraNigaLu tAvu varNisuva bhASeyalli kAlada
baLake hEgide embudannu pariSIlisuva mUlaka tiLiyaballarAdarU,
avarU adannu tamma arivige eTakada rUpadallEnE baLasabEkAguttade.

## kannaDada eraDu vidhAnagaLu
kannaDada maTTige hELuvudAdare, nAvu kAlada vibhajanegAgi eraDu bEre
bEre vidhAnagaLannu anusarisuttEve. ivugaLalli modalaneya vidhAnada
mUlaka nAvu ondu ghaTaneya kAla yAvudembudannu sUcisuttEve,
mattu innondu vidhAnada mUlaka eraDu ghaTanegaLa naDuve kAlada
maTTige entaha sambandhavideyembudannu tiLisuttEve.

ondu ghaTane adannu varadi mADuva samayakkinta modalu naDe
dirabahudu illavE adara anantara naDeyalirabahudu. I vyatyAsavannu
sUcisuvudakkAgi kannaDada kriyApadagaLigella eraDeraDu kAlarUpagaLive.
udAharaNegAgi, 'rAju pETege hOgu'va ghaTane adannu varadi
mADuva samayakkinta modalE naDedideyAdare, adannu sUcisalu
hOda emba rUpavide mattu anantara naDeyaliruvudAdare hOgu
ttAne emba rUpavide.

eraDu ghaTanegaLa naDuve mUru rItiya sambandhagaLiraballuvu:
ondu ghaTane innondu ghaTaneya modalu naDedirabahudu, anantara
naDedirabahudu, illavE averaDU oTTige ondE kAladalli naDediraba
hudu (athavA naDeyalirabahudu). idannu sUcisuvudakkAgi eraDu


ghaTanegaLalli modalaneyadannu sUcisuva kriyApadakke kannaDadalli
mUru rUpagaLive.

udAharaNegAgi, 'tinDi tinnuva' ghaTane mattu 'manege hOguva'
ghaTanegaLa naDuviruva I mUru rItiya sambandhagaLannu sUcisuvu
dakkAgi avugaLalli modalinadannu sUcisuva kriyApadavannu mUru
bEre bEre rUpagaLalli baLasaballevu:

1. (1) jAnaki tinDi tindu manege hOguttALe.
2. (2) jAnaki tinDi tinnuttA manege hOguttALe.
3. (3) jAnaki tinDi tinnalu manege hOguttALe.

mElina vAkyagaLalli 'tinDi tinnuva' ghaTaneyannu tindu, tinnuttA
mattu tinnalu emba mUru kriyArUpagaLa mUlaka sUcisalAgide
embudannu gamanisabahudu.

kannaDadalli I rIti ghaTanegaLannu sUcisuva ellA kriyApadagaLigU
kAlavannu sUcisuvudakkAgi eraDu pUrNa rUpagaLive mattu mUru
apUrNa rUpagaLive. pUrNarUpagaLa mUlaka ondu ghaTaneya
samayavannu adannu varadi mADuva samayakke sambandhisidante sUcisu
tEve, mattu apUrNa rUpagaLa mUlaka samayada maTTige eraDu
ghaTanegaLa naDuviruva sambandhavemhadu embudannu sUcisuttEve.
ivu samayavannu sUcisuvudakkAgi kannaDadalli baLakeyAguva eraDu
vidhAnagaLu.

## iru kriyApadada vaySiSTya
iru emba ondu kriyApadakke mAtra kannaDadalli (idda, iruttAne
mattu iddAne embudAgi) mUru bEre bEre kAlagaLannu sUcisuva
pUrNarUpagaLive. ivu varadi mADuva samayakkinta modalu, adara
anantara, mattu adE samayagaLalli kANisuva iruvikegaLannu sUcisu
ttave.

iru embudu ondu ghaTaneyannu sUcisuva badalu 'iruvike'
emba ondu sthitiyannu sUcisuttiruvudE adakke I rIti mUru
pUrNarUpagaLiruvudakke kAraNavirabEku. (idallade, itara kriyApada
gaLa hAge iru embudakkU iddu, iruttA mattu iralu embudAgi
mUru apUrNa rUpagaLive).


## vartamAna kAla
ondu ghaTane adannu varadi mADuva samayadallEnE naDeyuttide
embudannu sUcisalu kannaDadalli viSiSTavAda 'vartamAna' kAlada kriyA
rUpavilla. hAgAgi, I arthavannu sUcisabEkAdAga nAvu ondu
ghaTanegU adara iruvikegU naDuviruva sambandhavannu sUcisuvantaha
baLasudAriyannu hiDiyabEkAguttade.

udAharaNegAgi, 'rAju hOguva' ghaTane adannu varadi mADuva
samayadallEnE naDeyuttide embudannu sUcisabEkiddalli rAju
hOguttA iddAne (illavE hOguttiddAne) embudAgi hOgu
vikegU iruvikegU naDuviruva sambandha ondE kAladdu (mattu A
iruvike Iginadu) embudAgi apUrNarUpa mattu pUrNarUpagaLa
jODiyannu baLasabEkAgide.

## kAlabhEda tOrisada padagaLu
bal mattu Ar emba eraDu kriyApadagaLige kannaDadalli kAlavannu
sUcisuva pratyayavannu sErisalu sAdhyavAgadu (mADaballe, hOga
lAre, modalAda prayOgagaLalli avugaLa munde kAlapratyaya bandilla
embudannu gamanisabahudu). ivu ghaTaneyannu sUcisuva badalu,
ghaTaneyalli toDagalu vyaktiyobbanigiruva (athavA illadiruva)
'sAmarthya'vannu sUcisuttave. ivakke nEravAgi kAlabhEdavannu
sUcisuva Saktiyilla. hAge sUcisabEkAdalli, mADaballavanAgidde,
mADaballavanAguttEne embantaha prayOgagaLalli kANisuva hAge,
baLasudAriyannu hiDiyabEkAguttade.

## mUru kAlagaLu
kannaDada vyAkaraNagaLallella sAmAnyavAgi bhUta, vartamAna mattu
bhaviSyat embudAgi mUru kAlagaLiveyendu, mattu ivannu sUci
suvudakkAgi kannaDadalli banda, baruttAne mattu baruvanu embantaha
mUru kriyArUpagaLiveyendu hELuvudu rUDhi.

Adare I mUru kriyArUpagaLalli baruvanu embantaha rUpa
gaLannu kannaDada kelavu barahagAraru mAtra baLasuttiddAre; mattu hAge
baLasiruvallU avakke baruttAne embantaha rUpagaLa arthavE iruva
hAge kANisuttade.


haLegannaDadallU 'vartamAna' rUpavembudAgi vayyAkaraNigaLu
hELuva mADidapam, ettidapam embantaha rUpagaLu hosagannaDada
mADuttA iddAne (mADuttiddAne), ettuttA iddAne emba
rUpagaLa hAge, mEle vivarisida eraDu vidhAnagaLa sErikeyinda
(endare apUrNa mattu pUrNa kriyArUpagaLa sErikeyinda)
tayArAda rUpagaLallade, ondE vidhAnadalli tayArAda (ondE kriyA
padada) rUpagaLalla.

udAharaNegAgi, mADidapam embudaralli mADida emba
apUrNa kriyArUpada mUlaka mADuva ghaTanegU Aguva ghaTanegU
naDuviruva sambandhavannu sUcisalAgide, mattu apam (appam) emba
bErondu kriyApadada pUrNa kriyArUpadada mUlaka Aguva ghaTane
naDeyuvudu (endare mADuva ghaTane konegoLLuvudu) varadi
mADuva samayada anantara embudannu sUcisalAgide.

idallade, haLegannaDadalli I kriyArUpavannu vartamAnArtha mattu
bhaviSyadarthagaLemba eraDu arthagaLallU baLasalAguttittu; udAharaNe
gAgi, pampana kAvyagaLalli I kriyArUpagaLa baLakeyannu gamanisidAga
I viSaya spaSTavAguttade (nanna nijakkU haLegannaDa vyAkaraNa
entahadu? pustakavannu nODi); haLegannaDada va rUpakkU intahadE
baLakeyide; adannU vartamAnArtha mattu bhaviSyadarthagaLemba eraDu
arthagaLallU baLasalAguttittu. hAgAgi, haLegannaDada dapa mattu va
rUpagaLa naDuvina vyatyAsa kAlada vyatyAsavE alla endu hELabEkAgu
ttade.

## maNipuriyalli kAlabhEda
kAlavannu vibhajisuva vidhAna, mattu adannu kriyApadagaLa mUlaka
sUcisuva vidhAna, mEle tiLisida hAge, bEre bEre bhASegaLalli bEre
bErAgiruttade. udAharaNegAgi, maNipuri bhASeyalli kAlavannu sUci
suvudakkAgi kannaDadalliruva hAge eraDu pUrNa kriyArUpagaLive
yAdarU avugaLa baLake kannaDada kriyArUpagaLa baLakeginta bhinnavAgide:

kannaDadalli Iga naDeyuttiruva mattu munde naDeyaliruva ghaTane
gaLannu oTTu sErisi ondu kriyArUpada mUlakavU, hinde naDedidda
ghaTanegaLannu innondu kriyArUpada mUlakavU sUcisalAguttade;
Adare, maNipuri bhASeyalli hinde naDedidda mattu Iga naDeyu
tiruva ghaTanegaLannu oTTu sErisi ondu kriyArUpada mUlakavU,


munde naDeyaliruva ghaTaneyannu bErondu kriyArUpada
mUlakavU sUcisalAguttade.

## mUru dxSTikOnagaLu
samayavannu sUcisuva vidhAnagaLa baLakeyalli bhASegaLa naDuve
kANisuva ondu prAmukhyavAda vyatyAsavEnendare, avu ghaTanegaLa
samayavannu ondE dxSTikOnadinda pariSIlisuvudilla.

kannaDa, maNipuri, ingliS modalAda bhASegaLu varadi mADuva
samayakkU ghaTane naDeyuva samayakkU naDuviruva sambandhakke
prASastra koDuvuvAdare, samskxta, hindi, marAThi, mAlTIs, hOpi
modalAda bhASegaLu ghaTanegaLa Antarika kAlavyavasthege, endare avu
sampUrNavO, asampUrNavO, kSaNikavO, nirantaravO, omme
naDedavugaLO, halavu bAri naDedavugaLO embantaha viSayagaLige
heccina prASastra koDuttave.

idallade, ghaTaneya yathArthatege (adu nijakkU naDedideyE
athavA illavE, naDedideyennalu entaha purAvegaLive mattu adu
naDeyuvante mADuva SaktigaLu entahavu embantaha viSayagaLige)
prASastra koDuva bhASegaLU halavive.

udAharaNegAgi barmis‌ bhASeya kriyApadagaLige eraDu rUpa
gaLiddu, ivu ghaTane yathArthavE athavA allavE embudannu sUcisu
ttave. naDediruva ghaTane mattu naDeyuttiruva ghaTane iveraDannU ondu
kriyArUpa sUcisuttade, mattu naDeyaliruva ghaTane mattu naDedira
bahudAda (Adare I viSayadalli samSayaviruva) ghaTane iveraDannu
eraDaneya rUpa sUcisuttade.

I rIti kriyArUpagaLa mUlaka kAlasambandha illavE kAlavyavasthe
yannu sUcisuva badalu, ghaTaneya yathArthateyannu sUcisuva bhASe
gaLU halavive. 'senekA'dantaha amerikAda uttara irokviyan bhASe
gaLu, 'munA'dantaha pOlinESiyan bhASegaLu, 'kayAradil'nantaha
AsTrEliyAda bhASegaLu, 'manAm'nantaha OSiyAnik bhASegaLu
intahavu. (jAsti vivaragaLige 1999ralli am‌sTar‌DAmina jAn
benjamins kampeni prakaTisida nanna pustaka The Prominence of Tense,
Aspect and Mood emba pustakavannu nODabahudu).

illi ondu viSayavannu nAvu nenapinallirisikoLLuvudu avaSya.
tArkikaru namma mundirisuva niyamagaLu ellA kAlakkU mattu ellA


pradESagaLigU ondE rItiyalli anvayisuvantaha niyamagaLu. avu
ellA bhASegaLigU samAnavAgi anvayisuttave.

Adare, vyAkaraNada niyamagaLu ivakkinta tIra bhinnavAgiddu, ondu
bhASeya ondu prabhEdakke mAtra anvayisuvantahavugaLu. haLegannaDada
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLalli halavu hosagannaDakke anvayisalAravu, mattu
hosagannaDada halavu niyamagaLu hindigAgali, marAThigAgali, samskxta
kkAgali anvayisalAravu.

ellA bhASegaLigU mUru kAlagaLannu sUcisuva avaSyakateyide,
hAgAgi, ellA bhASegaLallU kriyApadagaLige mUru kAlarUpagaLira
bEku endu vAdisuvavaru tArkika niyamagaLigU vyAkaraNa niyama
gaLigU naDuviruva I vyatyAsavannu gamanisilla embudu spaSTa.

vyAkaraNagaLa maTTigantU intaha niyamagaLannu hAkalu sAdhyavE
illa. yAkendare, ghaTanegaLa samayakkU avannu varadi mADuva
samayakkU naDuve entaha sambandhavide embudannu kriyApadagaLa
mUlaka nEravAgi sUcisadE iruvantaha (tenseless) halavu bhASe
gaLive. ivu kriyArUpagaLa mUlaka ghaTanegaLa kAlavyavasthe illavE
yathArthateyannu mAtravE sUcisuttave.

## 1.7 eNikeyallU vayvidhyavide
lekka hAkuvAga nAvu ondu, eraDu, mUru, nAlku ityAdiyAgi
hattaravarege eNisi, anantara hannondu 'hattara ondu', hanneraDu
'hattara eraDu', hadimUru 'hattara mUru' embudAgi punaH onda
rinda surumADuttEve. I rIti namma eNike hattu hattara gumpugaLalli
sAguttade.

intaha hattu gumpugaLa doDDa gumpige nUru emba hesaru
koDuttEve. hIge sAguva namma eNike hattara paddhatiyadu. (namma
ombattu emba padakke mAtra 'hattarinda ondu kaDime' emba
mUlArthavide.)

ingliS, hindi, marAThi modalAda halavAru bhASegaLalli idE
hattara paddhati jAriyallide. Adare eNikegaLellavU intahadE hattara
paddhatiyalli sAgabEkemba niyamavEnilla. eNikeya gumpugaLannu


hattaralli mADuva badalu idaralli mADabahudu, illavE ippatta
rallU mADabahudu.

## nAlkara paddhati
assAminalli vAsisuva kasAri janAngadavara boDo (illavE boro)
bhASeyalli nAlkara paddhati kANasiguttade. I bhASeyalli ondu, eraDu,
mUru, nAlku embudAgi nAlkara varege lekka hAki, mundakke
ondnAlkara ondu (endare aydu), ondnAlkara eraDu (endare Aru),
ondnAlkara mUru (endare ELu) mattu eraDAlku (endare enTu)
ityAdiyAgi eNike sAguttade. hannondu ennalu I bhASeyalli
eraDAlkara mUru ennabEku, hadinAlku ennalu mUrnAlkara eraDu
ennabEku, ityAdi.

boDO bhASeyalli aydakkU ondu pada ideyAda kAraNa, I
nAlkara paddhatiyalli ippattara varege lekka hAkalu baruttade; adakkinta
heccina eNikeyannu naDesalu, adakke hosadondu paddhati bEkAguttade.
idakkAgi nammalli nUrara paddhatiyiruvante, bODO bhASeyalli
ippattara paddhatiyide.

I paddhatiyante, ippattAru ennalu 'ondippattu ondnAlkara eraDu'
ennabEku. 'mUrippattu mUrnAlkara ondu' endare eppattamUru (3
x 20) + (3 x 4) + 1 endAguttade. intaha eNike nammadarinda
toDakAdudendu namage tOrabahudu, Adare bODO bhASeyalli
mAtanADuvavarige nammalliruva hattara paddhatiginta avara nAlkara
paddhatiyE lEsendu anisadiradu.

## eNisuva vastugaLa sUcane
bODO janara eNikeyalli I vaySiSTya mAtravallade bEreyU
kelavu vaySiSTyagaLive. udAharaNegAgi, avarige namma hAge ondu,
eraDu, mUru, nAlku embudAgi bariya ankegaLannu eNisuvudE
tiLiyadu. hAge ankegaLannu baLasabEkAgi bandAgalella, avaru yAva
rItiya vastugaLanneNisuttiddEve embudannU kaDDAyavAgi tiLisabEku
embudAgi avara bhASeyalli ondu vyAkaraNa niyamavide. idu avara
bhASeya eNikeyalli tOruva innondu vaySiSTya.


udAharaNegAgi, avaru eNisuttiruvudu haNNu, cenDu, kaNNu
modalAda uruTAgiruva padArthagaLannAdare, A eNikeyalli prati
salavU tAy emba padavannu sErisikoLLabEku; idara badalu pustaka,
kAgada, ele, rekke muntAda cappaTeyAda padArthagaLannu eNisabEkAgi
bandAga, gAj emba padavannu sErisikoLLabEku; janarannu lekka
hAkuvAga kA emba padavannu sErisabEku, prANigaLannu lekka hAkuvAga
mA emba padavannu sErisabEku, ityAdi.

idarante, ondnAlkara ondu endu hELidare I bhASeyalli adakke
yAva arthavU illa; hAge avaru hELuvudU illa. ondnAlkara mA
ondu endare aydu prANigaLu endAguttade; ondnAlkara tAy
ondu endare aydu haNNugaLantaha uruTAda vastugaLu emba artha
baruttade; ondnAlkara gAj ondu endare aydu pustakagaLantaha
cappaTeyAda vastugaLu endAguttade. ondu, eraDu, mUru, nAlku
modalAda ankegaLigU bODO bhASeyalli kannaDada ankegaLiginta
bhinnavAda sE, nay, tAm, ba modalAda padagaLive endu bEre
hELabEkAgillavaSTe

lekka hAkuvAga I rIti vastugaLa svarUpavannu sUkSmavAgi tiLisi
hELuva krama bODO bhASeyalli mAtravallade, namma dESada uttara
mattu ISAnya gaDi pradESagaLalli vAsisuva bEreyU halavAru
girijanara bhASegaLalli baLakeyallide. I janara samparkadindAgi intaha
krama inDO-Aryan bhASegaLAda assAmi, bihAri modalAdavu
gaLallU baLakege bandive. bihArina rAjamahAl parvata SrENigaLalli
vAsisuva namma 'dAyAdi'gaLAda mAlTO janara mAtinallU I
vaySiSTya kanDubaruttideyendu vidvAmsaru varadimADiddAre.

## kriyApadagaLa vaySiSTya
bODO bhASeyannADuva kasAri janAngadavaru tamma bhASeya itara
vibhAgagaLallU idE rItiya halavAru vaySiSTyagaLannu paDediddAre.
vastugaLannu cappaTeyAdavugaLu, uruTAdavugaLu, kOlinantiruvavu
gaLu, haggadantiruvavugaLu ityAdiyAgi sUcisade avarige A vastu
gaLannu lekkahAkalu hEge sAdhyavAguvudillavO hAgeyE kriyApada
gaLannu baLasuvAgalU kriyegaLalli kANisuva sUkSmavAda vyatyAsagaLannu
gamanisade avarige avara bhASeyalli mAtanADalu bAradu.


nammalli tinnu, endiruva ondE ondu kriyApadakke samanAgi I
bhASeyalli innUrayvattu kriyArUpagaLive: entaha vastuvannu tinnu
tEve, hEge tinnuttEve, eSTu tinnuttEve, yAroDane tinnuttEve,
modalAda vividha viSayagaLiganusAravAgi, avaru ArisikoLLabEkAda
kriyArUpa vyatyAsagoLLuttade. kattaleyalli tinnuvudu ennuvudakke
ondu rUpavide, kaddu tinnuvudu ennuvudakke innondu rUpavide,
maDaci tinnuvudu ennuvudakke mattondu rUpavide, tUtu mADi
tinnuvudu ennuvudakke innondu rUpavide.

bhASeyu manuSyana AlOcanAkramavannE tanna kayhiDitadalli iTTu
koLLuvudendu kelavaru vAdisuttAre. suttalU kaNNige kANisuva jagattE
I bhASeganuguNavAgi bhinna bhinnavAgi tOruvudendU ivara vAdavide.
I vAda nijavAdare, bODO janara jagattigU kannaDigara jagattigU
naDuve bahaLaSTu vyatyAsavideyenda hAgAyitu. idu nijavAdare, bhinna
bhinnavAda halavAru bhASegaLannu abhyasisuvudara mUlaka namma
jagattannu innaSTu vyApaka mattu vayvidhyayuktavannAgi mADalu sAdhya
vAdItallavE?


<a id="part-2"></a>

[English →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-en#part-two--grammar-and-learning) | [Eke →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn-eke#part-2)

## bhAga eraDukalike mattu vyAkaraNa

cikka makkaLu tamma beLavaNigeya angavAgi mAtxbhASeyannu kaliyuvu
dakkU, SAleyalli ingliS, hindi modalAda eraDanE illavE
mUranE bhASeyannu kaliyuvudakkU naDuve halavu vyatyAsagaLive.
idE rItiyalli, bhASeyannu kaliyuvudakkU adannu Odalu illavE
bareyalu kaliyuvudakkU naDuveyU halavu vyatyAsagaLive. I vyatyAsa
gaLu entahavu embudannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLade, hosa bhASe
yondannu, illavE mAtxbhASeyadE Ada barahavannu kalisa horaTare
halavAru samasyegaLELaballuvu.

intaha halavu samasyegaLu ivattu namma SAlegaLalli baLakeya
lliruva paThya kramadalli kANisuttive. kannaDada klAsinalli kannaDa makkaLige
Odu-baraha kalisabEkAgide, Adare nijakkU nAvu kalisuttiruvudu kannaDa
bhASeyannu. idakke badalu, hosa bhASeyondannu kalisabEkAgiruva
ingliS, hindi modalAda bEre bhASegaLa klAsugaLalli bhASeyannu
sariyAgi kalisuva modalE nEravAgi A bhASeya sAhitya kxtigaLannu
kalisuva yatna naDeyuttide!

kannaDa vyAkaraNavemba hesarinalli kannaDakke svalpavU sambandhisadantaha
viSayagaLannu kalisalAguttide. nijakkU ondu bhASeyalli padagaLannu,
padarUpagaLannu mattu vAkyagaLannu hEge racisalAguttade embudannu
vyAkaraNa hELikoDabEku; Adare kannaDada taragatigaLalli kalisuva
vyAkaraNa idondannU hELade, kannaDada maTTige tIra anavaSyaka
gaLAgiruva kelavu samskxta vyAkaraNada viSayagaLannu tiLisuttade.

bhASe mattu barahagaLannu kalisuva vidhAnadalli mUDi bandiruva
I tappugaLindAgi vidyArthigaLu aydAru varSa ondu bhASeyannu
kalitarU avarige adaralli ondu vAkyavannU sariyAgi bareyalu
sAdhyavAgada hAgAgide. idallade, barahavannu kalitarU avaralli pustaka
gaLannu Oduva Asakti unTAguvudilla.


I samasyegaLinda horabaruvudu hEge, ittIcegina samSOdhanegaLu
I viSayadalli Enu hELuttave embudannu keLagina hattu lEkhanagaLalli
vivarisalAgide.

## 2.1 todalu nuDiya indrajAla
huTTidoDaneyE jOrAgi aLalu surumADuva makkaLige tamma bAyi
yinda svara horaDisalu yArU hELikoDabEkAgillavEnO nija.
Adare, I svaradalli nUrAru vayvidhyategaLannu barisi avannella tamma
svAdhInadallirisikonDu mAtAgi baLasuvudendare aSTondu sulabhada
kelasavEnalla. I kAryada kliSTateyannu managanDa bhASAvijYAnigaLu
mattu manOvijYAnigaLu magu tanna bhASeyannu modala bArige hEge
kayvaSa mADikoLLuttade embudannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLalu bahaLa
samayadindalU prayatnisuttiddAre. Adare avara prayatnavinnU pUrti
saphalagonDideyennuva sthitige bandu muTTilla.

huTTidandinindalU bage bageya SabdagaLannu utpAdisalu prayatni
suttalE iruva magu sAmAnyavAgi ondu-ondUvare varSadalli
eraDu illavE mUru padagaLuLLa mAtugaLannADalu SaktavAguttade
mattu innondu varSa kaLeyuvudaroLage tanna mAtxbhASeyalli
heccu kaDime sariyAgiyE mAtanADalU kalitu biDuttade embudu
kela samSOdhakarigantU AScaryavannE unTumADide.

idu eSTu kaSTada kelasavembudannu ELenTu varSa prayatnapaTTu
kalitarU ingliS‌nalli ondE ondu vAkyavannU sariyAgi ADalu
sAdhyavAgadiruvantaha namma SAlA vidyArthigaLu hELaballaru. avarE
I kelasavannu tamma bAlyadalli lIlAjAlavAgi mADi mugisiruva
rAddarinda I kAryada hinde namagariyadantaha indrajAlavEnO
aDagideyembudaralli yAva sandEhavU illa.

## mAtu kaliyuva Sakti
identaha indrajAla? huTTuvAgalE makkaLu mAtu kaliyalu bEkA
dantaha ondu viSiSTavAda Saktiyannu paDedukonDu huTTiruvarendU,
mattu I Sakti aydu-Aru varSa prAyada varege mAtravE avaralli
uLidiruttadeyendU vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. ondu magu A


prAyadoLage bhASeyannu kaliyali, kaliyadirali, anantara A Sakti A
maguvina kayyalli uLidiralAradu.

arekivuDAda maguvigU mUru nAlku varSagaLoLagEnE bhASe
yannu prayatnapUrvakavAgi kalisidalli adu sulabhavAgi kaliyaballudu;
Adare, adara vayassu jAstiyAdantella I kelasa heccu heccu kaThiNa
vAguttA hOguttadeyendu vijYAnigaLu kanDuhiDidiruvudu idakke
ondu uttama udAharaNe. SAlege baruva vidyArthigaLella I mAtu
kaliyuva Saktiyannu paDediruvantaha vayassannu dATiruttAre. hAgAgi,
avara taleyoLage hosadondu bhASeyannu tumbuvudu aSTondu
kaSTavAguttideyendu bEre hELabEkAgillavaSTe?

todalu nuDiya I hasuLegaLa bhASAbhyAsa hEge naDeyuttade?
kelavu manegaLalli tAyitandeyaru tamma makkaLondige spaSTavAgi
avarige arthavAguvante mAtanADuvarAdarU I rItiya mAtu
makkaLa bhASAbhyAsakke eSTu avaSyavembudinnU spaSTavAgilla. tammoDane
yAva rItiyallU mAtanADalu tAyitandeyarE illadantaha tabbali
makkaLU lIlAjAlavAgi tamma modala bhASeyannu kalitukoLLuttAre.
hAgAgi, I kAryada hindina vaycitrya innaSTu gUDhavAgirabEkendu
vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaDuttAre.

bahuSaH tamma maneya mattu nerehoreya manegaLa vayaskaru
ADuva mAtugaLannu kELikELi tAvAgi mAtanADalu mattu bEreyavara
mAtugaLannu arthamADikoLLalu bEkAdantaha anubhavavannu mEle
hELida viSiSTavAda Saktiya mUlaka makkaLu tAvAgiyE paDedukoLLu
tArendu hELabahudEnO. I anubhavavannu paDeyuva krama hEge
emba viSayadalli ittIcege bahaLaSTu vAda vivAdagaLu naDeyuttive.

kelavara matadante, huTTuvAgalEnE makkaLu jagattina bhASegaLigella
hondikeyAgabahudAdantaha niyamAvaLiyondannu (endare vyAkaraNa
vannu) taleyoLage tumbikonDiruttave, mattu tamma suttumuttalinavara
mAtugaLannu kELi kELi antaha niyamAvaLiyalli avaSyaviruva
badalAvaNegaLannu mADikoLLuttave.

idu hEgE irali, makkaLu tamma modala mUru nAlku varSa
gaLalli ondu bhASeyannu kalitukoLLuva kramakkU, A vayassu dATida
mEle hosadondu bhASeyannu kalitukoLLuva kramakkU naDuve
bahaLaSTu vyatyAsavideyembudantU nija. modalaneya bhASeyannu


kalitabanda anubhavada taLapAyada mElEnE eraDaneya illavE
mUraneya bhASeya kaliyuvike naDeyabEku.

modalaneya bhASeyannu kaliyuvantaha eLe vayassannu dATida
makkaLu A vayassinalli yAva bhASeyannU kaliyadiddarU, mattu
anantara avarige modalaneya bhASeyannE kalisabEkiddarU, eraDaneya
illavE mUraneya bhASeyannu kalisuva kramadallEnE adannu kalisa
bEkAguvudendu vijYAnigaLu kanDukonDiddAre.

I eraDu rItiya kaliyuvikegaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsavannu spaSTa
mADikoDuvudakkAgi makkaLu tamma modalaneya mAtxbhASeyannu
'gaLisi'koLLuttArendU, eraDaneya illavE mUraneya bhASeyannu
'kalitu'koLLuttArendU I eraDu kAryagaLannu sUcisalu bEre bEre
kriyApadagaLannu baLasuva krama bhASAvijYAnigaLalli rUDhige bandide.

## kivuDu makkaLige mAtu kalisuvudu
huTTu kivuDarAda makkaLige mAtu bAradiruvudakke avaralli intaha
mAtu kaliyuva Sakti illadiruvudu kAraNavalla, hAge kaliyuvudakke
avaSyavAgiruvantaha itararu ADuva mAtannu kELuva Sakti avara
llilladiruvudE kAraNa. modala hattu hadinaydu tingaLugaLalli itara
makkaLante kivuDarAda makkaLU bEre bEre rItiya SabdagaLannu
horaDisuttiruttave. Adare, I SabdagaLu tAyi tandeyara illavE
sahOdara sahOdariyara mAtinalli baruva padagaLige samanAgi
badalAgalu sAdhyaviruvudilla.

itara makkaLu tamma suttalinavara mAtugaLannu kELi kELi, hosa
hosa SabdagaLannu utpAdisuva vayassannu muTTidAga, kivuDutanaviruva
makkaLu mella mellage bAyiyinda Sabda horaDisuvudannE nillisa
toDaguttave. hAgAgi, yAvudAdarondu magu I rIti bAyiyinda
Sabda horaDisuvudannu antaha prAyadalli kaDimemADatoDagide
yAdare, adakke kividOSavEnAdarU ideyE endu parIkSisikoLLuva
avaSyakateyide.

doDDavaralliruvante makkaLallU bEre bEre maTTada kivuDutana
viruttade. kelavu makkaLige svalpa gaTTiyAgi mAtanADidare kELisuvantaha
kaDime maTTada kivuDutanavirabahudu. intaha ondu magu bhASe
kaliyuva prAyavannu muTTuttiruva samayadalli, endare sumAru
ondUvare-eraDu varSa vayassinadAdAga, tAyitandeyaru prayatna


paTTu A maguvinoDane nityavU adakke kELisuvante gaTTiyAgi mattu
spaSTavAgi mAtanADuva paripAThavanniTTukonDare, A maguvina todalu
nuDi kaDime kaDimeyAgi mAyavAguva badalu hiriyara mAta
nnanusarisi padagaLantAgi, A magu itara makkaLanteyE mAtanADalu
kaliyuvudendu vijYAnigaLu sAdhisi tOrisiddAre.

idakkU heccina maTTada kiviDutanaviruva maguvige uLidavarADuva
mAtu kELisuvante kivigaLige hAkikoLLuva upakaraNavondannu
toDisuva sAdhyateyide. bariya hattu tingaLina SiSugaLigU amerikada
kelavu prayOgaSAlegaLalli intaha upakaraNagaLannu toDisi parIkSisi
ddAre. atI kaDime kELisuvantaha huTTukivuDarAda makkaLU intaha
upakaraNagaLa sahAyadinda itara makkaLanteyE SIghravAgi mattu spaSTa
vAgi mAtanADalu kalitive.

kivuDutana mattu mAtubAradiruvike iveraDu manuSyanannu entaha
asahAyaka sthitige mattu asahyavAda EkAntakke taLLabahudembudannu
managanDu tAyitandeyaru eLE prAyadallEnE kivuDutanavira
bahudAda tamma makkaLige mAtu kaliyalu ellA rItiya sahAya
gaLannU odagisikoDuvudu avaSya.

## 2.2 kannaDada makkaLige kannaDa pATha
modalaneya taragatige bandu sEruva huDuga huDugiyarige kannaDada
klAsinalli Enannu kalisabEku emba viSayavannu namma vidyAdhikAri
gaLinnU sAkaSTu sUkSmavAgi vivEcisidantilla. huTTi mUru nAlku
varSa kaLeyuvudaroLagEnE I makkaLu kannaDa bhASeyannu ADuvu
daralli mattu bEreyavaru ADiddannu kELi artha mADikoLLuvudaralli
sAkaSTu paLagiruttAre. I viSayadalli kaliyabEkAdudannella svataH
kalitukoLLuva SaktiyU janmataH avarige labhisiruttade. tamma mAtx
bhASeyannu kalitukoLLuva krama hEgembudannu avarige yArU
hELikoDabEkAgilla. hAgAdare, kannaDa klAsinalli avarige kalisikoDa
bEkAdaddEnu?

mAtanADidudannu kELi artha mADikoLLuvudu mattu hELa
bEkendenisidudannu mAtininda hELi tiLisuvudu iveraDu kAryagaLa
nnallade, Oduvudu mattu bareyuvudu emba inneraDu kAryagaLannU
mADuva Sakti manuSyanigirabEkembudu namma Adhunika nAgarikateya


vaySiSTyagaLallondAgide. modalaneya taragatige sEruva makkaLige
kalisikoDabEkAgiruva viSayagaLalli Oduvudu mattu bareyuvudu
iveraDU atyanta mukhyavAda amSagaLembudu idarinda spaSTavAguttade.
I kelasavannu mukhyavAgi kannaDada klAsinallE naDesabEkAgide. hAgAgi,
iveraDu cAturyagaLannu makkaLige kalisikoDuvalli kannaDa klAsina paThya
pustakagaLu mattu pAThakramagaLu eSTara maTTige takkudAgiveyembudannu
pariSIlisuvudu avaSya.

## Odu kalisuvudu
Oduvikeyalli pariNatanAgalu vidyArthiyu halavAru rItiya kavSalya
gaLannu kayvaSamADikoLLabEkAguttade. Atanu tAnu OdabEkAgiruva
bhASeyannu sariyAgi tiLidirabEku mAtravalla, baravaNigeyalli baLasa
lAguva bEre bEre sanjYegaLoLagiruva ati sUkSmavAda vyatyAsagaLannu
gamanisikoLLuvaSTu Atana buddhi beLedirabEku. sanjYegaLigU SabdagaLigU
naDuve sambandhavannu kalpisikoLLuva, mattu barahada sanjYegaLannu nEra
vAgi mattu SabdagaLa mUlaka arthamADikoLLuva Sakti Atanalli mUDira
bEku.

sanjYegaLannu yAva kramadalli baLasalAgideyembudannu, endare sara
mattu rasagaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsa entahadembudannu gamanisikoLLuva
Sakti AtanigirabEku. beLavaNigeya vividha hantagaLalliruva I sAmarthya
gaLannella avugaLa pUrNa rUpakke beLesikoDuvudara mUlaka vidyArthige
kannaDa barahavannu kalisikoDuvudE kannaDa klAsina mukhya uddESavendu
vAdisalu sAdhyavide.

makkaLige Odu kalisuvudu hEge embudaralli mukhyavAgi eraDu
bhinna bhinnavAda abhiprAyagaLu vidvAmsara gamanavannu seLedive. makkaLige
bEre bEre padagaLannu Odalu hELikoDuvAga, avugaLalli baLake
yAgiruva akSaragaLannu biDisi biDisi Odalu kalisabEkembudondu;
mattu hAge biDisi hELalu hOgade, padagaLannu mattu padasamUha
gaLannu oTToTTAgi Odi grahisikoLLalu kalisabEkembudinnondu. sadyakke
I eraDu abhiprAyagaLalli yAvudu sari endu tiLiyalu prayatni
suvudakkintalU avugaLalli yAva vidhAna namma bhASeya barahavannu
kalisuvalli heccu upayuktavAgaballudu embudannu nirdharisi
koLLuvudu atyavaSya.

LLala


ingliS‌nalliruvaSTu 'spelling' samasyegaLilladiruva kannaDa baraha
vannu kalisuvalli mEle koTTiruva modalaneya vidhAnavE heccu
prayOjanakAriyAgaballudu. idallade, aduvarege OdadE iddantaha
hosa hosa padagaLannOdalu makkaLu bEre bEre akSaragaLigiruva
uccAraNeyannu aritukonDiruvudu uttama. AdarU Oduvikeyu
jAsti vEgadinda naDeyabEkAdare, padagaLannu akSara akSaragaLAgi biDisi
Odalu hOgade, oTToTTAgi grahisikoLLuva abhyAsavannU kUDa mADa
bEkAguttade.

makkaLige koDuva Odina SikSaNadalli modalige akSaragaLannu biDisi
biDisi Odalu kalisi, akSaragaLa sariyAda paricayavAguva hottige
avarannu I abhyAsadinda tappisi, padagaLannu oTToTTAgi grahisikonDu
SIghravAgi Odalu kalisuvantaha madhyada dAriyondannu anusarisuvudE
kannaDada maTTige uttamavendu illi hELabahudu.

antU kannaDada modala pustakavu makkaLu tamage tiLidiruvantaha
padagaLannu mattu mAtugaLannu AdaSTu SIghravAgi Odi tiLidukoLLalu
sahAya mADuvantirabEku. idakkAgi I pustakadalli baruva pAThagaLannu
kannaDada akSaragaLige mattu avugaLa racanAkramakke anuguNavAgi
tayArisikoLLuva avaSyakateyide, mattu avugaLalli AdaSTu maTTige
makkaLige tiLidiruvantaha padagaLannE upayOgisuva avaSyakateyide.
ivugaLalli baLasalAguva akSaragaLU kUDa bEre bEre sannivESagaLalli
prayOgisalpaTTu, makkaLa manassinalli dxDhagoLLuvantirabEku. yAva
akSaravU ondO eraDO padagaLalli mAtravE tOribandu anantara
ellU tOri baradiruvantaha sthitiyirabAradu.

## Odina bhASe kalisuvudu
barahada kannaDakkU mAtina kannaDakkU naDuve svalpavAdarU vyatyAsaviddE
iruttade. paThyapustakagaLalli barahakke yOgyavAgiruvantaha kannaDada
prabhEdavannE baLasuttiruvevAddarinda lipiyannu kaliyuvudarondige
kannaDada I viSiSTavAda prabhEdavannU makkaLu kaliyabEkAguttade.

hAgAgi, kannaDada klAsinalli Odalu mattu bareyalu kalisuvudu
mAtravallade, ondu viSiSTavAda bhASAprabhEdavannU makkaLige kalisa
bEkAguvudemba viSayavannu nenapinallirisikoLLuvudu avaSya. pATha
gaLannu racisuvAga lipiya vaySiSTyagaLannu mAtravallade, bhASeya
vaySiSTyagaLannU (endare adu yAva amSagaLalli ADumAtiginta


bhinnavAgideyembudannu) gamanadallirisikoLLuvudu idarinda avaSyavAgu
ttade.

## paThyapustakagaLa racane
Adare, namma SAlegaLalli baLasuva kannaDa paThyapustakagaLannu racisidavaralli
heccinavarU I mElina viSayagaLannu gamanadallirisikonDiruvante
kANisuvudilla. SAlA makkaLige tamma mAtxbhASeyAda kannaDavannu
kalisalu baLasuva pustakagaLu avara eraDanE illavE mUranE bhASe
yAgaballa ingliS mattu hindI bhASegaLannu kalisalu baLasuva pustaka
gaLiginta svalpavAdarU bhinnavAgiveyE embudannu gamanisidevAdare I
viSaya spaSTavAdItu.

ingliS mattu hindI klAsugaLalli namma makkaLige ondu hosa
lipiyannu Odalu mattu bareyalu kalisabEku mAtravalla, ondu
hosa bhASeyannU kalisabEku. idakkAgi hosa hosa padagaLannu mattu
hosa hosa vAkyaracanAkramagaLannu avarige kalisabEku. paThyapustaka
gaLannu racisuvavaru I rIti namma makkaLige kannaDa kalisuvudakkU
ingliS kalisuvudakkU naDuviruva I atyanta mukhyavAda vyatyAsa
vannu gamanisikoLLabEDavE?

nijakkU namma SAlegaLalli kaliyuva heccina makkaLU paThyapustaka
gaLalli baruva pAThagaLannu mattu padyagaLannu bAyipATha
mADikoLLuttArallade avannu Odalu kaliyuvudilla. avugaLalli baruva
citragaLu hIge bAyipATha mADida amSagaLannu A puTagaLannu tere
doDane nenapige taralu sahAyavannu mAtra mADuttave. hAgAgi,
makkaLu pustakadalli baredudannu Odade, adaralli iruva citragaLannu
OduttArendarU salluttade

makkaLu akSaragaLannu mattu padagaLannu Oduvante mattu A padagaLa
mattu vAkyagaLa arthavannu hAge Odi grahisikoLLuvante prErEpisalu
samarthavAgadiruva paThyapustakagaLu Odu-baraha kalisalu arhavalla
vendu bEre hELabEkAgillavaSTe.

## paThyapustakada uddESa
