kannaDadalli modalaneya taragatige paThyapustakavannu tayArisuvavaru I
ondu viSayavannu atyavaSyavAgi gamanadalliTTukoLLabEku. kannaDada


makkaLige kannaDada modala taragatiyalli bhASegintalU barahavannu
kalisuvudE ati mukhyavAda kelasa. kannaDa padyavondannu bAyipATha
mADi hELalu makkaLige baruvudE illavE embudu mukhyavalla.
bAyige baradE iruva padyavannu mattu pAThavannu pustakadinda Odi
hELalu avarige baruvudE illavE embudu mukhya.

idakkAgi, modalu kannaDa pustakadalli bEre bEre sannivESagaLalli
baruva akSaragaLannOdalu makkaLige sandarbhavannodagisi koDuvantaha
vividha rItiya pAThagaLirabEku. intaha pAThagaLa sankhye jAstiyiddaSTu,
mattu avugaLa vayvidhyate heccidaSTu makkaLu bAyipATha mADuvudu
tapputtade, mattu akSaragaLannu hAgU padagaLannu OdiyE grahisikoLLu
vantaha sandarbha jAstiyAguttade.

akSaragaLannu mattu padagaLannu Oduvalli makkaLige sAkaSTu
kutUhalavannunTumADalu sAdhyavideyAdalli, barahavannu kalisuva
paThyapustakagaLalli citragaLannE koDabEkAgillavendu kelavaru vidvAmsaru
abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. ingliS makkaLige barahavannu kalisuvudakkAgi
intaha paThyapustakavondannu amerikada khyAta bhASAvijYAni
liyonArD blUm‌phIlD racisi koTTiddAre. Adare I viSayadalli
innU heccina samSOdhanegaLu naDeyuva avaSyakateyide. yAkendare,
kelavara abhiprAyadante, makkaLa pustakagaLalli kelavAdarU citragaLu
iddE tIrabEku.

## 2.3 vyAkaraNavemba kallina kaDale
vyAkaraNavendare bahaLa mandige talenOvu. adondu SuSka mattu
niSTrayOjaka viSayavendu halavarige adaralli tAtsAra. nijavAgiyU
ondu pattEdAri kateya hAge rOmAncakavAgirabEkAgiruva I
viSayavannu intaha adhOgatige tandu iLisidavaru bErArU alla,
namma neccina vayyAkaraNigaLE.

vyAkaraNadalli nAvu tiLiyabEkAdudu illavE kaliyabEkAdudu
Enide endu halavu mandi praSnisabahudu. idakke uttaravAgi namma
kannaDa bhASeya vyAkaraNavannE pariSIlisabahudu. eraDu eraDUvare
varSa prAyadavarAdAginindalU nAvu anavaratavAgi I bhASeyalli
mAtanADutta bandiddEve. nammalli heccinavarU tamma manassinalliruva
viSayavannu itararige arthavAguvante tiLisikoDaballaru, mattu


innobbaru hELidudannu sAkaSTu maTTige sariyAgiyE arthamADikoLLaballaru. mAtxbhASeyalli nAvu paDediruva I cAturya nijakkU dayvadattavAdudu endE hELabahudu.

kannaDadalli vyAkaraNagaLu tiLisi hELabEkAgiruvudu I cAturyada
svarUpavEnembudannu, nAvu hEge mAtanADuttEve? manassinalliruvu
dannu hEge innobbarige arthavAguvante tiLisi hELuttEve? innobbaru
hELidudannu hEge artha mADikoLLuttEve? embityAdi praSnegaLige
vyAkaraNa uttara koDuttade. nAligeyannu bEre bEre rItiyalli
tirugisi Sabda horaDisuttEve; I SabdagaLinda siddhavAda padagaLannu bEre
bEre rItiyalli sErisi mAtugaLannu racisuttEve; idu hEge naDeyu
ttade embudannu vyAkaraNa tiLisuttade.

## tiLiyuvudara phala
I sangatiyannu tiLidu AgabEkAdaddAdarU Enu endu kelavaru
kELabahudu. idakkondu uttamavAda udAharaNeyide. kay, kAlu,
tale modalAda angagaLannu nAvu hEge bEkO hAge manassige
bandante tirugisaballevu; naDeyaballevu, ODaballevu, kuNiyaballevu;
I eraDu kaygaLinda sAvirAru bEre bEre rItiya kelasagaLannu
mADaballevu.

Adare, intaha calanegaLannella naDesuvudakkAgi namma kaykAlu
gaLalliruva ententaha snAyugaLannu mattu elubugaLannu hEge hEgella
calisabEku embudannu nAvEnAdarU tiLidiruvevEnu? idondU
tiLiyadiddarU namage namma I kelasagaLannella samarpakavAgi mADi
mugisalu sAdhyavAguttide.

Adare, naDeyuvAga kAlu uLukidalli, kay elubu muridalli,
illavE bErEnAdarU apaghAta sambhavisidalli nAvu nEravAgi DAkTara
rallige ODabEkAguttade, allavE? Aga gottAguttade, nijakkU namma
ajYAnada mahimeyantahadu embudu. bhASeya viSayadalli nama
giruva ajYAnadindAgi intaha tondaregaLAvuvU baralAravendu
yArAdarU bhAvisabahudu. Adare bhASeya oLaguTTannariyada namma
rAjakAraNigaLa ajYAnada phalavannu nAvindu dinanityavU anubhavisu
tiddEvalla?


## tiLiyuva Ase
vyAkaraNavannu kalitu Enu prayOjana endu kELuvavarige innondu
rItiya uttaravannU koDabahudu. prapancadalli sAvirAru kutUhala
kAriyAda viSayagaLive. AkASadalli candraniddAne, nakSatragaLive; samudra
dalli mInugaLive, mattu innU EnEnO jantugaLive; namma suttalU
sAvirAru AScaryakAraka vastugaLu haraDive. ivannella kUlankaSavAgi
tiLidukoLLabEku embudu namma mAnavasahajavAda Ase. I Aseyannu
IDErisuvudakkAgi mAnavanu himAlayada tudige hattiddAne,
samudrada ALakke iLididdAne, candralOkakkU prayANa beLesiddAne.

namma bAyiyindalE hora horaDuva mAtU intaha AScarya
karavAda sangatigaLalli ondu. adara viSayavAgi abhyAsa mADidaSTU
hosa hosa sangatigaLu horabaruttive. udAharaNegAgi, mAtu
horaDisuvAga naDeyuva namma nAligeya calaneyannE parIkSisi nODa
bahudu. ra ennuvAga adara tudi bAyiya mElchAvaNiyannu taTTu
ide; la ennuvAga adu allE nintu eraDU badigaLalli usiru hora
hAyuvante mADuttade; ta ennuvAga usiru ellU hOgadante adu
taDegaTTuttade; Ta ennuvAga adara tudi hindakke maDacikonDu I kelasa
mADuttade. nammalli pratiyobbarU mAtanADuvAga tamma nAligeya
mUlaka I ellA kelasagaLannU mADuttiruvevAdarU nAligeya I
calanavalanagaLannu sUkSmavAgi gamanisidavareSTu mandi?

vyAkaraNadalli bhASeya kuritu tiLisi hELabahudAda sAvirAru
viSayagaLalli idU ondu. maneyinda bande mattu manege bande
emberaDu vAkyagaLoLage arthadalli vyatyAsavide. I vyatyAsavannu kannaDa
dalli hEge sUcisuttEve embudannu kannaDada vyAkaraNa tiLisuttade.
mane emba padakke eraDu bEre bEre 'vibhaktipratyaya'gaLannu sErisi
kannaDadalli I arthabhEdavannu sUcisuttade. Adare, ellA bhASe
gaLU idE kramavannu anusarisabEkendEnU niyamavilla. kelavu bhASe
gaLalli padagaLa sthAnavannu badalAyisi I arthabhEdavannu sUcisa
lAguttade; mattu innu kelavu bhASegaLalli pratyayagaLa badalu bEre
padagaLannE baLasalAguttade.

## nIrasateyannu kaLeyalu dAri
namma bhASeya vyAkaraNa I rIti nijakkU namma bhASeya svarUpavEnu
embudannu kutUhala huTTuvante varNisahoraTalli adara nIrasate

Aha


yella iddakkiddante mAyavAdItu. ma embudu 'anunAsika' endu
hELi 'nAsikeyannu anusarisuvudE anunAsika' endu vivaraNe koTTare
yArigU EnU arthavAgadu, mattu adu yAra kutUhalavannU
keraLisalAradu. Adare namma SAlA vyAkaraNagaLallella makAravannu
varNisuva krama intahadE.

hIge hELuva badalu, ma ennuvAga tuTigaLeraDu muccikonDu,
usiru bAyiyinda horage hOgadantAguttade; Adare, mUgina
mUlaka hora hOguva dvAra terediruva kAraNa, adu mUgina
mUlaka hora hOguttade embudAgi makAravannu uccarisi vivarisi
dalli, antaha vivaraNe yArallU kutUhalavannu keraLisItu.

## innondu uddESa
vyAkaraNavannu kaliyuvudaralli innondu uddESavU ide. adEnembu
dannu svalpa vivaravAgi pariSIlisONa: mAtanADuvAga nAvu sAmAnya
vAgi obbara mukhavannobbaru nODuttiruttEve. mAtannu kELuttiru
vavanu hIge mukhavannu nODiyE mAtanADuvavanu santOSa
dalliddAnO, bEsaradalliddAnO, kOpadalliddAnO embudannella
tiLiyaballanu. mAtanADuvavana mAtina kramadindalU kELuvavanige
intaha halavu viSayagaLu gottAgabahudu.

allade, mAtanADuvAga nAvu kaysanne, kaNNusanne modalAdavu
gaLannu baLasuttiruttEve. hELida mAtu sariyAgi kELisadiddarU, I
kaysanne, kaNNusannegaLa sahAyadinda mAtanADuvavana manassinalli Enide
embudannu UhisikoLLaballevu. idondU sAdhyavAgadiddarU, mAta
nADuvavanu edurigEnE iruva kAraNa, avanoDane arthavAgadiruva
viSayagaLa bagge bEkAdaSTu praSnegaLannu kELi avannu gottumADi
koLLuva sAdhyateyU ide embudannu mareyabAradu.

## barahada samasyegaLu
dUrada Urinalliruva mitranobbanige patra bareyuvudiddalli intaha
sahAyaka amSagaLondU siguvudilla. patradalli barediruva vAkyagaLu
mAtravE Atanige nAvu tiLisikoDabEkendiruva viSayagaLannella tiLisi
koDabEku. patra baredavanu santOSadalliddanO, kOpadalliddanO,
bEsaradalliddanO embudannella I vAkyagaLu mattu avugaLalli
bandiruva bEre bEre padagaLu mattu pratyayagaLu tiLisikoDabEku.

ALa


mAtina mUlaka ondu viSayavannu tiLisi hELuvudakkintalU barahada
mUlaka tiLisi hELuvudu heccu kaSTada kelasavemba viSaya idarinda
spaSTavAguttade. I kelasavannu txptikaravAgi naDesalu vidyArthigaLu SAle
yalli ondu hosa cAturyavannE kayvaSa mADikoLLabEkAguttade.

mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuviruva I vyatyAsavannu sariyAgi
arthamADikoLLadavaru jIvanadalli halavAru tondaregaLige sikki bILu
ttAre. tamASegAgi tamma patradalli EnAdarU gIcihAkiddare, avara
mitraru adannu nijavendE tiLidu, avarigU avara mitrarigU naDu
viruva sambandhavE oDeduhOguva sandarbha barabahudu. saraLa nuDi,
konku nuDi, dvESada nuDi, tamASeya nuDi ivannella barahadalli
sUcisalu bEre bEre kramagaLive. bhASeya svarUpavannu sariyAgi
arthamADikonDavarige I cAturyagaLellavU kayvaSavAgiruttave.

mOTAru naDesuvavanu tanna mOTArina Antarika racaneyantaha
dembudannu tiLidukoLLadiddarU A kelasavannu samarpakavAgiyE mADa
ballanembudEnO nija. Adare mOTArina oLaguTTannaritalli avanu I
kelasadalli innU heccina cAturyavannu baLasaballanembudU nijavE.
bhASeya mattu barahada baLakeyallU idE tatvavannu kANabahudu.
SAleyalli vyAkaraNavannu kalisuvudarinda tamma bhASeya bagge vidyArthi
gaLalli kutUhalavannu keraLisuvudarondige, barahada oLaguTTannU
avarige tiLisikoDalu sAdhyavide. idannu sariyAgi mADalu SaktarAdalli,
vayyAkaraNigaLu ondu doDDa kAryavannE sAdhisidantAdItu.

## 2.4 SAlA vyAkaraNagaLalli modalaneya pATha
kannaDadalli vyAkaraNagaLannu bareyuttiruva vidvAmsaralli heccinavarU
tamma vicAra Saktiyannu sampUrNavAgi kaLedukonDiruvarembudakke
'varNamAle'yemba avara vyAkaraNada modalaneya pAThavE uttama
udAharaNe. kannaDa bhASeya varNagaLAvuvu, mattu entahavu embu
dannu cikka makkaLige arthavAguvante vivaravAgi tiLisi hELabEkAgiruva
I pAThada svarUpa ondu sAvira varSagaLaSTu samayavU badalAgade
uLidide.

I sAvira varSagaLalli bErellA SAstragaLallU ententaha badalA
vaNegaLella naDedu hOgiveyembudannu gamanisidavAdare (cappaTeyidda

AA


bhUmi uruTAgide), kannaDada I baDa vyAkaraNaSAstra eSTu hinduLi
dideyemba viSaya spaSTavAdItu.

## bhASe mattu lipi
bhASe mattu adu baLasuva lipigaLa naDuve bahaLaSTu vyatyAsagaLiralu
sAdhyavide. kannaDa bhASeya caritre mattu kannaDa lipiya caritre -
iveraDU bhinna bhinnavAdavugaLu; hAgAgi, kannaDadallU bhASe mattu
lipigaLa naDuve tumbA vyatyAsagaLive. I vyatyAsagaLannu sariyAgi grahisi
koLLalu prayatnisadiruvudE varNamAleyennuva I pAThavannu bareda
vidvAmsara mukhya dOSavAgide. kESirAjanU I tappannu mADiddanu,
adannu kanDukoLLalArada avana himbAlakarellarU idannu mADu
ttiddAre.

kannaDavannu bareyalu nAvindu baLasuttiruva lipi kannaDakkAgiyE
siddhavAdudEnalla. aSOkana kAladalli baLakeyallidda brAhmI lipiyannu,
illavE adakke tIra hattiravidda lipiyondannu namma pUrvikaru alpa
svalpa badalAvaNegaLondige tamma bhASegU aLavaDisikonDiddaru. I
lipiya racanAkramadalli ivattigU viSESa badalAvaNeyEnU naDedilla.
Adare, adara sanjYegaLalli mAtra halavu badalAvaNegaLAgive.

bhAratada lipigaLalli heccinavU I brAhmI lipiyindalE utpanna
vAdavugaLAddarinda, telugu, malayALa, marAThi, gujarAti modalAda
bhASegaLu baLasuva lipigaLallella kannaDada lipiyantahadE racanAkrama
tOribaruttide. I lipigaLoLagina vyatyAsagaLalli heccinavU avu
baLasuva sanjYegaLa svarUpadalli naDedu banda badalAvaNegaLa phala.

## varNamAle mattu akSaramAle
I rIti, kannaDa bhASeya caritre adu baLasuva lipiya caritreginta tIra
bhinnavAgideyAda kAraNa, adara 'varNamAle' mattu adu baLasuva
lipiya 'akSaramAle' ivugaLoLage vyatyAsagaLiruvudu sahaja. bahaLa
mandi vidvAmsaru kannaDadalli iveraDU ondE emba artha baruva
hAge barediruttAre.

kannaDa lipiyalli oTTu hadinAlku svara sanjYegaLiveyAdare (kelavaru
innU eraDannu sErisikoLLuttAre) kannaDa bhASeyalli oTTu a, A, i,
I, u, U, e, E, o, mattu O emba hattu svara varNagaLu mAtra

ATa


ive. lipiyalli kANisuva x, khU, ay, mattu av emba uLida nAlku
svara sanjYegaLannu nAvu vyanjanayukta svaragaLannAgi uccarisuvevAda
kAraNa, avannu mElinavugaLinda bhinnavAda svaravarNagaLendu kareyuvu
daralli arthavilla.

udAharaNegAgi ay mattu av emba eraDu svarasanjYegaLannu
gamanisabahudu. uccAraNeyalli ivu ay mattu av emba
sanjYAgucchagaLinda svalpavU bhinnavAgilla. yakAra mattu vakAragaLu
kannaDadalli itara svaragaLoDaneyU (udA: ey, bay, iv
ityAdi) baruttaveyAda kAraNa, avugaLalli ay mattu av‌gaLige
mAtra ondu viSiSTavAda sthAnavannu kalpisikoTTu, avannu bareyalu ay
mattu av emba bEreyE eraDu akSaragaLannu baLasuvudaralli yAva
avcityavU illa.

hIgiddarU namma pUrvikaru tamma bhASeyannu bareyalu brAhmI
lipiyannu baLasatoDagidAga, itara svarasanjYegaLondige iveraDannU
ettikonDarembudu namma lipiyalli tOribaruva I eraDu anavaSyaka
sanjYegaLige kAraNa.

itara eraDu svarasanjYegaLalli xkAravu kannaDada maTTigantU
vyAkaraNa pustakagaLalli mAtravE kANasiguvantahadu. adakke kannaDa varNa
mAleyalli yAva sthAnavU illa. kannaDa lipiya akSara mAleyallU
adannu sErisikoLLuva avaSyakateyEnilla.

xkArada maTTige hELuvudAdare, adu uccAraNeyalli rakAra
yukta svaravAgiyE baLakeyallide. I svara kelavaralli ikAravirabahudu,
kelavaralli ukAravirabahudu, mattu innu kelavaralli viSiSTavAdondu
ukAra (vivxtOSNa)vAgiyU irabahudu. I vayvidhyavannu
tOrisuvudakkAgi, bahuSaH barahada maTTige adannondu viSiSTa
akSaravendu parigaNisabahudu. Adare, adannondu heccina svaravarNa
vembudAgi hELalu baruvudilla.

## vargIyagaLu mattu avargIyagaLu
vyanjanagaLannu vargIya mattu avargIyagaLemba eraDu gumpugaLAgi
vingaDisuva samskxta vyAkaraNada paddhatiyannE kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLallU
anusarisalAguttade. vargIyagaLannu kavarga, cavarga, Tavarga, tavarga,
mattu pavargagaLendu oTTu aydu vargagaLAgi vingaDisuvudu krama.
ondondu vargadallU aydaydu sanjYegaLiddu, vargIya vyanjanagaLa


oTTu sankhye ippattaydAguvudu. ya, ra, la, va, Sa, Sa, sa, ha, mattu
LagaLu ombattu avargIyagaLenisuvuvu. anusvAra mattu visargagaLannu
yOgavAhagaLemba mUraneya gumpinallirisuvudu rUDhi.

idu kannaDa lipiya vyanjana sanjYe(akSara)gaLa vivEcaneyAyitu.
mEleyE hELidante, kannaDa bhASeya vyanjana varNagaLa sankhye adara
lipiya akSara sankhyege sarihondabEkendEnU niyamavillavaSTe? kannaDa
dalli mahAprANAkSaragaLa sthAnavEnembudara kuritu bahaLa carce
naDedide. avu kannaDakke samskxtadinda eravalAgi banda padagaLalli mAtra
prayuktavAguvuvembudu kelavara matavAdare, accakannaDa padagaLallU
avugaLa prayOgavideyembudu innu kelavara mata.

Adare, mahAprANAkSaragaLu baruva padagaLa mUla kannaDavirali,
samskxtavirali, avannuccarisuvAgalantU alpaprANAkSaragaLinda bhinnavAgi
uccarisuva kannaDigaru kelavE kelavu mandi mAtra embudaralli samSaya
villa. kannaDa varNamAle kannaDigara uccAraNeya mEle avalambisira
bEku; hAgAgi, mahAprANagaLannu viSiSTa varNagaLendu parigaNisuva
avaSyakateyillavendE hELabahudu.

i, i, Na, na, ma emba aydu anunAsikagaLalli modala mUru
padamadhya sthAnadalli mAtravE prayuktavAguttave. adarallU jakAra
mattu ikAragaLu savargIya vyanjanagaLeduru (endare jakAravu ka
mattu ga embavugaLeduru mattu ikAravu ca mattu ja embavu
gaLeduru) mAtra baruttave; hAgAgi, mattu A sthAnadalli uLida
anunAsikagaLu baradE iruva kAraNa, averaDakkU viSiSTavAda varNa
sthAnavannu kalpisabEkAgilla. Na, na, mattu ma embivu mUrE kannaDada
anunAsika varNagaLu embudu idarinda siddhavAguttade.

avargIyagaLendu hELalAguva yakArAdigaLannu mElina aydu
vargagaLoLageyE sErisi vargIyagaLannAgi parigaNisalu sAdhyavide.
SakAravannu heccinavarU SakAravAgiyE uccarisuttAre; hAgAgi, adakke
varNasthAna koDabEkAgilla. hakAravannu kavargadallU, SakAra, yakAra
gaLannu cavargadallU, LakAravannu TavargadallU, sakAra, lakAra mattu
rakAragaLannu tavargadallU, vakAravannu pavargadallU avugaLa
uccAraNeyannanusarisi sErisikoLLabahudu.

I lekkadante kannaDada kavargadalli mUru (ka, ga, ha), cavargadalli
nAlku (ca, ja, Sa, ya), Tavargadalli nAlku (Ta, ja, Na, La),
tavargadalli Aru (ta, da, na, sa, la, ra), mattu pavargadalli nAlku


(pa, ba, ma, va) embudAgi kannaDadalli oTTu ippattondu vyanjana
varNagaLiveyendu siddhavAguttade.

## yOgavAhagaLu
anusvAra mattu visargagaLemba yOgavAhagaLeraDU kannaDakke tAnu
eravalAgi paDakonDa lipiyoDane banda horegaLu mAtra. uccAraNe
yalli anusvAravu makAra, nakAragaLiginta bhinnavAdudalla. visargakke
padAntyadalli hakAravAgiyU, padamadhyadalli ottakSaravAgiyU uccA
raNeyide. hAgAgi, iveraDakkU kannaDa varNamAleyalli sthaLavilla.

## varNagaLa uccAraNe
innu I varNagaLa uccAraNeyantahadu embudannu varNisuva
rItiyU sAvira varSagaLaSTu hindinadE. I viSayadalli bhASA
vijYAnigaLu bahaLaSTu samSOdhanegaLannu naDesiddu, nUrAru hosa
hosa viSayagaLu beLakige bandive. ivondU namma kannaDa
vayyAkaraNigaLa gamanakke bandillavendu tOruttade. athavA bandarU
avakkanuguNavAgi paThyavannu sudhArisabEkemba utsAha avaralli
mUDilla. tAvu cikkandinalli Enu kalitiddevO adannE indina
huDugarU uruhoDedu parIkSeyalli baredare sAku embudu avara
ASayavirabahudu.

I vyAkaraNa pustakagaLalli kANisuva uccAraNeya varNanegU kannaDa
bhASeya uccAraNegU naDuve yAva sambandhavU illavAdare adu
varNane hEgAdItu? mattu adannu kaliyuvavarige Enu artha
vAdItu? udAharaNegAgi, kavargada vyanjanagaLannu 'ganTali'nalli
uccarisuva kAraNa avu kanThagaLendu heccina vyAkaraNagaLallU baredide.
nijakkU nAvivannu ganTalinalli uccarisuttEveyO? ka ennuvAga
nAlageya himbhAga mElakke ubbi nAlageya mElbAgadalliruva
anguLu (mxdutAlu)vannu muTTuvudallade ganTalalli entaha uccA
raNeyU naDeyuvudilla.

idE rItiyalli, Tavargada vyanjanagaLannu uccarisuvAga, nAligeya
tudi hindakke maDacikoLLuvudE atyanta mukhyavAda kArya. idannu
vivarisihELuva badalu avu mUrdhanyagaLu, bAyiya mElbAgadalli
utpannavAguttave endu baredare avugaLa viSiSTavAda uccAraNe
vidyArthigaLige hEge gottAdItu?

A


kannaDa varNagaLa uccAraNeyannu vivaravAgi varNisahoraTare
ondu doDDa pustakavannE bareyabahudu. intaha pustakadalli barabahu
dAda viSayagaLalli yAvuvannu kannaDa vyAkaraNada modalaneya pATha
dalli sErisikoLLabEku, mattu yAvuvannu biDabEku embudu ondu
praSne. idannu paThyapustakagaLannu rUpisuva vidvAmsarE nirdharisabEku.
Adare, ivattina vyAkaraNa pustakagaLalli intaha pustakadalli kANisadE
iruvantaha arthavillada 'varNane'gaLE jAsti kANisuttave; hAgAgi,
avu Enannu varNisuttaveyembudU vidyArthigaLige (mattu adhyApaka
rige) gottAgalAradu.

varNamAle mattu akSaramAlegaLoLage kannaDadalli iSTellA vyatyAsa
gaLiddarU, avannu svalpavU parigaNisadiruvudarindAgi, namma SAlA
vyAkaraNagaLu vidyArthigaLige bariya talenOvAgiyE uLidive. vastu
sthitiyannu arthavAguvante varNisahoraTalli mAtra avu vidyArthi
gaLalli kutUhalavannu keraLisaballuvu.

## 2.5 kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli samskxtada devva
kESirAjana SabdamaNidarpaNadinda suruvAgi ivattina SAlAvyAkaraNagaLa
varege, kannaDadavendenisikoLLuva vyAkaraNagaLallella saNNa doDDa samskxta
devvagaLanEka tumbikonDive. I devvagaLa kATadindAgi, kannaDa bhASe
yalli eSTE badalAvaNeyAdarU adara 'vyAkaraNa' mAtra banDegallina
hAge acalavAgi nintukonDide. bhASeyalli iruvudondu, adara
vyAkaraNa hELuvudinnondu emba I paristhitiyindAgi, vyAkaraNavannu
kaliyuva vidyArthigaLalli gondalavallade bErEnU mUDuttilla.

## bhASeyallillada bhaviSyattu
bhUta, vartamAna mattu bhaviSyat embudAgi kannaDada kriyApadagaLalli
mUru kAlabhEdagaLiveyendu namma SAlAvyAkaraNagaLella sAri hELu
tive. avugaLa varNaneya prakAra, bandanu embudu bhUtarUpa,
baruttAne embudu vartamAna rUpa, mattu baruvanu embudu
bhaviSyat rUpa. Adare nijakkU kannaDadalli I mUru kriyArUpa
gaLannu nAvu I mUru arthagaLalli baLasuttiruvevEnu?


kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLalli samskxtada devva

kannaDada Adhunika prayOgagaLannu parIkSisi nODidalli ondu
kutUhalajanakavAda amSa gamanakke bandItu. karNATakada dakSiNa
bhAgada lEkhakaru baruttAne emba rUpavannE vartamAna mattu bhaviSya
darthagaLeraDarallU baLasuttAre. baruvanu emba rUpa avara baraha
gaLalli kANisuvudE illa. uttaradavara kelavu lEkhanagaLalli baruvanu
emba rUpa kANisuvudAdarU adakke bhaviSyadarthadondige vartamA
nArthavU ide. antU bhASeya maTTige hELuvudAdare, barahada
kannaDadalli bhUta mattu itara emba eraDE eraDu kAlabhEdagaLu
mAtra kanDubaruttave. SAlA vyAkaraNagaLalli mAtra kAlabhEdagaLu
mUru.

## sAmAnyArtha mattu niScitArtha
hIge prayOgadalli illadE iruva kAlabhEdavannu kriyArUpagaLa
mEle hErida namma vayyAkaraNigaLu iru emba ondu kriyApadadalli
mAtra bahaLa spaSTavAgiyE tOribaruva kAlabhEdavannu gamanisi
dantilla. kannaDadalli iddAne mattu iruttAne emba I eraDu rUpa
gaLige eraDu bhinna bhinnavAda arthagaLive. maneyalli iruttAne
endare 'sAmAnyavAgi iruttAne, Iga iddAnO illavO tiLiyadu'
emba arthavAdare, maneyalli iddAne endare, 'niScitavAgiyU
iddAne' emba artha baruttade.

hIge sAmAnya mattu niScitagaLemba eraDu arthagaLannu
koDuva rUpabhEda iru emba ondu dhAtuvinalli mAtra tOribaru
ttade. heccina vayyAkaraNigaLU I eraDu rUpagaLige ondE arthavide
yemba hAge barediddAre.

## vyatyAsagaLa mUla
nAvu upayOgisuva bhASegU adannu varNisalendu horaTa
vyAkaraNagaLigU naDuve intaha halavAru vyatyAsagaLu kanDu baruttive.
kannaDa bhASeya svarUpavEnembudannu tiLiyalu nAvu yAva rItiya
prayatnavannU mADuttillavembudE I vyatyAsagaLigella mUla kAraNa
vAgide. pANiniyE modalAda vidvAmsara satata prayatnadindAgi
samskxta bhASeyannu spaSTavAgi varNisuva granthagaLu halavu siddha
vAduvu. samskxta bhASegU kannaDa bhASegU naDuve bahaLa vyatyAsa
videyAda kAraNa, samskxta vyAkaraNavannu hAgeyE kannaDakke aLavaDisi


koLLalu sAdhyavAgadu. hAge mADalu yatnisuttiruvudarindalE namma
vyAkaraNagaLu iSTondu hIna sthitiyallive.

samskxta vyAkaraNagaLu samskxta bhASeyannu varNisalu yatnisuva
hAge, kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLu kannaDa bhASeyannu varNisalu yatnisabEku.
kannaDada padagaLannu nAvu hEge uccarisuttEve, pratyayagaLa mUlaka
avannu nAvu hEge sAdhisuttEve, avannu ondakkondu sErisidAga
entaha badalAvaNegaLella taledOruttave, kannaDada vAkyagaLannu racisalu
I padagaLannella yAva yAva rItiyalli pONisikoLLabEku - intaha
halavAru kutUhalakArakavAda praSnegaLige kannaDada vyAkaraNa nEravAda
uttaragaLannu koDalu yatnisabEku.

I uttaragaLannu SAlA vidyArthigaLige arthavAguvante bareya
bEku mAtravalla, SAlA vidyArthigaLu tamma mAtinalli illavE baraha
gaLalli baLasuva dhvanigaLa, padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racaneyannu mAtravE
udAharaNegaLannAgi baLasi I vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu paThya pustakagaLu
varNisabEku.

hIge iruvudannu iruvante varNisatoDagidalli vyAkaraNavu
vidyArthigaLa kutUhalavannu keraLisabahudu mAtravalla, munde doDDava
rAda mEle I vidyArthigaLE kannaDa bhASeya kuritu hosa hosa
sangatigaLannu kanDuhiDiyuvante prErEpaNeyannU koDaballudu.
vastusthitiyinda dUravAgi uLiyuvudarindalE namma vyAkaraNavindu
bariya SuSka viSayavAgi yArallU kutUhalavannu keraLisalu samartha
vAgade uLidide.

ondu bhASeya svarUpavannu citrisuva vyAkaraNa A bhASe
badalAdantella badalAgutta hOgabEku, mattu A bhASeya kuritu
hosa hosa amSagaLu gamanakke bandantella adarallU mArpATu
gaLAguttirabEku. hIge jIvakaLeyannu tumbuvallivaregU namma
bhASeya vyAkaraNa niSprayOjakavAgiyE uLidItu.

## SAlA vyAkaraNagaLa mukhya dOSa
namma SAlA vyAkaraNagaLa mukhya dOSavEnendare, avu hosagannaDada
svarUpavEnembudannu spaSTavAgi tiLisalu yatnisuva badalu, kESirAja,
pANini modalAdavaru carcisida atI kliSTavAda mattu hosagannaDakke
svalpavU sambandhisadantaha nUrAru viSayagaLannu vidyArthigaLa tale
yoLage tumbalu yatnisuttave.


samskxta bhASege sambandhisidantaha guNa, vxddhi, Sutva, STutva,
jaStva modalAda sandhikAryagaLannu hELikoDuva I vyAkaraNagaLige
kannaDada udAharaNegaLu siguvudu asambhavavE. hAgAgi, enTanE
taragatige siddhavAda vyAkaraNagaLalli hUvilla, ammaya, SaDUrmi
modalAda, kannaDada maTTige tIra vicitravAgi kANisuva, padagaLa
prayOga kANasiguttade. ivannella parIkSegAgi bAyipATha mADa
bEkAgiruva vidyArthigaLige vyAkaraNavembudondu vicitravAda viSaya
vendu anisidare tappEnu?

hAgAgi, SAlA vyAkaraNagaLannu bareyuvavaru mattu avarige
mArgadarSana mADuva paThyapustaka samitiyavaru I vyAkaraNagaLannu
bareyuvudara mattu kalisuvudara uddESavEnembudannu modaligEnE
nirdharisikoLLabEku. tamma tAyinuDiya svarUpavEnembudannu tiLidu
koLLalu, mattu A bhASeyalli barahada mUlaka tamma manassinalliruva
viSayavannu itararige sariyAgi arthavAguva hAge tiLisalu hAgU
itararu baredudannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLalu vidyArthigaLige
vyAkaraNavannu kalisuva avaSyakateyide. avaru yAva rItiya baraha
vannu baLasuttiddAre mattu baLasabEkAgide embudara mEle I
vyAkaraNada racane avalambisirabEku.

hosagannaDada vyAkaraNadalli hosagannaDada vicAragaLannu mAtravE
vivarisabEku. samskxtada illavE haLegannaDada vicAragaLannU makkaLige
tiLisi hELuvudarinda prayOjanavEnAdarU ideyendu I vidvAmsara
matavAdare, A viSayagaLigAgi bEreyE pustakavannu bareyuvudu
uttama. ivellavannu hosagannaDa vyAkaraNadallE sErisuvudarinda
vidyArthigaLa manassinalli gondalavallade bErEnU mUDalAradu.

## 2.6 samskxtada samAsagaLu kannaDadalliiveyE?

paThya pustaka samitiya AdESada mErege hayskUlu vidyArthigaLige kannaDa
vyAkaraNavannu kalisalu siddhavAgiruva paThya pustakagaLalli 'samAsagaLu'
emba vibhAgavondide. idaralli prAmukhyavAgi tatpuruSa, karma
dhAraya, dvigu, bahuvrIhi, avyayIbhAva mattu dvandva emba Aru
samskxta samAsagaLannU gamaka hAgU kriyAsamAsagaLemba eraDu


heccina 'kannaDa' samAsagaLannU paricayisuvudu rUDhi. kannaDa vyAkaraNa
gaLalli samAsagaLannu paricayisuva I krama hadimUranE SatamAna
dallidda kESirAjana kAladindalU baLakeyallide.

Adare, kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli I rIti samskxta samAsagaLannu
kalisuva avaSyakateyideyE, mattu hAge kalisuvudarinda vidyArthigaLige
prayOjanavEnAdarU sigabahudE, athavA idakke badalAgi adu
avaralli gondalavannEnAdarU unTumADabahudE embudannu
yArU vivEcisidantilla.

## vyAkaraNada uddESa
kannaDadalli baruva padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racaneyentahadembudannu
tiLisihELuvudE kannaDa vyAkaraNada mukhya uddESavAgirabEku. samskxta
padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racane kannaDadavakkinta tIra bhinnavAgiruva
kAraNa, kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli avannU vivarisahOdare A vyAkaraNa
anavaSyakavAgi bahaLa kliSTavAdItu. samskxta bahaLa mukhyavAda bhASe,
atyuttamavAda kAvya mattu SAstra granthagaLu adarallive, mattu adannu
nAvu 'dEva bhASe'yendu parigaNisuttEve embudellavU nijavAdarU
kannaDa padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racaneyannu ariyabEkendiruvavarige
samskxta padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racaneyannu tiLisahOguvudu tIrA
anavaSyaka.

nimma manege hOgalu dAri kELidavarige nimmUrina dEva
sthAnada dAri hELidirAdare, adU nimma mane dEvasthAnakkinta bEreyE
ondu dikkinallideyAdare, hEge tondareyunTAgabahudO, hAgeyE
kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli samskxta vyAkaraNada amSagaLannu sErisuvudarinda
vidyArthigaLige tondareyAgadiradu.

## samAsavendarEnu?
samAsa embudu eraDu padagaLu oTTu sEri ondE padavAgiruvantaha
kelavu viSiSTavAda padagaLa (endare samastapadagaLa) racaneyentahadu
embudannu tiLisuva ondu vyAkaraNa SAstra vibhAga. intaha samasta
padagaLu kannaDadallU ive, samskxtadallU ive; hindi, ingliS,
marAThi modalAda bEre bhASegaLallU ive. intaha padagaLillada
bhASegaLU kelavive. I padagaLa racane bEre bEre bhASegaLalli bEre
bEre teranAgide.


kannaDadalli baruva samastapadagaLa racaneyannu tiLisi hELalu hEge
hindi, ingliS, marAThi modalAdavugaLalli baruva samasta padagaLa
racaneyannu tiLisuva avaSyakateyillavO, hAgeyE adakke samskxtadalli
baruva samastapadagaLa racaneyannu tiLisuvudU avaSyavilla.

namma paThyapustaka samitiyavarAgalI, vyAkaraNa pustakagaLannu bare
yuva vidvAmsarAgalI I viSayavannu gamanisida hAge kANisuvu
dilla. samskxtakkU kannaDakkU naDuve samastapadagaLa racaneyalli halavu
mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive. samskxtadinda eravalAgi banda padagaLigU
kannaDadalli kannaDadavE Ada racanA niyamagaLu anvayisuttave. hAgAgi,
antaha samastapadagaLannu varNisuvallU samskxta samAsagaLannu
baLasuva avaSyakateyilla.

## kelavu mukhya vyatyAsagaLu
samskxta mattu kannaDa bhASegaLa naDuviruva ondu atyanta mukhyavAda
vyatyAsavEnendare, samskxtadalli nAmapada mattu kriyApadagaLemba
eraDu rItiya padagaLu mAtra ive (avyayagaLemba mUranE rItiya
padagaLiveyAdarU ivannu nAmapadagaLendE parigaNisuvudu rUDhi).
Adare kannaDadalli nAmapada, kriyApada mattu guNavAcaka pada embu
dAgi mUru bageya padagaLive.

samskxtadalli nAmapadagaLondige guNavAcaka padagaLannu viSESaNa
gaLannAgi baLasuvAga, nAmapadagaLa hAge avakkU vibhakti pratyayagaLannu
sErisuva avaSyakateyide. kannaDadalli idu avaSyavilla. samskxtada
kxSNEna sarpaNa embudu kannaDadalli kappu hAvininda endAgutta
dallade, kappininda hAvininda endAguvudilla.

idE rItiyalli sarvanAma, kxdanta modalAdavugaLU nAmapada
gaLondige viSESaNagaLAgi baruvAga avugaLige samskxtadalli nAmapada
gaLa hAgeyE vibhaktipratyayagaLannu sErisabEkAguttade, Adare kannaDadalli
idu avaSyavilla. mxtEna sarpaNa - satta hAvininda, tasya
bAlakasya - A huDugana modalAda prayOgagaLalli I vyatyAsavannu
kANabahudu.

samskxtadalli nAmapadagaLondige viSESaNagaLAgi baruva guNa
padagaLu vibhaktipratyayavillade bandAga (udA: kxSNa sarpaNa,
mxtasarpaNa) avugaLalli vibhakti pratyaya lOpavAgi samastapada
vAgideyendu hELuttAre. hAge hELuvudu samanjasavU havdu. Adare


kannaDadallU idE rItiyalli kappu hAvannu, satta hAvige embantaha
prayOgagaLalli vibhakti pratyayada lOpavAgideyendu hELidare adu
sariyAgalAradu.

yAkendare, kannaDada nAmapadagaLondige viSESaNagaLAgi baruva
guNapadagaLu illavE kxdantagaLu samskxtada hAge vibhakti pratyaya
gaLondige baruvudilla. hAgAgi, alli vibhaktilOpada praSneyE ELuvu
dilla. hIgiddarU kUDa, kannaDada vyAkaraNagaLallella bisigALi, A
huDuga, satta hAvu modalAdavugaLalli samAsavAgideyendU, avu
karmadhAraya, gamaka modalAda samAsagaLige udAharaNegaLendU
bareyalAgide. samskxta vyAkaraNadinda samAsagaLannu hAgeyE kannaDa
vyAkaraNakke tandu sErisiruvudE I rIti namma vayyAkaraNigaLu tappu
mADalu mukhya kAraNa.

## linga mattu vibhakti pratyayagaLu
samskxtakkU kannaDakkU naDuviruva innondu mukhyavAda vyatyAsa
vEnendare, samskxtadalli baruva nAmapadagaLa lingavEnembudannu avakke
entaha vibhaktipratyaya sEruttade embudara mEle tiLidukoLLa bEkAgu
ttade. nijakkU samskxtada vibhakti pratyayagaLu nAmapadada linga, vacana,
mattu vibhakti I mUrannU oTTAgi sUcisuttave.

udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli nxpa 'arasu', vxkSa 'mara', anila
'gALi' modalAdavugaLu pullingadallU, janani 'tAyi', mAlA
'mAle', AjYA 'AjYe' modalAdavu strIlingadallU, kalatra 'henDati',
brahma 'paramAtma' udaka 'nIru' modalAdavu napumsaka lingadallU
ive. bariya arthadinda I padagaLa lingavEnembudannu tiLiyalu
sAdhyavAgadu.

kannaDadalli baruva nAmapadagaLa linga idakkinta tIra bhinnavAdudu.
adu avugaLa arthavannavalambiside. idallade, kannaDada vibhakti pratyaya
gaLu vibhaktiyannu mAtra sUcisuttave, vacana mattu lingagaLannu
sUcisalu kannaDadalli aycchikavAgiruva bEreyE pratyayagaLive.

I kAraNakkAgi, samskxtadalli baruva bahuvrIhi samAsakkU kannaDa
dalli baruva bahuvrIhi samAsakkU naDuve vyatyAsavide. samastapadada
angagaLAgi bandiruva padagaLalli yAvudAdarU ondu adara kEndra
binduvAgiruva badalu, adara horagiruva ondu pada kEndra bindu
vAgideyAdare adannu bahuvrIhiyendu kareyuvudu rUDhi.


udAharaNegAgi, samskxtada pItAmbaraH 'haLadi baTTeyannuTTavanu'
emba padadalli pIta 'haLadi' mattu ambara 'baTTe' emba eraDu pada
gaLu angagaLAgi bandive. Adare, I padada kEndra bindu I eraDu
angagaLalli ondara mElU bILade adara horagiruva 'uTTavanu'
embarthada padada mEle bILuttade. hAgAgi, adannu bahuvrIhi
yendu kareyabahudu.

illi gamanisabEkAda amSavEnendare, pItAmbaraH emba padada
koneyalli baruva visarga A padada vibhaktiyannu sUcisuttideyallade
adu A padada angavalla.

kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLalli bahuvrIhi samAsakke haNegaNNa, calavAdi
modalAda padagaLannu udAharaNegaLannAgi koDuvudu rUDhi. ivu
samskxtada bahuvrIhi samAsaviruva padagaLannu hOluttiruvudE
idakke kAraNa. Adare, I padagaLa koneyalli baruva a illavE i
emba pratyayagaLu vibhakti pratyayagaLalla. avu A padagaLa angagaLE.

kannaDada maTTige hELuvudAdare, haNegaNNa emba padadalli haNe
mattu kaNNa 'kaNNuLLavanu' emba eraDu padagaLu sErive. hAgAgi,
adaralli eraDaneya angavAgiruva pada (kaNNa embudu) pradhAna
padavAgideyallade horagiruva padavondu pradhAna padavAgilla. hAgAgi
adu tatpuruSa samAsakke udAharaNeyallade bahuvrIhigalla.

## kannaDada bahuvrIhi
samskxtadalli avyayIbhAvavemba samAsavondide. idarinda sidda
vAguva padagaLu avyaya (kriyAviSESaNa)gaLAgiddu, avugaLa kEndra
bindu modalaneya angada mEle bILuttade. udAharaNegAgi, upa
kxSNam 'kxSNana hattira' embudu samskxtadalli ondu avyayavAgiddu,
adara kEndra bindu upa emba modalaneya angada mEle bILuttade.

avyayIbhAva samAsakke kannaDadalli kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLu koDuva
udAharaNegaLu hingAlu, mundale, modalAdavugaLu. Adare ivu
kannaDadalli nAmapadagaLAgiveyallade avyaya illavE kriyAviSESaNa
gaLAgilla. idallade, hingAlu emba pada kAlina himbhAgavannu sUcisu
tiddu, adara kEndra bindu hinde mattu kAlu emba adara eraDu
angagaLalli yAvudara mElU bILade, A padada horagiruva bhAga
emba padada mEle bILuttade. hAgAgi nijakkU idu bahuvrIhige
udAharaNeyAgaballudallade avyayIbhAvakke udAharaNeyAgalAradu.


kelavaru I samAsavannu 'amSi' endare ondu vastuvina amSavannu
tiLisuvavu embudAgi bEre hesarininda karediddAre. Adare, ammaniginta
cikkavaLAgiruva obba hengasannu (endare avaLa tangiyannu) sUcisuva
cikkamma embantaha bEre kelavu padagaLU intahavE Agiddu avannu
amSiyendu kareyalu baruvudilla. ivellavU kannaDadalli bahuvrIhige
udAharaNegaLAgaballuvu.

kelavu vyAkaraNagaLalli keLaduTi emba padadallU amSi samAsavide
endiddAre, mattu 'tuTiya keLagu' embudAgi adakke vigrahavAkya
koTTiddAre. Adare nijakkU keLaduTi embudu keLagina tuTiyannu
sUcisuttiddu, karmadhArayakke udAharaNeyAgaballudallade amSigalla.

hayskUlu vidyArthigaLigAgi racitavAgiruva kannaDa vyAkaraNa emba
paThyapustakada 'samAsagaLu' emba ondu cikka vibhAgadalli intaha innU
halavAru asAngatyagaLu mattu tappugaLive. samskxta vyAkaraNavannu
hAgeyE kannaDakke anvayisalu horaTiruvudE I tappugaLige mukhya
kAraNa. intaha halavAru tappugaLinda tumbi tuLukuttiruva I
vyAkaraNa vibhAgavannu kaliyabEkAgiruva vidyArthigaLige adu
talenOvannallade bEre EnannU odagisalAradu.

## 2.7 kannaDada makkaLige ingliS pATha
aydAru varSa SAlegaLalli kalitarU namma vidyArthigaLige A bhASeyalli
ondE ondu vAkyavannU sariyAgi racisalu sAdhyavAguttillavemba
dUru kELibaruttide. Adare idakke vidyArthigaLa aSraddhegintalU avarige
ingliS kalisahoraTa namma ajYAna mattu aSraddhegaLu mUlakAraNa
vembudannu mAtra yArU gamanisidantilla.

inglenDinalli ingliS bhASeyalli sarAgavAgi mAtanADalu baruva
huDugarige A bhASeya barahavannu kalisuvudakkAgi tayArAgiruva paThya
pustakada pratirUpavannE nAvilli A bhASeya hesarannE kELirada makkaLige
bhASe mattu baraha iveraDannU kalisuvudakkAgi baLasuttiddEve. I
pustakavannirisikonDu klAsinalli avarige akSara hELikoDuttEve, mattu
spelling kalisuttEve, Adare bhASeyannu mAtra kalisuttilla. hIgellA
iddarU avaru alpasvalpa ingliS kalitukoLLuttAralla, adu nijakkU
namma bhAgyavendE hELabEku.


## bhASe kaliyade Odu kaliyuvudu
I paThyapustakagaLannu racisiruva vidvAmsarige bhASe mattu barahagaLa
naDuviruva sambandhavE tiLidantilla. barahavu nijakkU ondu bhASe
yannu pratinidhisuva sanjYAvidhAna mAtra. namage tiLiyadiruva
bhASeyannu modalu kalitukoLLade, adara barahavannu kaliyuvudu
tumbA kaSTa.

bhASeyannu kaliyuvudendare adaralli ADidudannu kELi arthamADi
koLLalu kaliyuvudu, mattu itararige arthavAguvante adaralli
ADalu kaliyuvudu. iveraDu cAturyagaLannu kayvaSa mADikonDa
mElEnE A bhASeyalli bareyuva illavE Oduva cAturyagaLannu
dorakisikoLLalu sAdhyavide.

namage tiLidiruva hosa bhASeyondannu hIge ADalu mattu
kELalu kaliyadEnE nEravAgi adaralli bareda pustakagaLannu Odi artha
mADikoLLalu bahaLa mandi prayatnisuttArEnO nija. intaha janaralli
kelavaru I prayatnadalli alpa svalpa jayavannU gaLisuttAre.

Adare, intahavaru A bhASeyalli Oduva krama mAtra atyanta
kliSTavAdudu. pustakadalli baruva vAkyagaLannu nEravAgi arthamADi
koLLuva badalu, ivaru pratiyondu padavannU bEre bEreyAgi tamma
mAtxbhASeyalli bhASAntarisutta biDibiDiyAgi OduttAre. hIge
Oduvudaralli eraDu mukhyavAda tondaregaLive.

I rItiya Oduvike atyanta nidhAnavAgi sAguvudembudu intaha
tondaregaLalli modalinadu. ondu puTavannu OdalEnE intaha
Odugarige bahaLaSTu samaya hiDidItu. eraDaneyadAgi, pratiyondu
padavannU bEre bErAgi bhASAntarisi OduvAga, vAkyada nijavAda
artha ivara kayge siguvudilla.

idallade, ondu bhASeyalli baruva padagaLige samarpakavAgi
hondikeyAguva padagaLu innondu bhASeyalli siguvudu bahaLa
aparUpa. sannivESakkanusAravAgi padagaLa artha bahaLaSTu vyatyAsa
goLLuttade; hAgAgi, arthakOSagaLalli koTTiruva vivaraNegaLa sahAya
dinda vAkyadalli baruva padagaLa artha hELuvudu tumbA kaSTa.

I ellA kAraNagaLindAgi, intaha Oduvikeya mUlaka prayatnakke
takka pratiphala endigU sigalAradu.


## bhASeya mUru amSagaLu
nijakkU ondu hosa bhASeyannu kaliyabEkendiruvavaru adara mUru
mukhyavAda amSagaLannu kayvaSa mADikoLLalu prayatnisabEku. A bhASe
yalli baLasuva dhvanigaLu, adara padarASi, mattu I padagaLannu vAkya
gaLAgi jODisuva krama - endare A bhASeya vyAkaraNa - ivu
bhASeyondara mUru mukhya amSagaLAgive.

ivugaLalli padarASiyembudu bhASeyalliruva atyanta vistAravAda
amSa. eSTE abhyAsa mADirali, ondu bhASeya padarASiyannu tAnu
sampUrNavAgi kayvaSa mADikonDiruvenendu yArU edetaTTi hELa
lAraru. obbana adhInadalliruva padarASiya vistAra Atana anubhava
vannu hondikonDu heccu kaDimeyAgiruttade. yAvudE ondu viSaya
dalli obbana anubhava jAstiyAdantella A viSayakke sambandhisida pada
gaLa mEle Atana hiDita bhadravAguttade.

manuSyanu sAvirAru bEre bEre rItiya dhvanigaLannu uccarisaballa
nAdarU avana bhASeyu I dhvanigaLalli nUrinnUrannu mAtra baLasi
koLLuttade. hIge baLasikoLLuva dhvanigaLu bhASeyinda bhASege bhinna
vAgiruttave; hAgAgi, hosa bhASeyondannu kaliyabEkendiruvavaru
hosa hosa dhvanigaLannU uccarisalu kaliyabEkAguttade. mAtannu kELi
arthamADikoLLuvalli dhvaniyE mukhyadvAravAgiruvudarinda, hosa
bhASeyondannu kaliyuvalli A bhASeyu baLasuva vividha dhvanigaLannu
kELi, uccarisi, avugaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLannu grahisikoLLalu
abhyAsa mADuvudE modalina pAThavAgirabEku.

vyAkaraNavannu kaliyade bhASe baralAradembudannu ellarU ballaru.
Adare, I kaliyuvike hEge sAgabEkembudannu mAtra heccinavarU
arthamADikonDantilla. vyAkaraNada niyamagaLannu bAyipATha mADi
koLLuvudarinda mAtravE bhASeyannu kaliyabEkendiruvavarige yAva
prayOjanavU sigalAradu. A niyamagaLu avara manassinalli nelenintu,
avugaLa prayOga yAntrikavAdarEnE avu avara kayvaSavAdante.
hAgAgi, vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu nEravAgi kaliyuvudakkintalU avannu
baLasuvudara mUlaka siddhavAda vAkyagaLannu manana mADuvudE
atyuttamavAda mArgavembudaralli sandEhavilla.

hAgAgi, bhASeyondannu kaliyuvavaru adara vyAkaraNa niyama
gaLannu nEravAgi kaliyuva avaSyakateyilla. Adare bhASeyannu itararige


kalisuvudakkAgi paThyapustakagaLannu racisahoraTavarige I niyamagaLella
avaSyavAgi tiLidirabEku.

## ingliS pAThakramada dOSagaLu
namma ingliS pAThakramada dOSagaLAvuvembudu I mElina carce
yinda spaSTavAgi gOcarisuttade. ingliS klAsige baruva makkaLige
ondu bhASe (kannaDa) AgalE tiLidiruttade. avaru ingliS emba hosa
dondu bhASeyannE kaliyabEkAgide, bariya ingliS barahavannalla. I
bhASeyalli baruva dhvanigaLigU kannaDadalli baruva dhvanigaLigU naDuve
halavAru vyatyAsagaLive. hAgAgi, modalige I hosa dhvanigaLannu
makkaLige tiLisikoDuva prayatna mADabEku. cikka cikka vAkyagaLannu
ADalu mattu kELi arthamADikoLLalu kalisabEku. idakke ingliS
akSarada jYAna bEkAgilla.

dhvanigaLannu kalisuvudarondige ingliS‌na vAkyaracaneya krama
gaLannU kalisabahudu. idakke avaSyabILuva kelavE kelavu padagaLannu
mAtra baLasikonDu avugaLa sahAyadinda bEre bEre rItiya vAkya
gaLannu racisuva kramavannu tiLisabEku. pAThagaLu munduvaridante
ivugaLalli baruva padagaLa sankhyeyU mella mellane jAstiyAguttira
bEku. I pAThagaLellavU bAyiyindalE naDeyabEku. spelling samasye
yindAgi ingliS‌na barahada krama bahaLaSTu kliSTavAgide. hAgAgi,
onderaDu varSagaLa bhASAbhyAsavAda mElEnE makkaLige ingliS
barahada SikSaNavannu koDisabEku.

bhASe mattu barahagaLu bhinna bhinnavAdavugaLu. hosadondu bhASe
yannu kalisuvAga iveraDannu bErpaDisuvudu avaSyavemba I viSaya
vannu heccina SikSaNatajYarU managanDantilla. bhASeyondannu sariyAgi
ADalu kaliyuva modalE adannu Odalu illavE bareyalu
prayatnisuvudendare bhadravAda aDipAyavillade mALige maneyannu
kaTTalu horaTante.

ivattina SAlegaLalli baLakeyalliruva ingliS pAThakramada mukhya
vAda korateyE idu. I korateyannu nIgisadiruvudarindAgi, namma
makkaLu kaliyuvudaralli hinde bILuttiddAre mAtravalla, avara
kaliyuva samayavU bahaLaSTu vyarthavAguttide.

bhASeyannu kaliyuvudaralli padagaLa abhyAsakkintalU dhvani mattu
vyAkaraNagaLa abhyAsa heccu mukhyavAdudu, mattu mUlabhUta


vAdudu embudannu mareyabAradu. bariya padagaLannu mAtravE
kaliyuva mUlaka mAtugaLannu ADalu illavE arthamADikoLLalu
sAdhyavAgadu. mEleyE hELiruvante, padagaLa kaliyuvikege koneyE
illa. adu nirantaravAgi sAguttiruva kelasa. dhvani mattu vyAkaraNa
niyamagaLannu mAtra heccu kaDime sampUrNavAgi kalitu mugisalu
sAdhyavide. iveraDu amSagaLalli vidyArthigaLu pariNatarAguvante mADu
vudE ingliS klAsina mukhya uddESavAgirabEku.

hindi, samskxta modalAda itara bhASegaLannu kalisuva klAsugaLU
namma SAlegaLalli idE rIti dikku tappiveyAddarinda vidyArthigaLu
allU bahaLaSTu tamma amUlyavAda samayavannu hALumADabEkA
gide.

## 2.8 bhASeya kalikege vyAkaraNada neravu
kannaDadalli ivattu vyAkaraNada kuritAgi eraDu bageya samSOdhanegaLu
oTToTTige naDeyabEkAgide: nijakkU kannaDada vyAkaraNa entahadu
embudannu tiLidukoLLuva samSOdhane ondu bageyadu; mattu I
tiLivannu hEge bEre kelasagaLannu naDesuvalli baLasaballevu embudannu
kanDuhiDiyuva samSOdhane innondu bageyadu.

kannaDadalli entaha padagaLella baLakeyAguttive, avugaLa oLaracane
entahadu, avannu jODisi bage bageya vAkyagaLannu unTumADuva
bage hEge, vAkyagaLannu baLasi lEkhanagaLannu mattu pustakagaLannu
bareyuva bage hEge embudannu tiLidukoLLuvudE vyAkaraNada mUla
guriyAgide.

I tiLivu namage halavu bagegaLalli neravige baraballudu. udA
haraNegAgi, kAnUnugaLannu illavE oppandagaLannu bareyuvavaru tAvu
baLasuva vAkyagaLige eraDu illavE heccu huruLugaLu (ippuruLu)
bAradiruvante nODikoLLabEkAguttade. illavAdare, avu halavu
bageya jagaLagaLige kAraNavAgaballuvu. tamma barahadalli ippuruLu
nusuLadante nODikoLLabEkiddalli, entaha vAkyagaLige ippuruLu bara
balludu, mattu adu bArada hAge vAkyagaLannu badalAyisikoLLuvudu
hEge embudannu tiLidirabEkAguttade. I tiLivannu paDeyuvalli
vyAkaraNada tiLivu neravige baraballudu.


cikka makkaLigAgi, illavE sAmAnya janarigAgi tiLivina barahagaLannu
bareyuvavaru tamma manassinalliruva viSayavannu avarige sulabhavAgi
gottAguva hAge bareyuvudu hEge embudannu tiLidirabEku. illa
vAdare, ivattu kannaDadalli barediruva paThyapustakagaLa hAge, avannu Odi
tiLidukoLLuvudu tumbA toDakina kelasavAgaballudu. entaha vAkya
gaLu cikka makkaLige illavE sAmAnya Odugarige toDakinavAguttave
embudannu tiLidukoLLuvalli, mattu avu tamma barahadalli bArada
hAge nODikoLLuvalli vyAkaraNada tiLivu neravige baraballudu.

ellakkintalU mukyavAgi, kannaDadalli Odalu mattu bareyalu
kaliyabEkendiruvavarige, mattu ingliS‌nantaha bEre bhASeyondannu
kaliyabEkendiruvavarige kannaDada vyAkaraNa tumbA neravannu nIDa
balludu. I koneya viSayavannu mAtra I lEkhanadalli pariSIlisa
lAgide.

## Odu-barahada kalike
hosadAgi SAlege sEruva makkaLige tamma ADunuDiyalli (kannaDadalli)
mAtanADalu cannAgi tiLidiruttade. SAleyalli avaru modalige mADa
bEkAgiruva kelasavEnendare, tamma ADunuDiginta svalpa maTTige bErA
giruva ellara kannaDadalli (endare karnATakada ellA SAlegaLallU heccu
kaDime ondE rUpadalliruva kannaDadalli) mAtanADalu kaliyuvudu,
mattu adarallEnE Odalu mattu bareyalu kaliyuvudu.

mAtanADuvudu hEge embudu makkaLige gottide; hAgAgi, ellara
kannaDadalli mAtanADuvudendare, kannaDada ondu rUpada badalu
innondu rUpavannu mAtinalli baLasalu kaliyuvudu. idannu avaru
heccu tondareyillade naDesaballaru.

Adare hIge kaliyuttiruvAga, avaru maneyalli baLasuva ADugannaDa
tappu tappAdudu mattu SAleyalli baLasuva ellara kannaDavE sari
yAdudu emba tappu anisike avaralli mUDada hAge nODikoLLa
bEku.

averaDu bEre bEre sandarbhagaLalli baLasabEkAgiruva kannaDada bage
gaLAgiddu, avugaLalli yAvudU tappalla embudannu avarige tiLisikoDa
bEku. idallade, averaDara naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLannu avaru gamanisuva
hAge mADidalli, ellara kannaDavannu kaliyuva kelasa heccu sulabhaddAga
balludu.


makkaLa ADugannaDakkU SAleyalli baLasuva ellara kannaDakkU naDuve
dhvanigaLa baLakeyalli kelavu vyatyAsagaLiraballuvu, mattu avu makkaLige
tondare koDaballuvu. udAharaNegAgi, makkaLa ADumAtinalli SakAra
illadirabahudu; hAgiddalli, SakAra bandiruva padagaLu makkaLa mAti
nalli sakAravAgi kANisikoLLaballuvu. idannu saripaDisabEkiddalli,
SakArakkU sakArakkU naDuve entaha vyatyAsa ide embudannu kalisu
vavaru tiLidirabEkAguttade, mattu adannu makkaLige kalisuvudu hEge
embudannU avaru tiLidirabEkAguttade.

idallade, makkaLige ellara kannaDadalli baruva dhvanigaLalli kelavannu
horaDisalu bAradiruvudakke avu avara ADunuDiyalli illadiruvudu
kAraNavallade, avara illavE avara nAligeya korateyalla embudannu
kalisuvavaru tiLidirabEku. yAvudAdarU ondu taragatiyalli kali
tiruva makkaLige antaha dhvanigaLannu ADalu tiLidillavAdare, adakke A
taragatiyalli kalisuvavarara korateyE kAraNavallade makkaLa korate
yalla.

dhvanigaLannu horaDisuva I ondu viSayavannu biTTare, ellara kannaDa
dalli mAtanADalu kaliyuvudu makkaLige heccu tondare koDuva kelasa
valla. Adare, Odalu mattu bareyalu kaliyuvudu avaralli
heccinavarigU ondu tumbA toDakina kelasavendu anisadiradu. idakke
kAraNavEnendare, adu avaru huTTinindalE paDeyaballa kelasagaLalli
sErilla. avaraSTakkE biTTare makkaLu mAtanADalu kaliyuttAre, Adare
Odalu mattu bareyalu kaliyuvudilla.

idallade, mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuve halavu bageya
vyatyAsagaLive. mAtinalli padagaLannella oTToTTige sErisi hELuttEve;
Adare, bareyuvAga avannu bErpaDisi bareyabEkAguttade. mAtinalli
baruva vAkyagaLu tunDu tunDAgiruttave; Adare, bareyuvAga avella
iDi iDiyAgiruvante nODikoLLabEkAguttade. mAtinalli heccAgi cikka
cikka vAkyagaLu mAtra baruttiruttave; Adare, barahadalli heccu toDakA
giruva uddudda vAkyagaLannu baLasabEkAguttade. mAtinalli halavu bAri
hELiddannE hELuttiruttEve; mattu hELuvudakke ondu kramaviruvudilla;
Adare, bareyuvAga avannella ondu kramadalli jODisikoLLabEkAgu
ttade.

SAleyalli makkaLu ellara kannaDadalli Odalu mattu bareyalu
kaliyabEkiddalli I ondu hosa bageya barahada kannaDavannu avaru
kaliyabEkAguttade, mattu adakkAgi avaru halavu hosa kavSalyagaLannU


kaliyabEkAguttade. idu tumbA toDakina kelasavAgiddu, idannu naDesu
valli makkaLige mattu kalisuvavarigerige vyAkaraNada tiLivu halavu bage
yalli neravannu nIDaballudu.

## Oduva kelasa
sariyAgi Odalu kaliyabEkiddalli, modalige tamma mAtinalli baruva
padagaLannu dhvanigaLa sErikeyinda unTumADalAgide emba viSayavannu
makkaLu tiLidukoLLuvudu avaSya; AmEle, barahadalli baruva gurutu
gaLu (akSaragaLu) I dhvanigaLannu sUcisuttave embudara kaDege avara
gamana hOgabEku. dhvanigaLannu jODisi padagaLannu unTumADida
hAge, akSaragaLannu jODisi padagaLannu unTumADalAguttade embu
dannu kanDukonDAga mAtra, avarige barahadalli baruva entaha
padavannU (aduvarege nODiradantaha padavannU) Odalu gottAgu
ttade.

I tiLuvaLikeyannu makkaLige koDisuvudu hEge embudannu
kalisuvavaru tiLidirabEku. heccina makkaLU adannu tAvAgiyE paDeya
lAraru. makkaLige Oduva bage hEge embudannu sariyAgi kalisadiddalli,
avaru padagaLannu biDisi Odade iDi iDiyAgi Odalu kaliyuttAre,
mattu I tappu kalikeyindAgi, avarige Oduva kelasa tumbA toDakina
dAgi kANisuttade. munde salIsAgi Odalu avarige baruvudE illa.

I vyatyAsa eSTu mukhyavAdudu embudannu ittIcege naDesida
miduLina samSOdhanegaLu tOrisikoTTive. salIsAgi Oduva makkaLa
miduLinalli avaru OduttiruvAga mUru bageya naragaLu mincuttiru
ive: (1) akSaragaLannu gamanisuva kaNNige sambandhisida naragaLu, (2)
avannu dhvanigaLAgi mArpaDisuva kivige sambandhisida naragaLu, mattu
(3) dhvanigaLannu padagaLAgi jODisi avakke arthavannu hondisuva
padakOSakke mattu vyAkaraNakke sambandhisida naragaLu. gaTTiyAgi
OduttiruvAga mAtravallade, mavnavAgi OduttiruvAgalU I mUru
bageya naragaLu avara miduLinalli mincuttiruttave.

idakke badalu, salIsAgi Odalu bAradiruva makkaLa miduLinalli
OduttiruvAga eraDu bageya (1nE mattu 3nE) naragaLu mAtra
mincuttiruttave; akkaragaLannu dhvanigaLAgi mArpaDisuva kivige
sambandhisida (2nE bageya) naragaLu avaru OduttiruvAga mincuvudE
illa. I naragaLU mincuva hAge avarige sariyAgi Oduva bageyannu


tiLisikoTTalli, munde salIsAgi Oduvudu hEge embudannu avaru
tAvAgiyE kalitukoLLuttAre.

ingliS‌nantaha nuDigaLa barahagaLalli tumbA toDaku toDakAda
spelling samasyeyide; hAgAgi, avugaLalliyU I rIti akSaragaLigU
dhvanigaLigU naDuve sambandhavide embudannu makkaLige tOrisikoDu
vudu tumbA kaSTada kelasa. kannaDadalliyU kannaDadavE Ada padagaLalli
I sambandhavannu makkaLige sulabhavAgi tOrisikoDabahudu. Adare,
samskxtadinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLu avaralli gondalavannunTu
mADaballuvu.

yAkendare, I padagaLannu kannaDadalli avugaLa uccAraNe
hEgideyO hAgeyE bareyuva badalu, samskxtadalliruva hAgeyE
bareyabEkemba kannaDada maTTige tIra anavaSyakavAda niyamavide. mahA
prANa, Sa, x modalAda halavu akSaragaLige bEkAguva uccAraNe
heccinavara OdinallU kANisikoLLuvudilla. hAgAgi, akSaragaLigU dhvani
gaLigU naDuviruva sambandhavannu kanDukoLLuvalli makkaLige I padagaLu
tondare koDuttave.

samskxtada eravalugaLannu samskxtadalliruva hAgeyE kannaDadallU
bareyabEkemba I niyamavannu biTTukoDuva mUlaka, illavE
intaha akSaragaLiruva samskxta eravalugaLannu cikka makkaLa pustakagaLalli
baLasadiruva mUlaka, avarige mElina sambandhavannu kanDukoLLuvalli
gondalavunTAgada hAge nODikoLLabahudu.

barahagaLannu makkaLu sariyAda kramadalli Odalu kaliyabEku mAtra
valla; Oduttiruva hAge, avu Enu hELuttive embudannu gottumADi
koLLalU kaliyabEkAguttade. vAkyagaLalli baruva padagaLannu artha
koDuva gumpugaLAgi jODisi Oduvudu hEge embudannu, mattu
Oduvudannu sariyAda jAgagaLalli nillisi nillisi Oduvudu hEge
embudannu avaru kaliyabEkAguttade. I kelasavannu sariyAgi naDesalu
bArada makkaLige avaru Oduttiruva vAkyagaLa oLaracaneyantahadu
embantaha vyAkaraNada tiLivannu koDisidalli, adu avarige neravannu
nIDuttade.

Odinalli baruva kliSTavAda vAkyagaLannu saraLa vAkyagaLAgi oDeyu
vudu hEge, avugaLalli mukhya vAkya yAvudu, uLida vAkyagaLu I
mukhya vAkya koDuva arthavannu hEge heccisuttave embantaha
vyAkaraNakke sambandhisida tiLivu Odinalli munde hOgalu neravu


nIDuttade. I tiLivu taragatiyalli mundiruvavarigintalU hinde
bILuvavarige heccina neravannu nIDuttade.

## bareyuva kelasa
Odalu kaliyuva kelasakkintalU bareyalu kaliyuva kelasa heccu
toDakinadAdudu. idakke kAraNavEnendare, mAtigU barahakkU naDu
viruva halavu vyatyAsagaLannu bareyuvavaru tamma baravaNigeyalli
mUDisabEkAguttade. udAharaNegAgi, mAtinalli baruva vAkyagaLu
tunDu tunDAgiraballuvu; Adare, barahadalli avella iDiyiDiyAgiru
vante nODikoLLabEkAguttade. tunDu vAkyagaLigU iDI vAkyagaLigU
naDuviruva vyatyAsa entahadu, tunDu vAkyagaLannu iDI vAkyagaLAgi
mArpaDisuvudu hEge embudannu tiLididdalli mAtra, avarige I
kelasavannu sariyAgi naDesalu baruttade.

cikka cikka vAkyagaLannu jODisi udda vAkyagaLannu unTumADuvudu
hEge, ondu cikka vAkyadoLage bEre cikka vAkyagaLannu irisi kliSTavAda
vAkyagaLannu unTumADuvudu hEge embudannU avarige kalisabEkAgu
ide. yAkendare, sAmAnyavAgi mAtinalli bAradiruvantaha halavu
bageya udda vAkyagaLu mattu kliSTa vAkyagaLu barahadalli baruttave.
ellA makkaLigU ivannu unTumADuva bage hEge embudannu
tAvAgiyE kalitukoLLalu baruvudilla.

vAkyagaLannu sErisi pArAgaLannu kaTTuva bageyannU avarige kalisi
koDabEkAguttade. oLLE mAdari pArAgaLalli modalige mukhya
viSayavannu mundiDuva cikka vAkyaviruttade; AmEle, adannu heccu
vivaravAgi tiLisuva, mattu adakke bembala nIDuva viSayagaLu
baruttave; mattu koneyalli, muktAyagoLisuva vAkya baruttade.
vAkyagaLannu I rIti ondakkondu hondikoLLuva hAge bareyuvudu
hEge embudannu avarige tiLisikoDabEku.

barahadalli baruva pArAgaLannu hEge aNigoLisuvudu embudannU
avarige kalisabEkAguttade. idu bEre bEre gurigaLigAgi baLakeyAguva
barahagaLalli bEre bErAgiruttade. ondu kateyannu bareyuvavaru adara
kate munde hOguvudakke heccina gamana koDabEkAguttade. idakke
badalu, ondu viSayada maTTige innobbara oppige illavE olavannu
paDeyabEkendiruvavaru A viSayavannu Odugara mundirisuvudu


hEge, mattu adannu bembalisuva viSayagaLannu koDuva bage hEge
embudakke gamana koDabEkAguttade.

mAtinallilladantaha kone (.), arekone (;), taDe (,) modalAda
halavu bageya gurutugaLannu barahadalli baLasikoLLabEkAguttade. mAti
nalli baruva kayyanne, kaNNusanne, dhvaniya EriLita, biDuvu modalAdavu
gaLige badalAgi ivannu baLasalAguttade. I gurutugaLannu sariyAgi
baLasikoLLuvalli vyAkaraNada tiLivu neravige baruttade.

omme baredudannu Odi nODi, adu sariyillavendu anisidalli
adannu tiddi saripaDisuvudu hEge embudannU makkaLu tiLidirabEku.
idakkAgi avaru tAvu barediruva vAkyavannu bEre bEre bagegaLalli
mArpaDisalu kalitirabEkAguttade. tAvu barediruva vAkyada oLaracane
entahadu, A vAkyavannu bEre yAva racanegaLige mArpaDisabahudu
embantaha vyAkaraNada tiLivu avarigiddalli, tAvu barediruva barahavannu
tiddi saripaDisuva kelasavannu avaru heccu cannAgi naDesaballaru.

intaha hattu halavu kavSalyagaLannu bareyalu kaliyuva makkaLu
paDedirabEkAguttade; ivakke sambandhisida vyAkaraNada tiLivannu koDisi
dalli, avarige I kavSalyagaLannu tammadAgisikoLLalu heccu sulabhavAgu
ttade. hAgAgi, yAva bageya vyAkaraNada tiLivu bareyalu kaliyuva
makkaLige neravannu nIDaballudu embudannu kanDuhiDiyuva kelasavannU
nAvu ivattu naDesabEkAgide.

idakke udAharaNeyAgi, barahagaLalli sariterapina (co-ordinated)
racanegaLannu baLasuvalli kANisikoLLuva tondareyannu gamanisabahudu:
ondE bageya eraDu illavE heccu viSayagaLannu tiLisabEkAdAga
intaha racanegaLannu baLasalAguttade.

udAharaNegAgi, avanu ApIsigU hOgalilla, maduvegU
baralilla emba vAkyadalli eraDu viSayagaLannu eduredurAgi nillisi
hELalAgide, mattu idakkAgi sariterapina racaneyannu baLasalAgide.
intaha racanegaLalli viSayagaLannu jODisuvudakkAgi mattu, illavE,
Agali, U, inta modalAda pada illavE pratyayagaLannu baLasa
lAguttade. tiLisabEkAgiruva viSayagaLu eraDakkinta heccu iddalli,
avannu ondu paTTiyAgiyU koDabahudu.

sariterapina racanegaLalli viSayagaLannu pada, padakante tunDu vAkya,
illavE iDI vAkyagaLa mUlaka sUcisalAguttade. illi bareyuvavaru
mukhyavAgi gamanisabEkAgiruva viSayavEnendare, ivugaLalli baruva


nuDitagaLu ondE bageyavAgirabEku. yAkendare, avu bEre bEre
bageyavAgiddare Odugarige tondareyAguttade.

udAharaNegAgi, keLage koTTiruva paTTiyalli ellA nuDitagaLU
ondE bageyavAgilla:

ivattu nAvu mADiruva kelasagaLu:

1. viLAsagaLannella eNNukadalli sErisi accu hAkidevu
2. hodikegaLige viLAsagaLannu anTisi suttOlegaLannu
3. avugaLoLage hAkidevu
4. anceyalli kaLisabEkAduvannu bEre irisalAyitu
5. ippattAytu kaDegaLige suttOle muTTisiddu

I udAharaNeyalli modala mUru nuDitagaLu vAkyagaLu; Adare,
nAlkaneyadu ondu padakante. idallade, mUranE vAkyada racane
modala eraDu vAkyagaLa racaneginta bErAgide. I vyatyAsagaLindAgi,
mElina sariterapina baraha Odugarige tondare koDuttade embudannu
gamanisabahudu. adu sulabhavAgi OdisikonDu hOguvudilla.

intaha vyatyAsagaLu tamma barahadalli sErikonDiveyembudu
bareyuvavarige sAmAnyavAgi gottE Aguvudilla. avu gamanakke bara
bEkiddalli, barahavannu avaru gaTTiyAgi Odi nODabEku, illavE
bErobbara hattira Odalu hELabEku. barahagaLalli baruva racanegaLa
tiLivu intaha tappugaLannu gurutisuvalli, mattu avannu saripaDisuvalli
bareyuvavara neravige baruttade.

## ingliS bhASeya kalike
SAleyalli ingliS bhASeyannu eraDanE bhASeyAgi kalisuttiruvAga
makkaLa tAynuDiyannu baLasabahudE, illavE baLasabEkE emba viSaya
dalli ittIcege tumbA carcegaLu naDeyuttive; Adare, ivattu heccina
samSOdhakarU ingliS bhASeya kalikeyalli tAynuDiya baLake halavu
bageyalli neravAgaballudu embudannu oppuva hantakke bandiddAre.

Adare kaLeda SatamAnadinda, ingliS taragatigaLalli tAynuDiyannu
baLasalE kUDadu emba kaTTaleyondu beLedubandide. idakke tAynuDi


yannu A rIti baLasidalli, adu ingliS kalikege aDDiyannunTumADa
balludemba tappu tiLivaLike ingliS nuDiyannu kalisuvavaralli beLedu
bandudE mukhya kAraNa.

idallade, makkaLu yAvAgalU ingliS bhASeyannE kELuttiddalli,
mattu bEre yAva bhASeyannU kELade iddalli, avarige ingliS‌nalli
tumbA cannAgi mattu bahaLa bEgane mAtanADalu bandItemba
innondu tappu anisikeyU idakke kAraNavAgittu.

ingliS bhASeyannu SikSaNa mAdhyamavAgi baLasuva kelavu SAlegaLa
llantU makkaLu SAleyoLage tamma tAynuDiyannu baLasuvudE ondu
doDDa aparAdhavembudAgi ivattigU parigaNisalAguttide.

nijakkU idu makkaLa illavE doDDavara kalike hEge sAguttade
embudannu tiLiyade mADiruvantaha kaTTale. yArE Agali, tamma
lliruva tiLuvaLikeya taLahadiya mEle hosa tiLuvaLikeyannu paDeya
bEkAguttade. SAlege baruva modalE makkaLu tamma tAynuDiyalli
cannAgi mAtanADalu kalitiruttAre; tamma anisikegaLannu A bhASeyalli
tiLisuvudu hEge, mattu adaralli bEreyavaru hELidudannu kELi
tiLiyuvudu hEge embudannu avaru cannAgi tiLidiruttAre. avara
AlOcanegaLellavU A bhASeyalliyE naDeyuttiruttave.

hAgiruvAga, makkaLu SAleyalli hosa bhASeyondannu kaliya
bEkiddalli, adannu avaru adakke modalE kalitukonDidda tAynuDiya
mUlakavEnE kaliyabEku. idallade, bhASeya svarUpaventahadu
embudannu SAlege sEruva modalEnE avarige tAynuDiya kalike
tiLisikoTTide. dhvanigaLannu baLasi padagaLannu unTumADuvudu hEge,
avannu baLasi padakantegaLannu mattu vAkyagaLannu unTumADuvudu
hEge, avu arthagaLannu hEge sUcisaballuvu embudannella avaru
adakke modalE tamma tAynuDiya kalikeya mUlaka tiLidiruttAre.

avaru kaliyabEkAgiruva hosa bhASeyalli (ingliS‌nalli) idannE
bErondu bageyalli naDesalAguttade. I bage entahadu embudannu
avaru gamanisuva hAge mADuva mUlaka, adannu kaliyalu toDagisu
vudE sariyAda mattu sulabhavAda dAri. I rIti tAynuDiya
mUlaka hosa bhASeyannu kalisahoraTalli, makkaLige nemmadiya kalike
dorakuttade, mattu hosa bhASeyalli anjade mAtu kaliyalu
baruttade.


idakke badalu, tAynuDiyannu SAleyalli baLasalE kUDademba
kaTTaleyannu mADidalli, kalikeyalli avaru baLasaballa ondu amUlya
vAda sAdhanavannu avarinda kittukonDahAgAguttade, mattu tAynuDiya
kuritAgi avaralli kILarimeyannu unTumADida hAgAguttade.
idarindAgi, halavu makkaLige tamma tannatanavannE kaLedukonDa hAgeyU
Aguttade.

nijakkU makkaLu tamma eraDanE bhASeyannu modalanE bhASeya
taLahadiya mElEnE kaliyuttAre. taragatiyalli tAynuDiyannu baLasa
bArademba kaTTaleyannu mADidarU, avaru kaliyuttiruvAga manassi
nalli illavE miduLinalli tAynuDiyannu baLasadiruvudilla. yAkendare,
hAge baLasadiralu avarige sAdyavE illa! hAgAgi, avara tAynuDi
yannu manassinalli mAtravE baLasalAguttideyO, illavE horagU
baLasalAguttideyO embudE illiruva vyatyAsa.

pada mattu vAkyagaLigU avugaLa arthakkU naDuviruva sambandhavannu
tiLidukonDu, adannu nenapinalli uLisikoLLuva kelasa makkaLa miduLina
ondu kaDeyalli mAtra naDeyuttade. hosadondu bhASeyannu
kaliyuva makkaLallU I kelasa adE jAgadalli, endare avaru tamma
tAynuDiyannu kaliyuttiruvAga baLasida jAgadallEnE naDeyuttade.
eraDanE bhASeyannu enTu-hattu varSa dATida makkaLu kaliyuttiru
vAgalU avara miduLinalli I kelasavannu naDesalu bEre hosa jAga
baLakege baruvudilla. endare, tAynuDiya tiLivige sambandhisida hAgEnE
avara eraDanE bhASeya tiLivu miduLinalli nelegoLLuttade.

modalanE bhASeya nelegaTTina mEle eraDanE bhASeya kalike
naDeyuva kAraNa, averaDu bhASegaLa naDuve vyAkaraNada niyama
gaLalliruva vyatyAsavannu makkaLu gamanisuva hAge mADidalli, eraDanE
bhASeyannu kaliyuva kelasa heccu sulabhavAgaballudendu samSO
dhanegaLu tOrisikoTTive. intaha tiLivu cikka makkaLigintalU
doDDavarige heccu neravannu nIDuttade.

udAharaNegAgi, kannaDadalli kriyApada vAkyada konege baruttade
(nAnu manege hOde); Adare, ingliS‌nalli idu vAkyada naDuve
baruttade (I went home). idu I eraDu bhASegaLalli baLakeyAguva
vAkyagaLa naDuviruva ondu mukhyavAda vyatyAsa. idakke sambandhisidante,
bEreyU halavu vyatyAsagaLu I eraDu bhASegaLa naDuve kANisi
koLLuttave:


udAharaNegAgi, kannaDadalli ottAseya (auxiliary) kriyApada
mukhya kriyApadada baLika baruttade (bandiddEne), Adare ingliS‌nalli
adu mukhya kriyApadada modalu baruttade (have come). kannaDadalli
marada keLage ennuttEve, Adare ingliS‌nalli under the tree
ennuttEve; kannaDadalli marada gellu ennuttEve; ingliS‌nalli branch
of the tree ennuttEve; kannaDadalli bEga banni ennuttEve; ingliS‌nalli
come quickly ennuttEve.

intaha bEreyU halavAru vyatyAsagaLu I eraDu bhASegaLa
naDuve kANisuttive; IgAgalE ondu bageya baLakeyannu kalitavarige
adakkU Iga kaliyabEkAgiruva baLakegU naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLannu
tOrisikoTTalli, avara kalike heccu sulabhavAgi sAguttade.

ondu bhASeyalli Oduva mattu bareyuva kelasavannu naDesalu
halavu kavSalyagaLannu kaydaSa mADikoLLabEkAguttade; ivannu bEre
bhASegaLalli paDeyuvudakkinta tAynuDiyalli paDeyuvudE heccu
sulabha. yAkendare, tAynuDiyalli cannAgi mAtanADalu baruvu
darinda, adaralli Oduvudannu mattu bareyuvudannu bEgane kaliya
bahudu. I rIti tAynuDiyalli paDeda kavSalyagaLannu AmEle sulabha
vAgi bEre bhASegaLige vargAyisalu baruttade. hAgAgi, modalige
tAynuDiyalli Odalu mattu bareyalu kalisi, AmEle eraDanE
illavE mUranE bhASeyalli kalisuvudE sariyAda dAri.

ingliS‌nalli tumbA toDaku toDakAda spelling samasyeyide.
hAgAgi, adara barahagaLalli akSaragaLigU dhvanigaLigU naDuve
hondANike ide embudannu makkaLu gamanisuva hAge mADuvudu
tumbA toDakina kelasa. halavu mandi makkaLa gamanakke idu baruvudE
illa. hAgAgi, antaha makkaLu padagaLannu akSaragaLAgi oDedu dhvani
gaLondige hondisalu hOgade, nEravAgi Odalu toDaguttAre. I
rIti Odalu modalige aSTondu tondareyAguvudillavAdarU, kalike
yalli munde hOdante heccu heccu barahagaLannu OdabEkAguvudAda
kAraNa, avaru kalikeyalli hinde bILatoDaguttAre.

hAgAgi, modalige kannaDadalli Odalu kaliyuva mUlaka sariyAgi
Oduva bage hEge embudannu tiLidukonDiruva makkaLu ingliS‌nallU
sariyAgi Odalu sulabhavAgi kalitukoLLaballaru. yAkendare, Oduva
kelasakkAgi kannaDadalli paDediruva kavSalyavannu avaru sulabhavAgi tamma
ingliS OdigU vargAyisaballaru.


akSaragaLigU dhvanigaLigU nEra sambandhaviruva barahagaLannu Odalu
kalisuvAga makkaLige ondu varSadalli eSTu kaliyalu sAdhyavAgu
ttadeyO aSTannu kaliyalu, ingliS‌nantaha spelling samasyeyiruva
barahagaLannu Odalu kalisuvAga eraDUvare varSagaLaSTu samaya
tagaluttadeyendu samSOdhanegaLu tOrisikoTTive. hAgAgi, munde
kannaDavannu OduvudE bEDa ennuvavarigU modalige adaralli Odalu
kalisi, AmEle ingliS‌nalli Odalu kalisuvudarinda sariyAgi Oduva
kramavannu avaru heccu bEgane tiLidukoLLaballaru.

mEle vivarisida hAge, Odalu kaliyuvudakkintalU bareyalu kali
yuvudu heccu toDakina kelasa. idannu eraDanE bhASeyalli naDesalu
kaliyuvudu mattaSTu toDakina kelasa. I eraDanE kelasavannu tamma
tAynuDiyalli bareyalu kalitiruva makkaLu eraDanE nuDiyalli heccu
sulabhavAgi naDesaballaru. yAkendare, avaru idakkAgi tamma tAynuDi
yalli kalitu konDidda kavSalyagaLalli heccinavannU eraDanE bhASeya
baravaNigegU vargAyisikoLLaballaru.

makkaLige tamma tAynuDiyalli AlOcisalu EnU tondare
yAguvudilla. Adare, eraDanE bhASeyalli sAkaSTu paLaguvallivarege
avarige adaralli AlOcisalu baruvudilla. hAgAgi, bareyabEkAgiruva
viSayagaLannu modalige tamma tAynuDiyalli AlOcisi, mattu avannu
bEkAda kramadalli jODisikonDu, AmEle eraDanE bhASeyalli
bareyuvudu avarige heccu sulabhavAda kelasavAgaballudu.

idallade, tAynuDiyalli bareyalu kalitiruva makkaLu tAvu
oTTugUDisiruva viSayagaLannu modalige tamma tAynuDiyalli baredu,
AmEle adannu eraDanE bhASege anuvAdisabahudu. eraDanE bhASe
yannu kaliyuva modala hantagaLalli intaha anuvAdada baLakeyU
neravige baruttadeyendu ittIcegina kelavu samSOdhanegaLu tOrisi
koTTive.

eraDanE bhASeyannu kaliyuttiruvAga oTToTTige tamma tAynuDi
yallU Odu-barahada tiLivannu heccisikoLLuva makkaLu eraDanE
bhASeya kalikeyalli bEre makkaLiginta munde hOguttAre. tAynuDi
yannu pUri kaDegaNisiruva makkaLu modamodalige tumbA vEgavAgi
munde hOguttiruvante kANisuttAre; Adare, AmEle avaralli halavu
makkaLu tamma eraDanE bhASeya kalikeyalli hinde bILatoDaguttAre.
idarinda gottAguvudEnendare, eraDanE bhASeya kalikeyalli heccina
makkaLigU tamma tAynuDiya bembala bEkAguttade.


illi innondu viSayavannU gamanisabEkAgide: bhASeya kalikeyalli
eraDu mukhyavAda hantagaLiruttave. adaralli salIsAgi mAtanADalu
kaliyuvudu ondu hanta, mattu gaNita, vijYAna modalAda amUrta
(abstract) viSayagaLannu tiLiyalu, mattu innobbarige tiLisalu kaliyu
vudu innondu hanta.

SAleyalli modalinindalU ingliS nuDiyannE SikSaNamAdhyama
vAgi baLasiruva makkaLu A bhASeyalli salIsAgi mAtanADuvudannu
gamanisiruva halavarige, avaru adannu bahaLa cannAgi kalitukonDi
ddArendu anisuttade. hAgAgi, tamma makkaLU ingliS nuDiyannE
SikSaNamAdhyamavAgi baLasi, AdaSTu bEgane A bhASeyalli pariNata
rAgabEkendu avaru bayasuttAre. Adare, nijakkU antaha makkaLu
tamma ingliS kalikeyalli modalaneya hantavannaSTE talapiruttAre.

munde eraDanE hantavannu talapuva kelasadalli avaru hinde bILu
ttAre. idakke kAraNavEnendare, makkaLu tamma tAynuDiyalli I kelasa
vannu heccu sulabhavAgi naDesaballaru, mattu AmEle adannu tamma
eraDaneya bhASegU sulabhavAgi vargAyisaballaru. ingliS bhASe
yannu SikSaNamAdhyamavAgi baLasuttiruva makkaLige intaha tAynuDiya
neravu dorakuvudillavAda kAraNa, avarige tamma kalikeya eraDanE
hantavannu talapuvalli tumbA tondareyAguttade.

hAgAgi, modalige kannaDavannE SikSaNamAdhyamavAgi baLasi, AmEle
hayskUlinalli, illavE munde kAlEjinalli ingliS bhASeyannu SikSaNa
mAdhyamavAgi baLasuva makkaLu A bhASeyalli eraDanE hantavannu
talapuvalli suruvinindalU adakkAgi ingliS bhASeyannE baLasuva
makkaLiginta munde hOguttAre.

## 2.9 ganTegeSTu puTa Odaballiri?
Oduvudaralli bariya vEgakke antaha mahatvavEnU illa. Odiddannu sari
yAgi arthamADikoLLuvudu, yAva mAtu sari, yAvudu tappu
endu nirdharisikoLLuvudu, mattu barahada andavannu managanDu
Anandisuvudu - ivellavU Odininda manuSyanu paDedukoLLabahu
dAda mahatvada amSagaLu.

AdarU, ivellA kAryagaLige mUlAdhAravAda Oduvikeyemba
yAntrika kelasavondideyalla, puTagaLa mEle baredudannu illavE


mudrisidudannu kaNNininda nODi mAtugaLAgi illavE mAtugaLa artha
gaLAgi parivartisikoLLuvantaha I kelasavannu tvaregoLisidaSTU namma
Oduvikeya vEga jAstiyAgiyE Aguttade, mattu antaha vEgadinda
namma samayada uLitAyavU Aguttade embudannu illi gamanisuvudu
avaSya. hAgAgi, Oduvikeyemba I yAntrika kelasavannu tvaregoLisu
vudu hEge embudannu tiLidukoLLuvudu oLLeyadu.

## mAna Odu
AlOcaneya illavE kalpaneya vEgaveSTiruvudO aSTE vEgavAgi
OduvikeyU sAgaballudAdare, adannu atyuttamavAda Oduvikeyendu
kareyabahudu. Adare, barahadalliruvudannu nODi grahisikoLLalu kaNNige
svalpavAdarU samaya tagaluvudAddarinda Oduvikeya vEga AlO
caneya vEgakkinta aSTara maTTigAdarU kaDimeyAgiyE Aguttade.

miniTige ondu sAvira padagaLa varegU kaNNu grahisikoLLabahudu.
Adare, hIge kaNNu grahisikonDudannu arthamADikoLLalu innU svalpa
samaya hiDiyuttade. hAgAgi, atyanta vEgavAgi OduvavarU miniTige
ArunUru-ELunUrakkinta jAsti padagaLannu Odi grahisikoLLalAraru.

mavnavAgi Oduvavaru padagaLannu ondondAgi uccarisi Odu
vavariginta heccu SIghravAgi Odaballarembudu idarinda vyaktavAguttade.
nijakkU bahaLa vEgavAgi Oduvavaru vAkyagaLalli baruva padagaLannu
mattu akSaragaLannu bEre bErAgi gamanisikoLLalu hOgade oTToTTAgi
Odalu kalitiruttAre. ati paricitavAda padagaLannu avugaLa kelavE
kelavu viSiSTavAda amSagaLinda (udA: talekoTTu, ottakSara modalA
davugaLinda) mAtravE UhisikoLLuva abhyAsa ivarigiruttade.

gaTTiyAgi OduvavarU intaha viSiSTavAda amSagaLinda padagaLa
iravannu UhisikoLLaballaru. Adare, A padagaLannu avaru bEre
bErAgi uccarisabEkAguttade. hAgAgi, avara Odina vEga aSTaramaTTige
kunThitavAguttade.

gaTTiyAgi Oduvavara kaNNu yAvAgalU avaru Oduttiruva
padakkinta mundeyE iruvudembudannu gamanisabahudu. kaNNigiruvaSTu
vEga nAligegillavAda kAraNa, avara Odina vEga nAligeya vEgadallE
uLiyuttade.


## barahada yOgyate
uttama OdugAranige tanna Odina vEgavannu sannivESakkanusAravAgi heccu
kaDime mADikoLLuva sAmarthyavirabEku. atI uttama darjeya
barahagaLannOduvAga, Atanu adaralli baruva pratiyondu hELike
yannU tUginODi, adara sArAsAragaLannu vicArisutta munduvariya
bEkAguttade. hAgAgi, antaha barahagaLannOdalu Atanige heccu
samaya bEkAguttade. barahada darje keLagAdantella Atana Oduvikeya
vEga heccuttA hOguttade.

tamma Oduvikeyannu uttamagoLisabEkendu iruvavaru I
rIti barahada yOgyateyannanusarisi tamma Odina vEgavannu heccu
kaDime mADikoLLalu kaliyabEku. ellA rItiya barahagaLannU ondE
vEgadinda, ondakSaravannU biDade, Oduvavaru tamma samayavannu
bahaLaSTu hALu mADikoLLuttiruttArembudu spaSTa.

## Odina uddESa
barahada yOgyateyannanusarisi mAtravalla, Oduvudaralli tamma uddESa
vEnembudannu anusarisiyU Odina vEgavannu heccu kaDime mADi
koLLalu kaliyuvudu avaSya. ondu puTavannu mElininda mEle
nODiyE adaralli nAvu arasuttiruva viSayavirabahudE athavA
illavE embudannu UhisikoLLalu, mattu bEDavAgiruva puTagaLannu
hAgeyE biTTu Odannu munduvarisalu abhyAsa mADabEku. pustaka
dalliruva pariviDi, viSayasUci, modalAdavugaLa sahAyadinda namage
bEkAgiruva amSa intahadE jAgadallideyembudannu aritukoLLalu
kaliyabEku.

pustakadalli barediruvudellavU vEdavAkyavendu lEkhakana hELike
gaLannella hAgeyE giLipATha mADikoLLuvudu bahaLa mandi vidyArthi
gaLalli mattu itara Odugaralli tOribaruva innondu korateyAgide.
hELikegaLa satyAsatyategaLannu vicArisi nODuvante, barahadalli kANisuva
viSayagaLannU hAgeyE svIkarisade, avannu vimarSisuva abhyAsavannu
beLesabEku. Oduvike namma AlOcaneyannu keraLisuttirabEku.

Adare, I AlOcane sandarbhada hiDitadallirabEku. ellellO
aleyutta hOgabAradu. kelavaru OduvAga, ondondu padavU
avara nenapinalliruva yAva yAvudO haLeya anubhavagaLannu hora
taruttiruttade, mattu avara kaNNu gereyinda gerege barahavannOdutta


sAguvudAdarU, manassu mAtra innellO aledADuttiruttade. intaha
Oduvikeyinda Oduganige Ananda sigabahudAdarU adara nijavAda
uddESa mAtra siddhisalAradu.

## Odina sAmarthya
AlOcanA sAmarthyadante Oduva sAmarthyavU obbobbaralli
ondondu teranAgiruttade. prayatnapaTTalli pratiyobbanU tannalliruva
I sAmarthyavannu ondu niScitavAda maTTadavarege Erisaballanu. tAnu
talapabahudAda Odina vEga entahadembudannu tiLidukonDu, adannu
paDeyalu pratiyobbanU prayatnisuvudu avaSya.

sAmAnyavAgi buddhivantarAda Odugarella tAvu talapabahudAda
Odina vEgakkinta bahaLa kaDime vEgadallEnE Oduttiruvarendu
samSOdhanegaLinda tiLidu bandide. udAharaNegAgi, gaNita, vijYAna
modalAda viSayagaLalli jAsti ankagaLannu paDeyaballa vidyArthi
kannaDa, ingliS modalAdavugaLalli kaDime ankagaLannu paDeyu
tiruvanAdare, avanige sariyAgi Odalu bAradiruvudE idakke mukhya
kAraNavirabahudu. kannaDa illavE ingliS barahagaLa Odu avana
buddiya OTakke sariyAgi ODade, avanige Odinalli bEsara bandiralU
sAdhyavide.

## yAntrika upakaraNagaLu
Oduvikeya vEgavannu mattu kramavannu abhivxddhigoLisalu halavu
bageya vidhAnagaLannu kanDuhiDiyalAgide. idakkAgi kelavu yAntrika
upakaraNagaLannU baLasabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, TekisToskOp emba
upakaraNavu ondu niScita vEgadalli OdabEkAda baraha ondu paradeya
mEle bILuttiruvante mADuttade. I vEgavannu svalpa svalpavE heccisi,
Oduganu jOru jOrAgi Oduvante mADalu sAdhyavide. padagaLannu
ondondAgi Oduva badalu artha ghaTakagaLAgiruva padasamUhagaLannu
oTToTTAgi grahisuvante prErEpisalU kUDa I upakaraNavannu baLasa
bahudu.

yAntrika upakaraNagaLa sahAyavilladiddarU svaprayatnadindalE
namma Odina vEgavannu heccisikoLLalu sAdhyavide. I viSayadalli
vidyArthigaLu mAtravalla, vayaskarU prayatnisidalli saphalarAga
ballarendu samSOdhanegaLu tOrisikoTTive.


Oduttiruva viSayadallE uLidiruvante manassannu hiDitadalliTTu
koLLuvudu, mavnavAgi mattu vEgavAgi Odalu kaliyuvudu, ondu
pArAdalli hELiruvantaha viSayavannu adara modalina onderaDu vAkya
gaLindalE Uhisalu yatnisuvudu - intaha halavu bageya abhyAsa
gaLa mUlaka Oduvikeyannu abhivxddhi goLisalu sAdhyavide.

## 2.10 Odalu bandarU OduvudillavEke?
indina vidyArthigaLu Odinalli jAsti Asakti vahisuttilla, ottAyakkAgi
paThyapustakagaLannu konDukonDiddarU avannella Odalu hOgade bariya
mArgadarSakagaLindalE parIkSege bEkAguvaSTu uttaragaLannu bAyi
pATha mADikonDu aSTarindalE txptarAgiruttAremba mAtu AgAga
kELibaruttade. vidyArthigaLalli mAtravalla, vayaskarallU Odina bagge I
rItiya aSraddhe tOribaruttide. paThyapustakagaLannu biTTu bErAva pustaka
gaLannu prakaTisahoraTarU prakASakara kay suTTu hOguttiruvudu ida
kkondu uttama nidarSana.

nammalli divasadinda divasakke SAlegaLa sankhye jAstiyAguttide,
mattu I SAlegaLalli 'Odalu-bareyalu' kaliyuttiruva vidyArthigaLa
sankhyeyU jAstiyAguttide. idarindAgi nammalliruva akSarasthara sankhye
yEnO heccuttide; Adare, nijakkU I akSara kalita mandiyannu
akSarastharendu kareyalu sAdhyavE embudannu yOcisuvudu avaSya.

tAvu kalita akSaravannu tamma hitakkAgi illavE AnandakkAgi ivaru
baLasuttillavAdare, akSara kalita ivarigU itara anakSarastharigU Enu
bhEda siddhisida hAgAyitu? Odu kalisuvudakkintalU kalita Odinalli
abhiruci mattu Asakti huTTuvante mADuvudE ati mukhyavAda kelasa
vembudu idarinda spaSTavAguttade.

## Odina uddESa
kALidAsana illavE bhAsana kxtigaLannu OdabEkendu samskxta kaliyu
vavarige, illavE SEks‌piyar OdabEkendu ingliS kaliyuvavarige,
munde A Odina upayOgavannu hEge mADikoLLabahudembudannu
yArU tiLisikoDabEkAgilla. Adare, nammalli heccinavarigU Odu


Odalu bandarU OduvudillavEke?

kaliyuvudaralli, illavE bhASe kaliyuvudaralli intaha nEravAda
uddESavEnU iruvudilla.

es.es.el.si.yalli sarAsari jAsti sigabEkendu hindI klAsige
sEruvavarige, illavE mArku heccu sigabEkendu kannaDa biTTu samskxta
vannarasuvavarige kALidAsanAdarEnu bErobbanAdarEnu? kaliyuvikeya
uddESa I rIti tiruvu muruvAgiruvudE kalita viSayada mEle
nammalli beLedu baruttiruva I anAstheya mUla.

adbhuta ramya kAdambarigaLannOdi manassannu taNisikonDavarige,
illavE vicArapUrNa lEkhanagaLannOdi buddhiyannu harita mADi
konDavarige hosa hosa pustakagaLannu konDukonDO, eravalu
paDedO OdabEkendu yArU ottAya mADabEkAgilla.

Adare, intaha pustakagaLa illavE lEkhanagaLa ruciyannE nODira
dantaha sAmAnya Odugarige avugaLalli Asakti huTTabEkAdare, adakkAgi
yArAdarU prayatna illavE ottAya mADalEbEkalla? I kelasavannu
mADalu ati uttama sthaLavendare makkaLige Odu kalisuttiruvantaha
SAlegaLE embudannu mAtra heccinavarU gamanisidantilla.

## Odina sannivESa
maneyalli vayaskaru dinAlU pustakagaLannO patrikegaLannU Oduttiru
varAdare, antaha sannivESadalli beLeyuva makkaLu tAvAgiyE Odinalli
Asakti tOrisabahudu. antaha Asaktiyannu gamanisi, avarige rucisu
vantaha Odina sAmagriyannu odagisi koTTalli, A Asakti tAnAgiyE
beLedukoLLuttade.

Adare, ivattu heccina vidyArthigaLU intaha Odina sannivESa
lavalESavU illadantaha manegaLallE beLeyuttiddAre; hAgAgi, avarige
Odannu mAtravalla, Odina ruciyannU kalisikoDuvantaha javAbdAri
sampUrNavAgi namma SAlegaLa mEle biddiruttade.

namma SAlegaLu mAtra, I prAmukhyavAda kelasada kaDege svalpavU
gamanavittantilla. Odannu kaliyuttiruvAgalAgali, kalitu mugisidAga
lAgali, I makkaLalli heccinavarigU pustakagaLannu kanDarEnE talenOvu
baruttade. idakke I vidyArthigaLannu dUri phalavilla.

svAbhAvikavAgi avaralli mUDibaruva Asaktiyannu cikkandinallEnE
muridu hAkuva avara adhyApakarannE dUrabEku. kate kAdambarigaLa


nOdi samaya hALumADabEDiri, paThyapustakagaLannu mAtravE Odiri
endu upadESa mADuva I mahAtmarannu bErEnanna bEku?

## Odina phala - manOranjane
pustakagaLa mUlaka, illavE patrikegaLa mUlaka bEre bEre viSayagaLa
nnaritukoLLalu sAdhyavAguvudembudEnO nija. Adare, pustakagaLu iru
vudE I 'oNa' uddESakkAgi emba bhAvane makkaLalli bErUritendare,
avu mADuva innondu aSTE mukhyavAda kAryakke sandarbhavE
dorakadantAguttade.

calaccitra, nATaka modalAduvannu nODi santOSapaDuvante,
pustakagaLannu OdiyU manuSyanu santOSapaDaballanu embudannu I
ruciyannu savida mattu saviyuttiruva nAvellarU ballevu. Adare, jana
sAmAnyarige I ruciya arivu svalpavU Adantilla. paThyapustakagaLannu
horatupaDisi, bEre pustakagaLa mArATa ivattu hEge naDeyuttide
embudannu gamanisidalli idu spaSTavAguttade. vidyArthigaLige pustakagaLa
ruciyannu tOrisikoDuvudakkAgi namma SAlegaLu nEravAda prayatna
naDesabEku.

Odinalli abhiruci huTTadE iruvudakke, illavE mUDibanda Asakti
alligE naSisi hOguvudakke halakelavu viSayagaLu kAraNagaLAga
balluvu. manassige hiDisuvantaha pustakavAvudU Odu kaliyuttiruva
huDugara kaNNige bILalillavembudondu; hAge kaNNige biddarU adara
lliruva kateyannu A kateya OTakke hondikoLLuvante SIghravAgi Oduva
krama avarige karagatavAgillavembudu innondu; A kateyannu sariyAgi
arthamADikonDu AnandisuvaSTu avara padasampattu beLedillavembu
dinnondu; antaha pustakagaLannu OduvudE tappemba bhAvaneyannu
avaralli tAyitandeyaru illavE adhyApakaru mUDisiruvarembudu
mattondu.

intaha halavu kAraNagaLindAgi, Odalu bandarU OdadE iru
vantaha janara sankhye nammalli jAstiyAgide. kAlEjina hostilannu
dATidarU, tamma paThyapustaka (illavE avugaLa mArgadarSike)gaLannu
biTTu bEre pustakagaLalli ondE ondannU sampUrNavAgi buDadinda
koneya varege Odida anubhava namma vidyArthigaLalli bahaLa mandigilla.
I vidyArthigaLella tamma jIvanadalli atyamUlyavAda ondu anu
bhavakke horatAgiddArembudu bahaLa bEsarada sangati.


## Odalu bandarU Oduvudilla Eke?
bengaLUrinantaha nagaradalli hattu hadinaydu varSa vAsisiyU
ondE ondu calanacitravannU nODadiruva mahanIyanobbaniddare
avanannu nIvu Enendu kareyabahudO adannE I pustaka Odada
mahanIyarigU anvayisabahudu.

## samasyege parihAra
akSara kalitU anakSarastharAgiyE uLiyuvantaha I duravastheyannu
hOgalADisalu namma SikSaNatajYaru mattu I viSayadalli Asakti
yiruva itara mahanIyaru EnAdarU vyavasthe mADuvudu avaSya.
Odu kaliyuttiruva makkaLa manassige hiDiyuva, mattu avara Odina
vEgakke hondikeyAguva bEre bEre pustakagaLannArisi, andavAgi
mudrisi, A makkaLa kayge sulabhavAgi eTakuvante mADabEku; I
pustakagaLannu avaru tAvAgiyE Arisi, Odi, santOSapaDuvante avara
SAlegaLalli sannivESagaLannu kalpisi koDabEku; mattu intaha Odinalli
Asakti tOradiruva makkaLige avara vayyaktika samasyegaLEnembudannu
pariSIlisi, avakke takka parihAragaLannu odagisabEku.

SikSaNAdhikArigaLu mattu SikSaNa tajYaru mAtravalla, Odugara sankhye
jAstiyAgabEkendu bayasuva itara mahanIyarU samasyeya I
mUlavannu gamanisuvudu avaSya. Odugara sankhye jAstiyAdaSTU
barehagArara, pustaka vyApArigaLa, mattu patrikegaLa vyApti heccuttade,
mattu idarindAgi avannu avalambisiruva itara udyamagaLa
vyAptiyU heccuttade. hAgAgi, bErAva kAraNakkAgi alladiddarU tamma
svArthakkAgiyAdarU I udyamigaLa dxSTi SAlA vidyArthigaLa Odina
kaDege haridare, I samasyeyannu bageharisalu heccu anukUlategaLu
labhisabahudu.


<a id="part-3"></a>

[English →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-en#part-three--speech-and-writing) | [Eke →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn-eke#part-3)

## bhAga mUrumAtu mattu baraha

barahavuLLa bhASegaLigU barahavillada bhASegaLigU naDuve, avugaLa
vyAkaraNada maTTige, yAva vyatyAsavU illa; I eraDu bageya bhASe
gaLallU paripUrNavAda vyAkaraNagaLE baLakeyAguttiruttave. idallade,
'prabuddhateya' maTTigU avugaLa vyAkaraNagaLa naDuve vyatyAsavannu
kANalu sAdhyavAgadu.

ondu bhASeyu baLasuttiruva lipiya caritre A bhASeya caritre
ginta tIra bhinnavAgiralu sAdhyavide. bhAratada bhASegaLu nAlku bEre
bEre mUlagaLinda beLedu bandive; Adare, avugaLalli heccinavU
ondE mUladinda beLedu banda lipigaLannu baLasuttive. I lipigaLa
mattu avugaLannu baLasuva barahagaLa mUla ittIceginadu; Adare,
bhASegaLa mUla miliyagaTTale varSagaLaSTu hinde, endare namma
arivige eTukada kAlavondaralli aDagide.

mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuve bEreyU halavu mukhyavAda
vyatyAsagaLiddu, kelavomme baraha mAtininda bErAgi tannadE Ada
ondu astitvavannu unTumADikoLLabahudu. hAgAdAga, adakkU
mAtigU naDuvina konDi tappi hOgi, adaralli halavu bageya kxtakate
gaLu tumbikoLLuttave; idarindAgi adu ondu 'bhASe'yendu kareyalu
sAdhyavilladantaha rUpavannu paDeyaballudu.

bhASe mattu barahagaLa naDuviruva I vyatyAsagaLu entahavu,
mattu avannu tiLidukoLLuvudu yAke avaSya embudannu I vibhAgada
Aru lEkhanagaLu spaSTapaDisuttave.

## 3.1 mAtigU ondu phOTO
kyAmarAda eduru nintu nAvella namma phOTO tegesikoLLuttEvalla?
hAgeyE namma mAtannU kyAmarAdeduru 'nillisi' adara phOTO
tegeyalu sAdhyavE? idannu sAdhyavAgisiddAre indina vijYAnigaLu.


Adare, illi phOTO tegeyuvudu sAdhAraNa kemarA alla, spekTO
grAm ennuva ondu viSiSTavAda upakaraNa. mAtu nimma bAyi
yinda horaTu ale aleyAgi gALiyalli sancarisuvAga, I
upakaraNa adannu hiDidiTTu, vicchEdisi, adara bhavtika citravondannu
tayArisi koDuttade. nIvondu bhASaNa koDuttiddIrAdare, adannu I
upakaraNa calanacitravAgiyU parivartisaballudu. TeliviSan‌na mEle
mAtina I calanacitravannu nODi, kivuDarU nimma bhASaNavannu artha
mADikoLLaballaru.

## Oduva phOTO
Adare, I bageya upakaraNada samSOdhane ittIceginadu. mAtannu
kaNNineduru hiDidu nillisuva prayatna idakkintalU eSTO varSa
hindeyE prArambhavAgittu. andina kAlada mAnavana cANAkSateya
phalavAgi, nIvindu nAnADabahudAda mAtina 'phOTO'vannu I
puTada mEle nODi, 'Odi', adara arthavannu grahisikoLLuttiddIri.

I dikkinalli kaDimeyendare mUru svatantravAda samSOdhane
gaLAdarU naDedirabEkembudu lipiSAstrajYara Uhe. purAtana IjipTina
llondu, purAtana cInAdallondu, mattu yukATan‌da mAyAdava
ralli mattondu. ivallade, mesapoTEmiyAdallU svatantravAgi
barahada samSOdhane naDedirabahudemba Uheyide. ivattu jagattinalli
baLakeyalliruva lipigaLalli heccinavakkU IjipT mattu mesapoTE
miyAgaLalli andu siddhavAgidda lipigaLE mUlavAgirabEku.

## padasankEta mattu varNasankEta
padasankEta mattu varNasankEta embudAgi lipigaLalli eraDu mukhya
vAda prabhEdagaLannu gurutisabahudu. padasankEtavendare, lipiyalli
ondondu padakkU ondondu viSiSTavAda sankEtavannu koDuvudu.
intaha lipigaLannu baLasuvavaru tamma bhASeyalli eSTu padagaLiveyO
