aSTE sankhyeya sankEtagaLannu kalitukoLLabEkAguttade. endare, intaha
lipiyalli kaDimeyendare hattippattu sAvira sankEtagaLAdarU ira
bEkAguttade.

varNasankEtavendare, bhASeyalliruva ondondu varNa (svara
illavE vyanjana)kkU ondondu sankEtavannu koDuvudu. yAva
bhASeyallU 50-60kkinta jAsti varNagaLiruvudillavAddarinda, intaha


lipiyannu baLasuvavaru nUrakkinta jAsti sankEtagaLannu kalitukoLLa
bEkAguvudilla.

viSvada baravaNigegaLannella I eraDu gumpugaLoLage sErisikoLLalu
sAdhyavideyAdarU, SuddhavAgi yAva lipiyannU padasankEta illavE
varNasankEta embudAgi varNisalubaruvudilla. ingliS baravaNige
yalli pada mattu varNasankEtagaLeraDU sErihOgive. udAharaNe
gAgi, no mattu know emba eraDu padagaLa naDuve uccAradalli
vyatyAsavEnU illavAdudarinda avu eraDu bEre bEre padagaLannu
sUcisuva padasankEtagaLendu hELabEkAguttade.

japAnIyara baravaNigeyalli padasankEtagaLondige varNaguccha
gaLannu sUcisuva sankEtagaLU sErikonDive. padasankEtakke atI
uttama udAharaNeyendare cInI baravaNige. Adare, I baravaNige
yallU varNasankEtagaLa prayOga kelaveDe sErikonDide. iveraDa
kkintalU bhinnavAgiruva arEbik baravaNigeyalli sAmAnyavAgi svara
varNagaLannu biTTu, vyanjanavarNagaLannu mAtravE bareyuva rUDhiyide.

## padasankEtada vaySiSTya
ondondu padakkU ondondu sankEtaviruva I padasankEtada lipi
yalli sAvirAru bhinna bhinnavAda sankEtagaLannu baLasabEkAguttade.
udAharaNegAgi, caynIs lipiyalli sAmAnyavAgi padakkondu sankEta
viruttade. adara halavAru padagaLa naDuve uccAraNeyalli vyatyAsa
villadiddarU arthadalli vyatyAsaviruva kAraNa, barahadalli bEre bEre
sankEtagaLannu baLasabEkAguttade.

udAharaNegAgi, henDati, ELu, mOsamADu, kAla, du:kha moda
lAda halavu arthagaLannu sUcisalu caynIs bhASeyalli chI emba
ondE uccAraNeyiruva padavannu baLasalAguttade, Adare ivakkella
caynIs lipiyalli bEre bEre sankEtagaLive. idE rItiyalli, nuDi,
are, baNNa, uppu, alli modalAda arthagaLannu sUcisuva padagaLige
lipiyalli bEre bEre sankEtagaLive; Adare, ivellakkU uccAraNe jen
embudondE.

cInI bhASeyalli bareda pustakagaLannu Odalu kaDimeyendare
ELenTu sAvira sankEtagaLannAdarU kalitukoLLabEkAguttade. adara
sampUrNa padakOSavondaralli oTTu sumAru ayvattu sAvira sankEta
gaLive! idu vidyArthigaLigondu doDDa talenOvannE tandoDDa

La


balludEnO nija; Adare, tamma tamma bhASegaLannu kaliyuvudarondige
iSTellA sankEtagaLannU avaru kaDDAyavAgiyE kalitukoLLa bEkAguvu
dAddarinda, eppattaydu kOTi janariruva cInAdESadalli bhASA
samasyeyE ELuttilla.

idu hEgendare, dUra dUrada UrugaLalliruva caynIs janaralli
obbara mAtannu innobbaru arthamADikoLLalArarAdarU, obbaru
baredudannu innobbaru Odi arthamADikoLLaballaru. udAharaNegAgi,
mandArin emba ondu mAdariya caynIs bhASeyannADuvavanobba
tanna bhASeyalli caynIs lipiyannu baLasi bareda patravannu kenTonIs
ennuva innondu mAdariya caynIs bhASeyannADuvavanu tannadE
bhASeyalli Odi arthamADikoLLaballanu. Adare, mandArin‌navanu tanna
bhASeyalli mAtanADahoraTare avanADida ondE ondu mAtU
kenTonIs‌navanige arthavAgadu

namma dESadallU intaha ondu lipi pracAradalliddiddare, SEkaDA
eppattaydu mandiyAdarU obbaru baredudannu innobbaru yAva
hosa bhASeyannu kalitukoLLadeyU sulabhadalli arthamADikoLLuvante
Agabahudittu.

## kannaDada lipi
nAvu bhAratadalli baLasuva lipigaLallella heccu kaDime varNakkondu
sankEtavide. rOman lipigU, kannaDa lipigU naDuve iruva mukhya
vyatyAsavEnendare, rOman lipiyalli svara mattu vyanjanagaLeraDakkU
svatantravAda astitvavuLLa sankEtagaLive, Adare kannaDa lipiyalli sAmAnya
vAgi ondu vyanjanada anantara baruva svara illavE vyanjanagaLa
sankEtagaLige padada Adiyalli illavE svarada anantara baruva sankEta
gaLaSTu pUrNateyilla. idannu sariyAgi gamanisada kelavaru kannaDa
lipiyalli svara mattu vyanjanagaLeraDakkU oTTAgi sankEtagaLiveyendu
tappAgi tiLidukonDantide.

## lipi samasye
bhASAsamasyeyondige lipi samasyeyU namma dESadalli halakelavu
hOrATagaLige kAraNavAgide. udAharaNegAgi, hindi-urdu vivAda
heccu kaDime lipi vivAdavendE hELidarU tappAgadu. bhASeya


vyAkaraNada maTTige hindi mattu urdugaLoLage heccina vyatyAsavEnU
illa.

samskxta, hindI mattu marAThi bhASegaLu baLasuva dEvanAgari
lipiyaSTu 'vayjYAnika'vAda lipi bErillavendu kelavaru rAjakAraNigaLu
mAtravalla, vidvAmsarendennisikoLLuvavarU hELuttiruttAre. Adare I
mAtige AdhAravEnU illa.

dEvanAgari lipi vayjYAnikavendu hELalu adaralli baruva sankEta
gaLannu vayjYAnikavAgi, endare avugaLa uccAraNeganusAravAgi, bEre
bEre vargagaLalli vingaDisalAgide embudE mukhya AdhAra. Adare idu
sankEtagaLa vingaDaNeya vayjYAnikateyallade, sankEtagaLa illavE avannu
baLasuva lipiya vayjYAnikateyalla. yAva lipiyalli baruva sankEta
gaLannu bEkiddarU I rIti uccAraNeganusAravAgi vingaDisuvudu kaSTa
vEnalla.

nijakkU bhAratada lipigaLallella urdu lipiyannu biTTare dEva
nAgari lipiyE atyanta kliSTavAda mattu toDakutoDakAda lipi. kannaDa
lipi mattu dEvanAgari lipi iveraDU ondE mUladinda bandive
yAdarU kannaDa lipi dEvanAgariginta halavAru viSayagaLalli saraLa
vAgide mattu lalitavAgide. idannu arthamADikoLLalArada kannaDigaru
kelavaru nammalli IgAgalE baLakeyalliruva uttamavAda lipiyannu
horagesedu, dEvanAgariyannu baLasikoLLuva Aturadalliruvantide.

## mAtu mattu baravaNige
mAtige hOlisidevAdare baravaNigeyembudu bahaLa ittIceginadu.
sAvirAru varSagaLa hindeyE IjipT mattu mesapoTEmiyAgaLalli
manuSyanige baravaNige tiLidittembudu nija. Adare, sAmAnya janara kayge
adu bandu innU innUru varSa kaLedilla. ivattigU baravaNigeyannu
baLasikoLLuvantaha bhASegaLu kelavu mAtra. jagattu iSTondu mundu
varidideyAdarU Odalu mattu bareyalu balla janara sankhye SEkaDA
ayvattakkintalU kaDime.

lipiyillada bhASegU lipiyiruva bhASegU naDuve entaha vyatyAsa
vide? I praSnege 'EnU illa' embudAgi bhASAvijYAnigaLu koDuva
uttaravannu bahuSaH heccinavarU nambalAraru. Adare, jagattinalli baLake
yalliruva halavAru bhASegaLa mEle avaru naDesiruva samSOdhanegaLa
phalavAgi tiLidu banda AScaryakara viSayagaLalli idU ondu.


bhASegaLalli naDeyabahudAda badalAvaNegaLalli lipiyindAguva
kArya sonneyendE hELabahudu. bhASeyondara yOgyateyU lipi
yiruvudarinda illavE illadiruvudarinda heccukaDimeyAguvudilla.
lipiyiruva bhASeyaSTE lipiyillada bhASeyU samxddha mattu sampanna
vAgiraballudu.

samskxta bhASege tannadE Ada lipi dorakuvudakkinta eSTO varSa
gaLa hindeyE adaralli jagattina mahOnnata kxtigaLalli ondAgiruva
vEdagaLa racaneyAgittembudu idakke ondu uttama udAharaNe.
lipiyu bhASeya mEle mADabahudAda pariNAmavEnAdarU iddare,
adu A bhASeya (barahada) vyAkaraNa niyamagaLigiruva apavAdagaLa
sankhyeyannu svalpa maTTige heccu mADuvudu mAtra

## 3.2 bhAratakkella ondu lipi bEkE?
bhAratada bhASegaLella ondE lipiyannu baLasatoDagidalli namma dESada
bhASAsamasyegaLellavU iddakkiddante mAyavAgi biDuvuvendu vAdisuva
ASAvAdigaLu nammalli bahaLa mandi iddAre. tamiLu, kannaDa, bangAli,
oDiyA modalAda I bEre bEre bhASegaLannADuva janaru tammavE
Ada lipigaLannu sampUrNavAgi biTTu koDalu siddharilladirabahudu.
AdarU 'rASTrada aykyate'gAgi I bhASegaLannADuva mandi tamma tamma
lipigaLoDane intaha rASTrIya lipiyondannU kalitu baLasatoDagi
dalli, namma dESa bahaLaSTu uddhAravAdItendu ivarellarU nambiru
vantide.

intaha vAdavannu munde taruvavaru bariya rAjakAraNigaLu
mAtravalla; I viSayadalli sAkaSTu samSOdhanegaLannu naDesi pariNata
rAgiruvevendu hELikoLLuva vidvAmsarU ivE abhiprAyagaLannu
manDisuttiruvudu nijakkU AScaryakaravAda sangatiyAgide.

udAharaNegAgi, 1956ralli prakaTavAda adhikxta bhASA samitiya
varadiyu intaha rASTrIya lipiyondara baLakeyu avaSyavendE
samarthisittu. jasTis SAradAcaraNa mitraru 'Ekalipi vistAra pariSat'
embudAgi ondu samstheyannE sthApisiddaru.

intaha Ekalipi vAdavannu manDisuvavaralli heccinavarU bhAratada
I rASTrIya lipi ivattu hindI bhASeyannu bareyalu baLasuttiruva


dEvanAgari lipiyE AgabEkendu vAdisuttiruvudu innondu gama
nArhavAda sangatiyAgide.

## Ekalipi avaSyavE?
illi eraDu mukhyavAda praSnegaLannu pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide.
bhAratada bhASegaLella ondE lipiyannu illavE samAna lipiyondannu
baLasuvudu avaSyavE, mattu hAge mADuvudarinda prayOjana
vEnAdarU ideyE embudondu; mattu adu avaSyavAgide
yAdarU, antaha samAna lipiyAgalu dEvanAgariyE arhavAdu
demba vAdadalli huruLideyE embudinnondu.

ivugaLalli modalaneya praSneyannu yArU iduvarege sariyAgi
vivEcisida hAge kanDubaruvudilla. Ekalipiya kuritu vAda naDesu
vavarella adara avaSyakate svataHsiddhavAdudemba abhiprAyadindalE tamma
vAdavannu prArambhisuttAre.

I viSayadalli adhikxta bhASA samitiyu eraDu mukhyavAda
kAraNagaLannu koTTide. dESada aykyatege adu sahAyakavAgabahudembu
dondu; bEre bEre bhASegaLannu kaliyuva kelasa adarinda sugama
vAgabahudembudinnondu. iveraDU heccina maTTige kalpitavAda kAraNa
gaLu. dESada aykyateyembudu tarkadeduru nillada viSaya. bhAratakkella
ondu lipiyannu tandu hAkuva avasaradalli Iga iruva aykyateyU
oDeduhOguva sambhavavE jAsti.

## lipi mattu bhASAbhyAsa
lipi bhEdavilladiddare nere prAntadavara bhASegaLannu kaliyuva kelasa
sugamavAgabahudu, mattu adarindAgi hAge kaliyuva janara
sankhyeyU heccabahudu emba vAda satyadinda bahaLa dUra ide.
telugu mattu kannaDa bhASegaLige heccu kaDime ondE lipiyide
yendarU salluttade. telugu bhASeyannu kaliyabEkemba iccheyuLLa
kannaDigaru ardha ganTeyoLage adara lipiyannu kayvaSa mADikoLLa
ballaru. Adare, indu eSTu mandi kannaDigaru illavE telugaru I
savkaryavannu upayOgisikoLLuttiddAre?

marAThi mattu hindI bhASegaLeraDU ondE lipiyannu baLasikoLLu
ttive. hAgendu marAThiyannu kaliyuva hindI janara sankhye adE


bhASeyannu kaliyuva kannaDigara illavE gujarAtigaLa sankhyeginta jAsti
yiruva hAgEnU kANisuttilla. nijakkU ondu bhASeyannu kaliyuva
avaSyakate bandare cInI bhASegiruvantaha atI kliSTavAda lipiyannU
jana aragisikonDAru. bEDavAgiruva bhASeya lipi samAnavAgiddarU
ondE, bhinnavAgiddarU ondE.

lipi bhEdavannu tegeduhAkidalli bhASegaLannu kaliyuva kelasa sugama
vAdItendu vAdisuvavarella lipi mattu bhASegaLa naDuvina sambandha
vannE sariyAgi arthamADikonDantilla. ingliS‌nantaha kelavu baraha
gaLalli kliSTavAda 'spelling' samasyegaLiruva kAraNa, bhASegaLannu kalitAda
mElU avugaLa barahavannu Odi arthamADikoLLalu heccina prayatna
naDesabEkAguttade. Adare, bhAratIya bhASegaLalli heccinavU ondE
mAdariya lipigaLannu baLasuttiveyAda kAraNa, avugaLalli ondu
lipiyannu kalitavaru hosadondu lipiyannu onderaDu dinagaLallE
kayvaSamADikoLLaballaru. lipigintalU bhASeyannu kalitukoLLuvudE
illi heccina samasyeyAgiruttade.

hAgAgi, I bhASegaLella samAna lipiyondannu baLasuvudarindAgi
hosa bhASeyannu kaliyuvalli Aguva uLitAya barE onderaDu dina
gaLaSTu mAtra. I alpa uLitAyakkAgi nAvu mADabEkAgiruva tyAga
ventahadembudannu gamanisidalli, yArU I kelasakke kayhAkalAraru.
EkalipivAda mAtravalla, samAnalipivAdavU bhAratada maTTige
nirAdhAravAdudembudu idarinda spaSTavAguttade.

## dEvanAgariya arhate
innu EkalipivAdigaLu I sthAnakke dEvanAgari lipiyE arhavendu
vAdisuttiddAralla, I vAdadalli eSTu huruLide embudannu vivEcisu
vudu avaSya. itara bhAratIya lipigaLigintella dEvanAgari lipiyannu
baLasuva bhAratIyara sankhye bahaLaSTu jAstiyAgiruvudemba ondu
kAraNa mAtra yuktiyuktavAgide. marAThi, hindi mattu samskxta -
I mUru bhASegaLU dEvanAgari lipiyannE baLasuttive. kelaveDegaLalli
konkaNigU idE lipi baLakeyallide. hAgAgi, I lipige jana sankhyeya
bembala bEkAdaSTide.

Adare, hindiyannu bhAratada rAjakIya bhASeyannAgi ArisikoLLu
valli janasankhyeyannu gaNanege tegedukonDante dEvanAgari lipiyannu
samAna lipiyAgi ArisikoLLuvallU adE amSakke mahatva koDa


bEkendEnilla. sAhajavAgi beLedu bandiruva bhASegaLoLage mElu
kILillavembudEnO nija. Adare lipigaLu mAnava nirmitavAgiruvu
vAddarinda, avugaLalli kelavu atyuttamavAdavugaLu mattu saraLavAdavu
gaLu, mattu kelavu atI kliSTavAdavugaLu embudAgi mavlyamApana
mADalu baruttade. dEvanAgari lipige janasankhyeya (baLasuvavara
sankhyeya) bembalavondannu biTTare bErAva yOgyateyU illa
embudu I keLagina vicAragaLinda spaSTavAguttade.

## lipiya vayjYAnikate
prapancadalli dEvanAgariyaSTu vayjYAnikavAda lipi bErondillavendu
halavAru hindI bhaktaru mattu rAjakAraNigaLu sAruttiddAre. lipi
yalli vayjYAnikateyendare Enembudannu svalpavU arthamADikoLLade
hELuva mAtidembudaralli samSayavilla. nijakkU dEvanAgari bahaLa
kliSTavAda mattu toDaku toDakAda lipi. ingliS, phrenc, modalAda
bhASegaLu baLasuva rOman lipi adakkinta bahaLaSTu saraLavAdudu.
kannaDa lipiyU dEvanAgari lipiginta heccu SrESThavAdudu.

lipigaLa yOgyateyannu tulanAtmakavAgi abhyasisuvalli eraDu
mukhya amSagaLannu gamanadalliTTukoLLuvudu avaSya. A lipiyalli
baruva sanjYegaLa illavE sankEtagaLa oLaracane hEgide embudondu;
mattu, adannu baLasuttiruva bhASeyalli baruva dhvanigaLannu I sankEta
gaLu hEge pratinidhIkarisuttive embudinnondu. lipigaLa kuritu vAda
naDesuvavarella I eraDu amSagaLannu sariyAgi bErpaDisikoLLalArade
ellellO dikkutappi aleyuttiruttAre.

## sTelling samasye
rOman lipiyannu baLasuva ingliS barahadalli ati kliSTavAda
'spelling' samasyeyide. idaralli ondE sanjYege halavAru uccAraga
Liruttave, mattu ondE dhvanige halavAru sanjYegaLU iruttave;
sanjYegaLigU avugaLa uccArakkU naDuve nEravAda sambandhavilla. I
kAraNakkAgi, ingliS barahavannu tumbA kliSTavAda barahavendu
hELalAguttade.

Adare ivella ingliS janaru rOman lipiyannu tamma bhASege
tappu tappAgi aLavaDisikonDiruvudarindAgi huTTikonDiruva dOSa
gaLu. I dOSagaLannu rOman lipiya Antarika dOSagaLendu


kareyalu endigU sAdhyavAgadu. idE lipiyannu hosadondu bhASe
yannu bareyuvalli baLasabEkAdAga, I samasyegaLalli ondU
bAradante nODikoLLabahudu.

intaha spelling samasye lipiya dOSavalla, adara baLakeya
dOSa embudakke dEvanAgari lipiyE ondu uttama udAharaNe.
samskxta bhASeyannu bareyuvalli I lipiyannu bahaLa maTTige
samarpakavAgiyE baLasalAguttide. Adare, adannu baLasuva marAThi
mattu hindI bhASegaLa barahagaLalli halakelavu spelling dOSagaLu
sErikonDive.

indina hindI panDitaru kuDukh, bODO, kOlAmi moda
lAda kelavu lipiyillada bhASegaLige idE dEvanAgari lipiyannu baLasi
konDiruva kramavannu nODidare mAtra, yArigU AScaryavAdItu.
ingliS‌na barahagaLalliruvudakkinta hattaraSTu spelling bhUtagaLu I
bhASegaLa 'dEvanAgari' barahagaLalli sErikonDive

## Antarika guNagaLu
lipigaLige irabahudAda Antarika guNagaLendare, avugaLalliruva sanjYe
gaLa svarUpa, ondE sanjYegiruva upasanjYegaLa sankhye (kannaDa lipi
yalli rakArakke ra, 9, mattu embudAgi mUru upasanjYe
gaLiruvante), eSTu SIghravAgi avannu bareyabahudu, Tayp mADa
bahudu, mattu eSTu hattira hattiravAgi avannu mudrisabahudu,
ityAdi. I ellA viSayagaLallU dEvanAgari lipige dorakuva anka
gaLu bahaLa kaDime.

dEvanAgari lipiya sanjYegaLu bahaLa toDaku toDakAgive; hAgAgi
avannu bareyuvAga kay heccu SIghravAgi ODalAradu; sanjYegaLa mEle
baruva talekoTTu bareyuva vEgavannu innaSTu kaDime mADuttade;
sanjYegaLu ondakkondu sErikoLLade dUra dUra nilluvuvAddarinda
bareyuvAga lEkhaniyannu AgAga etti iDabEkAguttade; adaralli
baruva ottakSaragaLu mattu svara sanjYegaLu I lipiyannu Tayp
rayTar‌ge aLavaDisuvalli bahaLaSTu tondare koTTive; mudraNadallU
I lipiya sAlugaLannu rOman lipiya sAlugaLaSTu hattira hattira
vAgi mudrisalu sAdhyavAgadu.

hAgiddare, dEvanAgari lipi atyanta vayjYAnika lipiyendu bahaLa
mandi sAri hELuttiruvudakke kAraNavEnu? adara sanjYegaLa (sankEta


gaLa) paTTi (akSaramAle)yannu sanjYegaLu sUcisuva dhvanigaLa uccA
raNege anusAravAgi siddhapaDisalAgideyembudE idakke mukhya AdhAra.
Adare, akSaramAleya racanegU lipiya yOgyategU yAva
sambandhavU illavembudannu I mahanIyaru gamanisidantilla. ondu
lipiyalli baruva sanjYegaLannu hEge bEkiddarU paTTimADabahudu.
idarindAgi A lipiya yOgyateyEnU heccu kaDimeyAguvudilla.

hindiyannu illavE samskxtavannu dEvanAgariyallade bErAva
lipiyalli baredarU adara yOgyate aLiyuttade endu vAdisuva I
hindI prEmigaLige, kannaDavE modalAda itara lipigaLannu baLasu
vavarigU tamma tamma lipigaLalli Adaraviruttade emba viSaya artha
vAguvudilla. dEvanAgari lipiginta vayjYAnikavAgi heccu yOgyateyuLLa
kannaDa lipiyannu nUrAru varSagaLindalU namma hiriyaru beLesi
konDu bandiruva kAraNa, adu namma samskxtiya avibhAjya anga
vAgide. adannu khaDDAyavAgi toreyabEkiddarU A sthAnakke dEvanAgari
lipi yAva vidhadallU arhavallavembudannu kannaDigaru mareyabAradu.

## kannaDakke rOman lipi
ivattina kannaDalipiyondige Aykeya lipiyAgi baLasalu, rOman
lipiyannu baLasi mADida 'hala' emba hesarina hosalipiyondannu bA.
rA. kiraN avaru kannaDa barahagArara mundirisuttiddAre. rOman
lipiya akSaragaLalli namage bEkAduvannu Arisi, avugaLalli kelavakke
mEle gere eLeda mattu innu kelavakke keLage cukke irisida kelavu heccina
akSaragaLannu sErisi, avaru I halalipiyannu unTumADiddAre.
IgAgalE mobayl‌gaLa mUlaka essemayns kaLuhisuvudakkAgi
kannaDavannu baLasuvavarellarU adakkAgi kannaDa lipiya badalu rOman
lipiyannE baLasuttiddAre. Adare, hIge baLasuvAga obbobbaru
ondondu rItiyalli A lipiya akSaragaLannu aLavaDisikoLLuva kAraNa,
tumbA gondalagaLive. idakke badalu, ellarU ondE rItiyalli
avannu baLasuva hAgAdare, I gondala illavAgabahudu. kiraN
avara halalipi illi neravAgaballudu.

bEre kaDegaLallU kannaDavannu bareyalu I hosalipiyannu ondu
Aykeya lipiyAgi baLasabahudu; adaralli pustakagaLannU accu
hAkisabahudu. yAkendare, adara baLakeyinda nAvu halavu heccina
prayOjanagaLannU paDeyaballevu: adaralli kannaDavannu Odalu-


bareyalu kalitavarige ingliS kaliyalu heccu sulabhavAgaballudu
embudondu; padagaLannu Oduva hAgeyE bareyuva kAraNa, Igina
lipiyalliruva spelling toDakugaLu hosalipiyalli illavAguttave
embudinnondu; mattu kannaDa mAtanADalu baruttiddarU adara
lipiyannu kaliyadavaru mattu ingliS tiLidiruvavaru sulabhavAgi I
lipiyalli kannaDa barahagaLannu Odaballaru embudinnondu.

akSaragaLa racaneya maTTige, halalipiyannu baLasuvudu Igiruva
kannaDa lipiginta halavu viSayagaLalli heccu anukUlavAgide. udA
haraNegAgi, adaralli ottakSaragaLiruvudilla; hAgAgi, adara sAlugaLannu
heccu hattira irisabahudu. tumbA cikkadAgi accuhAkisidarU adannu
Odalu kaSTavAguvudilla. kannaDa lipiyannu aSTu cikkadAgi accu
hAkisidare Odalu tumbA kaSTavAguttade. kannaDa lipiyalli vyanjanagaLa
baLika baruva svaragaLannu mattu vyanjanagaLannu adarondige sErisi
bareyuvudu idakke kAraNavirabahudu.

idallade, kampyUTar modalAda upakaraNagaLalli kannaDavannu I
halalipiyalli baLasuvudu heccu sulabhavAguttade; ingliS‌nantaha
yurOpina nuDigaLinda padagaLannu eravalu paDedu baLasuvudU
sulabha; mattu, I lipiyindAgi kannaDakke jAgatika maTTada baLake
sulabhavAguttade. intaha halavu prayOjanagaLiruva kAraNa, idannu
ondu Aykeya lipiyAgi baLakege taruvudarinda yAva tondareyU
illa.

## 3.3 xkArada aLivu-uLivu
kannaDada paThyapustakagaLalli x emba akSaravannu baLasuva badalu ru
embudannE baLasuva mUlaka (xSi, kxSNa, mxga modalAda pada
gaLannu ruSi, kruSNa, muruga ityAdiyAgi bareyuvudara mUlaka),
kannaDa lipiyannu kaliyabEkAgiruva makkaLa horeyannu kaDimemADa
bahudendu paThyapustaka samitiyavaru ondu nirdhArakke bandiddaru.
Adare I nirdhAravannu halavu mandi gaNyara virOdhadindAgi kaybiDa
bEkAyitendu dinapatrikegaLalli baredide. illi yAva nirdhAra sari
mattu yAvudu tappu?


## varNamAle mattu akSaramAle
bhASeyalliruva varNamAlegU adu baLasuva lipiyalli iruva akSara
mAlegU naDuve vyatyAsagaLiraballuvu. heccina bhASegaLU bEre
yAvudO ondu bhASegAgi siddhavAda lipiyannu tammadAgi mADi
konDiruvudu idakke ondu kAraNa. bhAratada bhASegaLu baLasuva lipi
gaLalli heccinavakkU aSOkana kAladalli pAli bhASeyannu bareyalu
baLasuttidda brAhmI lipiyE mUla. idallade, bhAratada horage baLake
yalliruva TibeTan, barmIs, thAyi, lavOtiyan, kambODiyan
modalAda itara halavu bhASegaLu baLasuva lipigaLigU idE brAhmI
lipi mUlavAgide.

ondu lipiyannu tammadAgi mADikoLLuvAga, bEre bEre bhASe
gaLu adaralli bEre bEre rItiya badalAvaNegaLannu mADikoLLa
bEkAguttade. ellA bhASegaLallU varNamAle ondE AgilladiruvudE
idakke kAraNa. udAharaNegAgi, brAhmI lipiyannu kannaDakke aLavaDisi
konDAga adaralli dIrgha ekAra mattu dIrgha okAra (E mattu O)
emba eraDu heccina svarAkSaragaLannU, a mattu i emba eraDu heccina
vyanjanAkSaragaLannU sErisikoLLabEkAgittu.

eravalAgi paDeda lipiyalliruva anavaSyakavAda akSaragaLannu biTTu
koDuvudU aparUpavEnalla. udAharaNegAgi, idE brAhmI lipi
yannu tamiLige aLavaDisikoLLuvAga, vargAkSaragaLalli modalaneya
mattu aydaneya akSaragaLannu mAtra (udA: kavargadalli ka mattu ji
embavugaLannu mAtra) uLisikoLLuva avaSyakate kanDubandittu. hAgAgi,
uLida mUru akSaragaLannu (kha, ga, ghagaLannu) tamiLu lipige aLavaDisi
konDiralilla. itara vargagaLallU idE vidhAnavannu anusarisalAyitu.

idallade, kAladinda kAlakke bhASegaLalli naDeyuva badalAvaNe
gaLindAgi avugaLalliruva varNagaLa sankhyeyalli heccu kaDimeyAgalu
sAdhyavide, mattu I rIti naDeyuva badalAvaNegaLindalU avugaLa
lliruva varNa mattu akSaragaLa naDuve vyatyAsagaLunTAgalu sAdhyavide.
udAharaNegAgi, haLegannaDadalli ra-a mattu Li-LagaLannu bhinna bhinnavAgi
uccarisuttiddirabEku. I uccAraNAbhEda hosagannaDada kAladalli
aLidu hOgide. adu I rIti aLiduhOguttiruva kAladalli
barahakkU uccAraNegU naDuve antaravErpaTTirabEku. Adare, hosa
gannaDada barahadalli a mattu Li emba eraDu vyanjanAkSaragaLannu tegedu
hAkuva mUlaka, I antaravannu illavAgisalAgide.


## sTelling samasye
bhASeyondara varNamAlegU adu baLasuva lipiya akSara mAlegU
naDuve hondANikeyillavAdAgalella A bhASeya baravaNigeyalli
spelling samasye taledOruttade. kannaDada lipiyalli baruva Sa mattu
Sa emba eraDu akSaragaLigU uccAra ondE. endare, avu ondE
varNavannu sUcisuttiddu, avugaLa baLakeyalli akSarakkU varNakkU
naDuve hondANikeyilla. idE rItiyalli, ay mattu ay embavu
gaLa naDuve, av mattu av embavugaLa naDuve, mattu alpaprANAkSara
-mahAprANAkSaragaLa naDuve heccina kannaDigara mAtinallU uccAraNe
yalli vyatyAsavilla.

kannaDada lipiyalli xkArada sthAnavU intahadE. heccinavarU
adannu ru illavE ri endu uccarisuttAre. (athavA rakAravannE
ukAra mattu ikAragaLinda bhinnavAda bErondu svaradondige
uccarisuttAre.) yArU adannu ondu svatantra svaravAgi uccarisuvu
dilla. uccAraNeyallillada I vyatyAsavannu lipiyalli kANisabEkAgiru
vudarinda, adondu sTelling samasyeyAgide.

barahadalliruva akSaragaLigU avugaLa uccAraNegU naDuve I rIti
vyatyAsagaLu kANisikoLLalu lipiyannu bhASege aLavaDisikoLLuvAga lipi
panDitaru mADuva tappugaLu innondu kAraNa. hindina kAladalli
barahavannu kelavE kelavu mandi mAtra baLasuttiddaru. Sa-SabhEda,
alpaprANa-mahAprANabhEda mattu x-ru bhEdavannu ivaru uccAraNe
yalli spaSTavAgi mUDisuttiddirabahudu. Adare, ivattu barahavannu
baLasuvavara sankhye bahaLaSTu jAstiyAgiruva kAraNa, heccinavara
uccAraNeyallU I vyatyAsagaLu kANisade tondareyunTAgide.

ay-ay bhEda, av-av bhEda, mattu sonne-anunAsika bhEda
kannaDada maTTige avaSyavillada vyatyAsagaLu. brAhmI lipiyannu kannaDakke
aLavaDisuvAga namma hindinavaru ivannu biTTukoDabahudittu. hAge
mADadiddudE ivattina tondarege kAraNa.

a-ra mattu bi-LagaLa naDuvina vyatyAsa uccAraNeyalli illavAdu
dannu gamanisi, namma hiriyaru a mattu i emba eraDu akSaragaLu
hosagannaDakke anavaSyaka embudAgi nirdharisiddaru, mattu avannu namma
barahadinda tegeduhAkiddaru. avaru hIge mADiradiddare ivattigU
nAvu I eraDu heccina akSaragaLannu kaTTikonDu kaSTapaDabEkAguttittu.


uccAraNeyalli vyatyAsavillada itara akSarayugmagaLa sthitiyU
intahadE. eSTO bAri elli Sa bareyabEku mattu elli Sa bareya
bEku embudannu nirdharisalu nAvu arthakOSada marehogabEkAgu
ttade. ivugaLa uccAraNeyalli vyatyAsavilladiruvudE idakke kAraNa. I
eraDu vyanjanagaLannu bareyuvalli vidyArthigaLu tappu mADuvudakkU
idE kAraNa. alpaprANa mattu mahAprANagaLa naDuvina vyatyAsavU
intahadE. heccina kannaDigara uccAraNeyallU ivugaLoLage yAva
vyatyAsavU illa. barahadalli mAtra I vyatyAsavannu kANisabEkAguttade.
hAgAgi, elli mahAprANa barabEku, mattu elli alpaprANa barabEku
embudannu nirdharisalu nAvu AgAga arthakOSada marehogabEkAgu
ttade.

## samasyege parihAra
I rIti barahakkU mAtigU (uccAraNegU) naDuve hondANike
tappihOdAgalella barahadalli badalAvaNeyannu mADi adu uccA
raNege hondikoLLuvante mADuvudE spelling samasyege uttama
parihAra. ingliS‌nantaha bhASegaLalli spelling samasye bahaLa jaTila
vAgide. hAgAgi, adannu pariharisuvudU bahaLa kaSTa. Adare, kannaDada
barahadalli heccinaDegaLallU mAtinoDane nEravAda hondANike
yiruvudAda kAraNa, kelavE kelavu badalAvaNegaLa mUlaka adaralli
kANisuva spelling samasyeyannu nivArisabahudu.

illi kelavu mukhyavAda viSayagaLannu gamanisuvudu avaSya. kAla
dinda kAlakke bhASe badalAguttiruvudu ondu sahajavAda kriye. adu
namma arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAnadalli naDeyuva badalAvaNeya
phalavAda kAraNa, adannu yArU taDeyalAraru. Adare I badalAvaNe
gaLannanusarisi namma baraha illavE lipiyalli badalAvaNegaLannu prayatna
pUrvakavAgi mADikoLLabEkAguttade. hAge mADadiddalli bhASe mattu
barahagaLa naDuve hondANike tappihOgi, barahavannu spelling samasye
kADuttade.

intaha badalAvaNegaLannu samAjada gaNyaru niSEdhisuvudU
sahajavE. avaru sAmAnyavAgi I rIti lipiyalli mADabahudAda
badalAvaNegaLannu mAtravalla, bhASeyalli sAhajavAgi naDeyuvantaha
badalAvaNegaLannU sahisuvudilla. Adare, bhASeyalli naDeyuva badalA
vaNegaLa mEle yArigU nEravAda niyantraNaviruvudilla. antaha


badalAvaNegaLu barahavannu sparSisadante avaru svalpamaTTige adannu
niyantrisaballaru. Adare idarindAgi barahakkU mAtigU naDuve kandaka
vErpaDuttade.

sTelling samasye svalpa svalpavAgi barahadalli sErikoLLuttiruttade.
idu bahaLa jAstiyAdAga mAtra, janarige adondu samasyeyemba
arivAguttade. intaha samayadalli krAntikArI yuvakaru gaNyara
virOdhavannU lekkisade, barahavannu badalAyisikoLLaballaru. kannaDadalli
mukhyavAgi ru-x, Sa-Sa, ay-ay, av-av, mattu alpaprANa-
mahAprANagaLemba I akSarayugmagaLa baLakeyalli, mattu sonne hAgU
visargagaLa baLakeyalli sTelling samasyeyiruvudantU nija.

I akSarayugagaLalli pratiyondarallU eraDaneya akSaravannu
barahadinda tegeduhAki kannaDa barahada spelling samasyeyannu nivArisa
bahudu. hIge mADidalli vidyArthigaLige kannaDada barahavannu kaliyalu
mattu itararige adannu baLasalu sulabhavAdItu embudU nijavE.
Adare, intaha badalAvaNegaLannu mADabEkE athavA bEDavE, mattu
mADuvudAdare yAva badalAvaNegaLannu mADabEku embudannu
samAjavE nirdharisabEku.

## haLE mattu hosa barahagaLu
I anavaSyakavAda akSaragaLannu biTTukoTTalli, avugaLannu baLasuva
haLeya barahagaLannu Odalu kaSTavAgabahudE, mattu hAge OduvAga
gondalavunTAgabahudE embudannU cintisuvudu avaSya. nijakkU
ondu hosa akSaravannu gurutisikoLLalu namage kelavE kelavu miniTu
gaLaSTu samaya sAku.

udAharaNegAgi, haLegannaDada barahagaLannu modala bArige OduvAga
avugaLalli hosadAgi kANisuva a mattu igaLannu gurutisikoLLuvalli
namage samasyeyEnU udbhavisuvudilla. ivattina uccAraNeyalli a-ra
mattu i-LagaLoLage vyatyAsavilla, haLegannaDada kAladallidda vyatyAsavannu
avu pratinidhIkarisuttave endiSTannu mAtra namage yArAdarU tiLisi
hELidare sAku.

nijakkU uccAraNeyalli kANisada vyatyAsavannu barahadalli kANisa
bEkAgi bandAga mAtra samasye edurAguttade. elli x bareyabEku
elli ru bareyabEku, illavE elli Sa bareyabEku elli Sa bareya
bEku, elli mahAprANa baLasabEku elli alpaprANa baLasabEku


embudE namma samasye. itararu antaha vyatyAsavannu kANisiruvarAdare
adannu Oduvalli namage yAva samasyeyU udbhavisalAradu. hAgAgi,
x, ay, av, Sa, sonne, visarga modalAda anavaSyakavAda akSaragaLannu
namma barahadinda tegedu hAkidevAdare, kannaDa barahadalli kANisuva
spelling samasye bahaLa maTTige kaDimeyAgaballudallade, avannu
baLasuva haLeya barahagaLannu Oduvalli entaha gondalavU unTAga
lAradu.

## yAvudu samskxti?
I mElina akSarayugmagaLu kannaDa bhASeya maTTige anavaSyaka
embudaralli samSayavilla. samskxta bhASeyannu bareyuvalli avu
avaSyavirabahudu. avugaLalli kelavu vEdakAladalli samskxta bhASeyannu
nuDiyuttiddAga mADuttirabahudAda uccAraNAbhEdavannu pratibimbisu
tive. innu kelavu sandhikAryadalli kANisuva vyatyAsavannu sUcisuvu
dakkAgi baLakege bandive. Adare I kAraNakkAgi samskxta padagaLannu
kannaDadalli bareyuvAga I lipibhEdavannu nAvu hAgeyE uLisi
koLLabEku, illavAdare namma 'samskxti'yE naSTavAguttade endu
kelavaru gaNyaru vAdisuttiruvudu nijakkU AScaryakaravAda sangati.

I rIti samskxta lipiya vaySiSTyavannu hAgeyE uLisikoLLa
diddare namma samskxtiyE nASavAguvudendu hELuva I gaNyaru
yArU haLegannaDada a mattu LigaLannu kaybiTTiruvudarindAgi namma
samskxti naSTavAgideyendAgali, illavE avannu punaH baLakege tara
bEkendAgali hELuva hAge kANisuvudilla. samskxtadinda eravalAgi
banda padagaLannu kannaDadalli nAvu hEge uccarisuttEveyO hAgeyE
bareyuvudaralli tappEnilla. hAge mADuvudE namma samskxtiyendu
tiLidukonDare sAku.

tamiLu barahadalli xkAra, visarga, sonne, mahAprANa modalA
davugaLannu baLasuva kramavilla. hIge baLasadiruvudE tamma samskxti
yendu avaru tiLididdAre. E-O, a-agaLu mAtravallade kannaDada
llillada viSiSTavAdondu nakAravannU avaru tamma lipige avaSyavendu
sErisikonDiddAre. namma bhASeyalliruva varNagaLannella tappillade
sariyAgi sUcisuvantaha lipiyannu namma bhASege aLavaDisikoLLuvudE
samskxtiyallade anavaSyakavAda sanjYegaLannu kaSTadinda uLisikoLLuvudu
bhrameyallade samskxtiyalla.


## Tarki dESada lipikrAnti
nanna cikkandinalli juTTannu irisikoLLuvudu samskxtiyendu
hiriyaru vidhisiddaru. Adare SAleyalli heccinavarU adannu tegeduhAki
andavAgi krApu bAcikoLLuttiddarAda kAraNa, nanage juTTannu irisi
koLLuvudu mujugaravendenisuttittu. hAgAgi, yAvAgalU nAnu
ondu gAndhI Toppiyannu dharisuttiddu, juTTannu adara oLage aDagisi
koLLuttidde. anantara uccavidyAbhyAsakkAgi dUrada UrinallirabEkAgi
bandAga, dhayrya tandukonDu adannu tegesi hAki A 'samskxti'ya
horeyinda muktanAde.

xkAra, SakAra, aykAra modalAdavugaLa horeyU intahadE
endu nanna abhiprAya. A horeyinda muktarAgalu dhayrya bEku.
gaNyarendennisikonDavara virOdhavannU lekkisade anavaSyakavAda I
horeyannu tegeduhAkidalli, mundina pILigeyavarellara kxtajYategU
nAvu bhAgigaLAgaballevu.

## 3.4 Tarki dESada lipikrAnti
sumAru eppattaydu varSagaLaSTu hinde, Tarki dESadalli ondu doDDa
lipikrAnti naDeyitu. aduvarege heccinavarU tamma barahagaLalli baLasu
tidda arEbik lipiyannu biTTukoTTu, adara badalige lyATin lipi
yannu baLasuva nirdhAra mADalAyitu. idarindAgi, mElvargada
kelavE kelavu janara sottAgi uLididda TarkiS baraha ellara
sottAgalu sAdhyavAyitu.

baraha ellara sottAgabEku, ellarU 'sAkSararAgabEku' emba
prayatna nammallU halavu varSagaLinda naDeyuttide, mattu idakkAgi
namma sarakAra kOTigaTTale haNavannU kharcu mADuttide. Adare,
idara pratiphala mAtra tumbA kaDime. kaSTapaTTu baraha kalitarU adannu
tamma dinanityada jIvanadalli baLasikoLLaballavaru ivattigU nammalli
heccu mandiyilla.

keLavargada janaru kannaDa barahavannu kaliyadiruvudakke, mattu
kalitarU adannu tamma dinanityada jIvanadalli baLasalu sAdhyavAga
diruvudakke nAvu kannaDadalli baLasuva lipiya dOSavEnAdarU kAraNa
virabahudE? mattu idu nijavAdare, TarkiS dESada I lipikrAnti


yinda nAvEnAdarU kalitukoLLalu sAdhyavE embudannu illi
pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide.

## arEbik lipiya dOSagaLu
TarkiS bhASeyannADuva janaru muslimarAgi matAntaragonDAga
lEnE arEbik lipiyannu tamma bhASege aLavaDisikonDirabEku.
hAgAgi, A lipiya baLakege TarkiS bhASeyalli sAvira varSagaLi
gintalU heccu dIrghavAda caritreyide. Adare, A lipi halavu
rItiyalli TarkiS padagaLa uccAraNeyannu sariyAgi sUcisalu
SaktavAgiralilla.

udAharaNegAgi, TarkiS bhASeyalli enTu svaravarNagaLiddu
vAdarU adu baLasuva arEbik lipiyalli mUru svaragaLannu mAtra
sUcisalu sAdhyavittu. idallade, arEbik mattu parSiyan bhASe
gaLinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu bareyuvAga, uccAraNeyalli
illadantaha halavu vyatyAsagaLannu lipiyalli tOrisuva paddhati baLake
yallittu. barahadalli intaha padagaLa baLakeyU bahaLa jAstiyittu.
idarindAgi, barahada bhASe mAtina bhASeginta bahaLa bhinnavAgi beLedu
bandittu.

I ellA kAraNagaLindAgi, TarkiS baraha A dESadalli kelavara
sottAgi mAtra uLidittu. SEkaDA hattakkinta kaDime jana mAtra A
dESadalli barahavannu ballavarAgiddaru. I paristhiti hindina kAlakke
sarihOgabahudittAdarU, ippattanE SatamAnakke kAlirisuttiddante,
yurOpina itara dESagaLalli kANisuva hAge, Tarki dESadallU baraha
ellara sottAgabEkemba kaLakaLi allina vidvAmsaralli mattu rAjakAraNi
gaLalli unTAyitu.

## lipiya badalAvaNe
1923ralli Tarki ondu prajAprabhutvavuLLa gaNarAjyavAyitu. Aga I
kaLakaLige innaSTu heccina mahatva bantu. prajAprabhutvadalli baraha ellara
sottAguvudu rAjakIyavAgi mAtravallade, sAmAjikavAgi mattu
ArthikavAgiyU atyavaSya. heccina vidvAmsarU I rIti TarkiS baraha
ellara sottAgadiruvudakke adu baLasuva arEbik lipiyE kAraNa
emba nirdhArakke bandiddaru.


## Tarki dESada lipikrAnti
hattombattaneya SatamAnada madhyabhAgadindalU arEbik lipi
yalli TarkiS bhASeyannu bareyuva kuritu vidvAmsaralli asamadhAna
kANisalu suruvAgittu. A samayadalli heccinavarU TarkiS bhASe
yannu bareyalu arEbik lipiyannu baLasuttiddarAdarU, alpamata
davarAda kriSciyannaru rOman lipiyannu baLasuttiddaru. idallade,
bEre kelavaru grIk lipiyannU I bhASege aLavaDisikonDiddaru.

pakkada dESavAda albEniyAdalli 1879rallEnE albEniyan
bhASege arEbik lipigintalU rOman lipiyE uttamavembudAgi
nirdharisi, aduvarege baLakeyallidda arEbik lipige badalAgi rOman
lipiyannu baLasalu toDagiyAgittu. sudhAraNeya hesarinalli hIge
mADuvudu dharmanindaneyembudAgi matAdhikArigaLu phatvA horaDi
siddarAdarU I kelasa naDeduhOgittu.

1928ralli Tarki dESavU TarkiS bhASege arEbik lipiyannu
baLasuva badalu rOman lipiyannu baLasabEkemba nirdhArakke bantu.
Agina janapriya adhyakSarAgidda mustAphA kamal avaru I viSayadalli
heccina Asakti vahisidudarindAgi, I badalAvaNe iDI dESadalli kelavE
kelavu tingaLugaLalli naDedu hOgalu sAdhyavAyitu. idarindAgi, A
dESadalli heccu heccu jana TarkiS barahavannu tammadannAgi mADi
koLLalu SaktarAdaru.

## kannaDada paristhiti
kannaDada paristhiti bahaLamaTTige I TarkiS paristhitiyannu hOluttade:
TarkiS bhASege arEbik mUlada lipiyannu aLavaDisikonDidda
kAraNa, arEbik mattu parSiyan mUlada padagaLannu A bhASegaLalli
hEge bareyuttArO hAgeyE TarkiS‌nallU bareyabEku emba
niyamavannu tamma mEle horisikoLLalu avarige sAdhyavAgittu.

kannaDadallU hIgeyE. I bhASege brAhmI lipiyannu aLavaDisi
konDidda kAraNa, samskxta padagaLannu A bhASeyalli hEge bareyu
tArO hAgeyE kannaDadallU bareyabEkemba kannaDada maTTige tIra
anavaSyakavAda niyamavannu namagU mADikoLLalu sAdhyavAgittu.

Tarki dESada janaru I anavaSyakavAda horeyannu tegedu hAkalu
tamma lipiyannE badalAyisikonDaru. kannaDadallU Igiruva lipiyannu
biTTukoTTu rOman‌nantaha bErondu lipiyannu aLavaDisikonDalli,
sulabhavAgi mElina hore nammannu biTTuhOdItu.


Adare, arEbik mUlada lipi bEreyU kelavu viSayagaLalli
TarkiS bhASege anukUlavAgiralilla; udAharaNegAgi, mEle tiLisida
hAge, TarkiS bhASeya ellA svaragaLannU A lipiyalli sariyAgi
sUcisalu sAdhyavAguttiralilla. hAgAgi, A lipiyannu biTTukoTTu bEre
lipiyannu baLasatoDaguvudu I heccina kAraNagaLigAgiyU avarige
avaSyavAgittu.

kannaDadalli kannaDadavE Ada padagaLannu bareyuvalli yAva
samasyeyU illa. hAgAgi, kannaDada Igina lipiyallEnE avaSyavillada
akSaragaLannu tegeduhAkuva mUlaka, mElina horeyinda muktarAga
ballevu.

## 3.5 kannaDakkondu ‘hosa baraha’
mEle 3.3nE lEkhanadalli vivarisida hAge, kannaDa barahadalli kannaDakke
bEkAguva akSaragaLannu mAtravE uLisikonDiruva 'hosa baraha' emba
hesarina kannaDa barahavondannu nAnu kannaDa barahavannu saripaDisONa
(2006, 2009) emba pustakadalli Odugara mundirisidde; idallade,
AmEle bareda nAlku pustakagaLalli adannE baLasidde. (Adare, I
pustakada lEkhanagaLannu nAnu adakke modalE barediddenAda kAraNa,
avugaLalli baLakeyAgidda haLe barahavannu badalisahOgilla; idaralli
hosadAgi sErisiruva lEkhanagaLallU adannu baLasilla.)

kannaDadavE Ada padagaLannu bareyalu a, A, i, I, u, U, e,
E, o, O emba hattu svaragaLu mattu k, c, T, t, p; g, j,
D, d, b; N, n, m; s, S, r; l, L; y, v emba
21 vyanjanagaLu embudAgi oTTu 31 akSaragaLu mAtra sAkAguttade;
Adare, samskxtadinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu bareyuvudakkAgi x,
ay, av emba mUru heccina svaragaLu, mattu kh, ch, Th, th, ph; ph,
jh, Dh, dh, bh; Y, Y; H emba 14 heccina vyanjanagaLu
embudAgi oTTu 17 heccina akSaragaLannu ivattu kannaDa barahagaLalli
baLasuttiddEve.

haLegannaDadalli L mattu L emba innU eraDu heccina akSara
gaLu baLakeyallidduvu; Adare hosagannaDada kAladalli, ivu heccina
kannaDigara uccAraNeyallU r mattu L embavugaLinda bhinnavAgilla


kannaDakkondu ‘hosa baraha’

embudannu gamanisida namma hindina barahagAraru A eraDu akSara
gaLannu barahadinda tegeduhAkiddaru.

adE rItiyalli, samskxta padagaLannu bareyuvalli baLakeyAgu
tiruva mElina 17 akSaragaLU ivattu heccina kannaDigara uccAraNe
yallU bhinnavAgi kANisikoLLuvudillavembudannu gamanisi, nAvu ivattu
avannU namma barahadinda tegeduhAkabEkAgide. I kelasavannu 'hosa
baraha'dalli mADalAgide.

ingliS‌ninda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu bareyuvallU mukhya
vAgi S, ph mattu th emba mUru heccina akSaragaLannu kannaDa
barahagaLalli baLasalAguttade; Adare, ivugaLalli modalinadannu heccina
kannaDigarU t embudAgiyE uccarisuttAre, mattu ingliS‌nalliyU
adara uccAra t embudAgiyE ide; hAgiruvAga, adannu t
embudAgi bareyade S embudAgi bareyuvudu nijakkU vicitravE!
(ingliS eravalu padagaLannu bareyuvAga t embudannu nAvu
baLasuvudE illa!) 'hosa baraha'dalli adannu t embudAgiyE
bareyalAguttade. uLida eraDu akSaragaLa badalAgiyU p mattu t
embavugaLannE, heccina kannaDigara uccAraNeyannanusarisi, baLasabahudu.

## vimarSegaLu
2006ralli nAnu Odugara mundirisidda I 'hosa baraha'da kuritAgi
halavu vimarSegaLu bandive; halavaru adarindAgabahudAda tondare
gaLa kuritU barediddAre. Adare, avaru kalpisikonDiruva I tondare
gaLu nijakkU tondaregaLE alla; bhASe mattu barahagaLa naDuvina
sambandha entahadu embudannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLade avaru I
AkSEpaNegaLannu ettiddAre. I vyatyAsa entahadu embudannu nAnu
vivaravAgi mundina (3.6) lEkhanadalli bareyaliddEne.

ondu barahadalli baredudannu yAva rItiyalli OdalAguttade
embudannu Oduganige tiLisuvudE adaralli baLakeyAguva lipiya
mukhya kelasa; padagaLa caritreyannu tiLisuvudAgali, bErondu bhASe
yalli avannu hEge bareyalAguttade embudannu tiLisuvudAgali adara
kelasavalla. intaha bEDada kelasagaLa horeyannu adara mEle horisi
dAga, baraha kliSTavAguttA hOguttade.

samskxtadinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu kannaDadalli bareyuvAga,
avannu samskxtadalli hEge bareyalAguttadeyO hAgeyE bareyabEku


emba niyama kannaDada maTTige intaha tIrA anavaSyakavAda ondu
hore. hindina kAladalli kannaDa barahagArarige samskxtada mEle
atiyAda pUjyabhAvavittu; mattu I kAraNakkAgi, adara padagaLannu
'keDisa'hOgade adaralliruva hAgeyE avannu kannaDadallU bareyabEku
emba I niyamavannu avaru tamma mEle horisikonDiddaru.

hindina kAladalli samAjada kelavE kelavu mandi panDitaru mAtra
barahavannu baLasuttiddaru; hAgAgi, mElina kaTTaleyinda heccu
tondareyAguttiralilla; tondareyAdarU, samskxtada mElina pUjya
bhAvadindAgi avaru adannu sahisikonDiddaru. Adare, ivattu ellA
kannaDigarU barahavannu baLasalu kaliyabEkAgide. hAgAgi, I sandarbha
dalli, kannaDada maTTige tIra anavaSyakavAgiruva I niyamavannu tegedu
hAkuvudE buddhivantike.

yAkendare, hAge mADuva mUlaka, kannaDa barahavannu kaliyuva
mattu baLasuva kelasa heccu sulabhavAguvante mADabahudu. samskxtada
eravalugaLannu heccina kannaDigarU hEge OduttAre embudannu tiLisu
valli I 17 heccina akSaragaLu svalpavU sahAyamADuvudillavAda
kAraNa, nijakkU avu kannaDa barahakke bEkAgiyE illa.

nanna I vAda tappu endu hELuvavaru yArU samskxta eravalu
gaLannu samskxtadalliruva hAgeyE bareyuvudarinda kannaDada Odugarige
yAva rItiyalli sahAyavAguttade embudannu ellU tOrisi
koTTilla. bEre EnEnO viSayakke sambandhisada vAdagaLannu mundiTTu
konDu avaru I badalAvaNeyannu virOdhisuttiddAre.

udAharaNegAgi, da-dha vyatyAsavannu barahadalli tOrisadiddare dana
-dhana, madya-madhya modalAda padagaLannu barediruvalli gondala
vunTAgaballudu emba vAdavannu gamanisabahudu. haLegannaDada ra-a
mattu La-i vyatyAsavannu biTTukoTTAgalU intahadE samasye eddira
bahudallavE? yAkendare, kare 'barahELu', kaL 'hAlu kare'; sAru
'hattira hOgu', sALu 'kUgi hELu'; eLe 'eLatu', el 'eLedADu'
embantaha halavAru padagaLannu bareyuvalli, a mattu igaLannu
tegeduhAkidAga, modaligidda vyatyAsa illavAgittu; hAgiddarU namma
hindinavaru dhayryadinda I mAppADannu mADikonDiddaru. ivattu
yArigU idondu samasyeyendu tOruvudE illavalla! nijakkU
avaru I badalAvaNeyannu mADiradiddare adu namage ondu doDDa
samasyeyAguttittu


## kannaDakkondu ‘hosa baraha’
idallade, mAtinalli I vyatyAsa illavAdarU tondareyAguvu
dillavenda mEle, barahadalli yAke tondareyAgabEku? innondu
viSayavEnendare, bhASegaLalli baLakeyAguva heccina padagaLigU onda
kkinta heccu arthagaLiruttave; samskxtada padagaLigantU innaSTu heccu
arthagaLiruttave; kelavu padagaLige ippattu-mUvattu arthagaLiruttave.
samskxtada ondu padakOSavannu biDisi nODidare idu spaSTavAdItu.
hAgiddarU, Odugarige yAva tondareyU Aguvudilla. heccineDe
gaLallU baLasida sandarbhadindalE avugaLalli sariyAda arthavannu
ArisikoLLalu namage gottAguttade. hAgAgi, kannaDa barahadallU Odina
llillada mElina vyatyAsagaLannu tegeduhAkuvudarinda Odugarige yAva
heccina tondareyU AgalAradu.

## barahavannu saripaDisuvudu
‘bhASAvijYAnigaLu bhASegaLannu varNisahOgabEkallade avannu badalA
yisuva prayatna mADabAradu; hAgiruvAga, nAnu yAke I rIti
kannaDavannu badalAyisalu horaTiddEne?’ embudu avaru ettiruva
innondu AkSEpa. Adare, nAnilli badalAyisahoraTiruvudu kannaDa
bhASeyannalla, kannaDa barahavannu. bhASegU barahakkU naDuviruva
vyatyAsavannu arthamADikoLLade avaru I AkSEpavannettiddAre.

bhASe tAnAgiyE kAladinda kAlakke badalAguttA hOguttade,
mattu A mUlaka adu tannannu saripaDisikoLLuttA iruttade. hAgAgi,
adakke bhASAvijYAniya neravu bEkAgilla. Ata tanna neravannu koDalu
hOdarU adu adannu svIkarisuvudilla.

Adare, baraha A rItiyadalla. hosa hosa sandarbhagaLige hondi
koLLuva hAge, adannu barahagArarE prayatnapaTTu badalAyisikoLLu
tirabEkAguttade. bhASeya hAge tAnAgi badalAguva Sakti adakkilla.
kelavomme barahada oLaguTTannariyadavaru intaha mArADugaLannu
naDesalu horaDuttAre, mattu A mUlaka tamma nuDiya baraha innaSTu
kliSTavAguva hAge mADuttAre.

udAharaNegAgi, ingliS‌nalli ivattu kANisuva heccina spelling
samasyegaLigU sAmyuvel jAnsan emba padakOSakAra adara baraha
dalli naDesidda halavu tappu mArADugaLE kAraNa. udAharaNegAgi,
padagaLa rUpa avugaLa caritreyannU sUcisabEku (know mattu no
padagaLa uccAraNe ondE iddarU, avugaLa caritre bEre embudannu


rUpabhEda sUcisuva hAge) emba anavaSyakavAda horeyannu Ata
ingliS barahada mEle horisidda. bEre yArAdarU barahagAraru
illavE vidvAmsaru munde bandu, Ata horisida intaha horegaLannu
tegeduhAkuvalli varegU, ingliS barahada I spelling samasyegaLu
hAgeyE uLidiruttave mAtravalla, kAladinda kAlakke heccAguttA
hOguttave. ivannu tAnAgi saripaDisikoLLuva Sakti barahakkilla.

tamma barahavannu tappu mADade saripaDisidavarU halavariddAre.
udAharaNegAgi, koriyan barahadalli baLakeyAguttidda caynIs
mUlada hAjA lipi tumbA toDaku toDakAgittu; adannu kaliyalu
halavu varSagaLE bEkAguttidduvu; kalita mEle adannu baLasuvudU
tumbA toDakina kelasavAgittu. ellA janarU barahavannu kaliyalu
sulabhavAguvante, 1945ralli adakkinta tumbA cannAgiruva hangul
emba ondu hosa lipiyondannu sxSTisi, koriyan bhASege
aLavaDisalAyitu.

I lipiyalli padagaLannu Oduva hAgeyE bareyuva kAraNa, ivattu
adannu kaliyuva mattu baLasuva kelasa tumbA sulabhavAgide. I hosa
lipiyannu baLasatoDagidudarindAgi, koriyAdalli Odu-baraha balla
vara eNike tumbA heccAgideyendu hELalAguttade.

TarkiS bhASeyallU intahadE ondu mArpADannu mADalAgittu;
toDaku toDakAgidda adara arEbik mUlada lipiyannu biTTukoTTu
rOman lipiyannu baLasatoDaguva mUlaka, adara barahadallidda
halavu bageya horegaLannu tegeduhAkalAgittu, mattu idarindAgi
ivattu TarkiyallU Odu-baraha kalitavara eNike tumbA heccAgide.
I mArpADina svarUpavannu hindina lEkhanadalli (3.5) vivarisa
lAgide.

I rIti haLE lipiyannu biTTukoTTu hosalipiyannu baLasalu
horaDuva badalu, baLakeyalliruva lipiyannE saripaDisiruva udA
haraNegaLU halavive: phinniS bhASeyannu bareyuvudakkAgi baLakeyAgu
tidda haLE lipiyalli halavu badalAvaNegaLannu mADi adannu saripaDisa
lAgide. hindina lipiyalli padagaLa OdigU baravaNigegU naDuve halavu
vyatyAsagaLu (spelling samasyegaLu) idduvu; avannella tegeduhAkuva
mUlaka, phinniS barahavannu saripaDisalAyitu. idarindAgi, ivattu
iDI yurOpinallE kaliyalu mattu baLasalu atyanta sulabha
vAgiruva baraha phinniS barahavembudAgi hELalAguttade.


## kannaDakkondu ‘hosa baraha’
barahavannu kaliyabEkendiruvavaru caynIs‌nantaha tumbA kliSTa
vAda barahavannU kalitAru embudAgi nAnu mEle baredidde.
hAgendu, namma barahadalliruva anavaSyakavAda toDakugaLannu tegedu
hAkabAradendEnU illavalla? nAlkaydu maylu dUra naDedu
hOgiyU kuDiyuva nIrannu taruvavariddAre, nija; Adare, nIrina
bAvi angaLada tudiyallE iddarU mEle TEnk kaTTisi, adaralli
nIrannu pampininda tumbisi, maneya nalligaLalli baruva hAge mADu
vavarU iddAralla? heccinavarU tamma kelasagaLu sulabhavAgi naDeya
bEkendu prayatnisuttiruttAre. sOmArigaLu mAtra badalAvaNegaLannu
virOdhisutta ninta nIrina hAge koLeyuttiruttAre.

## heccina dhvanigaLannEke kalisabAradu?
mahAprANAkSara, SakAra, xkAra modalAda I heccina akSaragaLu
heccina kannaDigara Odu illavE uccAraNeyallU illa; hAgAgi, Odu
kaliyuvalli mattu baraha baLasuvalli tondare koDuva I akSaragaLannu
tegeduhAkuvudE oLLeyadu embudAgi nAnu vAdisidde; hIge hELu
vAga, nAnu kannaDa barahavannu saripaDisahoraTidde.

idannu virOdhisuvavarobbaru mahAprANAkSara, SakAra, xkAra
modalAduvannu sariyAgi Oduvudu illavE uccarisuvudu kaSTada
kelasavEnalla; makkaLige avannu sulabhavAgi kalisabahudu embudAgi
vAdisiddAre. nijakkU idu mElina viSayakke nEravAgi sambandhisa
dantaha innondu vAdavAgide. yAkendare, idu Odannu endare
mAtannu saripaDisuva kelasa; barahavannu saripaDisuva kelasavE alla.
avarE innondu kaDe hELida hAge, mAtannu illavE bhASeyannu
saripaDisuvudu bhASAvijYAniya kelasavalla; Ata hAgellAdarU adannu
saripaDisahoraTarU bhASe adannu oppikoLLade pakkakkesedubiDabahudu.
yAkendare, yArigU bhASeya mEle hatOTiyannu sAdhisalu sAdhya
vAgadu.

idallade, sAviragaTTale adhyApakarige mattu miliyagaTTale vidyArthi
gaLige I heccina akSaragaLannu sariyAgi uccarisalu kalisuvudu avaru
UhisidaSTu sulabhada kelasavEnalla; ondu cikka ippattaydu-mUvattu
vayaskara taragatiyalli ellarigU I akSaragaLannu sariyAgi uccarisalu
kalisahoraTavarige mAtravE I kelasa eSTu toDakinadu embudara
arivAgaballudu. adu hEgE irali, A rIti heccina dhvanigaLannu


uccarisalu kalitu kannaDigarige AgabEkAddEnu? ivattina samAjadalli
samskxtada I heccina akSaragaLannu kaliyuvudakkintalU ingliS‌na
heccina akSaragaLannu kaliyuvudakkEne janaru Asakti tOrisabahudu.

kannaDa barahadalli I 17 heccina akSaragaLiruvudu adara SrImantike
embudAgi kelavaru bhAvisiddAre; hAgAgi, adannu tegeduhAkuvudendare
baDavarannu mElettuva badalu SrImantarannu baDavara maTTakke iLisuva
hAge embudAgi avaru vAdisuttAre. nijakkU Odinalli kANisadiruva
akSaragaLu barahadalliruvudu SrImantikeyalla, yAva prayOjanakkU
bArada ondu hore! haLegannaDadallidda a-agaLannu biTTukoTTuda
rindAgi hosagannaDa baraha hEge baDavAgalillavO hAgeyE I 17
akSaragaLannu biTTukoTTAgalU adu baDavAguvudilla, innondu hore
yannu kaLacikoLLuttade, aSTe

## ‘hosa baraha’da prayOjanagaLu
illi namma mundiruva praSne nijakkU tumbA saraLavAdudu:
samskxtadinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu kannaDadalli bareyuvAga,
avu samskxtadalli hEgiveyO hAgeyE bareyabEkO, illavE
avannu heccina kannaDigarU kannaDadalli hEge OduttArO (uccarisu
tArO) hAge bareyabEkO embudu.

avannu nAvu hEge OduttEvO hAge baredare sAku, samskxta
dalliruva hAgeyE kannaDadallU bareyabEkAgilla embudu 'hosa
baraha'da niluvu; ivattu hIge mADuvudarinda nAvu halavu
prayOjanagaLannu paDeyaballevu. ivugaLalli mukhyavAda kelavannu keLage
paTTimADalAgide:

(1) cikka makkaLige mattu baraha bArada doDDavarige kannaDa baraha
vannu kalisuva kelasa sulabhavAguttade. yAkendare, avarige 48
akSaragaLa badalu barE 31 akSaragaLannu kalisidare sAku. ivannella
Oduva hAgeyE bareyuva kAraNa, kaliyuvudU sulabha.

(2) ellA padagaLannU Oduva hAgeyE bareyuva kAraNa, ivattu
kannaDadalliruva spelling samasye pUrti illavAguttade.

(3) ivattu kannaDada dinapatrikegaLalli mattu kate-kAdambarigaLalli
tumbA heccu accina tappugaLu kANisuvudu mahAprANAkSara, SakAra,
mattu xkAragaLa baLakeyalli. ivu sAmAnyavAgi 'hosa baraha'dalli
baruvudillavAda kAraNa, I tappugaLellavU illavAguttave. (halavu


## kannaDakkondu ‘hosa baraha’
janarige hakArada (illavE SakArada) baLakeyU tondareyadAgi
kANisuttade; Adare sadyakkantU A viSayadalli nAvEnU mADalArevu).

1. (4) barahagArarige elli yAva akSaragaLannu baLasabEku emba
2. viSayadalli samSayavELuvudu, mattu AgAga padakOSagaLannu biDisi
3. nODabEkAguvudu mElina akSaragaLa baLakeyalli mAtra. avannu
4. Oduva hAge bareyadiruvudE idakke kAraNa. 'hosa baraha'dalli I
5. samSayagaLella illavAguttave.
6. (5) keLavarada makkaLige uccAraNeyallillada I heccina akSaragaLannu
7. kaliyalu tumbA kaSTavendenisuva kAraNa, avaralli kILarimeyunTAgu
8. ide; mattu, avaru tamma kalikeyannu naDuvinallE biTTubiDuttAre.
9. 'hosa baraha'da baLakeyAdalli I tondareyilla.
10. (6) 'hosa baraha'dalli beraLaccu mADuvudu mattu kampyUTarinalli
11. bareyuvudu sulabha; SiphT kIyannu tumbA kaDime bAri ottabEkAgu
12. ide.
13. (7) padagaLannu Oduva hAgeyE bareyuva kAraNa, barahakkU ADu
14. mAtigU naDuviruva antara kaDimeyAguttade.
15. (8) barahada kliSTate mattu kxtakategaLu kaDimeyAguttave, mattu
16. idarindAgi baraha heccu jIvantavAgi kANisuttade.
17. nanna ittIcegina kannaDa vyAkaraNa yAke bEku emba pustakadalli
18. innondu mukhyavAda prayOjanavannU koTTiddEne:
19. (9) kannaDa barahavannu Odalu kaliyuva makkaLu adaralli akSara
20. gaLannu jODisi (mara padavannu ma mattu ra emba akSarakantegaLannu
21. jODisi, mattu ma emba akSarakanteyannu m mattu a emba akSara
22. gaLannu jODisi) padagaLannu bareyalAguttade embudannu, mattu baraha
23. dalli kANisuva akSaragaLigU bAyiyinda horaDisuva [m], [a],
24. [r], [a] modalAda dhvanigaLigU naDuve sambandha ide embudannu
25. kanDukonDalli mAtra, avarige adannu salIsAgi Odalu baruttade.

akSaragaLigU dhvanigaLigU naDuve nEravAda sambandha ideyAdare,
idannu kanDukoLLuvudu tumbA sulabha; barahadalliruva 'sTelling'
samasyegaLu I sambandhavannu keDisuttave; hAgAgi, intaha samasyegaLu
tumbA hecciruva ingliS‌nantaha barahagaLannu makkaLige sariyAda krama
dalli Odalu kalisuvudu tumbA kaSTa. ivattu ingliS barahavannu
Odalu kaliyuva makkaLalli heccinavarigU sariyAda kramadalli Odu


vudu hEge embudu gottAguvudE illa embudAgi samSOdhanegaLu
tOrisikoTTive.

kannaDa barahadallU, mahAprANAkSara, SakAra, xkAra modalAda
heccina akSaragaLu spelling samasyeyannu tandoDDuttave; yAkendare,
avu akSaragaLigU dhvanigaLigU naDuve nEravAda sambandhavillada hAge
mADuttave. hAgAgi, avannu barahadinda horagirisidalli makkaLu bahaLa
bEgane sariyAda kramadalli Oduvudu hEge embudannu kaliyaballaru.

## haLE barahavannu uLisikoLLuvudarinda prayOjanavideyE?
samskxtadinda eravalAgi paDeda padagaLannu samskxtadalliruva hAgeyE
bareyabEkemba niyamavannu Igiruva hAgeyE uLisikonDalli
kannaDigarige prayOjanagaLEnAdarU sigaballuvE embudannU pariSIlisa
bahudu.

nanage anisuvudEnendare, I padagaLannu badalAyisahOgade,
samskxtadalliruva hAgeyE bareyuttiruvudarinda sigaballa prayOjana
gaLella tAtkAlikavAdavugaLu. udAharaNegAgi, avannu haLE rUpadalli
nODi baLakeyAgiruvavarige hosa rUpavannu kanDAga adu tappendu
anisuttade; intaha anisike unTAgadante, ivarigAgi I badalAvaNe
yannu mADadirabEku. Adare, hosa rUpavannu kanDu baLakeyAdavarige
adu tappendu anisuvudE illavalla

hosa barahavannu kalitavarige haLE barahadalliruva pustakagaLannu
Odalu tusu tondareyAgabahudu; idU kUDa tAtkAlikavAda
tondare. samaya kaLedante intaha sandarbhagaLu kaDimeyAguttA
hOguttave.

barahadalli entaha badalAvaNeyannu mADuvudiddarU intaha
tAtkAlikavAda tondaregaLu bandE baruttave; avakke hedari badalAvaNe
yannu mADikoLLadiddare, spelling samasyeyannu yAvAgalU anubhavi
suttalE irabEkAguttade. yAkendare, kannaDa barahavannu mEle
sUcisida hAge badalAyisuvudarinda namage dorakuva prayOjana
gaLalli pratiyondU namage yAvAgalU dorakuvantahavu.

ingliS‌na spelling samasyeyU intahadE. adannu saripaDisa
hOdare halavAru tAtkAlika tondaregaLannu edurisabEkAguttade.
Adare, ingliS‌nalli intaha tAtkAlika tondaregaLu tumbA jAsti;
hAgAgi, heccinavarigU adannu saripaDisabEkendu anisuvudilla.


kannaDadalli tondaregaLu heccillavAda kAraNa (kannaDadavE Ada padagaLa
maTTige EnU illa), adannu sulabhavAgi saripaDisabahudu. idannu
nAnu nanna ittIcegina pustakagaLalli tOrisikoTTiddEne.

## 3. bhASe mattu baraha
mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuve halavu vyatyAsagaLive; I vyatyAsagaLu
mAtigillada halavu anukUlategaLannu barahakke tandukoTTive; Adare,
ivE vyatyAsagaLu kelavu sandarbhagaLalli barahakke hAnikArakagaLAgiyU
pariNamisive.

I vyatyAsagaLindAgi, kelavu barahagaLige bhASeya kaTTannu muridu
horabaralu, mattu tammadE Ada svatantra astitvavannu sAdhisikoLLalu
sAdhyavAgide. Adare, hAge svatantravAgi nintiruva barahagaLannu
'bhASe'gaLendu kareyuvudu mAtra sariyallavendu nanage tOruttade.
yAkendare, bhASegaLalliruva jIvantike I barahagaLalli uLidiruvudilla.
mAtannanusarisi badalAguttA hOguva barahagaLu mAtra tamma
jIvantikeyannu uLisikoLLaballuvu.

I viSayavannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLalu modalige mAtu mattu
barahagaLa naDuvina vyatyAsagaLentahavu, mattu I vyatyAsagaLu mAtu
mattu barahagaLa mEle entaha pariNAmavannu bIraballuvu embudannu
tiLidukoLLuva avaSyakateyide.

## mAtu kSaNika, baraha SASvata
mAtina mAdhyama dhvaniyAda kAraNa, ADuttidda hAgeyE adu
aLiduhOguttA iruttade. Adare, kAgadada mEle mUDisuva baraha
heccu SASvatavAdudu. mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuvina I vyatyAsa
dindAgi, avugaLa naDuve halavu tumbA mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLu
mUDibandive.

omme nuDida mAtannu nAvu hindakke paDeyalArevu; hAgAgi,
adaralli badalAvaNegaLannU mADalArevu; adu tappAgiddare, adannu
saripaDisuva bErondu mAtannu hELaballevallade, adannE hindakke
paDedu saripaDisuva hAgilla. Adare, baredudannu Odi nODi, adaralli


tappugaLiddare avannu tiddi saripaDisi, bEkiddare adannE innomme baredu,
AmEle adannu Odugareduru irisaballevu.

mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuviruva I vyatyAsa avugaLa naDuve
innU halavAru vyatyAsagaLannu tandu hAkide. mAtinalli baruva
vAkyagaLu sAmAnyavAgi tunDu tunDAgiruttave; avugaLalli halavu
tappAgiyU iraballuvu. idallade, mAtinalli halavu bAri hELiddannE
hELuttiruttEve; ondu viSayada naDuve innondu viSaya talehAku
tiruttade; obbanu mAtanADuttiruvAga naDuve innobbana mAtU
bandiruttade.

Adare, barahadalli vAkyagaLu iDiyiDiyAgiruttave, mattu avu sari
yAgiruvanteyU nODikoLLalAguttade. tiLisabEkendiruva viSaya
gaLannu ondu kramadalli jODisalAguttade, mattu avugaLalli punarukti
dOSa illadante nODikoLLalAguttade.

mAtinalli baLakeyAguva vAkyagaLu cikka cikkavu; uddudda vAkya
gaLiddarU avannu cikka cikka vAkyagaLa jODaNeyinda unTumADalAgu
ttade. Adare, barahadalli heccAgi uddudda vAkyagaLE baLakeyAguttiru
ttave. idallade, ondu vAkyadoLage innondu vAkyavannu irisiru
vantaha sikkalu vAkyagaLu barahadalli kANisikoLLuva hAge mAtinalli
kANisikoLLuvudilla.

mAtigU barahakkU naDuve intaha halavu vyatyAsagaLiruvuda
rindAgi, baraha mAtiginta SrESTha emba anisike nammalli beLedubandide.
Adare, nijakkU miliyagaTTale varSagaLinda bhASeya mAdhyamavAgi
baLakeyAguttiruvudu mAtallade barahavalla. mAtige svalpamaTTigina
SASvatateyannu tandukoDuvudakkAgi kelavE kelavu bhASegaLalli mAtra
baraha baLakege bandide. ivattigU barahavannu baLasuva bhASegaLigintalU
baLasada bhASegaLE heccive.

## barahavannu makkaLu huTTinindalE paDeyuvudilla
mAtigU barahakkU naDuviruva innondu mukhyavAda vyatyAsavendare,
mAtannu makkaLu huTTinindalE paDeyuttAre; adannu avarige yArU
kalisikoDabEkAgilla; maneyalli doDDavaru mAtanADuvudannu kELi,
avaru tAvAgiyE adannu kalitukoLLuttAre; ArOgyadalliruva yAva
maguvU tanna tAynuDiyannu kalitukoLLadiruvudilla. idallade, ellA
makkaLU tamma tAynuDiyalli ondE bageya pariNatiyannu paDeyu


ttAre: idannu paDeyalu kelavarige tusu heccu samaya tagalaballudu,
mattu kelavarige tusu kaDime samaya tagalaballudu; Adare, yAva
maguvU tanna tAynuDiyalli sampUrNavAda pariNatiyannu paDeya
diruvudilla.

Adare, barahavannu makkaLu huTTinindalE paDeyuvudilla. adannu
avarige maneyallAgali, SAleyallAgali yArAdarU kalisabEkAguttade.
hAge kalisadiddare, avaru adannu kaliyuvudE illa. idallade, ellA
makkaLU barahadalli ondE bageya pariNatiyannu paDeyuvudilla;
kelavarige adannu tumbA cannAgi baLasalu baruttade, mattu bEre
kelavarige adannu eSTu kalitarU sariyAgi baLasalu baruvudilla. I
ellA viSayagaLallU, Ijuvudu, saykal tuLiyuvudu, vAhanagaLannu
ODisuvudu modalAdavugaLa hAge, barahavembudu namma maTTige
huTTinindalE paDeyada, mattu kalitu paDeyabEkAgiruva kavSalyavAgide.

mAtu mattu barahagaLa naDuviruva I vyatyAsa avugaLa naDuve
bErondu tumbA mukhyavAda vyatyAsavannu tandiriside: hEge bareya
bEku, mattu Enu bareyabEku embudannu makkaLige kalisikoDabahudu;
doDDavaru hEge kalisikoDuttArO, hAgeyE makkaLU bareyalu
kaliyuttAre.

Adare, hEge mAtanADabEku, mattu Enu mAtADabEku embu
dannu makkaLige kalisikoDalu baruvudilla; avaru tamma tAynuDiyalli
mAtanADalu kaliyuttiruvAga avarannu tandetAyiyaru tiddalu
hOdarU, adu avara mAtina mEle yAva pariNAmavannU bIruvu
dilla. idallade, tAynuDiyannu kaliyuvalli kelavu niScitavAda hanta
gaLiddu, ivugaLalli ondondannU niScitavAda kramadalli makkaLellarU
dATuttiruttAre. I viSayadallU avara mEle doDDavara kalisuvike
yAva pariNAmavannU bIruvudilla.

makkaLu mAtu mattu barahagaLannu kaliyuva kramadalliruva I
vyatyAsadindAgi, avugaLa naDuve innondu mukyavAda vyatyAsa mUDi
bandide. mAtu kAladinda kAlakke, mattu talemArininda talemArige
badalAguttA hOguttade, mattu sahajavAgi naDeyuva I badalA
vaNeya mUlaka, mAtu yAvAgalU tanna hosatanavannu uLisi
konDiruttade. I badalAvaNe mukhyavAgi makkaLu tamma tAynuDiyannu
kalitukoLLuva samayadalli naDeyuttade. doDDavara mAtinalli kxtakate
gaLEnAdarU sErikonDiveyAdare, avellavU intaha badalAvaNegaLa


mUlaka makkaLa mAtinalli pUrti illavAguttave. mAtinalli naDeyuva
I badalAvaNeya mEle yAra hatOTiyU iruvudilla.

Adare, barahadalli intaha yAva badalAvaNeyU naDeyuvudilla.
adannu makkaLige kalisikoDabEkAguttadeyAda kAraNa, hAge kalisikoDu
vAga adannu makkaLu 'sariyAgi' kaliyuvante mADalu sAdhyavAguttade.
hAgAgi, samaya kaLedantella barahadalli kxtakate tumbikoLLuttade,
mattu adu mAtininda dUravAguttA hOguttade. I kxtakateyannu
hOgalADisabEkAdalli, mattu mAtigU barahakkU naDuve beLedu
baruva antaravannu kaDime mADabEkAdalli, yArAdarU barahagAraru
tamma barahagaLalli adakke bEkAda badalAvaNegaLannu mUDisalu prayatna
paDabEkAguttade.

## yAvudu bhASe?
mAtigU barahakkU naDuviruva I vyatyAsavannu gamanisidAga,
innondu mukhyavAda viSaya namma gamanakke baruttade: nAvu 'bhASe'
emba padada mUlaka janara mAtannu hesarisabEkallade avara baraha
vannalla. miliyagaTTale varSagaLinda bhASeya mAdhyamavAgiddudu
mAtallade barahavalla. mAtinalli hELida sangati tusu SASvatavAgi
uLiyuvante mADalu barahavannu baLasalAguttade, aSTe. bhASeyinda
mAtu, mattu mAtininda baraha embudAgi barahakkU bhASegU naDuve
mAtu ondu konDiyAgi nintiruttade. idallade, monne monneya
varegU barahavannu samAjada kelavE kelavu mandi mAtra baLasu
ttiddaru.

Adare mEle sUcisida hAge, mAtigU barahakkU naDuve halavu
vyatyAsagaLiddu, I vyatyAsagaLindAgi barahakke mAtininda bErAgiruva
tannadE Ada astitvavondannu kaTTikoLLalu sAdhyavAgide, mattu
idarindAgi, janara manassinalli ivattu mAtigintalU barahakke heccina
mahatva bandide. idallade, barahavillada mAtu bhASeyE alla emba
anisike ivattu halavarallide. Adare idu nAyi tanna bAlavannu bIsuva
badalu, bAlavE nAyiyannu bIsuva hAge

kAladinda kAlakke badalAguttA hOguva mAtannanusarisi baraha
badalAgadiddare EnAguttade? idakke samskxta baraha ondu oLLeya
udAharaNe. halavAru oLLeya barahagAraru samskxtadalli barahagaLannu
baredaru; ivannAdharisi, pANiniyantaha vayyAkaraNigaLu samskxtakke


ondu kaTTuniTTAda vyAkaraNavannU baredukoTTaru. ivugaLindAgi,
samskxta baraha mAtannanusarisi badalAgalu hOgade niScalavAgi
uLiyuvantAyitu. kaLeda eraDu sAvira varSagaLalli I rIti samskxta
baraha mAtannanusarisi badalAgade uLidide.

nijakkU ivattu samskxtavannu ondu bhASeyendu kareyuvudu
sariyalla. yAkendare, eraDu sAvira varSagaLaSTu hinde mAtininda
bErpaTTAgalE adu 'bhASe' emba hesarannU kaLedukonDittu. ivattu
kelavaru tAvu samskxtavannu ADuttiddEvendu hELabahudu; Adare,
kAladinda kAlakke mattu talemArininda talemArige badalAguvantaha,
mattu A mUlaka tanna hosatanavannu uLisikoLLuvantaha bhASeya
mukhya svabhAva adakkilla. yAkendare, A rIti badalAdare adu samskxta
vAgi uLiyade bErondu bhASeyAgibiDuttade

hAgAgi, samskxtavannu mAtinalli baLasuvavarellarU ivattu
pANiniya vyAkaraNakke mattu mahAkavigaLa baLakege hondikoLLuvante
tamma mAtannu saridUgisikoLLuttalE irabEkAguttade. adaralli badalA
vaNegaLEnAdarU naDedarU avu svAbhAvikavAgi naDeyuva badalu,
barahagAraru (kavigaLu) vayyaktikavAgi naDesidudarindAgi unTAguttave.
I rIti mAtina AdhAravannu biTTukoTTudarindAgi samskxta barahagaLu
kxtakavAguttA hOguttive.

idannu tiLiyalu, samskxtadalli baLakeyAguva samastapadagaLannu
pariSIlisabahudu: sAmAnyavAgi, bhASegaLalli samastapadagaLigU pada
kantegaLigU naDuve vyatyAsaviruttade; udAharaNegAgi, kannaDadalli
karihalage embudu ondu samastapada, biLihalage embudu ondu
padakante.

intaha padakanteyannu ondu viSiSTavAda arthadalli tayArisi
baLasidAga, mattu A arthadalli adu mAtinalli baLakege bandAga mAtra
samastapadavendennisuttade. beNkallu, huTTuhabba, hurigaDale modalA
davugaLu I rIti viSiSTavAda arthadalli baLakege bandu kannaDadalli
samastapadagaLenisive.

samastapada mattu padakantegaLa naDuve bhASegaLalli kANisikoLLuva
I vyatyAsa samskxta barahadalli illavAgide. adaralli kelavu samasta
padagaLige viSiSTavAda arthavideyAdarU, avannu antaha arthadalli
mAtravallade bariya padakanteya arthadallU kavigaLu baLasaballaru.
hAgAgi, 'samAsa'vemba vyAkaraNa vidhAna samskxtadalli eraDu illavE


heccu nAmapadagaLannu oTTusErisi sankSipta rUpadalli baLasuva ondu
sAdhana mAtravAgi uLidukonDide.

samskxtada padakantegaLalli eraDu nAmapadagaLannu oTTige baLasa
bEkAdalli, averaDakkU linga, vacana, mattu vibhaktigaLannu sUcisuva
pratyayagaLannu sErisabEkAguttade. kxSNam sarpa0, kxSNana sarpENa
embantaha padakantegaLannu idakke udAharaNeyAgi koDabahudu.
samastapadagaLalli I pratyaya koneya padadalli mAtra iruttade embu
dannu kxSNasarpa0, kxSNasarpENa embantaha padarUpagaLalli kANa
bahudu.

mEle sUcisida hAge, samskxtada kavigaLa kayyalli I vidhAna pada
gaLannu vAkyagaLalli sankSiptavAgi baLasuva ondu vidhAnavAgi badalAgide.
yAva eraDu (illavE heccu) nAmapadagaLannu bEkiddarU oTTu sErisi
mattu sankSiptagoLisi, adannu avaru tamma kAvyagaLalli baLasaballaru.

udAharaNegAgi, bANabhaTTana kAdambariyalli ippattu-mUvattu
nAmapadagaLannu oTTusErisi tayArisiruva udduddavAda samastapada
gaLannU kANabahudu. intaha samastapadagaLige tayArike emba ondE
ondu hantaviraballudallade, adakkinta bhinnavAda baLake emba innondu
hantaviralAradu. yAkendare, antaha udduddavAda padagaLannu tiru
tirugi baLasuva mUlaka avu ondu bhASeyalli rUDhige baralu
sAdhyavE illa

kavigaLu vayyaktikavAgi naDesiruva intaha halavu mArpADu
gaLindAgi, samskxta barahadalli kxtakegaLu tumbikonDive. kAladinda
kAlakke sahajavAgi munduvariyuva bhASegaLalli intaha kxtakegaLu
tAvAgiyE bidduhOguttave; Adare, samskxta barahakke eraDu sAvira
varSagaLindalU mAtina AdhAra tappihOgideyAda kAraNa, adaralli
sErikonDiruva kxtakegaLu hAgeyE uLidive. ninta nIrina hAge adu
jaDavAgide, mattu tanna jIvantikeyannu kaLedukonDide.

## ‘klAsikal’ bhASeyO, barahavO?
samskxta, lyATin modalAda kelavu barahagaLannu klAsikal bhASe
gaLendu kareyalAguttade; nUrAru varSagaLinda badalAgade uLidiru
vudu, mattu halavu bageya uttamavAda granthagaLannu avugaLalli
barediruvudu avakke I 'klAsikal' emba hesaru baralu mukhya kAraNa.
Adare, mEle sUcisida hAge, nUrAru varSa badalAgade uLidira


bEkAdare, avu mAtina AdhAra tappihOgiruva barahagaLAgirabEkallade
bhASegaLAgiralu sAdhyavilla.

ivattu kannaDakkU bhArata sarakAra 'klAsikal' padaviyannu koTTide.
Adare, kannaDa baraha samskxta mattu lyATin barahagaLa hAge
badalAgade uLidilla; adu modalige haLegannaDaviddudu AmEle naDu
gannaDavAgi, ivattu hosagannaDavAgide. kannaDa bhASe mAtinalli
badalAguttiruvante, adannanusarisi kannaDa barahavU badalAguttA
hOgide. hAgAgi, ivattigU kannaDa baraha jIvantavAgide.

hAgAdare, kannaDadalli yAvudannu 'klAsikal' embudAgi kareya
bahudu? nanage anisuvudEnendare, haLegannaDa barahakke bEkiddare I
padaviyannu koDabahudu. yAkendare, vaDDArAdhaneyinda toDagi
muddaNNanavaregU nUrAru varSagaLa baLake adakkideyendu hELa
bahudu.


bhASeya bagege nIvEnu balliri?


<a id="part-4"></a>

[English →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-en#part-four--the-nature-of-the-kannada-language) | [Eke →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn-eke#part-4)

bhAga nAlku
kannaDa bhASeya svarUpa

kannaDa bhASe ondu Urinalli iruva hAge innondu Urinalli iruvu
dilla; ondu samAja illavE jAtiyalli iruva hAge innondu
samAja illavE jAtiyalli iruvudilla; ondu kAladalli iruva hAge
innondu kAladalli iruvudilla. bEre bEre Uru, samAja mattu
kAlagaLalli adu I rIti bhinna bhinnavAgi kANisalu mukhyavAgi kAla
dinda kAlakke adaralli naDeyuva badalAvaNegaLE kAraNavendu hELa
bahudu.

I badalAvaNegaLu bEre bEre UrugaLalli bEre bEreyAgi
naDeyalu A UrugaLalli vAsisuva janara naDuve samparka kaDime
yAgiruvudE kAraNa. udAharaNegAgi, karAvaLiya UrugaLigU
karNATakada itara UrugaLigU naDuve paScima ghaTTagaLindAgi hindina
kAladalli paraspara samparka bahaLa kaDimeyiddirabEku. idarindAgi,
karAvaLiya kannaDadalli naDeda badalAvaNegaLu itara pradESagaLalli baLake
yalliruva kannaDada prabhEdagaLalli naDeda badalAvaNegaLiginta bhinnavAda
dAriyannu hiDidirabEku, mattu idarindAgi ivattu karAvaLiyalli
baLakeyalliruva kannaDa itara pradESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva kannaDakkinta
bhinnavAgi kANisuttide.

bEre bEre samAja illavE jAtigaLallU idE rItiyalli paraspara
samparka kaDimeyAdaSTU A samAja illavE jAtigaLige sErida janara
mAtugaLalli badalAvaNegaLu bEre bEre dikkinalli naDeyuttave, mattu
idarindAgi avu kramENa ondakkinta ondu bhinnavAgatoDaguttave.
hIge, kAla, Uru mattu samAjagaLa naDuve kANisuva vyatyAsagaLigella
bhASe kAladinda kAlakke badalAguttiruvudE mukhya kAraNa.

kannaDadalli I rIti kAla, dESa, mattu samAjagaLige sambandhisi
dante entaha vyatyAsagaLella ive emba viSayadalli innU bahaLaSTu
samSOdhanegaLu naDeyuva avaSyakateyide. I samSOdhanegaLu hEge
munduvariyabEku embudannu I vibhAgada modala eraDu lEkhana
gaLu sUcisuttave.


## kannaDada mUru mukhagaLu
kannaDa vyAkaraNada viSayadallU nAvu kaliyabEkAgiruva viSaya
gaLu halavive. kannaDada heccina vayyAkaraNigaLU samskxta illavE
ingliS bhASeya vyAkaraNavannu mAdariyAgirisikonDu kannaDakke
vyAkaraNavannu racisiruvante kANisuttade.

kannaDa bhASe I eraDu bhASegaLiginta tIra bhinnavAgiruva kAraNa,
intaha vyAkaraNagaLu adara padagaLa mattu vAkyagaLa racanegaLannu
sariyAgi pratibimbisalAravu. kannaDa vyAkaraNakke adaradE Ada ondu
vyAkaraNa parampareyannu siddhapaDisuvudu yAke avaSya embudannu I
vibhAgada mundina eraDu lEkhanagaLu sUcisuttave.

kannaDa padagaLa Antarika racane mattu caritreyantahadu embudannu
nirdharisuvalli samSOdhanegU kavitvakkU naDuve gharSaNegaLunTAgalu
sAdhyavide. kelavu sandarbhagaLalli kavitva elle mIruttideyendu
samSOdhane tiLisabahudEnO embudannu aydaneya lEkhana sUcisu
ttade.

kannaDadalli hosa hosa vicAragaLannu pratipAdisalu mattu itara
bhASegaLinda antaha vicAragaLannu Amadu mADikoLLalu adara pada
rASiyannu vxddhisuva avaSyakate kanDubaruttade. idannu hEge naDesa
bEku? hEge naDesidalli I padavxddhi kannaDada sAhajikateyannu keDisa
diddItu emba viSayavannu Araneya lEkhana parIkSisuttade.

## 4.1 kannaDada mUru mukhagaLu
karNATakadalli heccina janarU kannaDavannADuttAremba viSaya namagella
gottide. I ADugannaDa haLLiyinda haLLige, jilleyinda jillege, mattu
jAtiyinda jAtige badalAguttA naDeyuvudembudU namage gottide.

maysUrina mandi ondu tarada kannaDavannADuttArAdare, mangaLUri
navaru innondu tara, dhAravADadavaru mattondu tara, mattu bIdar
navaru magadondu tara. iSTE alla, maysUru jilleyallEnE koLLe
gAlada kannaDa, nanjanagUDina kannaDa, mattu heggaDadEvana kOTeya
kannaDagaLa naDuve vyatyAsavide.

I rIti Urininda Urige vyatyAsavide mAtravalla, ondE haLLi
yalli vAsisuva janarallU brAhmaNara mAtu, okkaligara mAtu, Adi
karNATakara mAtu embuvella bEre bErAgive.


## vyatyAsagaLa niyamabaddhate
kannaDadalli iSTella vyatyAsagaLiveyembudannu nAvella tiLidiruvevAdarU
I vyatyAsagaLu entahavu, ivugaLa vyAptiyEnu embudannu iduvarege
spaSTavAgi yArU vivarisilla. SAstrIyavAda abhyAsa naDesidalli, I
vyatyAsagaLa hinde niScitavAdondu niyamavide embudara arivAga
bahudu.

udAharaNegAgi, maysUrinavaru mane ennuttArAdare, dhAravADa
davaru mani ennuttAre. maysUrina haNe dhAravADadalli haNiyAgu
ide, kere keriyAguttade, gere geriyAguttade. maysUru kannaDada
nAmapadagaLa koneyalli baruva ekAragaLella dhAravADa kannaDadalli
ikAravAguttadeyembudE I vyatyAsada hindiruva niyama.

maysUru jilleyoLagEnE huNasUrinalli hakki endu hELuvudakke
nanjanagUDinalli akki ennuttAre; huNasUrina hAlu nanjanagUDinalli
Alu endAguttade; hambu ambu endAguttade, hAvu avu
endAguttade. padagaLa Adiyalli baruva hakAragaLella nanjanagUDina
kannaDadalli lOpagonDive embudE I vyatyAsada hindiruva niyama.

koLLEgAladalli ekArAntavAgiruva kriyApadagaLella nanjanagUDi
nalli ikArAntavAguttaveyembudu intahadE innondu niyama.
koLLEgAladalli bare endiruvudu nanjanagUDinalli bari endAguttade;
age agiyAguttade, kare kariyAguttade, oDe oDiyAguttade. Adare
I niyama kriyApadagaLige mAtra anvayisuttade, nAmapadagaLige
anvayisuvudilla embudannu gamanisabEku.

## vyatyAsagaLa vyApti
ondu Urininda innondu Urige ADugannaDadalli tOribaruva
vyatyAsagaLu hIge niyamabaddhavAgive mAtravalla, avugaLigondu niScita
vAda vyAptiyU ide. udAharaNegAgi, padada Adiyalliruva hakAravu
biddu hOguvudemba niyamavannu gamanisabahudu.

maysUru jilleya huNasUru, ke.Ar.nagara, mattu piriyA
paTTaNagaLalli padagaLa Adiyalli baruva hakAravannu janaru spaSTavAgiyE
uccarisuttAre. huNasUru biTTu heggaDadEvana kOTege hOdevAdare
alli padagaLa Adiyalli baruva hakAragaLella lOpagonDiruvudannu


## kannaDada mUru mukhagaLu
kANabahudu. munde gunDlupETe, cAmarAja nagara, ti.narasIpura,
nanjanagUDu, koLLEgAla modalAda kaDegaLallU hakAravu hIge
lOpagonDiruvudannu kANabahudu.

I rIti hakAra lOpa ellelli naDedide mattu ellelli naDedilla
embudannu haLLiyinda haLLige suttADi kUlankaSavAgi abhyAsa mADide
vAdare, maysUrina nakSeyalli ondu spaSTavAda 'hakArada gere'
yanneLeyalu sAdhyavAdItu. I gere nanjanagUDu-huNasUrugaLa
naDuve, heggaDadEvana kOTeya paScimakkAgi hAyditu.

I gere maysUru jilleyannu mAtravalla, iDI karNATakavannE
eraDu bhAgagaLAgi vingaDisuttideyendu tOruttade. idara ondu tudi
maysUru jilleyallideyAdare, innondu tudi gulbarga mattu
SAbAd‌gaLa naDuve hAdu Andhrada gaDiyannu muTTuva hAge
kANisuttade. I eraDu tudigaLa naDuve I gere yAva yAva jille
gaLannella kattarisuttade, idara nijavAda svarUpavEnu embudannu
tiLiyalu manDya, hAsana, cikkamagaLUru modalAda jillegaLalli
sancarisi allina janara mAtannu gamanisabEku.

## age-Agi gere
kannaDadalli (guddaliyinda) age, mattu (bAyiyalli) agi embudAgi
eraDu kriyApadagaLiveyaSTe. maysUru jilleya bEre bEre tAlUku
gaLalli ivakke eraDu rUpagaLive:

(1) koLLEgAla mattu ti.narasIpuragaLalli iveraDU Agi emba
ondE rUpavannu tALuttave.

(2) huNasUru mattu ke.Ar.nagara tAlUkugaLalli iveraDU
ikAradalli konegoLLuttave; Adare, I padagaLalli modalige baruva
akAradalli vyatyAsa taledOride: guddaliyinda agi, bAyiyalli a'gi.
illi ekArAntavAda kriyApadagaLella ikArAntavAgive; Adare, hinde
ikArAntavAgidda kriyApadagaLalli modalige baruva akAragaLella
a'kAragaLAgiveyemba niyama kanDubaruttide.

## kanda-kanDa gere
maysUru kannaDada innondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, kannaDada mADi
konDa, tindukonDa embantaha padagaLallAguva parivartane:


(1) nanjanagUDu, cAmarAjanagara, ti.narasIpura mattu koLLE
gAlagaLalli ivu mADkanda, tinDkanda endAguttave;

(2) uLideDegaLalli mADkanDa, tinDkanDa endAguttave.

I 'kanda-kanDa' gere cAmarAjanagara mattu nanjanagUDugaLa
paScimakkAgi hAyuttade. I gereya innondu kone elli embudannu
tiLiyalu manDya mattu bengaLUru jillegaLalli vAsisuva janara
mAtannu pariSIlisabEku.

## sAmAjika parimiti
iSTara varege kannaDadalli Urininda Urige kanDubaruva vyatyAsagaLa
bhavgOLika parimiti illavE vyApti entahadembudannu pariSIlisidevu.
ondE haLLiyalliyU kannaDavu jAtiyinda jAtige vyatyAsa hondu
ttideyAda kAraNa, mElina niyamagaLigella 'sAmAjika parimiti'yannU
nirdharisuvudu avaSya.

udAharaNegAgi, padada Adiyalliruva hakAra bidduhOguttade
yemba niyamavannu gamanisabahudu:

(1) nanjanagUDina okkaligara illavE AdikarNATakara mAtinalli
padAdiya hakAra heccu kaDime sampUrNavAgi bidduhOgide;

(2) Adare, idE Urina brAhmaNara kannaDadalli I hakAra hAgeyE
uLidukonDide.

jAtiyinda jAtige tOribaruva sAmAjika vyatyAsagaLU
bhavgOLika vyatyAsagaLaSTE niyamabaddhavAgiruttave. udAharaNegAgi,
nanjanagUDina okkaligara mattu AdikarNATakara mAtugaLannu hOlisi
nODabahudu:

okkaligaru mane ennuvudakke AdikarNATakaru mana ennuttAre,
aNe (haNe)ge aNa ennuttAre, talege tali ennuttAre, attege atta
ennuttAre. nAmapadagaLa koneyalliruva ekAragaLella AdikarNATakara
mAtinalli akAragaLAgiveyembudE I vyatyAsada hindiruva niyama.

## cAritrika parimiti
kannaDa bhASeyalli tOruva vyatyAsagaLige I rIti bhavgOLika mattu
sAmAjika parimitigaLu mAtravallade, mUraneyadAda cAritrika
parimitiyU ideyembudannu gamanisabEku: haLegannaDadalli bareda


pampana bhASegU, naDugannaDadalli bareda basavaNNana vacanagaLa bhASegU
naDuve bahaLaSTu vyatyAsagaLive. mElina vyatyAsagaLa hAgeyE I
vyatyAsagaLU niyamabaddhavAgive.

pampana kannaDadalli padagaLa Adiyalli baruttidda pakAragaLella naDu
gannaDadalli mattu indina kannaDadalli hakAragaLAgiveyembudu intaha
niyamabaddhavAda cAritrika vyatyAsagaLalli ondu.

bhavgOLika, sAmAjika mattu cAritrikagaLemba I mUru mukhya
badalAvaNegaLindAgi kannaDadalli bEre bEre prabhEdagaLErpaTTive. ivannu
kUlankaSavAgi abhyAsa mADade, namma kannaDada jYAna pUrNavAgadu.

ondondu kAladalli ondondu prabhEda lEkhanayOgyavendu
parigaNitavAguttiruvudu kanDubaruttide. hIge parigaNitavAgadE iruva
prabhEdagaLu tappu illavE grAmya endu tegaLuvudu sariyalla. kannaDada
mUru mukhagaLantiruva I mUru vidhavAda bhASAprabhEdagaLu sari
samanAda gavravakke arhavAdavugaLu. avugaLoLage kILu mElilla.

## 4.2 kannaDada upabhASegaLu
kannaDa bhASe kAladinda kAlakke, Urininda Urige, mattu samAjadinda
samAjakke bhinnavAgiruvudu kanDubaruttade. hanneraDanE SatamAnadallidda
pampana kAlada kannaDa, hadinaydanE SatamAnadallidda basavaNNana kAlada
kannaDa, mattu ippattanE SatamAnada ivattina kannaDagaLa naDuve halavAru
vyatyAsagaLu kANisuttiddu, ivella mukhyavAgi kAladinda kAlakke kannaDa
bhASe badalAguttA hOdudara pariNAmavendu hELabahudu.

idE rItiyalli, karAvaLiya kannaDa. maysUrina kannaDa, mattu
dhAravADada kannaDagaLa naDuve halavAru vyatyAsagaLu kANisuttiddu,
ivella bEre bEre pradESagaLalli kannaDa bhASe bEre bEre rItiyalli
badalAvaNegonDudara pariNAmavendu hELabahudu.

ondE Urinalli vAsisuva bEre bEre samAja(jAti)gaLa
naDuveyU kannaDa bhASeyalli halavu bageya vyatyAsagaLu kANisuttave.
udAharaNegAgi, karAvaLi karnATakada suLyadalli havyakaru baLasuva
kannaDakkU gavDaru baLasuva kannaDakkU naDuve halakelavu vyatyAsagaLive.
ivu bEre bEre samAjagaLalli kannaDa bhASe bEre bEre rItiyalli
badalAvaNegonDudara pariNAmavendu hELabahudu.


ondu bhASege entaha upabhASegaLella ive emba praSnege uttara
hELalu A bhASe bEre bEre kAlagaLalli, bEre bEre UrugaLalli,
mattu bEre bEre samAjagaLalli yAva rItiyallella baLakeyallittu
mattu baLakeyallide, A baLakegaLa naDuve entaha vyatyAsagaLella ive
emba viSayavannu kUlankaSavAgi pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide. kannaDada
maTTige I viSayadalli sAkaSTu samSOdhanegaLu naDedillavAda kAraNa,
I praSnege spaSTavAda uttaravannu koDuvudu sadyakkantU kaSTasAdhya.

namage tiLidiruva maTTige, kelavu mukhyavAda amSagaLannu mAtravE
illi sUcisalu sAdhya. Adare hIge mADuvudarinda, innu munde
kannaDadalli entaha samSOdhanegaLella naDeyabEku embudannu Uhisi
koLLalu sAdhyavide.

## kannaDada vibhajane
cAritrika vayvidhyateyannAdharisi kannaDavannu pUrayda haLegannaDa, haLegannaDa,
naDugannaDa, mattu hosagannaDa embudAgi nAlku mukhya upabhASe
gaLAgi vibhajisalAgide. I vibhajaneyannu chEdisuvante, prAdESika
vayvidhyateyannAdharisi kannaDavannu karAvaLiya paScima kannaDa mattu
oLanADina pUrva kannaDa embudAgiyU, ivugaLalli pUrva kannaDa
vannu dakSiNa (maysUru) kannaDa mattu uttara (dhAravADa) kannaDa
embudAgiyU vingaDisabahudu.

sAmAjika vayvidhyateyannAdharisi kannaDavannu soliga, baDaga, mattu
itara embudAgiyU, mattu itara embudannu bEre bEre samAja
illavE jAtigaLannAdharisi bEre bEre upabhASegaLannAgiyU vingaDisa
bahudu. Adare mEle sUcisidante, I mUru vibhajanegaLU onda
nnondu chEdisuvuvAda kAraNa, avugaLalli ondannu innondarinda
pratyEkisi hELuvudu kaSTa.

udAharaNegAgi, karAvaLi (paScima) mattu oLanADu (pUrva)
emba prAdESika vibhajane pUrvada haLegannaDakkintalU haLeyadAgide;
hAgAgi, pUrvada haLegannaDa, haLegannaDa, naDugannaDa mattu hosagannaDa
emba I nAlku upabhASegaLa kAladallU pUrva-paScimavemba
prAdESika vibhajaneyiddirabEkendu hELabahudu.

karAvaLiyalli baLakeyalliruva havyaka emba prabhEdadalli karAvaLi
yallEnE dakSiNa mattu uttara pradESagaLa naDuve vyatyAsagaLive;
hAgAgi, alliyU sAmAjika prabhEdavannu prAdESika prabhEda chEdisu


tideyendu hELabahudu. idallade, soliga mattu baDaga embavuga
LeraDu kelavu viSiSTavAda pradESagaLalli mAtra baLakeyallive; hAgAgi,
avugaLa maTTige sAmAjika mattu prAdESika amSagaLeraDu oTTu sErive
yendu hELabahudu.

idallade, mEle hELiruva pUrvada haLegannaDa, haLegannaDa, naDu
gannaDa, mattu hosagannaDa emba vibhajane bariya cAritrika vibhajane
yalla. yAkendare, bEre bEre kAlagaLalli bEre bEre sAmAjika mattu
prAdESika prabhEdagaLu SAsanagaLalli mattu kAvyagaLalli baLakeyAgalu
sAdhyaviddu, ivu bEre bEre sAmAjika mattu prAdESika prabhEdagaLannU
pratinidhIkarisalu sAdhyavide.

udAharaNegAgi, haLegannaDavembudu mukhyavAgi jayna lEkhakarinda
racitavAgiruva kAvyagaLalli kANisuva prabhEdavAdare, naDugannaDavembudu
mukhyavAgi lingAyatara kxtigaLalli kANisuva prabhEda. hAgAgi, ivu
cAritrika amSagaLalli mAtravallade, sAmAjika amSadallU ondakkinta
ondu bhinnavAgiveyendu hELabEkAguttade. idE rItiyalli, hosa
gannaDa halavu viSayagaLalli maysUrina kannaDavannu hOluttade;
hAgAgi, adannU Adhunika kannaDavendu parigaNisuvudu mAtravallade,
dakSiNada ondu prAdESika prabhEdavendU parigaNisabEkAguttade.

kannaDa bhASege entaha upabhASegaLella ive emba praSnege uttara
hELalu I rIti kAla, pradESa, mattu samAjagaLemba I mUru
pramANagaLannU oTTAgi gamanadallirisikoLLuvudu avaSya. kAladinda
kAlakke kannaDa bhASe yAva rItiyallella badalAguttA bandide embu
dannu tiLiyuvudara mUlaka, adu kaLeda ondUvare sAvira varSagaLalli
hEge bEre bEre kavalugaLAgi oDedide embudannu nirdharisabahudu.
idakkAgi I ondUvare sAvira varSagaLalli racitavAgiruva kannaDada
SAsanagaLannu mattu itara granthagaLannu, avugaLannu racisida samayava
nnAdharisi, pariSIlisuvudu avaSya.

idallade, kannaDada Adhunika prabhEdagaLa naDuve kANisuva vyatyAsa
gaLannu sangrahisi, avakke kAraNagaLAgiruva badalAvaNegaLu entahavu,
mattu avugaLalli yAvuvu modalu mattu yAvuvu anantara naDedira
bahudu, endare avugaLa kAlavyavasthe entahadu embudannu tiLiyuvu
dara mUlakavU kannaDa bhASeya caritreyannu, mattu adara sAmAjika
hAgU prAdESika prabhEdagaLa caritreyannu kalpisikoLLalu baruttade.


## karAvaLi mattu oLanADina kannaDa
kannaDada upabhASegaLannu mukhyavAgi karAvaLiya kannaDa mattu oLa
nADina kannaDa embudAgi vingaDisuva avaSyakateyide. sAmAnyavAgi,
kannaDa bhASeya caritreyannu bareyuvavaru adu modalige uttara
mArga mattu dakSiNa mArga emba eraDu kavalugaLAgi oDedideyendu
hELuvudE rUDhi. nxpatungana kavirAjamArgadalli, eraDanE nAga
varmana kAvyAvalOkanadalli, mattu bhaTTAkaLankana SabdAnuSAsanadalli
I rIti kannaDadalli uttara mattu dakSiNa mArgagaLiveyendu hELiru
vudu idakke mukhya AdhAravirabEku.

Adare, kannaDa kavigaLa mattu vayyAkaraNigaLa I hELike kannaDada
prabhEdagaLannu ALavAgi abhyAsa mADi siddhapaDisida hELikeya hAge
kANisuvudilla. samskxtadalli uttaramArga mattu dakSiNamArgagaLemba
eraDu prabhEdagaLiveyembudAgi kAvyAdarSadalli danDi hELiruva
mAtannu hAgeyE kannaDakkU aLavaDisuvudara mUlaka, I vibhajane
yannu siddapaDisiruva hAge kANisuttade. danDiya I mAtige samskxta
dalli gavDi mattu vaydarbhigaLemba eraDu SayligaLiddudE kAraNa.
kannaDadallU uttara-dakSiNa bhEdaviruvudu nijavAdarU, adu
karAvaLi-oLanADu (illavE paScima-pUrva) emba bhEdadaSTu mukhya
vAdudalla.

Adhunika vidvAmsarU I mElina hELikeyannu heccina parAmarSege
guripaDisida hAge kANuvudilla. udAharaNegAgi, SrIkanThayya mattu
venkaNNayya avara prakAra "dhArvADa(uttara karNATaka)da kannaDakkU
maysUru kannaDakkU iruvaSTu bhEdavu mangaLUru kannaDakkU
maysUru kannaDakkU iruvudilla". mElininda mEle nODidAga I
mAtu sariyendu tOruttade; Adare, illi maysUru mattu
dhAravADa kannaDagaLondige hOlisiruvudu mangaLUrina barahada
kannaDavannallade, allina kannaDigara mAtinalli baLakeyalliruva havyaka,
kOTa, gavDa, hAlakki modalAda prabhEdagaLannalla.

barahada kannaDa karnATakadalli elleDeyallU heccu kaDime ondE
taravAgide. kelavu viSiSTavAda barahagaLalli mAtra mAtina kannaDa baLake
