yAguttiddu, sAhitigaLu adannu baLasi prAdESika mattu sAmAjika
vayvidhyateyannu tOrisikoDalu prayatnisuttAre. mangaLUrina (sAhiti
gaLa) barahagaLallU I rIti kelavu prAdESika amSagaLannu kANalu
sAdhya. Adare, ivu dhAravADa illavE maysUrina barahagaLalli
kANisuva hAge, allinavara mAtannu pUrtiyAgi tOrisikoDalu yatni


suvudilla. hAge mADidalli A barahagaLu itara kannaDigarige svalpavU
arthavAgadembudE idakke kAraNavirabahudu.

## kelavu mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLu
karAvaLiya kannaDigara ADumAtannu oLanADina kannaDigara ADumAti
nondige hOlisi nODidevAdare, avugaLa naDuve halavAru mukhya
vAda vyatyAsagaLiruvudannu kANabahudu. maysUru kannaDa mattu
dhAravADa kannaDagaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLiginta ivu oTTu sankhyeyalli
mAtravallade, kAlada maTTigU heccu prAcInavAdavugaLAgive. ivu
gaLalli kelavu pUrvada haLegannaDakkintalU hindina kAladalli, endare
sumAru eraDu sAvira varSagaLaSTu hinde naDeda badalAvaNegaLinda
siddavAdavugaLirabEku.

udAharaNegAgi, karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli madhyamapuruSa
samAviSTa mattu asamAviSTa embudAgi uttamapuruSadalli
eraDu rUpagaLive: havyakadalli nAvu embudakke 'nIvU kUDa'
emba samAviSTa arthavideyAdare, engo embudakke 'nimmannu biTTu
nAvu mAtra' emba asamAviSTa arthavide. kriyApadagaLa padarUpa
gaLallU havyakadalli I vyatyAsa kANisuttade.

madhyamapuruSa samAviSTa mattu asamAviSTa emba I vyatyAsa
haLegannaDadalli (udA: pampana kAvyagaLalli) nAm mattu Am emba
sarvanAmagaLalli kANisuttade; Adare, naDugannaDa mattu hosagannaDa
gaLalli kANisuvudilla. haLegannaDadallU I vyatyAsa kriyApadagaLa
padarUpagaLalli kANisuvudilla.

vyAkaraNada maTTige karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLigU oLanADina
prabhEdagaLigU naDuve innU halavAru vyatyAsagaLiddu, avugaLalli
kelavannu pariSIlisidAga, karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLu haLegannaDa
kkintalU hindina kAladallEnE oLanADina prabhEdagaLinda bhinnavAgiddira
bEkembudannu sUcisuttave.

udAharaNegAgi, mUladrAviDadalli kriyApadagaLige t pratyaya
vannu sErisi Aguvikeyannu mADuvikeyannAgi mArpaDisalAguttittu; I
pratyaya kannaDa mattu tuLu bhASegaLannu horatupaDisi, ellA drAviDa
bhASegaLallU uLidukonDide. kannaDadalli idu barE paLeyuLikeyAgi
aDagu 'mareyAgu': aDaku 'maremADu', amugu 'ottihOgu':


amuku 'ottu', turugu 'otti tumbiru' : turuku 'otti tumbisu'
embantaha kelavE kelavu kriyApadajODigaLalli mAtra kANisuttade.

Adare baDaga kannaDadalli mattu havyaka kannaDadalli ivattigU I
pratyayada baLake uLidukonDide. havyakada muruttu 'muriyitu' :
murudattu 'murida', oDattu 'oDeyitu' : oDadattu 'oDeda',
marattu 'maretuhOyitu': maredattu 'mareta' embantaha rUpa
jODigaLalli I pratyayada baLakeyannu kANabahudu.

## dhvani parivartanegaLu
karAvaLiya I kannaDa prabhEdagaLu haLegannaDakkinta hindinavembudannu
avugaLalli kANisuva bEre kelavu dhvani parivartanegaLa AdhArada mElU
sAdhisaballevu. udAharaNegAgi, enTu-ombattanE SatamAnadalli naDeda
(1) ekAra ikAravAguva, mattu (2) okAra ukAravAguva badalA
vaNe karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli naDedilla, Adare haLegannaDa-naDu
gannaDagaLalli mattu oLanADina ivattina prabhEdagaLalli naDedive.

padagaLa modalanE akSaradalli ekAra illavE okAra bandiddu,
adara anantara yAvudAdarondu otte vyanjana, mattu A vyanjanada
baLika ukAra illavE ikAra bandideyAdare, modalanE akSarada
ekAra ikAravAguttade, mattu okAra ukAravAguttade embudE I
mArpADina svarUpa.

enTu-ombattanE SatamAnada SAsanagaLalli kANisuva edir,
keDisu, kesu 'kempu', periya 'doDDa' modalAda padagaLu AmElina
SAsanagaLalli anukramavAgi idiru, kiDisu, kisu, piriya embu
dAgiyU, tolu 'dana', pogu 'pravESisu' modalAda padagaLu
tulu, pugu embudAgiyU badalAgiruvudu idakke udAharaNe.

mEle sUcisida hAge, karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli I badalA
vaNe naDedilla. udAharaNegAgi, havyakada eduru, keDu, heriyOru
'doDDavaru', hogu modalAda padagaLalli ekAra, mattu kemi 'kivi',
beLi 'biLi', eragu 'iruve', soli 'suli', torusu 'turisu', toLi
'tuLi' modalAda padagaLalli ikAra badalAgade uLidiruvudannu kANa
bahudu.

idallade, karAvaLiya itara kannaDa prabhEdagaLallU I badalAvaNe
naDedillavembudakke hAlakki okkaligara kannaDadalli kANisuva eduru, kevi
'kivi', beLi 'biLi', heri, tori 'turisu' modalAda padagaLannu, mattu


suLyada gavDara kannaDadalli kANisuva kebi 'kivi', bedar 'bidiru', kodi
'kudi' toLi 'tuLi' modalAda padagaLannu udAharisabahudu.

enTu-ombattanE SatamAnadalli naDedidda I badalAvaNe I rIti
karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli naDediralillavAda kAraNa, kannaDadalli
karAvaLi-oLanADu (illavE paScima-pUrva) emba prAdESika prabhEda
haLegannaDada kAlakkintalU hindeyE siddhavAgittu endu hELalu baru
ttade.

Adare, kannaDadalli I badalAvaNeya anantara bEreyU halavu
badalAvaNegaLu naDediddu, avugaLalli kelavu karAvaLi mattu oLanADina
prabhEdagaLeraDarallU kANisuttave; Adare, innu kelavu badalAvaNegaLu
oLanADina prabhEdagaLalli mAtra kANisuttave, mattu bEre kelavu
karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLalli mAtra kANisuttave.

udAharaNegAgi, sumAru ombattanE SatamAnadalli naDeyalu
suruvAgidda pakAra hakAravAguva badalAvaNe kannaDada ellA prabhEda
gaLallU kANisuttade. I badalAvaNege karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLu
apavAdagaLalla. pAl>hAlu, puli>huli, pO>hOgu,
pogal>hogaLu modalAda padagaLalli I badalAvaNe naDediruvu
dannu kANabahudu. idE rItiyalli, hattu-hannondanE SatamAnadalli
naDeda LikAra LakAravAguva badalAvaNeyU kannaDada ellA prabhEda
gaLallU kANisuttade. ali 'nASavAgu'>aLi, pulu>huLa, pogal>
hogaLu, ele 'eLedADu' > eLe, balisu 'upayOgisu' > baLasu
modalAda padagaLalli I badalAvaNeyannu kANabahudu.

Adare, dIrgha svarada anantara, illavE mUrakSarada padagaLalli
eraDanE svarada anantara baruva anunAsikavu adara anantara ondu
sparSavyanjana bandAga lOpagoLLuva badalAvaNe haLegannaDada kAla
kkinta anantara naDeda badalAvaNe. idu oLanADina kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli
naDedideyAdarU, karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLalli naDedilla. havyakada dAnTu
‘dATu’, nUnku ‘nUku’, sAnku ‘sAku’, kalinku ‘kalaku’, kADinge
‘kADige’, marango ‘maragaLu’ modalAda padagaLannu mattu padarUpa
gaLannu idakke udAharaNegaLAgi koDabahudu.

AdicakAra, jakAra mattu gakAragaLa anantara baruva akAra ekAra
vAguva badalAvaNe karAvaLiyalli mAtra naDedide; Adare, oLanADinalli
naDedilla. havyakada jegili 'jagali', ceppara 'cappara', ganDu 'ganDu',


geDDe 'gaDDe', geDDe 'gaDDa' modalAda padagaLannu idakke udAharaNe
gaLAgi koDabahudu.

ondu bhASe halakelavu upabhASegaLAgi oDeda mElU adaralli
naDeyuva badalAvaNegaLu adara ellA upabhASegaLannU bAdhisalu
sAdhyavide. pakAra hakAravAgiruva, mattu vakAra bakAravAgiruva
badalAvaNegaLu kannaDadalli intahavendu hELabahudu.

kelavu badalAvaNegaLu ondu pradESadalli baLakeyalliruva ellA
bhASegaLannU oTTAgi bAdhisalu sAdhyavide. udAharaNegAgi, uttarada
kannaDa prabhEdavannu bAdhisida cakAra ts mattu c embudAgi oDedu
koLLuva badalAvaNe kannaDavannu mAtravallade telugu mattu marAThi
bhASegaLannu bAdhiside; Adare, kannaDadalli idu uttarada upabhASe
gaLannu mAtra bAdhiside, dakSiNadavannu bAdhisilla.

idakke badalAgi, kelavu badalAvaNegaLu ondu bhASeya kelavu
upabhASegaLannu mAtra bAdhisi, uLiduvannu sparSisadiralu sAdhyavide.
udAharaNegAgi, mUrakSarada padagaLalli baruva eraDanE svara kelavu
viSiSTavAda sandarbhagaLalli lOpagonDiruvudannu nAvu oLanADina
kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli mAtra kANuttEve: kudure>Sudre, sAsive>
sAsve, bAgilu>bAglu, angaDi>angli modalAda maysUru
kannaDadalli naDediruva I badalAvaNe karAvaLiya kannaDadalli naDedilla.

## karAvaLiya kannaDa haLegannaDavE?
karAvaLiya kannaDa prabhEdagaLAgiruva havyaka, hAlakki, gavDa modalAdavu
gaLannu kELidAga kelavarige haLegannaDavannu kELida hAge anisuttade. itara
kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli naDediruva kelavu badalAvaNegaLu I prabhEdadalli
naDeyadiddudE avarige hIge anisalu mukhya kAraNa.

udAharaNegAgi mEleye sUcisidante, itara prabhEdagaLalli
naDedidda anunAsika lOpa havyakadalli naDedilla. I kAraNakkAgi,
havyakada bahuvacana rUpagaLannu (marango, mangango ityAdi)
kELidAga, mattu anunAsikavAgiruva bEre kelavu padagaLannu
(dAnTu, nUnku, avunku modalAdavugaLannu) kELidAga haLegannaDa
vannu kELidante anisuttade.

idE rItiyalli, haLegannaDada kriyApadagaLigidda bhaviSyadrUpagaLu
mattu niSEdharUpagaLu havyakadalli mattu itara karAvaLiya prabhEda
gaLalli naSTavAgade uLidive: bappe 'bandEnu', hOp 'hOdEnu',


timbe 'tindEnu', hOga 'hOgalikkilla', hADa 'hADalikkilla'
modalAda havyakada padarUpagaLannu kELidAgalU avakke samanAgiruva
haLegannaDa padarUpagaLannu kELida hAge anisuttade.

Adare I kAraNakkAgi karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLannu 'haLegannaDa'vendu
hELuvudu sariyalla. itara kannaDa prabhEdagaLa hAge avu hosagannaDada
prabhEdagaLE. oLanADina prabhEdagaLalli naDeda kelavu badalAvaNegaLu
karAvaLiya prabhEdagaLalli hEge naDedillavO, hAgeyE karAvaLiya
prabhEdagaLalli naDeda kelavu badalAvaNegaLu oLanADina prabhEdagaLalli
naDedilla. idarindAgi, ivu ondarindondu bhinnavAgiveyendu hELalu
sAdhyavideyallade, ivugaLalli kelavannu hosagannaDavendU innu kelavannu
haLegannaDavendU hELalu baruvudilla.

Adare, kannaDadalli halavu mandi barahagAraru I tappannu mADu
vudu kANisuttade. haLatu-hosatu embudu ondu prabhEda yAva
kAladalli baLakeyallide embudannu avalambisideyallade adara vyAkaraNa
entahadu embudara mEle, illavE adara padagaLa racaneyalli entaha
dhvanigaLella baLakeyAguttive embudara mEle avalambisilla.

## baDaga mattu soliga
haLegannaDa kAlada anantara, Adare hadinaydanE SatamAnakkinta modalu,
baDaga mattu soliga emba I eraDu kannaDa prabhEdagaLu kannaDada itara
oLanADina prabhEdagaLinda bErpaTTiruva hAge kANisuttade. haLegannaDa
kAlada anantara, endare hadinAlku-hadinaydanE SatamAnadalli naDeda
akAra rakAravAguva badalAvaNe I eraDu kannaDa prabhEdagaLallU naDe
dilla. Adare, adakkinta modalu naDedidda badalAvaNegaLella ivugaLallU
naDediruva hAge kANisuvudE hIge hELalu AdhAra.

udAharaNegAgi, soligara kannaDadalli aT 'banDe' : are 'ardha',
iTu 'iruve' : iru 'iru', kaT 'barahELu' : kare 'baTTeya kale',
UTu 'kAlUru' : Uru 'haLLi' modalAda padajODigaLalli akAra
mattu rakAragaLu bhinnavAgi uLidiruvudannu kANabahudu.

idE rItiyalli, baDaga kannaDada maTu 'karu' : nari 'nari', mUru
'mUru' : mAru 'ede', bETu 'kesaru' : bEru 'bEru', mUru
'muri' : puri 'huriyakki' modalAda padajODigaLalli I vyatyAsa
aLiyade uLidiruvudannu kANabahudu.


I badalAvaNeginta modalE naDedidda LakAra LakAravAguva
badalAvaNe, pakAra hakAravAguva badalAvaNe modalAdavugaLella I
eraDu prabhEdagaLallU naDediruva hAge kANisuvudAda kAraNa, ivu
haLegannaDa kAlada baLika kavaloDedu bErAgirabEkendu sadyakke Uhisi
koLLabahudu.

## oLanADina prabhEdagaLu
oLanADina kannaDadalli entaha prabhEdagaLella ive, adannu yAva rIti
yallella vingaDisabahudu embudannu iduvarege yArU sariyAgi
tiLidukoLLalu prayatnisilla. uttara mattu dakSiNa embudAgi eraDu
mukhyavAda prabhEdagaLannu vidvAmsaru gamanisiruvarAdarU, nijakkU I
eraDu oLanADina prabhEdagaLa naDuve entaha vyatyAsagaLella ive,
avugaLa vyApti entahadu, mattu I vyatyAsagaLa AdhArada mEle
oLanADina prabhEdagaLannu yAva rItiyalli vingaDisalu sAdhya emba
viSayadalli paripUrNavAda mattu vyApakavAda samSOdhane innU
naDedilla. kannaDa viSvavidyAlayavAgalI illavE karnATakada itara
viSvavidyAlayagaLAgalI intaha samSOdhaneyannu kaygettikoLLuvudu
avaSya.

udAharaNegAgi, hakAra lOpagoLLuva badalAvaNeyannu nAvu
maysUru jilleyallU kANuttEve, baLLAri jilleyallU kANuttEve,
mattu gulbarga jilleyallU kANuttEve. Adare, maysUru jille
yallEnE ke.Ar.nagara, piriyApaTTaNa, mattu huNasUrina ondu
bhAgadalli I badalAvaNe kANisuvudilla. uLida bhAgagaLalli mAtra
kANisuttade.

illU kUDa, mElvargadavara kannaDadalli kANisuvudilla, madhyama
mattu keLavargadavara kannaDadalli mAtra kANisuttade. gulbarga
jilleyallU I badalAvaNe kelavu prabhEdagaLalli kANisuttade, Adare
bEre kelavu prabhEdagaLalli kANisuvudilla.

nijakkU I badalAvaNeya vyAptiyEnu? bEre bEre pradESagaLalli
kANisikoLLuva I hakAralOpa ondE badalAvaNeyE, illavE
svatantravAgi naDeda bEre bEre badalAvaNegaLE? ondE badalAvaNe
yAdare, idu kannaDavannu yAva rItiyalli vibhajisuttade? gulbargakkU
maysUrigU naDuve I hakAralOpada gere hEge hariyuttade?


oLanADina upabhASegaLa vibhajaneyalli adara sthAnavEnu? intaha
halavAru praSnegaLige nammalli uttaravilla.

oLanADina kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli naDediruva ellA badalAvaNegaLa
viSayadallU intahavE praSnegaLige uttaravannu kanDuhiDiyabEkAgide.
idakkAgi karnATakada bEre bEre jillegaLannu ondondAgi ArisikonDu,
avugaLalli entaha kannaDa prabhEdagaLella ive, mattu I prabhEdagaLa
naDuve entaha vyatyAsagaLella ive embudAgi pariSIlaneyondannu
naDesabEkAgide.

## maysUru kannaDada prabhEdagaLu
udAharaNegAgi, maysUru jilleya kannaDa prabhEdagaLannu gamanisa
bahudu. sumAru mUvattu varSagaLa hinde nAnu ondu tingaLu I
jilleyalli suttADi, bEre bEre UrugaLalli baLakeyalliruva kannaDa
prabhEdagaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsagaLannu sangrahisidde. idu I jilleya
samagra pariSIlaneyEnU alla; AdarU, kannaDa prabhEdagaLa kuritu
entaha viSayagaLannu sangrahisalu sAdhya embudannu idu tOrisikoDa
balludu.

samAjaSAstrajYa em.en.SrInivAs avaru hELuvante, maysUrina
haLLigaLalli vAsisuva janarannu samAjada sampUrNa sadasyarAgiruvavaru,
ardha sadasyarAgiruvavaru, mattu samAjadinda horagiruvavaru
embudAgi mUru vargagaLalli vingaDisabahudu. muslimaru ivaralli
koneya vargakke sEruttAre; Adare, avaru maneyalli urdu mAta
nADuva kAraNa, kannaDa prabhEdagaLa I pariSIlaneyalli avara mAtannu
pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyilla.

samAjada ardha sadasyarAgiruva eraDanE vargadavarannu mElvarga
davaru mattu keLavargadavaru embudAgi eraDu prabhEdagaLalli vingaDisa
bahudu, mattu samAjada sampUrNa sadasyarAgiruva modalaneya
vargadavarannu madhya vargadavarendu parigaNisabahudu. kannaDada prabhEda
gaLa maTTige hELuvudAdare, maysUrina haLLigaLalli mElina mUru
vargagaLiganusarisi mUru sAmAjika prabhEdagaLannu kANabahudu.

prAdESikavAgi, maysUru jilleyannu paScima, pUrva, mattu madhya
embudAgi mUru vibhAgagaLalli vingaDisabahudu. Ti.narasIpura, koLLE
gAla, yaLandUru, cAmarAjanagara, mattu gunDlupETe tAlUkina
svalpa bhAga - iviSTu pUrva vibhAgakkU, piriyApaTTaNa, ke.Ar.nagara,


mattu huNasUru tAlUkina svalpa bhAga - iviSTu paScima bhAgakkU,
mattu jilleya uLida bhAgagaLu madhya vibhAgakkU sEruttave.

idu I pradESadalli baLakeyalliruva kannaDa prabhEdagaLannu
avalambisi racisiruva prAdESika vibhajane. mEle vivarisida mUru
sAmAjika prabhEdagaLu I mUru prAdESika prabhEdagaLannu chEdisuttave
yAda kAraNa, maysUru jilleya kannaDa prabhEdagaLa varNaneyannu
koDuvAga sAmAjika mattu prAdESikagaLemba I eraDu amSagaLannU
gamanadallirisikoLLuvudu avaSya.

maysUru jilleya ellA kannaDa prabhEdagaLallU kANisuva, mattu
baraha kannaDadalli kANisadiruva vaySiSTyagaLu kelavive. udAharaNegAgi,
mUru laghu akSaragaLiruva padagaLalli, mattu mUru akSaragaLalli
modalaneyadu mAtra guruvAgiruva padagaLalli eraDaneya svara
lOpagoLLuttade (Agasa>Agna, kUdalu> kUddu); intaha
padagaLalli mUru akSaragaLa badalu nAlku akSaragaLiveyAdare,
eraDaneya svarada badalu mUraneya svara lOpagoLLuttade
(kannaDaka>kannaDa). I badalAvaNe maysUrina ellA prabhEdagaLallU
kANisuttade.

akAra mattu ekAragaLu paravAdAga, o mattu O svaragaLu
anukramavAgi va mattu vA endAguvudu (oge>vage, gODe>
gvADe), makArada anantara a mattu A endAguvudu (mosaru>
masaru), mattu e-E svaragaLu ya-yA endAguvudu (emme>
yamme, hETe>hyATe) maysUru jilleyalli elleDeyallU
kANisuva innondu badalAvaNe.

Adare, kelavara mAtinalli mAtra I badalAvaNe kANisikoLLuttade,
bEre kelavara mAtinalli kANisikoLLuvudilla. hAgAgi, I badalA
vaNeya nijavAda vyApti entahadu embudinnU spaSTavAgilla. idakke
sAmAjika illavE prAdESika mitigaLEnAdarU iveyE embudannu
tiLiyalu heccina pariSIlane avaSya.

mElvargadavara prabhEdadalli kANisadiruva, mattu uLida ellA
prabhEdagaLallU kANisuva vaySiSTyagaLU kelavive. udAharaNegAgi,
rt, rD, mattu rT emba vyanjanakantegaLu L, N, mattu NN
embudAgi badalAyisiruvudannu (hurti>huLLi 'huruLi', kaLurti>
kaLLu 'karuLu', kurDa>kuNNa 'kuruDa', hOrTa>hoNNa 'horaTa')


madhya mattu keLavargada prabhEdagaLalli jilleya ellA pradESagaLallU
kANabahudu.

## madhyavargada prabhEdagaLu
madhyavargada sAmAjika prabhEdavannu maysUru kannaDada mukhya
sAmAjika prabhEdavendu parigaNisabahudu. mEle vivarisidante,
maysUrina haLLigaLalli idu samAjada sampUrNa sadasyarAgiruva janara
prabhEda. I prabhEdavannu pUrva, paScima, mattu madhya emba mUru
prAdESika prabhEdagaLAgi vingaDisabahudu.

I vibhajanege AdhAravAgaballa badalAvaNegaLannu oTTAgi pariSIlisi
dAga, paScimada prabhEda uLida eraDu prabhEdagaLiginta halavu viSaya
gaLalli bhinnavAgiruvudu kANisuttade. Adare, pUrva mattu madhya
prabhEdagaLa naDuve heccu vyatyAsagaLu kANisuvudilla.

udAharaNegAgi mEleyE sUcisiruvante, AdihakAra lOpa
goLLuva badalAvaNe (hAlu>Alu, hakki>akki, hELu>ELu, huLi>
uLi) pUrva mattu madhya prabhEdagaLalli naDedide; Adare, paScima
prabhEdadalli naDedilla. idE rItiyalli, D endu emba vyanjanakante pUrva
mattu madhya prabhEdagaLalli L endAgide (koDDi>koLLi 'koDali',
kaDDe>kaLLe 'kaDale', saDDu>saLLu 'saDilu', guDDu>guLLu 'guDisalu');
Adare, paScima prabhEdadalli badalAgade hAgeyE uLidide.

paScima mattu madhya prabhEdagaLannu pUrva prabhEdadinda
bErpaDisuva badalAvaNeyendare, ekAradalli konegoLLuva kriyApada
gaLu ikAradalli konegoLLuvantAguvudu (bare>bari, naDe>naDi,
kara>kari 'barahELu', age>agi 'guddaliyinda Agi'). I badalAvaNe
paScima mattu madhya prabhEdagaLalli naDedide; Adare, pUrva prabhEdadalli
naDedilla.

illU paScimada prabhEda madhya prabhEdakkinta bErAgide: koneya
ekAra ikAravAgiruva kriyApadagaLu modalinindalU koneyalli
ikAravidda (agi 'jagi', kari 'eNNeyalli kari' modalAda) kriyApada
gaLiginta madhya prabhEdadalli bErAgilla; Adare, paScimada prabhEdadalli
averaDu modalaneya svaradalli bErAgive.

idallade, pUrva mattu paScima prabhEdagaLa naDuve avu baLasuva
padagaLallU kelavu vyatyAsagaLive; illU kUDa, madhya prabhEda pUrva


<table>

<tr>
<th>paScimada prabhEda</th>
<th>pUrvada prabhEda</th>
</tr>
</thead>

<td>benki</td>
<td>binki</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ili</td>
<td>eli</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>maga</td>
<td>maNa</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>maggu</td>
<td>maga</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cENu</td>
<td>cELu</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ELu</td>
<td>yOLu</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>beLLu</td>
<td>beTTu</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>gorlu</td>
<td>kobbu</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tindo ‘tindevu’</td>
<td>tindu</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tindivni</td>
<td>tindini</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

pUrvada prabhEdavannu dakSiNa pUrva mattu uttara pUrva embu
dAgi vingaDisabahudu. padagaLa koneyalli baruva ekAra dakSiNadalli
ay illavE a endAgiruvudu (bare>bara, baray, mane>mana,
manay, age>aga, agay) I vibhajanege ondu AdhAra. prathama
puruSa Ekavacanadalli kriyApadagaLa pullinga mattu strIlinga rUpagaLu
dakSiNadalli bhinnavAgive, uttaradalli bhinnavAgilla embudu innondu
AdhAra.

dakSiNadalli pullinga rUpagaLa koneyalli baruva akAra anunAsika
svaravAgide. uttama puruSa EkavacanadallU kriyApadada bhUtarUpa
gaLu dakSiNadalli ekAradalli konegoLLuvuvAdare, uttaradalli ikAra
dalli konegoLLuttave (bande>bandi, tinde>tindi, nODDe>nODDi).

## itara prabhEdagaLu
itara eraDu sAmAjika prabhEdagaLU idE rItiyalli prAdESika
vyatyAsagaLannu tOrisuttave. udAharaNegAgi, mElvargada prabhEda
paScima mattu madhya pradESagaLalli ekAradalli konegoLLuva kriyApada
gaLu ikAradalli konegoLLuvante mADuttave, Adare pUrva pradESa
dalli mADuvudilla. paScima pradESadalli modalindalEnE ikAradalli
konegoLLuttidda kriyApadagaLu ekAra ikAravAdudarinda siddhavAda


kriyApadagaLinda avugaLa modalanE svaradalli bhinnavAgive, Adare, madhya
pradESadalli intaha vyatyAsavilla.

keLavargadavaralli baLakeyalliruva kannaDada prabhEda madhya vargadavara
prabhEdadalli kANisuva vaySiSTyagaLellavannU paDediruttade. idallade,
adaralli adaravE Ada bEre kelavu vaySiSTyagaLU sErikonDive. Adare,
I vaySiSTyagaLu kelavu pradESagaLalli mAtra kANisuttiddu, avugaLa
nijavAda vyAptiyantahadu embudannu tiLiyalu idakkintalU heccu
vistAravAda pariSIlaneyannu naDesuva avaSyakateyide.

udAharaNegAgi, ke.Ar.nagara tAlUkina keLavargadavara mAtinalli
kakAra mattu gakAragaLu, i, I, e mattu E svaragaLu baLika bandAga,
anukramavAgi cakAra mattu jakAragaLAgi mArpaTTive (kivi>civi,
kIlu>cIlu, kelasa>celsa, kELu>bELu; giDa>jiDa, gIru>jIru,
gellu>jellu, gENu>jENu). I badalAvaNeya vyApti paScima
pradESadalli hEgide embudinnU spaSTavAgilla.

keLavargadavara mAtinallEnE, cAmarAjanagara tAlUkina dakSiNa
pradESadalli nakAra NakAravAgiruvudu kanDubaruttade (anna>aNNa,
ninne>niNNe, banni>baNNi, Ane>ANe). I badalAvaNeyadU vyApti
mattu svarUpagaLu entahavu embudu spaSTavAgilla.

## kADukurubara kannaDa
maysUrina paScima pradESadalli mEle vivarisida samAjagaLiginta bhinna
vAgiruva kADukuruba emba pangaDavU, pUrva pradESadalli soliga
emba pangaDavU ide embudannu illi gamanisabahudu. ivugaLalli
soliga emba pangaDa haLegannaDada kAladallEnE kavaloDeda pangaDa
virabEkembudannu nAvu mEle nODiruvevu. kADukuruba pangaDada
kannaDavU itara kannaDa prabhEdagaLiginta halavu viSayagaLalli bErAgide.

udAharaNegAgi, I prabhEdadalli e mattu E svaragaLu anukrama
vAgi a mattu A svaragaLAguttave; Adare, I badalAvaNe avugaLa
baLika T, D, N mattu L vyanjanagaLu bandiruvalli naDeyuvudE
jAsti (eNNe>aNNe, heNNu>aNNu, hELu>ALu, bEDa>bADa).

makArada anantara o mattu O svaragaLu anukramavAgi a mattu
A svaragaLAgi badalAguvudu I prabhEdada innondu vaySiSTya
(moTTe>maTTe, moLe>maLe, mODa>mADa).


karnATakada itara jillegaLallU intahavE illavE idakkintalU
ALavAda mattu vistAravAda pariSIlaneyannu naDesi, alli baLake
yalliruva kannaDadalli entaha vaySiSTyagaLella kANisuttave embudannu
tiLidukoLLuva avaSyakateyide. I rIti karnATakada ellA jillegaLallU
pariSIlane naDesida baLika, adarinda siddhavAguva prabhEdagaLannella oTTu
sErisi, kannaDakke entaha prabhEda illavE upabhASegaLella ive embu
dannu, mattu I prabhEdagaLa vyAptiyEnu, avugaLa naDuve entaha
vyatyAsagaLella ive, avu cAritrikavAgi eSTu varSagaLaSTu hinde
kavaloDedirabahudu embudannu nirdharisabahudu.

## pariSIlaneya avaSyakate
sAmAnyavAgi, mAtinalli mAtravE kANisikoLLuva prabhEdagaLannella
'aSuddha' rUpagaLendU, barahadalli kANisuva rUpavannu 'Suddha' rUpa
vendU hELuvudu rUDhi. barahadalli entaha prabhEdavannu baLasabEku
embudannu vidyArthigaLige tiLisuvudakkAgi I rIti Suddha mattu aSuddha
embudAgi (illavE bEre yAvudAdarU padada baLakeya mUlaka)
kannaDa prabhEdagaLannu pratyEkisuvudu avaSyavAdarU, SuddhASuddhavemba
padagaLa hindiruva artha ivugaLa naDuviruva vyatyAsakke anvayisuvu
dillavembudannu gamanisuvudu (mattu vidyArthigaLige tiLihELuvudu)
avaSya.

mEleyE sUcisidante, ondu nuDiya prAdESika illavE
sAmAjika prabhEdagaLalli yAvudu bEkiddarU, barahadalli baLake
yAguva mUlaka, barahada prabhEdavAgaballudu. idallade, bEre bEre
kAlagaLalli bEre bEre prabhEdagaLu barahada prabhEdavAgi baLakege bara
balluvu. endare, ondu kAladalli 'aSuddha'vendenisidda prabhEda
innondu kAla dalli 'Suddha'vendenisaballudu.

I kAraNakkAgi, kannaDada prabhEdagaLa naDuve kANisuva I vayvidhyate
kannaDada bhASAsampattu embudAgi nAvu tiLidukoLLabEkAgide. I
vayvidhyateyannu pariSIlisuvudendare, nijakkU kannaDada bhASAsampattannu
pariSIlisida hAge. haLegannaDa-naDugannaDagaLigU hosagannaDakkU naDu
viruva vyatyAsavannu tiLidukoLLuvudu hEge avaSyavO, hAgeyE
kannaDada bEre bEre sAmAjika mattu prAdESika prabhEdagaLa naDuviruva
vyatyAsavannu tiLidukoLLuvudU avaSyavE.


## kannaDada vyAkaraNa parampare
I prabhEdagaLa naDuve avu baLasuva padagaLalliyU halavAru
vyatyAsagaLive. kelavu prabhEdagaLalli mAtravE kANisuvantaha padagaLU
halavive. ivannella oTTu sErisi, kannaDada upabhASAkOSavondannu
tayArisidevAdare, padagaLa maTTige nijakkU kannaDada bhASAsampattu
entahadu emba viSaya spaSTavAdItu.

idE rItiyalli, I prabhEdagaLa naDuve avu baLasuva vyAkaraNada
maTTigU halavu vyatyAsagaLive. ivannU oTTu sErisi, padagaLannu mattu
vAkyagaLannu racisuvalli I prabhEdagaLu hEge bEre bEre tantragaLannu
baLasuttive embudannu tiLiyabahudu. kannaDa bhASeya svarUpaventahadu
emba viSaya intaha kannaDa prabhEdagaLa pariSIlaneyinda mAtravE
spaSTavAgaballudu.

## 4.3 kannaDada vyAkaraNa parampare
kannaDada vyAkaraNada adhyayanakke ondu sAvira varSagaLigintalU heccu
dIrghavAda caritreyide. I avadhiyalli kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle bEre
bEre rItiya mattu bEre bEre gAtrada nUrakkU mikki granthagaLu
mattu lEkhanagaLu racitavAgive. ivu kannaDadalli mAtravallade, ingliS,
samskxta, raSyan modalAda bEre kelavu bhASegaLallU racitavAgive. I
vyAkaraNagaLu sUtrarUpadalli, sUtrada vyAkhyAna rUpadalli, praSne-
uttara rUpadalli, prabandha rUpadalli - hIge bEre bEre rUpa
gaLallU racitavAgive.

kannaDavannu kaliyabayasuvavarige, kannaDada oLaguTTannu tiLiya
bayasuvavarige, kannaDavannu itara drAviDa illavE bEre bhASegaLondige
hOlisabayasuvavarige, kannaDada caritreyannu ariyabEkendiruvavarige
- hIge bEre bEre uddESagaLannu mundiTTukonDu barediruva
vyAkaraNagaLU ivugaLallive.

## mUru mukhya paramparegaLu
kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle iSTellA granthagaLu mattu lEkhanagaLu hora
bandiveyembudu namage santOSavannu mattu hemmeyannu taruvantaha
sangatiyembudEnO nija. Adare, nijakkU I granthagaLu mattu lEkhana
gaLu kannaDa vyAkaraNada oLaguTTannu tiLisikoDuvalli eSTara maTTige


samarthavAgive embudannu pariSIlisuvudu avaSya. idakkAgi I grantha
gaLannu mattu lEkhanagaLannu mUru mukhya paramparegaLalli racitavAdavu
gaLendu vingaDisikoLLabahudu.

pANiniya samskxta vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racitavAda kESirAjana
SabdamaNidarpaNa, bhaTTAkaLankana SabdAnuSAsana mattu innitara halavAru
haLegannaDa vyAkaraNagaLu, mattu avugaLa mEle bareda vyAkhyAnagaLu
ondu vibhAgakke sEruttave. Adhunika kannaDada mElU I parampareyalli
bareda vyAkaraNagaLu halavive.

hattombattanE SatamAnadinda Icege, mukhyavAgi kriSciyan
miSanarigaLu ingliS‌nalli barediruva kelavu hosagannaDa vyAkaraNagaLu
yurOpina vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racitavAgiddu eraDaneya vibhAgakke
sEruttave.

adarindIcege, Adhunika bhASAvijYAnigaLu racisiruva vyAkaraNa
granthagaLu mattu lEkhanagaLu mukhyavAgi amerikada ingliS vyAkaraNa
parampareyalli siddhavAgiddu, mUraneya vibhAgakke sEruttave.

kannaDada I mUru rItiya vyAkaraNagaLallU namage kanDubaruva
ondu mukhyavAda sangatiyEnendare, ivu bEre yAvudO ondu
bhASeya (endare samskxta, lyATin illavE ingliS bhASeya)
vyAkaraNa parampareyannu anusarisalu prayatnisiveyallade, kannaDakke
adaraddE Ada ondu vyAkaraNa parampareyannu sAdhisikoDalu prayatni
silla. I ellA vyAkaraNagaLallU idondu eddu kANuva korate.

samskxta, lyATin mattu ingliS - ivu mUrU inDO
yurOpiyan emba ondE bhASA kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu. ivu
svatantra bhASegaLAgiddu ondarindondu sAkaSTu bhinnavAgiveyAdarU,
ivugaLa vyAkaraNada mUla sUtragaLu heccu kaDime ondE Agive;
hAgAgi, I mUru vyAkaraNa paramparegaLu heccu kaDime ondE
vyAkaraNa parampareya mUru prabhEdagaLendu hELalu sAdhyavide.

kannaDa bhASe idakkinta tIra bhinnavAda drAviDa bhASAkuTumbakke
sEriruva bhASe. idara vyAkaraNada mUla sUtragaLu samskxta, lyATin,
ingliS modalAda inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLalli kANisuva
vyAkaraNada mUla sUtragaLiginta tIra bhinnavAdavugaLu. hAgAgi, kannaDa
vyAkaraNada mUlasUtragaLannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLabEkAdare, kannaDakke
adaradE Ada vyAkaraNa parampareyannu siddhapaDisikoLLuvudu avaSya.
samskxta illavE ingliS vyAkaraNa parampareyalli bareda granthagaLu


## kannaDada vyAkaraNa parampare
mattu lEkhanagaLu intaha kannaDadavE Ada vaySiSTyagaLige heccina gamana
koDalAravu.

## vyAkaraNa sambandhagaLu
udAharaNegAgi, pANiniya vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racitavAgiruva
granthagaLalli kartx, karma, karaNa modalAda 'kAraka'gaLige mahatvada
sthAnavide. intaha kArakagaLu samskxtada vAkyaracaneyannu sariyAgi
varNisi hELalu avaSyavAda kAraNa, avakke A bhASeya vyAkaraNa
parampareyalli pradhAnavAda sthAnavannu koDuvudu ucitavendE
hELabahudu.

lyATin mattu ingliS bhASegaLa vyAkaraNa parampareyalli siddha
vAgiruva granthagaLalli intahavE Ada sabjekT, DayrekT AbjekT,
embantaha 'vyAkaraNa sambandhagaLu' mahatvada sthAna paDedive. I
bhASegaLalli baruva vibhakti pratyaya illavE upasargagaLige nEravAgi
artha hELalu sAdhyavillavAda kAraNa, vAkyagaLalli avu entaha kArya
gaLannu naDesuttave embudannu tiLisalu intaha vyAkaraNa sambandhagaLa
avaSyakateyide.

Adare, kannaDada vAkyaracaneyalli I samasyeyilla. adara vibhakti
pratyayagaLige nEravAgi arthadoDane sambandhavannu kalpisikoDalu sAdhya
vide. vAkyavu tiLisuva ghaTaneyalli toDagikonDiruva vyakti, vastu
modalAdavugaLa kAryavEnu embudannu I vibhakti pratyayagaLu nEra
vAgi sUcisuttiruvudE idakke kAraNa. hAgAgi, kannaDada vyAkaraNadalli
vibhakti pratyayagaLa arthavEnembudannu tiLisalu kArakagaLannAgali illavE
itara vyAkaraNa sambandhagaLannAgali baLasuva avaSyakateyilla.

samskxta, ingliS modalAda itara bhASegaLa vyAkaraNa parampare
yalli bareda kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLu intaha anavaSyavAda kArakagaLannu
illavE vyAkaraNa sambandhagaLannu kannaDada mEle hEri, adara vyAkaraNa
tumbA kliSTavAguvante mADive.

udAharaNegAgi, yurOpiyan bhASegaLa vyAkaraNagaLalli baLake
yAguva 'sabjekT' emba vyAkaraNa sambandhavannu kannaDa vyAkaraNadallU
aLavaDisahoraTa bhASAvijYAnigaLu kannaDada nanage mUru kate
gottide embantaha vAkyagaLalli yAvudannu (nanage embudannO, kate
embudannO) sabjekT embudAgi parigaNisabEku emba viSayadalli


halavu samasyegaLannedurisabEkAgide. kannaDakke adaradE Ada vyAkaraNa
parampareyondannu sAdhisikoTTalli intaha toDakugaLu ELuvudilla.

## guNapadagaLu
kannaDada vAkyaracaneyalli udda, agala, doDDa modalAda guNapada
gaLige ondu viSiSTavAda sthAnavide; avu nAmapada mattu kriyApada
gaLiginta bhinnavAda bEreyE ondu padavargakke sEruttave. kannaDa
bhASeya mEle racitavAgiruva vyAkaraNagaLu kannaDada I vaySiSTyavannu
spaSTavAgi vivarisi hELuvudu avaSya.

samskxtada vAkyaracane I viSayadalli kannaDakkinta tIra bhinna
vAdudu. samskxtadalli intaha guNavAcaka padagaLige nAmapadagaLiginta
bhinnavAda sthAnavilla. avu nAmapadagaLa hAgeyE linga, vacana mattu
vibhakti pratyayagaLondige baruttiddu, vAkyadalli svatantravAgi nilla
balluvu. kannaDa vAkyagaLalli kANisuva hAge, avu nAmapadagaLannu
avalambisikonDiruvudilla. samskxta bhASeya I vaySiSTyavannu
pANiniya vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racisiruva granthagaLu sariyAgi prati
bimbisuttave.

Adare, pANiniya vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racitavAda kannaDa
vyAkaraNagaLu kannaDaddE Ada vaySiSTyavannu varNisuva badalu, adara
vAkyaracane samskxtada vAkyaracaneya hAgeyE ideyemba tappu kalpane
baruvante mADuttave. samskxtada guNadharmavannu kannaDada mEle
hErahOgi, kannaDa vyAkaraNa anavaSyakavAgi heccu kliSTavAguvante
mADuttave.

kannaDa bhASe intaha halavAru viSayagaLalli samskxta mattu
ingliS bhASegaLiginta tIra bhinnavAgide; hAgAgi, adara vyAkaraNavannu
samskxta illavE ingliS bhASeya vyAkaraNa parampareyalli bareya
hOdAga, A vyAkaraNa anavaSyakavAgi heccu kliSTavAguttade.

kannaDakke adaraddE Ada vyAkaraNa parampareyannu siddhapaDisuvudu
yAke avaSya emba viSaya idarinda spaSTavAguttade. intaha tannadE
vyAkaraNa parampareyalli racitavAda granthagaLu kannaDada vAkyaracaneyannu
saraLavAgi mattu heccu spaSTavAgi vivarisi hELaballuvu. kannaDa vyAkaraNa
vannu varNisahoraDuvavarella I dikkinalli samSOdhane naDesuvudu
avaSya.


## 4.4 SatamAnada kannaDa vyAkaraNa samSOdhane
kaLeda ippattanE SatamAnadalli kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle entaha
samSOdhanegaLella naDedidduvu embudannu tiLiyuva prayatnavannu I
lEkhanadalli mADalAgide. Adare, I pariSIlaneyannu naDesuva modalu
samSOdhaneyendarEnu embudannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLuva avaSyakate
yide.

namma viSvavidyAlayagaLalli samSOdhakaru bahaLa mandi iruva
rAdarU jAgatika maTTada samSOdhanegaLu nammalli heccEnU naDeyu
ttilla emba dUru kELibaruttide. idakke namma viSvavidyAlayagaLalli
samSOdhanege mArgadarSana mADuvavaralli heccinavarU samSOdhane
endarEnu, samSOdhane mattu kaliyuvikegaLa naDuve entaha vyatyAsa
vide embudannu sariyAgi tiLiyadiruvudE mukhya kAraNavendu nanage
anisuttade.

I vyatyAsavannu modalige svalpa vivarisi, AmEle kannaDa vyAkaraNada
mEle kaLeda SatamAnadalli naDeda samSOdhanegaLu hEge dAri tappive
embudannu tOrisabayasuttEne.

## kaliyuvike mattu samSOdhane
yAvudAdarU ondu viSayavannu kaliyuvudakkU, adara mEle
samSOdhane mADuvudakkU naDuve kelavu mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive:
nAvu ettikonDa viSayada mEle bEre bEre pustakagaLalli, patrikegaLalli,
mattu avannu Odi tiLidukonDiruva vidvAmsaralli sAkaSTu mAhitigaLu
sangrahavAgiruttave. antaha pustaka mattu patrikegaLannu Odi, vidvAmsaru
hELuvudannu kELi, A viSayada kuritu mAhitiyannu sangrahisuvudakke
kaliyuvudu endu hesaru.

samSOdhane embudu idakkinta tIra bhinnavAdudu: ondu viSayada
kuritu samAjadalli sangrahavAgiruva mAhitiyalli tappugaLu illavE
asAngatyagaLu EnAdarU iveyE, mattu yArigU tiLiyadiruvantaha
hosa sangatigaLEnAdarU iveyE embudannu kanDuhiDiyuvudE
samSOdhane.

I vyatyAsada prakAra, ondu viSayavannu namage kaliyabEkendiddalli
namage adhyApakara sahAya bEku; Adare, ondu viSayada kuritu


samSOdhane naDesabEkendiddalli, adakke namage 'mArgadarSakara' sahAya
bEkallade adhyApakara sahAya bEkAgilla. kaliyuvavara maTTige
adhyApakarendare ellavannU tiLidavaru; kaliyuvavaralli ELuva samSaya
gaLannella nivArisuva Sakti avarigide; hAgAgi, avaru Enu hELuttiddAre
embudannu kivigoTTu kELi, adannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLuvudE
kaliyuvavaru mADabEkAgiruva mukhya kelasa.

Adare, samSOdhakara maTTige ellavannU tiLidavaru yArU illa;
mArgadarSakaru avarige yAva rItiyalli samSOdhane mADabEku
embudannu tiLisaballarallade, samSOdhaneya phalitAmSa Enirabahudu,
illavE EnirabEku embudannu tiLisalAraru. adannu tamma samSOdhane
gaLa mUlaka hosadAgi kanDuhiDiyuvudE samSOdhakara mukhya kelasa.

I rIti, yArigU gottilladiruva sangatigaLannu kanDuhiDiyuva
mUlaka, mattu tappAgi tiLidukonDiruva sangatigaLannu saripaDisuva
mUlaka samAjada jYAnarASiyannu heccisuvudE samSOdhakara kelasa.

kaliyuvikegU samSOdhanegU naDuve vyatyAsaviruva hAge, kalisuva
adhyApakarigU samSOdhanege dAri tOrisuva mArgadarSakarigU
naDuve vyatyAsaviruvudu avaSya. adhyApakanobba tAnu kalisuva viSaya
vannu sariyAgi tiLidirabEku mAtravalla, tAnu tiLidiruvudellavU sari
emba AtmaviSvAsavU AtanallirabEku. I viSayadalli svalpavAdarU
samSayavideyAdare, Ata dhayryadinda vidyArthigaLige kalisalAra.

Adare, samSOdhane mADuvavaru, mattu samSOdhanege mArga
darSana mADuvavaru yAva hELikeyannU sampUrNavAgi sariyendu
tiLidukoLLabAradu. ellavannU samSayada dxSTiyinda nODidAga
mAtra, avara samSOdhane munde hOgaballudu. entaha doDDa
vidvAmsaru hELiddannU hAgeyE oppikoLLade vicAraNege oLapaDisalu
avaru siddharirabEku.

I kAraNakkAgi, parIkSegaLalli rEnk gaLisuva vidyArthi uttama
samSOdhakanAgabEkendEnilla. hAge AguvudU kaSTasAdhya. idE rIti
yalli, vidyArthigaLa accumeccina adhyApaka uttama mArgadarSaka
nAguvudU kaSTasAdhya. kaliyuvudakke mattu kalisuvudakke bEkAguva
manObhAva samSOdhanege mattu mArgadarSanakke bEkAguva manO
bhAvakkinta tIra bhinnavAgiruvudE idakke kAraNa.

namma viSvavidyAlayagaLalli I eraDu kelasagaLannU obbarE mADa
bEkAguvudarinda, samSOdhaneyemba hesarinalli kaliyuvike mAtra


naDeyuvudu kANisuttade. heccinavarigU I eraDu bhinna bhinnavAda
kelasagaLannu oTTAgi naDesikonDu hOgalu sAdhyavAgadiruvudE idakke
kAraNa.

omme nanna mitrarobbaru DAkTarET padavigAgi tAvu bareda
prabandhavannu nanage tOrisidaru. adannu OdidAga nanage AScarya
vAyitu: mUvattu varSagaLaSTu haLeya siddhAntagaLannu baLasi avaru
A prabandhavannu barediddaru. A siddhAntagaLalli heccinavU sariyalla
endu avarige spaSTavAgi tiLididdarU avaru hIge mADiddaru.

idu yAke hIge endu nAnu kELidAga avaru hELidaru, "nanna
mArgadarSigaLu tamma DAkTarET prabandhadalli I siddAntagaLannu
baLasiddAre; Iga nAnu hosa siddAntagaLannu baLasidalli, avaru hinde
baredidda prabandha sariyalla embudAgi nAnu hELida hAgAdItu. hAge
mADidalli, nanna prabandhakke avara oppige siguvudu asambhava".

namma viSvavidyAlayagaLalli jAgatika maTTada samSOdhanegaLu naDeya
diruvudakke ondu mukhyavAda kAraNavannu I mElina ghaTane bahaLa
spaSTavAgi sUcisuttade. tamma mArgadarSanadalli prabandhagaLannu bareyu
tiruva samSOdhakaru tAvu barediruva prabandhakkinta ondu hejje
munde hOdarU bEsarapaTTukoLLuva adhyApakariruvaSTu divasa namma
viSvavidyAlayagaLalli samSOdhane naDesuvudu asAdhyavendE hELa
bahudu. tanna SiSyaninda parAbhavavannu bayasuva adhyApakaru mAtra
nijakkU samSOdhanege mArgadarSakarAgaballaru. antaha adhyApakaru
nammalli beraLeNikeyaSTu illa embudu bEsarada sangati.

kannaDa vyAkaraNada viSayadalli I mAtu akSaraSaH satya. kESirAjanE
modalAda kannaDa vayyAkaraNigaLu Enu hELiddAre embudannu
carcisuvudu vyAkaraNada kaliyuvikeyallade samSOdhaneyalla. avaru
barediruva vyAkaraNa niyamagaLalli tappu illavE asAngatyagaLEnAdarU
iveyE? iddare avannu nivArisuvudu hEge? avaru hELadE
iruvantaha hosa vyAkaraNAmSagaLEnAdarU iveyE? avaru bare
diruva vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu hosagannaDakke hondisikoLLalu avu
gaLalli entaha badalAvaNegaLannu mADikoLLabEku? intaha viSayagaLa
kuritu carce naDedalli mAtra I vyAkaraNagaLa mEle samSOdhane
naDedideyendu hELabahudu.

Adare, kannaDa vyAkaraNada kuritAgi antaha carce namma viSva
vidyAlayagaLalli naDedilla mattu naDeyuttillavendE hELabahudu.


kESirAjana niyamagaLalli tappideyendu hELuvudE mahApApa endu
bhAvisuvavarige nijakkU samSOdhane mADuva adhikAravE illa.

## SatamAnada vyAkaraNagaLu
kaLeda SatamAnadalli kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle halavAru pustakagaLu
mattu lEkhanagaLu prakaTavAgive. Adare, ivugaLalli samSOdhaneya
mUlaka kannaDa vyAkaraNada kuritu namma jYAna heccAguvante mADuva
pustakagaLu mattu lEkhanagaLu bahaLa kaDime. heccinavU kESirAjanE
modalAda hindina vayyAkaraNigaLu hELida viSayavannE bEre bEre
rItiyalli vivarisi hELalu naDesida prayatnagaLu.

samskxtada vyAkaraNa parampareyannu baLasuva badalu yurOpina
lyATin, grIk modalAda bhASegaLa vyAkaraNa parampareyannAgali,
illavE inglenD mattu amerikada ingliS vyAkaraNa parampare
yannAgali baLasi racisida vyAkaraNa granthagaLu mattu lEkhanagaLu halavu
I SatamAnadalli siddhavAgive. Adare, I prayatnagaLallella kannaDaddE Ada
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu kanDuhiDiyuva samSOdhaka pravxtti kANisu
vudu bahaLa aparUpavendE hELabahudu.

pravDhaSAlegaLalli vyAkaraNavannu bOdhisuvudakkAgi halavAru mandi
adhyApakaru mattu itara lEkhakaru cikka cikka vyAkaraNa pustakagaLannu
baredu prakaTisiddAre. ivellavU kESirAjanE modalAda hindina kannaDa
vayyAkaraNigaLu tOrisida dAriyallE naDediveyAda kAraNa, ivugaLa
racaneya hinde samSOdhaneyEnU illa. intaha pustakagaLu paThyapustaka
samitiyu eLediruva gereyoLagEnE uLiyuva avaSyakateyideyAda
kAraNa, ivugaLa tayArikeyalli samSOdhaneyannu kANalu sAdhyavU
illa.

idallade, haLegannaDa vyAkaraNagaLannu arthamADikoLLuvalli edu
rAguva samasyegaLannu pariharisalu yatnisuva lEkhana mattu granthagaLU
kelavu prakaTavAgive. ivu vyAkhyAnakArana dxSTikOnavannu avalambisu
ttaveyallade, obba samSOdhakana dxSTikOnavannu avalambisuvudilla.
hAgAgi, ivugaLallU kannaDa vyAkaraNada kuritAgi hosa viSayagaLa
prastApavannu kANuvudu kaSTasAdhya.

viSvavidyAlayagaLalli samSOdhanA padavi (pi.hec.Di)gAgi siddha
vAgiruva prabandhagaLu, mukhyavAgi ingliS bhASeyalli baredavugaLu,
halavive. ivugaLalli haLegannaDa (samskxta) vyAkaraNa parampareyannu


biTTukoTTu, yurOpina illavE amerikada vyAkaraNa parampareyannu
baLasiruvudu kanDubaruttade. Adare, I vyAkaraNa paramparegU
lyATin, grIk, ingliS modalAda inDO-yurOpiyan bhASe
gaLE AdhAravAgiruva kAraNa, kannaDada maTTige idu samskxta vyAkaraNa
parampareyaSTE asamarpakavendu hELabahudu.

kannaDa bhASe I inDO-yurOpiyan bhASAkuTumbakkinta tIra
bhinnavAgiruva drAviDa bhASAkuTumbakke sEriruva bhASe. adara vyAkaraNa
inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLa vyAkaraNakkinta tIra bhinnavAdudu.
kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle racitavAgiruva I prabandhagaLu A vyAkaraNa
ondu hosa dAriyalli naDeyuvante mADiruvuvEnO nija. Adare,
I hosa dAriyU, haLE dAriya hAge, kannaDada maTTige ondu tappu
dAriyallade bErenalla.

## kESirAjana vyAkaraNa
kESirAjana kAladalli kannaDavannu bahuSaH prAkxta, pAli, apabhramSa
modalAdavugaLa hAge samskxtada ondu vikxta rUpavendu parigaNisu
tiddirabEku. ivattigU intaha abhiprAyavannu hondiruva mandi
nammalli kelavariddAre.

Adare, hattombattanE SatamAnada koneyallEnE I abhiprAya
tappu emba viSaya siddhavAgittu. samskxta inDO-yurOpiyan
bhASAkuTumbakke sEruvudendU, kannaDa adakkinta tIra bhinnavAgiruva
drAviDa bhASAkuTumbakke sEruvudendU A samayadalli vidvAmsaru
tOrisikoTTiddaru. I kAraNakkAgi, kannaDa vyAkaraNa samskxtavE
modalAda inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLa vyAkaraNakkinta bhinna
vAgiruvudu anivArya. Adare, yAva rItiyallella adu bhinnavAgide
embudannu kanDuhiDiyuva prayatna kannaDada maTTige innU sariyAgi
naDedilla.

kESirAjana SabdamaNidarpaNa embudu samskxtada vyAkaraNa niyama
gaLannu hAgeyE kannaDakke aLavaDisalu naDesiruva prayatna mAtra. hAge
aLavaDisalu eSTu mAtrakkU sAdhyavillavendu tOridAga mAtra,
kannaDakke adaradE Ada vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu tayArisikoDuva
prayatnavannu I vyAkaraNadalli mADalAgide.

Adare hIge mADidudarindAgi, A vyAkaraNa kannaDada maTTige ondu
ganTu ganTAgiruva, mattu anavaSyakavAgi tumbA kliSTavAgiruva


vyAkaraNavAgide. halaveDegaLalli adu samskxta vyAkaraNada niyamagaLa
mEle kannaDa niyamagaLa tEpe hAkiruva hAgide.

hosagannaDada maTTige hELuvudAdare, I vyAkaraNavannu sampUrNa
vAgi biTTukoTTu, kannaDaddE Ada hosadondu vyAkaraNavannu
siddhapaDisuvudE namage uLidiruva dAri.

haLegannaDada I vyAkaraNavannu samSOdhakana dxSTiyinda parIkSiside
vAdare, adaralli ardhakkintalU heccina bhAgadalli kannaDakke avaSyavallada
samskxta vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu bahaLa kaSTadinda kannaDa udAharaNe
gaLannu koTTu vivarisalu prayatnisiruvudannu kANabahudu. uLida
ardhada svalpa bhAgadalli samskxtadalli illada, mattu kannaDadalli ive
yendu bhramisiruva vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu kANabahudu. innu svalpa
bhAgadalli haLegannaDakke anvayisuva, mattu hosagannaDakke anvayisa
diruva niyamagaLive. hAgAgi, I vyAkaraNadalli nijakkU hosagannaDakke
anvayisuva niyamagaLiruva bhAga bahaLa cikkadu.

udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada samAsagaLannu I vyAkaraNa nEravAgi
varNisalu prayatnisuvudilla. idakke badalu, samskxtada Aru samAsa
gaLannu (tatpuruSa, karmadhAraya, dvigu, avyayIbhAva, dvandva, mattu
bahuvrIhi embavugaLannu) hAgeyE uLisikonDu, anantara I Aru
samAsagaLalli sEradiruva samastapadagaLigAgi mAtra, inneraDu samAsa
gaLannu (gamaka mattu kriyAsamAsa embavugaLannu) hosadAgi sErisi
koLLuttade. nijakkU kannaDada samastapadagaLannu varNisalu I tEpe kelasa
avaSyavilla. nEravAgi kannaDa samAsagaLu entahavu embudAgi varNane
yondannu koTTiddare sAkAguttittu.

samskxtada samastapadagaLannu avugaLa angagaLAgi bandiruva pada
gaLalli pradhAnapada yAvudu emba viSayada AdhArada mEle vingaDisa
bEkAguttade. Adare, kannaDada heccina samastapadagaLallU eraDaneya
angavE pradhAnapadavAgideyAda kAraNa, avannu I viSayada AdhArada
mEle vingaDisidalli adu samarpakavAda vibhajaneyAgalAradu.

idallade, samskxtadalli nAmapadagaLannu mAtra samastapadagaLalli
baLasalu sAdhya. avyayagaLU avugaLalli baraballuvAdarU, avannu
samskxta vyAkaraNagaLalli nAmapadagaLendE parigaNisalAguttade. idakke
badalu, kannaDadalli samastapadagaLa modalaneya angavAgi nAmapada,
kriyApada mattu guNapadagaLemba mUru bageya padagaLu baraballuvu.
hAgAgi, kannaDada samastapadagaLa vibhajanege (mattu bEre drAviDa


nuDigaLa samastapadagaLa vibhajanege) avugaLa modala padavAgi entaha
pada bandide embudE sariyAda AdhAravAgaballudu.

kannaDadalli nAmapadagaLu mattu guNapadagaLu emba eraDu pada
vargagaLige sEruva padagaLive; Adare, samskxtadalli I eraDu bageya
padagaLU nAmapadavemba ondE padavargadalli baruttave. kannaDadalli
guNapadagaLannu, kxdantagaLannu, mattu sankhyAvAcaka padagaLannu nEra
vAgi avugaLalli yAva badalAvaNeyannU mADade nAmapadadondige
baLasaballevu. Adare, samskxtadalli ivakke samanAda padagaLannu nAma
padagaLondige baLasabEkiddalli, A padagaLondige baruva vibhakti-vacana
pratyayagaLannu avakkU sErisabEkAguttade.

udAharaNegAgi, kxSNana sarpaNa 'kappu hAvininda' embudaralli
txtIyA-Ekavacanada vibhakti pratyaya sarpa emba nAmapadadondige
mAtravallade kxSNa padadondigU bandide. Adare, kannaDadalli I rIti
*kappininda hAvininda endu hELalu baruvudilla.

samskxtadalli kxSNa emba padavannu vibhakti pratyayavillade kxSNa
sarpaNa embudaralliruva hAge baLasidAga, alli vibhaktilOpavAgi
samAsavAgideyendu hELalu baruttade; Adare, kannaDada kappuhAvu
embudaralli I rIti vibhakti lOpa AgillavAda kAraNa (alli
modaligEnE vibhakti pratyayaviralillavAda kAraNa) samAsavAgideyendu
hELalu yAva AdhAravU illa. Adare, intaha kaDegaLalli samAsa
vAgideyendu kannaDada vayyAkaraNigaLu bhramisiddAre.

kxdanta, sarvanAma mattu sankhyAvAcakagaLa baLakeyU idE rIti
yadu. samskxtadalli mxtEna sarpaNa emballi, illavE tasmAt
ghaTAt emballi vibhakti pratyaya eraDu padagaLallU bandiddu, mxta
sarpaNa mattu tadvaTAt emballi modalaneya padada vibhakti lOpa
vAgideyendu hELaballevu.

Adare, kannaDadalli satta hAvininda mattu A koDadinda emba
baLakegaLiveyallade, *sattadinda hAvininda mattu *adarinda koDa
dinda embantaha modalaneya padakke vibhakti pratyayavannu sErisiruva
baLakegaLilla. hAgAgi, kannaDada satta hAvu, A koDa embantaha baLake
gaLalli vibhakti lOpavU illa. ivugaLalli gamaka samAsavemba kannaDaddE
Ada samAsavideyendu namma vayyAkaraNigaLu hELiruvudu avara
bhrame mAtra.


samskxtadalli vibhakti pratyayagaLannu avugaLa arthadondige nEravAgi
sambandhisuvudu tumbA kaSTa. halaveDegaLalli kANisuva vibhakti pallaTakke
samskxtadalli arthavE illa. I kAraNakkAgi, mattu samskxtada kelavu
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu sulabhavAgi vivarisalu sAdhyavAguvante adara
vayyAkaraNigaLu kAraka emba vyAkaraNa tatvavondannu kalpisikonDi
ddAre. ingliS, phrenc modalAda kelavu pAScAtya bhASegaLallU
intahadE samasyeyiddu, adakkAgi sabjekT, AbjekT modalAda kelavu
vyAkaraNa tatvagaLannu kalpisikoLLabEkAgide.

samskxtadalli I rIti kAraka embudannu yAke kalpisikonDiddAre,
mattu kannaDakke idara avaSyakateyideyE embudannu parAmarSisalu
hOgade, kannaDa vayyAkaraNigaLu adannu hAgeyE tamma vyAkaraNa
gaLallU aLavaDisikonDiddAre.

Adare, kannaDadalli vibhakti pratyayagaLige avugaLa ellA baLakegaLallU
nEravAgi arthadondige sambandhavannu sAdhisabahudu. avugaLa baLake
yalli samskxta vibhaktigaLa baLakeyalli kANisuvantaha samasyeyilla.
hAgAgi, avannu arthadondige sambandhisuvudakkAgi kArakavemba
vyAkaraNa tatvavannu baLasuva avaSyakateyilla.

kannaDada vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu vivarisuvallU I kArakagaLa
avaSyakate kanDubaruvudilla. idannu kanDukoLLalu sAdhyavAgada kannaDada
vayyAkaraNigaLu I kArakavemba kalpita tatvavannu kannaDa vyAkaraNadoLakke
tandu hAki, A vyAkaraNa anavaSyakavAgi kliSTavAguvante mADiddAre.

haLegannaDa vyAkaraNagaLalli, mattu avugaLa AdhArada mEle racita
vAgiruva hosagannaDa vyAkaraNagaLalli intaha kannaDakke avaSyavilladiruva
innU halavAru vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu mattu kalpanegaLannu kANa
bahudu. kaliyuvavana vxttiyannu biTTukoTTu, samSOdhakana dxSTi
yinda pariSIlisidAga mAtra, kannaDa vyAkaraNakke ivu yAke avaSyavilla
embudu spaSTavAdItu.

namma vayyAkaraNigaLalli aparUpakke kelavaru intaha samSOdhaka
dxSTiyinda haLegannaDa vyAkaraNagaLannu, mattu adE parampareyalli
siddhavAda hosagannaDa vyAkaraNagaLannu pariSIlisiddAre. udAharaNegAgi,
pancamI vibhakti mattu gamaka samAsagaLa kuritu sEDiyApu
kxSNabhaTTaru barediruva lEkhanagaLannu gamanisabahudu.


vyAkaraNavondaralli baLakeyAguva pAribhASika padagaLu adara
hindiruva vyAkaraNa parampareyalli beLedubandiruttave. avugaLa
avaSyakate, avugaLigiruva artha modalAduvella A vyAkaraNa parampare
yannu, mattu A bhASeya vyAkaraNavannu avalambisiruttave. avannu
bErondu bhASeya vyAkaraNavannu bareyuvalli baLasabEkAdAga,
intaha vyAkaraNAmSagaLu anavaSyakavAgi A bhASeya vyAkaraNavannu
kliSTavAgi mADadante eccara vahisuva avaSyakateyide.

udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli ELu vibhaktigaLive; samskxtada vayyA
karaNigaLu ivannu prathamA, dvitIyA, txtIyA ityAdiyAgi
hesarisiddAre. I pAribhASika pada(hesaru)gaLannu kannaDada vayyAkaraNi
gaLu hAgeyE kannaDa vyAkaraNadallU aLavaDisikonDiddAre.

illi ELu vibhaktigaLiveyembudu, avannu ondanE vibhakti, eraDanE
vibhakti, mUranE vibhakti modalAdavugaLAgi ondu kramadalli paTTi
mADabEkembudu, mattu I paTTiyalli baruva yAvudE ondu
vibhaktige intahadE artha illavE baLake irabEkembudu samskxta
vyAkaraNakke sambandhisida amSa. kannaDa vyAkaraNa I ellA viSayagaLallU
samskxtakkinta bhinnavAgiraballudu, mattu nijakkU adu A rIti
bhinnavAgide.

kannaDadalli oTTu nAlku vibhaktigaLu mAtra ive: annu, inda, ge,
mattu lli embavu I nAlku vibhaktigaLannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLu.
kannaDada maTTige inda mattu ge embavugaLeraDu mukhyavAgi calanege
sambandhisida Akaravannu, endare calane ellinda suruvAgide mattu
ellige sAgide embudannu, sUcisuttave. calanege sambandhisadE iruva
Akaravannu lli emba pratyaya sUcisuttade. hIge I mUru pratyaya
gaLadu ondu gumpAdare, annu emba pratyaya ivakkinta tIra bhinna
vAgiddu, ondu ghaTane yAvudara mEle pariNAma bIride embudannu
sUcisuttade.

sankhyegaLa mUlaka I pratyayagaLannu hesarisuvudAdare, annu
embudannu modalaneya vibhaktiyendU, inda mattu ge embavugaLannu
eraDanE mattu mUranE vibhaktigaLendU, lli embudannu nAlkanE
vibhaktiyendU hesarisuvudE kannaDada maTTige sari.

samskxta vyAkaraNadalli vibhaktigaLige prathamA, dvitiyA, txtIya
ityAdiyAgi sankhyegaLannu baLasi hesarugaLannu koTTiruvudakke kAraNa


bEreyE ide: avannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLu ellella ondE rUpa
dalli baruttave embudannu sUcisalu sulabhavAguvante I paTTiyannu
mADalAgide. udAharaNegAgi, agni emba padakke dvivacanada txtIyA,
caturthI mattu pancami vibhaktigaLalli agnibhyAm emba ondE rUpa
ide. Adare, bahuvacanada caturthI mattu pancamigaLalli mAtra
agnibhyaH emba ondE rUpa ide. Ekavacanada pancamI mattu
SaSThigaLalli agnEH emba ondE rUpa ide.

I rIti bEre bEre nAmapadagaLige ondE rUpa kANisuva
vibhaktigaLella oTToTTAgi baruvante samskxtada vayyAkaraNigaLu I
vibhaktigaLa paTTiyannu mADiddAre. idannu kannaDadallU hAgeyE
baLasuvudarinda kannaDada vyAkaraNada maTTige yAva prayOjanavU
siguvudilla. nijakkU kannaDada yAva eraDu vibhaktigaLU ondE rUpa
dalli baruvudilla.

samskxta vayyAkaraNigaLu baLasuva svaragaLa paTTiyU hIgeyE.
samskxtada sandhiniyamagaLannu sulabhavAgi mattu aDakavAgi hELalu
sAdhyavAguvante I paTTiyannu racisalAgide. kannaDada vayyAkaraNigaLu
I paTTiyalli alpasvalpa vyatyAsavannu mADi, hAgeyE adannu kannaDakke
aLavaDisikonDiddAre. Adare I paTTi kannaDa vyAkaraNakke svalpavU
anukUlavAgilla.

a, i mattu u (hrasva mattu dIrgha) embavugaLannu oTTige hELi,
anantara x mattu ay (hrasva mattu dIrgha) embavugaLannu, mattu
anantara E, O mattu ay, av embavugaLannu hELuvudu samskxtada
krama. aiuN, xlkak, EOc, ayOc emba mAhESvara sUtra
gaLalli I paTTi baruttade.

samskxtadalli akAra, ikAra mattu ukAragaLu mUlasvaragaLu;
inDO-yurOpiyan mUlabhASeya ekAra mattu okAragaLu
samskxtadalli akAravAgi badalAgiveyAda kAraNa, samskxtadalli
kANisuva ekAra mattu okAragaLu mUlasvaragaLalla. avu sandhiya
mUlaka siddhavAguva 'guNAkSaragaLu' mAtra. avannu akAra, ikAra
mattu ukAragaLinda bEre irisalu idu ondu kAraNa; avu dIrgha
rUpadalli mAtra baruttave, hrasva rUpadalli baruvudilla embudu
innondu kAraNa. ay mattu avgaLU samskxtada sandhikAryagaLalli
viSiSTavAda sthAnavannu paDediruva 'vxddhi' emba hesarina svaragaLu. I
rIti, mElina svaragaLa paTTi samskxta vyAkaraNada maTTige atyanta
upayuktavAda paTTi.


Adare, kannaDa vyAkaraNada maTTige I paTTi tIrA anupayukta
vAdudu. yAkendare, kannaDadalli ekAra mattu okAragaLeraDU mUla
svaragaLAgiddu, hrasva mattu dIrghagaLemba eraDu rUpagaLallU baru
ttave; avannu a, i mattu u svaragaLinda pratyEkisuvudakke kannaDa
vyAkaraNadalli yAva AdhAravU illa.

idallade, kannaDada sandhikAryagaLalli ikAra mattu ekAragaLu
ondu rItiyalli vartisuvuvAdare (avugaLeduru yakAra AgamavAgi
baruttade), ukAra, okAra mattu akAragaLu innondu rItiyalli
vartisuttave (avugaLeduru vakAra AgamavAgi baruttade). hAgAgi,
kannaDada maTTige svaragaLa paTTiyannu i, e; u, o, a (hrasva mattu
dIrgha) embudAgi koDuvudE uttama.

idallade, ay mattu avgaLige kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli samskxtada hAge
viSiSTavAda sthAnavilla. nijakkU avu akArakkinta bhinnavAda svaragaLE
alla; akArakke yakAra mattu vakAragaLannu sErisiruva sErikegaLu
mAtra. brAhmI lipiyannu kannaDakke aLavaDisikonDAga anavaSyakavAgi
bandu sErikonDa akSaragaLivu. kannaDadalli iveraDu mAtravallade,
ey, oy, Ay modalAda bEreyU halavu sErikegaLiveyAda
kAraNa, I eraDu sErikegaLige mAtra viSiSTavAda sthAnavannu koTTiru
vudarindAgi kannaDa baraha anavaSyakavAgi kliSTavAgide. idallade, adu
samSOdhakaralli gondalavannU unTumADuttade.

## Adhunika vyAkaraNagaLu
samskxtada vyAkaraNa parampareyannu biTTukoTTu, yurOpina illavE
amerikAda vyAkaraNa parampareyannu anusarisi bareda halavu kannaDa
vyAkaraNagaLu kaLeda SatamAnadalli siddhavAgive. kelavu viSayagaLalli ivu
samskxta vyAkaraNada horeyannu kannaDa vyAkaraNadinda tegeduhAkuva
mUlaka kannaDa vyAkaraNavannu saraLagoLisive. Adare, innu kelavu
viSayagaLalli ingliS illavE itara pAScAtya bhASegaLa vyAkaraNada
horeyannu kannaDa vyAkaraNada mEle hEruva mUlaka adannu kliSTa
goLisive.

amerikAda ingliS vyAkaraNa parampareyalli mukhyavAgi eraDu
rItiya dxSTikOnagaLannu kANabahudu: bEre bEre bhASegaLige bEre
bEre rItiya vyAkaraNagaLiralu sAdhya, mattu I kAraNakkAgi avugaLa
vyAkaraNagaLannu avugaLadE Ada racanAvaySiSTyagaLannu kanDuhiDiyuva


mUlaka varNisabEku ennuva blUm‌phIlD modalAdavara varNa
nAtmaka vyAkaraNagaLa dxSTikOna ivugaLallondu; ellA bhASegaLigU
samAnavAgiruva vyAkaraNavondide, adannu modalige varNisi, anantara
avugaLa naDuve mElininda mEle kANisuva vyatyAsagaLAvuvu
embudannu varNisabEku emba com‌ski modalAdavara dxSTikOna
innondu.

Adhunika kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLalli heccinavU ivugaLalli modalaneya
dAda varNanAtmaka dxSTikOnavannavalambisive. Adare, adara mUla
tatvagaLannu baLasikoLLuvalli avu yaSasviyAgiruva hAge kANisuvudilla.
halavAru viSayagaLalli avu ingliS bhASege avaSyaviruva, Adare
kannaDa bhASege avaSyavilladiruva vyAkaraNAmSagaLannu hAgeyE kannaDa
vyAkaraNadallU aLavaDisalu yatnisiruvudannu kANabahudu.

udAharaNegAgi, samskxtada hAge ingliS‌nallU samastapadagaLa
vibhajaneyannu avugaLa angagaLalli pradhAna pada yAvudu emba
viSayada AdhArada mEle sAdhisalu sAdhyavide. idannE I vyAkaraNagaLu
kannaDakkU anvayisiruvudannu kANabahudu. idallade, ingliS‌na sabjekT,
AbjekT modalAduvannU ivu kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli anavaSyakavAgi
aLavaDisikonDive.

Adare, bEre kelavu viSayagaLalli ivu kannaDa vyAkaraNavannu hosa
rItiyalli varNisalu yatnisive. udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada svaragaLannu
pUrva mattu paSca embudAgi vingaDisuva mUlaka, kannaDa vyAkaraNakke
anukUlavAguvantaha svaragaLa paTTiyannu koDalu ivu SaktavAgive.
kannaDada sandhikAryagaLannU ivu svatantra rItiyalli varNisiruvudannu
kANabahudu. vibhaktigaLa varNane, kriyArUpagaLa varNane modalAda
bEre kelavu kaDegaLallU ivu kannaDada svarUpavannu heccu saraLavAgi
vivarisalu SaktavAgive.

com‌skiya 'janareTiv' dxSTikOnadinda siddhavAda vyAkaraNagaLalli
mAtra, kannaDa vyAkaraNa ingliS vyAkaraNada tadpratiyAgide. e.ke.
rAmAnujan avara kannaDa vyAkaraNadalli idannu spaSTavAgi kANa
bahudu. udAharaNegAgi, ingliS‌nalli vAkyaracanege padagaLa (illavE
padagucchagaLa) sApEkSa sthAna bahaLa mukhyavAdudu. vAkyadalli ondu
nAmapada kriyApadada modalu bandare adu sabjekTannU, anantara
bandare AbjekTannU sUcisuttadeyemba niyama adarallide.


idallade, ingliS vAkyadalli AbjekT illada vAkya iraballudu,
Adare sabjekT illada vAkya iralAradu.

intaha halavu niyamagaLa AdhArada mEle, ingliS vAkyagaLannu
nAmapadaguccha (sabjekT) mattu kriyApadaguccha embudAgi modalige
vingaDisi, AmEle kriyApadagucchavannu tirugi kriyApadaguccha mattu
nAmapadaguccha (AbjekT) embudAgi vingaDisalAguttade.

Adare, I ellA viSayagaLallU kannaDa bhASe ingliS‌ninda
bhinnavAgide; hAgAgi, mElina niyamagaLannu kannaDada vAkyagaLige
anvayisalu sAdhyavAgadu. hAgiddarU, rAmAnujan avara kannaDa
vyAkaraNa intahadE vAkyaracaneyannu kannaDadallU kANalu prayatnisu
ttade.

munde embattanE daSakadalli bhASegaLu I viSayadalli bhinna
vAgiralu sAdhya embudannu managanDa com‌ski modalAdavaru tamma
dxSTikOnavannu badalAyisikonDiddAre; idallade, ittIcege avara
siddhAnta idE dikkinalli innaSTu badalAvaNegaLannu kanDide: bEre bEre
bhASegaLa naDuve samAnavAgiruva vyAkaraNAmSa atyalpa endu vAdisuva
com‌skiyavara 'minimalisT siddhAnta' I viSayadalli heccu kaDime
blUm‌phIlD avara haLE siddAntavannE hOluttide. kannaDa
vyAkaraNada maTTige I siddAntavannu kAryarUpakke taruva kelasa I
SatamAnadalli innU naDeyabEkAgide.

## vyAkaraNada avaSyakate
nijakkU I rIti kannaDa vyAkaraNavannu samSOdhisuvudarinda prayOjana
vEnAdarU ideyE endu yArAdarU kELabahudu. vyAkaraNabaddha
vAgi mAtanADalu nAvu cikkandinallE kalitiruvevAda kAraNa, adakke
vyAkaraNavannu kaliyuva avaSyakateyilla. Adare, arivige eTakuvantaha
vyAkaraNa jYAnadinda bEre halavu rItiya prayOjanagaLannu nAvu
paDeyaballevu.

kampyUTar‌gaLu ivattu namma jIvanadalli bahaLa mukhyavAda sthAna
vannu AkramisikoLLuttive. kannaDa bhASeyannu kampyUTar‌gaLige aLavaDisi
koLLabEkiddalli, adakke kannaDa padaracane mattu vAkyaracanegaLannu
tiLisikoDuva tantrASavannu tayArisikoDuvudu avaSya. idakke samskxta
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu illavE ingliS vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu
kannaDadavendu bhramisuva kannaDa vyAkaraNagaLinda EnU prayOjana


vAgalAradu. kannaDakke adaradE Ada vyAkaraNavondannu siddhapaDisidalli
mAtra, antaha vyAkaraNavannu baLasi kampyUTar‌gaLige uttamavAda
kannaDa tantrAmSavannu tayArisikoDalu sAdhya.

intaha kannaDaddE Ada tantrAmSada mUlaka, nAvu barediruva kannaDa
padagaLannu mattu vAkyagaLannu kampyUTar mUlaka tiddalu sAdhyavAga
bahudu, mattu ingliS, hindi modalAda bhASegaLalli bareda
barahagaLannu kannaDakke anuvAdisuva kelasavannU kampyUTar mUlaka
mADisalu sAdhyavAgabahudu. hAgAgi, I kampyUTar‌gaLa hosa
yugadalli kannaDa vyAkaraNakke ellillada prAmukhyate baruvudaralli
samSayavilla.

## 4.5 Sabdabrahmaru eDavidAga
Sabdakke artha hELuvudU ondu kaleyE embudannu oppabEku.
yAkendare, I kAryadalli vidvAmsarigintalU kavigaLigE agrasthAna.
kelaveDegaLalli ondu Sabda mattu adara artha ivugaLoLage yAva
rItiya cAritrika sambandhavilladiddarU kavigaLu A artha koTTuda
rindAgi adakke mAnyate baruttade. hAgendu vidvAmsaru tamma SAstrIya
kxtigaLallU kavitvakke illavE kalpanAvilAsakke mAruhOdarAdare,
antaha vidvAmsaru eDaviddArendE hELabEkAguttade.

kempagiruvudu kenne (ArOgyavantara kenne kempAgiruvudarinda)
endAgali, parane paridu hOguva svabhAvavuLLudE pardu > haddu
endAgali, mEyuvudaralli hiridenisiddannu kanDuhiDidudE mEke
endAgali Sam.bhA.jOSiyavaru vAdisidare, adannu tappendu
SAstrIyavAgi vAdisalu sAdhyavAgadirabahudu. kuDu-kuDane naDuguvu
dakke haccuva caLiyannu kODu endU, A caLiyinnU jAstiyAgi
kuLLirabEkAda paristhiti bandare adakke kuLir emba hesarendU avaru
sAridarU avara I kavitvakke kelavaru taledUgabahudu (Sam.bhA.
jOSiyavara kannuDiya huTTu emba pustakavannu nODi).

Adare, beral emba Sabdadinda beranTu embudu siddavAgide
yendAgali, kUL (anna)vannu tindu tiruguvudarindAgi kULi >
gULi emba pada siddhavAgideyendAgali, suddigaLannu bEreyavarigariya
dante hIrikonDu baruvavanE hEra illavE hErige endAgali
vAdisahoraTare adakke SAstrada mannaNe dorakalAradu. SabdagaLalli


## Sabda brahmaru eDavidAga
baruva pratiyondu vyanjanakke illavE svarakke adaradE Ada caritre
yiddu, bariya sArUpyada AdhArada mEle SabdagaLoLage sambandhavannu
kalpisalu sAdhyavAgadu.

## svara mattu vyanjanagaLa caritre
kannaDa SabdagaLalli baruva svara mattu vyanjanagaLa caritreyannu barI kannaDa
SabdagaLannu mAtravE pariSIlisuvudara mUlaka tiLiyalu sAdhyavAgadu.
idakkAgi kelavomme tamiLu, telugu, tuLu, gOnDi, kuDukh
modalAda itara drAviDa bhASegaLalli baruva SabdagaLannU abhyAsa
mADuva avaSyakate kanDubaruttade.

udAharaNegAgi, beranTu emba Sabdadalli baruva eraDaneya
vyanjanavu akAravAgiddu, kannaDadalli adu rakAravAgideyendu, mattu
beral embudaralli I vyanjanakke rakAravE mUlavAgittendu intaha
abhyAsadinda siddhisuttade. avugaLoLage arthadalli sambandha tOrabahu
dAdarU SabdagaLa maTTige sambandhavilla.

kUL-gUL embavugaLallU hIgeyE. avugaLoLage artha
sAmya kANisuttade, Adare Sabda sambandhavilla. kUL embudu
haLegannaDa dallEnE kUL endide. Adare, gUL embudaralliruva
LakAra I rIti aykAradinda bandideyendu vAdisalu yAva AdhAravU
illa. adu mUladallU LakAravAgiyE iddirabEku. hIru emba
padadinda hEra illavE hEriga emba padavannu SAstrIyavAgi
sAdhisalu sAdhyavillavEkendare, kannaDada caritreyalli I emba svara E
emba svaravAgideyendu hELalu yAva AdhAravU illa.

## namma nuDi
mAsti venkaTESa ayyangAryaru bareda namma nuDi emba pustaka
dallU intahavE halavu kalpanegaLannu kANuttEve. andavAda kay
angay, angayyalli iruvudu ankeyalliruttade, hAgAgi ankayyE
anantara anke endAgirabEku embudu intaha kalpanegaLallondu.
bAyalli nIrUruvante mADuva padArtha Urpu > uppu embu
dinnondu. iru emba dhAtuvininda Ete, aydAne emba rUpaga
LAdante, kayya beraLugaLa hAge ottAgiru emba arthadalli aydu emba
pada bandu adE aydu emba sankhyAvAciyAda padavAgiralU sAku
embudu mattondu.


mElininda mEle nODuvavarige ivellavU yuktiyuktavAda vAda
gaLAgiyE tOrabahudAdarU ondu mukhya cAritrika kAraNakkAgi ivu
mUrannU tappu kalpanegaLendu tyajisabEkAguttade. kannaDadavE Ada
canda, cannAgi modalAda padagaLinda mattu itara drAviDa bhASegaLalli
kANisuva padagaLinda, kannaDada anda emba padada mUlavU canda
endE iddirabEkendu nirdharisabEkAguttade.

Adi cakAra vikalpavAgi lOpagonDiruvudE I rIti kannaDadalli
canda-anda embudAgi eraDeraDu rUpagaLu kANisalu kAraNa. angay
mattu anke emba padagaLa mUlarUpakke intaha AdicakAravannu
kalpisikoLLalu yAva AdhAravU illavAdudarinda, avakkU anda emba
padakkU naDuve yAva sambandhavU siddisadu.

uppu emba padada mUlavU cuppu endiddirabEkendu kuyi,
gOnDi, pArji modalAda madhyadrAviDa bhASegaLa AdhArada mEle
hELabahudu. aydu emba padadallU intaha AdicakAravittu. udA
haraNegAgi, pArjiyalli I pada cEdu endU, kuyiyalli singi
endU baruttade. Uru (mUla Uru) emba padakkAgali, iru emba
padakkAgali intaha AdicakAravannu kalpisikoLLalu AdhAravillavAda
kAraNa, mEle hELida mAstiyavara kalpaneyannu sariyendu samarthisi
koLLalu sAdhyavAgadu. illa emba padakkU cil emba rUpavidditAda
kAraNa, adannU ir emba dhAtuvininda sAdhisuvudu kaSTasAdhya.

## bEre kelavu kalpanegaLu
mAstiyavara pustakadalli idE rItiya innU halavAru kalpanegaLannu
kANabahudu. ivugaLalli kelavannu mElina kalpanegaLa hAge tappendu
nirdhAravAgi hELabahudAdare, bEre kelavannu sariyendu illavE
tappendu vAdisalu yAva AdhAravU illavAddarinda sadyakkantU
hAgeyE biDabEkAguttade.

bAgi bAgi mADuva kelasavAddarinda kuNi embudakkU kUnu
embudakkU sambandha kalpisiddAre, Adare kUnu embudara nakAra kuNi
embudaralli NakAravAdudu hEge embudannu mAtra hELilla. kaL
'maresu' embudarinda kaLatale > kattale emba pada bandideyendi
ddAre, Adare I eraDaneya pada (kaLatale embudu) kari embudarinda
siddhisideyendu hELalu cAritrika AdhAravide. pit (hinde) emba padada


## pAribhASika padagaLa sxSTi
uccAraNe hindumundAgi tippe endAgideyendu avaru hELiruvu
dantU tIra vicitra.

bennu emba padavannu mAstiyavaru pin emba padadinda sAdhisu
ttAre. Adare kannaDada ikAra ekAravAdudu akAra illavE ekAra
paradalli bandAga mAtra (udA: ir > eraDu, nillu > nele). bennu
emba padada mUla 'verin' endEnO irabEku (tuLuvina beri,
tamiLina verin ityAdi padagaLannu idakke AdhAravAgi koDabahudu).

ogedu oNagisida baTTeyannu maDisuttEve, Addarinda maDisida
baTTe maylige allada baTTe maDi Ayitu, idannu mADuvavanE maDi
vaLa emba mAstiyavara vAdavannu sadyakkantU tappendu sAdhisalu
sAdhyavillavAdarU adu mElinavugaLa hAgeyE ide.

## rUDhimUlavAda sambandha
bhASeyalli baruva heccina padagaLigU avu sUcisuva vastuvinoDane
illavE viSayadoDane nEravAda sambandhavilla. sAvirAru varSagaLinda
beLedu bandiruva rUDhimUlavAda sambandha mAtravE ivugaLoLage
iruvantahadu embudannu mareyabAradu. padakkU adu sUcisuva
vastuvigU nEravAda sambandha ideyAdare, kannaDada marakke samskxta
dalli vxkSa, hindiyalli pED, marAThiyalli jhAD, ingliS‌nalli TrI
endella bEre hesarugaLiralu sAdhyavAguttiralilla.

padagaLigU, vastu illavE viSayagaLigU naDuviruva I sambandha
vannu, mattu adara caritreyannu tiLiyuvalli tarkakke yAva sthAnavU
illa. bhASeya svarUpavannu tarkada mUlaka viSlESisa horaTavaralli
obbarU iduvarege jayaSIlarAgilla embudu illi gamanisabEkAda
sangatiyAgide.

## 4. pAribhASika padagaLa sxSTi
yAvudAdarondu SAstradalli hosa viSayagaLannu kanDuhiDida mEle,
adannu varadimADabEkAgi bandAga, halavu bAri hosa padagaLannU
sxSTisikoLLuva avaSyakate kanDubaruttade. bhASeyalliruva padagaLu I
hosa viSayagaLannu spaSTavAgi mattu aDakavAgi varNisalu SaktavAga
diruvudE idakke kAraNa. I samasye heccAgi SAstrIya barahagaLalli


kANisikoLLuttade. hAgAgi, I rIti hosadAgi sxSTiyAguva padagaLu
SAstrIya barahagaLalli jAsti kANisikoLLuttave, mattu avugaLalli
heccinavU antaha barahagaLigaSTE sImitavAgiruttave.

intaha padagaLannu nAvu pAribhASika padagaLendu kareyuttEve.
ivugaLa arthavEnembudannu tiLiyalu, avakke sambandhisida SAstragaLannu
tiLidukonDiruvudu atyavaSya. udAharaNegAgi, samAsa embudu
vyAkaraNa SAstrakke sambandhisiruva ondu pAribhASika pada. idara artha
vEnembudannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLabEkAgiddalli, modalige adakke
sambandhisida vyAkaraNa tatvagaLu entahavu embudannu tiLidukoLLuva
avaSyakateyide.

ittIcege naDeyuttiruva hosa hosa samSOdhanegaLalli heccinavU
ingliS bhASeyallE varadiyAguttive. hAgAgi, avakke sambandhisidante
hosa hosa pAribhASika padagaLU A bhASeyallE heccu heccu sxSTi
yAguttive. Adare, kannaDadantaha itara bhASegaLalli I hosa viSaya
gaLannu vivarisabEkAdAgalella, avugaLallU takkudAda pAribhASika
padagaLannu sxSTisikoLLuva avaSyakate kanDubaruttade. I pAribhASika
padagaLa sxSTiyannu yAva rItiyalli naDesabahudu embudannu
pariSIlisuvudE I lEkhanada guri.

## eraDu rItiya vyAkaraNa jYAnagaLu
ondu bhASeyannu baLasuttiruvAga, nAvu eraDu rItiya vyAkaraNa
jYAnagaLannu upayOgisuttiruttEve. namma arivige eTakadantaha
vyAkaraNa jYAnavondu; idannu nAvu namma arivilladanteyE baLasu
tiruttEve; idaralli naDeyuva badalAvaNegaLU namage gottAgadante
naDeyuttiruttave. sAmAnyavAgi namma bhASeya bagegiruva I vyAkaraNa
jYAnavannu nAvu cikkandinalli bhASeyannu paDeyuvAga namagarivilla
danteyE paDediruttEve.

intaha arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAna mAtravallade, namma
bhASeya kuritAgi arivige eTakuva vyAkaraNa jYAnavU nammallide. svalpa
maTTige nAvidannu kannaDada klAsinalli kalitiruttEve. anantaravU bhASeya
kuritAgi namagiruva kutUhalavannu taNisuvudakkAgi lEkhanagaLa
nnOdiyO athavA namma mAtannE gamanisiyO A mAtina Antarika
racaneyantahadu embudannu svalpamaTTige aritiruttEve. pAribhASika


## pAribhASika padagaLa sxSTi,
padagaLa sxSTi prAmukhyavAgi I eraDanE rItiya vyAkaraNa jYAnada
AdhArada mEle naDeyabEkAgide.

hAgAgi, intaha padagaLannu sxSTisuvavarige sAkaSTu arivige
eTakuva vyAkaraNa jYAnavilladiddalli avaru sxSTisuva padagaLu bhASege
sariyAgi hondikoLLalAravu. idallade, intaha padagaLa mUlaka
SAstrakke sambandhisida viSayagaLannu arthamADikoLLalu vidyArthigaLige
kaSTavAgabahudu. avannu bhASe (endare bhASeyannu baLasuva samAja)
svIkarisadiralU sAdhyavide. endare, hIge sxSTiyAda padagaLu
pAribhASika padakOSagaLallaSTE uLiyalU sAdhyavide.

illi nAvu gamanisabEkAgiruva viSayavEnendare, pAribhASika pada
gaLannu ondu bhASeya vidvAmsaru tamma arivige eTakuva vyAkaraNa
jYAnada AdhArada mEle racisi barahagaLalli baLasuttArAdarU, anantara
bhASeyalli naDeyuva adara baLake arivige eTakada vyAkaraNajYAnada
angavAgiyE naDeyabEkAguttade. I eraDaneya kriye samarpakavAgi
naDeyabEkiddalli antaha padagaLu bhASeya racanege honduvantiru
vudu avaSya.

vidvAmsaru sxSTisuva hosa hosa pAribhASika padagaLu bhASe
yalli sariyAgi hondikonDu, avannu kaliyuva vidyArthigaLige mattu
baLasuva itara vidvAmsarige tondareyAgadirabEkAdalli, antaha pada
gaLannu sxSTisuvavarella atyavaSyavAgiyU tiLidukoLLabEkAgiruva
viSayagaLu kelavive.

## padagaLa mUla
hosatAgi padagaLannu sxSTi mADuvAga adakke bEkAguva padAmSa
gaLannu endare dhAtugaLannu mattu pratyayagaLannu ellinda paDeyabEku
embudu ondu praSne. kannaDadalli pAribhASika padagaLannu sxSTi mADu
vavarella ivannu samskxtadinda ettikoLLuvudu rUDhi. AdaSTu maTTige
ivaru ingliS‌nalliruva padagaLannu hAgeyE uLisikoLLalu
prayatnisuttAre; avu kannaDa bhASege svalpavU hondikoLLuvudilla
endu anisidalli mAtra, ivaru hosa padagaLannu sxSTisalu
hOguttAre.

kannaDaddE Ada dhAtu mattu pratyayagaLannu intaha pAribhASika pada
gaLannu sxSTisuvalli baLasadiralu ivaru koDuva mukhya kAraNa
vEnendare, kannaDadalli I dhAtugaLige dinabaLakeya arthaviddu, niSkxSTa


vAda artha baruvante avannu SAstrIya barahagaLallU baLasidevAdare
gondalavunTAgalu sAdhyavide embudu.

ingliS, phrenc modalAda bhASegaLalli I samasyeyannu bagehari
suvudakkAgi grIk illavE lyATin bhASegaLinda dhAtugaLannu mattu
pratyayagaLannu Amadu mADikoLLuva krama rUDhige bandittu. kannaDada
maTTige idE rItiyalli samskxtadinda dhAtugaLannu mattu pratyaya
gaLannu Amadu mADikoLLuvudu aSTE anukUla embudu ivara
vAda.

Adare, dinabaLakeya arthaviruva padagaLannu pAribhASika padagaLAgi
baLasidalli gondalavunTAgaballudu emba vAda nijakkU sAdhAravE
embudannu pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide. ingliS‌na ittIcegina pravxtti
yannu gamanisidevAdare, dinabaLakeya padagaLE heccu heccAgi
pAribhASika padagaLa sthAnadalli baLakege baruttiruvudu kanDubaruttide.

udAharaNegAgi, gaNakayantrakke (kampyUTar) sambandhisida pAri
bhASika padagaLalli heccinavU dinabaLakeya padagaLE (mouse, tools,
paste, web, ityAdi). intaha padagaLannu aDakavAgi racisalu sAdhya
vAgade, dIrghavAda padagucchagaLannu baLasabEkAgi bandAga, avugaLalli
baruva padagaLa modalaneya akSaragaLannu mAtra baLasi aDakavAda
padagaLannu racisuva kramavU (URL ‘Uniform Resource Locator’,
FTP ‘File Transfer Protocol’, VBA ‘Visual Basic for
Applications’ ityAdi) ingliS‌nalli beLedu bandide.

kannaDadallU idE vidhAnavannu yAke baLasabAradu? rAjakIya
pakSagaLannu hesarisuvalli mattu vyaktigaLannu hesarisuvalli (kuvempu,
tarAsu, anakx, ityAdi) intahadE vidhAna IgAgalE kannaDadalli
baLakeyallide. adannE pAribhASika padagaLannu unTumADuvallU
baLasabahudu.

nAvu gamanisabEkAgiruva innondu viSayavEnendare, samskxta
dalli hosa pAribhASika padagaLannu racisabEkAdAga, avaru bEre yAva
bhASegU marehokkiralilla; samskxtadavE Ada pada mattu pratyaya
gaLannE baLasi tamage bEkAda hosa padagaLannu unTumADikonDiddaru.
lyATin‌nalliyU hIgeyE. I bhASegaLalli I rIti tammavE Ada pada
mattu pratyayagaLannu baLasi pAribhASika padagaLannu unTumADiruvudu
gondalakke eDekoDalillavAdare, kannaDadalli yAke gondalakkeDe
koDabEku?


pAribhASika padagaLa sxSTi,

## eravalu mattu padasxSTi
ondu bhASe eSTu sulabhavAgi bEre bhASegaLinda padagaLannu eravalAgi
paDedukoLLaballudu embudu bahuSaH adannu baLasuva iDI samAjada
anisikeyannavalambiside. kannaDadalli intaha eravalu bahaLa sulabhavAgi
naDeyuttade, Adare, idakke viruddhavAgi, baLasabEkAgiruva padagaLannella
tamma bhASege bhASAntarisikoLLuva pravxtti tamiLinalli kANisuttade.

I eraDu vidhAnagaLalli yAvudu sari, yAvudu tappu emba
praSnege uttara koDuvudu kaSTa. ingliS mattu jarman bhASegaLa
naDuveyU intahadE vyatyAsaviruvudannu kANabahudu. ingliS‌nalli
eravalu bahaLa sulabhavAgi naDeyaballudu, Adare jarman‌nalli
bhASAntara vidhAnavannu baLasuvudE jAsti.

kannaDa bhASeyannu baLasuva samAja eravalannu bahaLa sulabhavAgi
angIkarisaballudAda kAraNa, pAribhASika padagaLa sxSTiyalli samskxta
dhAtu mattu pratyayagaLa baLakege I samAjadalli heccina virOdha
vEnU tOribaruvudilla. A rIti racitavAda pAribhASika padagaLannu
aragisikoLLuvudu mAtra vidyArthigaLige mattu itara Odugarige tumbA
kaSTavAguttide.

idallade, samskxtada badalu kannaDadavE Ada pada mattu pratyaya
gaLannu baLasi hosa padagaLannu unTumADidalli, antaha padagaLu
kannaDada jAyamAnakke heccu hondikeyAgaballuvu emba viSayadalli
samSayavilla. hosagannaDada padagaLu idakke anukUlavAgillavAdalli
haLegannaDada illavE kannaDadavE Ada upabhASegaLa padagaLannu mattu
pratyayagaLannu idakkAgi ArisikoLLabahudallavE?

## bhASAntara mattu arthAntara
ingliS‌nalliruva pAribhASika padavondakke badalAgi kannaDadalli ondu
hosadAda pAribhASika padavannu sxSTisuvAga, adu ingliS‌nallidda
padada oLaracane mattu adara artha ivannu pratibimbisabEkE athavA A
padakke SAstradalli yAva arthavideyO adannu pratibimbisabEkE emba
viSayadalli vidvAmsaroLage bhinnAbhiprAyavide.

udAharaNegAgi black box emba padakke badalAgi kannaDadallondu
pAribhASika padavannu sxSTisabEkAdAga, A padada oLaracaneyannu mattu
adara arthavannu sUcisuvante kappu peTTige emba padavannu baLasa
bEkE, illavE A pada gurutisuva vastuvannu (cockpit recorder)


varNisuvante bErondu padavannu illavE padagucchavannu baLasabEkE
embudAgi sandEhavunTAgalu sAdhyavide.

vijYAna padakOSavannu kannaDadalli tayArisuvavaru modalaneya
vidhAnavannu anusarisiruvarAdare, adannE marAThiyalli tayArisuvavaru
eraDaneya vidhAnavannu anusariddAre. Adare, ivugaLalli yAvudannU
sampUrNa sariyendu hELalu baruvudilla. ondu padavannu baLasa
toDaguvAga, sAmAnyavAgi adu gurutisuva vastuvina guNadharma
gaLalli kaNNige hoDedu kANisuvantahadannu A pada varNisuvantira
bEkendu nAvu prayatnisuttEve. Adare, baLake munduvaridante A
vastuvina guNadharmagaLalli badalAvaNegaLunTAgalu sAdhyavide, mattu A
vastuvina kuritAgi namagiruva jYAnadallU badalAvaNegaLunTAgalu
sAdhyavide.

hAgAgi, baLasalu prArambhisida samayadalli ondu pAribhASika
padada oLaracane mattu artha adu gurutisuva vastuvige anvayisu
vanteyE idditAdarU, anantarada kAladalli adu A rIti anvayisa
dante Agalu sAdhyavide. kannaDada ugibanDi pada idakke ondu uttama
udAharaNe. Igina kAladalli I pada gurutisuva sAdhana DIsel
illavE vidyucchaktiyinda calisuvudE jAsti.

idallade, bhASegaLalli baruva padagaLa oLaracane mattu artha
ivakkU avu gurutisuva vastuvina guNadharmakkU naDuve asAngatya
viruvudE jAsti. kxSNa emba hesarina vyakti beLLagAgiruvudu, illavE
sundari emba hesarina huDugi kurUpiyAgiruvudu aSTondu
aparUpavEnalla. I hesarugaLannu baLasuvavarU avu vyaktigaLa illavE
vastugaLa guNadharmavannu sariyAgi tiLisuttirabahudendu nirIkSisu
vudU illa. padagaLu bhASeyalli bariya sankEtagaLAgi baLakeyAguvu
vallade, avu gurutisuva vastugaLa illavE viSayagaLa varNanegaLAgi
baLakeyAguvudu bahaLa kaDime. pAribhASika padagaLU I rIti sankEta
gaLAgiddare sAku, varNanegaLAgirabEkendEnU illa.


<a id="part-5"></a>

[English →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-en#part-five--languages-of-the-world) | [Eke →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn-eke#part-5)

## bhAga aydujagattina bhASegaLu

prapancadalli oTTu eSTu bhASegaLive emba praSnege txptikaravAda uttara
koDuvudu svalpa kaSTa. idakke halavu kAraNagaLive. samSOdhakara
gamanakke bAradiruva bhASegaLu halaviveyembudu ondu mukhyavAda
kAraNa. udAharaNegAgi, dakSiNa amerikAda abhEdyavAda kADugaLalli
vAsisuva halavu janAngagaLannu mattu avarADuva bhASegaLannu
samSOdhakarinnU sariyAgi abhyAsa mADilla. namma dESadallU guDDa
kADugaLalli vAsisuva halakelavu janAngagaLa bhASegaLentahavembudannu
nAvinnU sariyAgi tiLidilla.

eraDaneyadAgi, eraDu samAjagaLalli baLakeyalliruva bhASA
prabhEdagaLannu eraDu bhASegaLendu parigaNisabEkE, illavE ondE
bhASeya eraDu prabhEdagaLendu parigaNisabEkE emba viSayadalli
abhiprAyabhEdagaLiralu sAdhya. I kAraNakkAgiyU bEre bEre
vidvAmsaru koDuva bhASegaLa paTTi bEre bErAgalu sAdhyavide.

kelavu vidvAmsara matadante, prapancadalli oTTu sumAru aydu
sAvira bhASegaLu baLakeyallive. I sankhye idakke eraDaraSTu, endare
sumAru hattu sAviradaSTendu hELuvavarU kelavariddAre, mattu
idannu mUru sAvirakke iLisuvavarU kelavariddAre. I bhASegaLalli
heccinavannU inDO-yurOpiyan, TibeTO-barman, Aphri-
ESiyATik, AsTrik, inDO-pesiphik modalAda kelavu bhASA
kuTumbagaLalli sErisi hELuva prayatnavU naDedide. mukhyavAgi intaha
hadinaydippattu bhASAkuTumbagaLannu idakkAgi kalpisikoLLalAgide.

prapancadalli kANisuva I bhASAvayvidhya ondu rItiyalli mAnava
samskxtiya vayvidhyavannu pratibimbisuttadeyendU hELabahudu.
pratiyondu samAjada bhASeyU A samAjadalliruva janara dinanityada
jIvanakke hondikoLLuvante sAvirAru varSagaLinda badalAguttA
bandide. Adare, I badalAvaNe bEre bEre samAjagaLalli bEre bEre


dikkinalli sAguvudE prapancadalli ivattu kANisuva bhASA vayvidhyakke
mUla kAraNa.

manassinallEnideyembudannu itararige tiLisalu, mattu itarara
manassinallEnideyembudannu tiLiyalu nammalliruva atyanta mukhyavAda
sAdhanavendare I bhASeyE. ibbaru vyaktigaLADuva bhASegaLa naDuve
eSTu vyatyAsaviruttadeyO, avarige obbarannobbaru artha mADi
koLLalu aSTE kaSTavU Aguttade. hAgAgi, bhASeyembudu manassugaLa
naDuvina konDiyU havdu, gODeyU havdu. I kAraNakkAgi, bhASe
yondara svabhAvavEnembudannu tiLiyuvaSTE bhASegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsa
gaLentahavembudannu tiLiyuvudU atyavaSya.

## 5.1 bhAratada bhASegaLu
bhAratadalli mukhyavAgi inDO-Aryan, draviDiyan (drAviDa),
TibeTO-barman mattu AsTrO-ESiyATik embudAgi nAlku
bhASAkuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLu baLakeyallive:

1. (1) hindi, bangAli, marAThi, gujarAti modalAdavugaLu
2. inDO-Aryan bhASA kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu;
3. (2) kannaDa, tamiLu, telugu, malayALa, tuLu modalAdavugaLu
4. drAviDa bhASAkuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu;
5. (3) maNipuri (may‌tay), bODo, angAmi, Avo, luSAyi,
6. modalAdavugaLu TibeTO-barman bhASA kuTumbakke sEridavugaLu;
7. mattu
8. (4) santAli, munDAri, khaDiyA, sOrA modalAdavugaLu
9. AsTrO-ESiyATik bhASA kuTumbakke sEridavugaLu.

ivallade, anDamAn mattu nikobAr dvIpagaLalli baLake
yalliruva bEre kelavu bhASegaLu inDO-pesiphik emba bErondu
bhASAkuTumbakke sEruttaveyendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. madhya
pradESada nimAr jilleyalli baLakeyalliruva nahAli emba innondu
bhASe I kuTumbagaLalli yAvudakkU sErade EkAkiyAgiruvudendu
kelavara abhiprAya.

bhAratadalli oTTu eSTu bhASegaLiveyemba praSnege uttara hELuvu
dendare, prapancadalli oTTu eSTu bhASegaLiveyemba praSnege uttara


hELuvaSTE kaSTa. heccu kaDime innUru bhASegaLu bhAratadalliveyendu
hELabahudAdarU, I sankhye kADuguDDagaLalli vAsisuva janara bhASe
gaLannu heccu heccu abhyAsa mADidantella heccAgalu (illavE
kaDimeyAgalu) sAdhyavide. idallade, bhASe mattu upabhASegaLa
naDuvina vyatyAsavEnembudannu nirdharisuvalli namma niluvEnu embu
dara mElU nAvu koDuva bhASegaLa sankhye heccukaDimeyAgaballudu.

bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva I innUru bhASegaLalli ardhakkintalU
heccu bhASegaLu himAlayada parvataSrENiyalli baLakeyalliruva
TibeTO-barman bhASAkuTumbakke sErive. Adare, bhAratada janasankhye
yalli I bhASegaLannADuvavaradu SEkaDA ondakkintalU kaDime!
himAlayada guDDakADugaLalli pratiyondu haLLigU ondondu viSiSTa
vAda bhASeyiruvudannu kANabahudu. I haLLigaLa naDuve anAdikAla
dindalU paraspara samparka bahaLa kaDimeyAgiddudE idakke kAraNa.

inDO-Aryan kuTumbakke sErida sumAru 50 bhASegaLu,
drAviDa kuTumbakke sErida 26 bhASegaLu, mattu AsTO-ESiyATik
kuTumbakke sErida 20 bhASegaLu bhAratadalli baLakeyallive. ivallade,
yAva kuTumbakkU sErada nahAliyantaha kelavu bhASegaLU, inDO
-pesiphik kuTumbakke sEraballa anDamanIs mattu nikobarIs dvIpa
gaLa kelavu bhASegaLU bhAratadallive.

## inDO-Aryan bhASegaLu
ivugaLalli inDO-Aryan (Arya) kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu
yurOpina mukhya bhASegaLAda ingliS, phrenc, jarman
modalAda bhASegaLige sambandhisiddu, A kuTumba inDO-yurO
piyan emba doDDadondu bhASAkuTumbada SAkheyAgide. bhArata
dalli I kuTumbakke sErida nepAli, assAmIs, bangAli, oDiyA,
marAThi, gujarAti, panjAbi, kASmIri modalAda halavu bhASegaLu
vxttAkAravAgi haraDiddu, avugaLa naDuve hindi mattu adara
upabhASegaLAgiruva bAngru, braj, bundEli, avadhi, bhOj‌puri,
modalAdavugaLu nelesive.

nijakkU inDO-Aryan bhASegaLu baLakeyalliruva I pradESa
bhASeya maTTige ondu avicchinna pradESavAgide. I pradESadalli uttara
dinda dakSiNakke illavE pUrvadinda paScimakke prayANa mADidalli,
haLLiyinda haLLige mAtina bhASe svalpa svalpavE badalAguttA baruvudu


kanDubaruttade. Adare elli ondu bhASe mugidu innondu bhASe
prArambhisuttade embudannu janara mAtinalli kANisuva vyatyAsagaLa
AdhArada mEle tIrmAnisalu sAdhyavAgadu.

udAharaNegAgi, marAThi mattu gujarAti bhASegaLannADuva pradESa
gaLa naDuve rAjakIyavAda gaDiyiruvudu nijavAdarU, A gaDipradESa
gaLalli janaru ADuva mAtina AdhArada mEle bhASeya gaDi elli
hAduhOguvudembudannu nirdharisalu sAdhyavAgadu. I kAraNakkAgi,
intaha gaDipradESadalliruva khAndESiyannu marAThiya upabhASe
yendu hELabEkE, illavE gujarAtiya upabhASeyendu hELabEkE
embudaralli matabhEdavide. idE rItiyalli, marAThi mattu oDiyA
bhASegaLa naDuve kANisuva halbi emba upabhASe averaDaralli
yAvudakke sErabEku emba viSayadalli matabhEdavide.

drAviDa bhASegaLa naDuviruva gaDi pradESa idakkinta tIra bhinna
vAdudu. kannaDa mattu telugu bhASegaLa naDuve, illavE kannaDa mattu
tamiLu bhASegaLa naDuve spaSTavAda gaDiyiddu illi vAsisuva janaralli,
avarADuva mAtannAdharisi, yAru kannaDigaru, yAru telugaru, mattu
yAru tamiLaru embudannu nirdharisuvalli yAva tondareyU illa.
ivugaLalli ondu bhASeyannADuvavaru innondu bhASeyannU
aritirabahudu, Adare avaralli yAra mAtxbhASe yAvudu emba
viSaya spaSTavAgiyE iruttade.

inDO-Aryan bhASegaLu parSiyan, balUci, paSo
modalAda irAniyan bhASegaLondige hattirada sambandhavannu paDe
diddu, avannella oTTige inDO-irAniyan emba SAkheyalli sErisi
hELuvudu rUDhi. ivugaLalli inDO-Aryan bhASegaLigella samskxta
bhASeyE mUlavendu kelavara abhiprAya.

innu kelavara matadante, I bhASegaLigella mUlavAgidda bhASe
bErondittu; baravaNigeya baLakegAgi, A mUlabhASeya AdhArada
mEle, samskxtavemba viSiSTavAda bhASeyondannu vidvAmsaru beLesira
bEku. inDO-Aryan mUlabhASeyannu baLasuttidda bEre bEre
samAjagaLalli naDeda badalAvaNegaLa phalavAgi, A mUlabhASe pAli,
