prAkxta, apabhramSa modalAda rUpagaLannu paDeyitu. anantara naDeda
badalAvaNegaLa phalavAgi, avE bhASegaLu hindi, marAThi, gujarAti
modalAda indina bEre bEre inDO-Aryan bhASegaLAgi
kANisikoLLuttive.


## drAviDa bhASegaLu
kannaDa, tamiLu, telugu modalAda mukhyavAgi bhAratada dakSiNa vibhAga
dalli baLakeyalliruva bhASegaLige I inDO-Aryan bhASegaLiginta
tIra bhinnavAda mUlavide. hAgAgi, ivannu drAviDa emba bEreyE
ondu kuTumbadalli sErisuva avaSyakateyide. inDO-Aryan
bhASegaLannADuva janaru bhAratakke valasegArarAgi baruva modalE I
drAviDa bhASegaLannADuva janaru bhAratadalli nelesiddarendu vidvAmsara
Uhe.

bhAratada horagiruva bEre kelavu bhASAkuTumbagaLondige drAviDa
bhASegaLannu sambandhisuva prayatnagaLalli ondU iduvarege saphala
vAgilla. yurOpina yurAlik kuTumbada upakuTumbavAda phinnO
-ugrik‌nondige ivannu sambandhisabahudendu kelavara abhiprAya
vAdare, uttara AphrikAda kelavu bhASegaLondige ivannu sambandhisa
bahudendu bEre kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. mohenjadArOdalli
sikkida barahagaLa hindiruva bhASe ondu drAviDa bhASeyAgira
bahudendu sAdhisalu bEre kelavaru prayatnisiddAre. Adare I ellA
prayatnagaLU UhApOhada sthitiyallE uLidive.

drAviDa bhASegaLannu mukhyavAgi nAlku SAkhegaLalli vingaDisabahu
dendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre:

1. (1) kannaDa, tuLu, tamiLu, malayALa, koDagu, toda modalAda
2. bhASegaLu dakSiNa drAviDa vibhAgadallU,
3. (2) telugu, gOnDi, konDa, kUyi, mAnDa, pengo modalAda
4. bhASegaLu dakSiNa-madhya vibhAgadallU,
5. (3) kOlAmi, pArji, gadaba modalAdavugaLu madhya vibhAga
6. dallU, mattu
7. (4) kuDukh, mAltO mattu brAhuyI bhASegaLu uttara
8. vibhAgadallU sEruttave.

drAviDa bhASegaLa I vibhajane avu mUlabhASeyinda yAva rIti
yalli kavaloDedirabEku embudannu avalambisideyAdarU, ivattu
avannADuva janaru nelesiruva pradESavannU I vibhajane pratibimbisu
ttade. dakSiNa drAviDa bhASegaLannADuva janaru mukhyavAgi bhAratada
dakSiNa bhAgadalli (tamiLunADu, kEraLa, mattu karNATakagaLalli) nelesi
ddAre.


idE rItiyalli, uttara vibhAgada kuDukh bhASeyannADuva janaru
orissA, bihAr mattu madhyapradESada uttara bhAgagaLallU, mAltO
bhASeyannADuvavaru bihArada rAjamahAl parvata SrENiyallU
nelesiddAre. nEpALadalli nelisiruva dhanagar janAngadavarU kuDukh
bhASeyannADuttAre. uttara vibhAgada mUranE bhASeyAda brAhuyi
yannADuvavaru pAkistAnada uttara vibhAgadalli kveTTAdinda las‌belA
davarege kvAlAt, haripur mattu haydarAbAd jillegaLalli nelesi
ddAre.

dakSiNa-madhya drAviDa bhASegaLAda telugu bhASeyannADuvavaru
Andhra pradESadalli, gOnDi bhASeyannADuvavaru madhyapradESadalli,
mattu konDa, kUyi mattu kUvi bhASegaLannADuvavaru orissAdalli
nelesiddAre. idakke badalu, madhya drAviDa bhASegaLAda kOlAmi mattu
nAyki bhASegaLannADuvavaru Andhra pradESada uttara bhAgadalli, pArji
bhASeyannADuvavaru madhya pradESada bastAr jilleyalli, mattu gadaba
bhASeyannADuvavaru orissAdalli nelesiddAre.

I rIti, dakSiNa, dakSiNa-madhya, madhya, mattu uttara drAviDa
bhASegaLu ondara uttarakke innondarante bhavgOLika haravannu
tOrisuttiveyAdarU, I bhASegaLalli kelavu bEre pradESadalliruva
drAviDa bhASegaLa vaySiSTyagaLannU tOrisuttiruvudu I vibhajaneya
ondu samasyeyAgide.

udAharaNegAgi, dakSiNadalli baLakeyalliruva tuLu bhASe halavu
viSayagaLalli dakSiNada itara bhASegaLi0da bhinnavAgiddu, madhyadrAviDa
bhASegaLannu hOluttade. dakSiNadallE iruva koraga emba innondu
bhASe kelavu viSayagaLalli uttarada kuDukh mattu mAltO
bhASegaLannu hOluttade. dakSiNa-madhya drAviDa bhASeyenisida telugu
halavu viSayagaLalli dakSiNa drAviDa bhASegaLannu hOluttade, ityAdi.

## drAviDa bhASegaLa naDuvina kelavu vyatyAsagaLu
I nAlku vibhAgagaLige sErida drAviDa bhASegaLa naDuve halavu rItiya
vyatyAsagaLannu kANabahudu. ivattina drAviDa bhASegaLu mUla drAviDa
bhASeyinda kavaloDedu bEre bEre bASegaLAguttiruvante, avugaLalli
intaha vyatyAsagaLu mUDibandive.

mUla drAviDada vaySiSTyagaLalli kelavannu kelavu bhASegaLu uLisi
konDive, mattu kelavu bhASegaLu uLisikonDilla embudarinda I


vyatyAsagaLalli kelavu huTTikonDive, mattu innu kelavu vyatyAsagaLu
mUla drAviDadalli illadidda vaySiSTyagaLannu Adhunika bhASegaLu
beLesikonDu bandiruvudarindAgi taledOrive.

udAharaNegAgi, mUladrAviDada sarvanAmagaLalli kELuganannu
sErisi hELuvavugaLu, mattu kELuganannu biTTu hELuvavugaLu embu
dAgi eraDu rItiya bahuvacana rUpagaLidduvu. tamiLu, malayALa,
tuLu modalAda bhASegaLalli I vaySiSTya uLidide, Adare kannaDadalli
uLidilla. malayALadalliruva iccaL 'nAvu mAtra' mattu iAm
'nAvu mattu nIvu' emba eraDu sarvanAmagaLige badalAgi kannaDadalli
nAvu emba ondE ondu sarvanAmavide embudannu illi gamanisa
bahudu. karAvaLiya kelavu kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli mAtra I vaySiSTya
ivattigU uLidukonDide (udA: havyakada engo mattu nAvu).
haLegannaDadallU I vyatyAsavittu.

dakSiNa-madhya drAviDa bhASegaLallella naDeda ondu badalAvaNe
yendare, padada eraDanE akSaradallidda rakAra, DakAra, LakAra, mattu
lakAragaLu kelavu viSiSTavAda sannivESagaLalli modalaneya akSarakke
sthaLAntarisive. I badalAvaNeya pariNAmavAgi kannaDada eLeyavanu
emba pada kUvi bhASeyalli lAvenju endAguttade, mattu gOnDi
bhASeyalli leyyO endAguttade. idE rItiyalli kannaDada bareyu
embudu teluginalli rAyu endAguttade, aDagu embudu DAgu
endAguttade, uddu (urdu) embudu ruddu endAguttade, illa
embudu lEdu endAguttade, ityAdi.

## drAviDa mattu Arya bhASegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsagaLu
drAviDa mattu Arya (inDO-Aryan) bhASegaLa naDuveyU
vyAkaraNada maTTige halavu rItiya vyatyAsagaLu kanDubaruttive. ivu
gaLalli heccinavakkU I bhASegaLige mUlavAgidda mUladrAviDa mattu
mUla inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLu vAkyaracanegAgi bEre bEre
vyAkaraNa tantragaLannu baLasikonDiddudE kAraNavendu hELabahudu.

Arya bhASegaLannADuva janaru bhAratakke valase banda mEle avara
bhASegaLalli halavAru badalAvaNegaLu naDedive. ivugaLalli heccinavU A
kAladalli bhAratadalli baLakeyallidda drAviDa (mattu itara) bhASegaLa
samparkadindAgi avannu heccu heccu hOluvante mADuva badalAvaNe
gaLE Agive. hIgiddarU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLa


naDuve ivattigU halavu mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLu uLidiruvudannu kANa
bahudu.

Arya bhASegaLalli nAmapada mattu kriyApada emba eraDu
mukhyavAda padavargagaLu mAtra ive; Adare, drAviDa bhASegaLalli I
eraDu padavargagaLu mAtravallade, guNapada emba mUraneyadondu
padavargavU ide embudu intaha vyatyAsagaLalli mukhyavAdudu. I
vyatyAsada pariNAmavAgi, vAkyaracaneya mattu padaracaneya halavu
niyamagaLu I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLalli bhinna bhinna
vAgive.

eraDaneyadAgi, nAmapadagaLannu bEre bEre lingagaLalli vingaDisu
vudakkAgi Arya bhASegaLu baLasuva vidhAna drAviDa bhASegaLu baLasuva
vidhAnakkinta tIra bhinnavAdudu. nAmapadagaLannu mukhyavAgi avugaLa
antyAkSaragaLa AdhArada mEle vibhajisuva krama Arya bhASegaLadAdare,
arthada AdhArada mEle vibhajisuvudu drAviDa bhASegaLu baLasuva
vidhAna. udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli 'henDati' emba ondE artha
viruva padagaLalli dArA: embudu pullinga, patni embudu strIlinga,
mattu kalitram embudu napumsakalinga. drAviDa bhASegaLalli baLasuvu
diddare, I mUrU strIlinga padagaLE Agiruttave.

vibhaktigaLa baLakeyallU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLa
naDuve mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive. drAviDa bhASegaLalli vibhakti pratyaya
gaLige arthadoDane nEravAda sambandhavide. Adare Arya bhASegaLalli
intaha nEravAda sambandhavilla. I kAraNakkAgi, vibhaktigaLa baLakeyannu
varNisalu Arya bhASegaLalli kArakagaLemba vyAkaraNa tatvavannu baLasa
bEkAguttade. avugaLa vAkyaracaneyalli kANisuva kartari-karmaNi
prayOgagaLa baLakeyU idE kAraNakkAgi udbhaviside. Adare, I
viSayadalli ivattina Arya bhASegaLu svalpa badalAgive.

padaracaneya vidhAnavU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhASe
gaLalli bEre bErAgide. Arya bhASegaLalli dhArALavAgi kANisuva
pUrva pratyayagaLa baLake drAviDa bhASegaLallilla. heccina padagaLigU
kriyAdhAtugaLE mUla emba niyama Arya bhASegaLallide, Adare
drAviDa bhASegaLallilla.

samastapadagaLa vibhajaneyallU Arya mattu drAviDa bhASegaLa
naDuve mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive. Arya bhASegaLalli I vibhajaneyannu
samastapadada angagaLAgi banda padagaLalli pradhAna pada yAvudu emba


viSayada AdhArada mEle naDesabahudAdare, drAviDa bhASegaLalli,
samastapadada modalaneya pada yAva vargakke sEruttade emba
viSayada AdhArada mEle naDesabEkAguttade.

drAviDa bhASegaLalli kriyApadagaLu 'kAlabhEda'vannu sUcisuvu
vAdare, Arya bhASegaLalli 'kAlavyavasthe'ya bhEdavannu sUcisuttave.
udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada hoDeyuttAne emba kriyArUpa mAta
nADuva samayakkinta anantara naDeyuva illavE mAtanADuva samaya
dallEnE naDeyuttiruva ghaTaneyannU, hoDeda emba kriyArUpa
mAtanADuva samayakkinta modalu naDeda ghaTaneyannU sUcisuttave.

idakke badalAgi, hindI bhASeyalli baruva AtA 'baruttAne' emba
kriyArUpa ondu apUrNa kriyeyannU, AyA 'banda' emba kriyA
rUpa ondu pUrNa kriyeyannU sUcisuttave. illi kAlabhEda mukhya
valla. I eraDu kriyArUpagaLannU vartamAnArtha koDuva hay emba
upakriyApadadondige (AtA hay, AyA hay), illavE bhUtArtha
vannu koDuva thA emba upakriyApadadondige (AtA thA, AyA
thA) baLasalu sAdhyavide. samskxtadallU I pUrNa mattu apUrNa
emba kAlavyavastheya bhEda bhUta mattu abhUta emba kAlabhEdakkinta
heccu mukhyavAdudu.

## TibeTO-barman bhASegaLu
bhAratadalli kASmIradinda hiDidu tripurAdavaregU haraDiruva himA
layada parvataSrENiyalli TibeTO-barman emba bhASA kuTumbakke
sErida laDAkhi, nevAri, leppA, bODO, gArO, AvO nAga, maNi
puri, luSAyi, tripuri, modalAda nUrakkU heccu bhASegaLannADuva
janaru vAsisuttAre.

TibeTan mattu barmIs bhASegaLondige mAtravalla, caynIs
bhASeyondigU I bhASegaLige hattirada sambandhaviddu, ivella ondE
mUlabhASeyalli bEre bEre rItiya badalAvaNegaLAdudarindAgi bhinna
bhinna bhASegaLAdavugaLendu vidvAmsaru kanDuhiDididdAre. TibeTO-
barman bhASegaLigU, caynIs bhASegU naDuve sambandhavideyembu
dannu sUcisuvudakkAgi adannu sinO-TibeTan emba innaSTu vistAra
vAda bhASA kuTumbada upakuTumbavendu hindinavaru parigaNisiddaru.

Adare, ittIcege naDeda kelavu samSOdhanegaLu caynIs bhASe
TibeTO-barman bhASegaLalli kelavakke (endare bODo, gArO,


kirAntI, modalAduvakke) uLiduvakkinta heccu hattiravembudannu
tOrisikoTTive; mattu I samSOdhanegaLa AdhArada mEle, caynIs
mattu adakke sambandhisida bEre kelavu bhASegaLannu oTTAgi TibeTO-
barman emba bhASA kuTumbada ondu upakuTumbavembudAgi
parigaNisuva avaSyakateyunTAgide.

jagattina bhASegaLallella inDO-yurOpiyan kuTumbakke sErida
bhASegaLannu biTTare I TibeTO-barman emba bhASAkuTumbakke
sErida bhASegaLE atI heccu janara manemAtAgive. Adare, I bhASA
kuTumbakkiruva janasankhyeya bala mukhyavAgi caynIs bhASeya jana
sankhyAbalada mEle avalambiside. sumAru nUru miliya janara
mAtAgiruva A bhASeyannu biTTare, uLida bhASegaLalli 22 miliya
janara mAtAgiruva barmIs mattu nAlku miliya janara mAtA
giruva TibeTan mukhyavAdavugaLu.

bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva TibeTO-barman bhASegaLalli ondu
miliyakkinta jAsti janara mAtAgiruva bhASegaLu maNipuri mattu
bODO mAtra. ivallade, 172 sAvira janara mane mAtAgiruva
AvO, mattu 97 sAvira janara mane mAtAgiruva angAmi nAgA
bhASegaLU I kuTumbakke sEruttave. ivakkinta kaDime janaru mAta
nADuva I kuTumbada bhASegaLu bhAratadalli oTTu nUrakkintalU
jAsti ive.

I bhASegaLannella paScima mattu pUrva bhASegaLendu eraDu
mukhya vibhAgagaLalli vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli pUrva vibhAgavannu
uttara mattu dakSiNa vibhAgagaLendu vingaDisalu sAdhyaviddu, caynIs,
bODO modalAdavugaLu uttara vibhAgadallU, barmIs,
lOlO, maNipuri modalAdavugaLu dakSiNa vibhAgadallU sEruttave.

maNipuri bhASeyalli hadinaydanE SatamAnadindalU sAhitya racane
naDeyuttide. modalige I sAhitya granthagaLannu avaradE Ada maNipuri
lipiyalli bareyalAguttittu. Adare anantara, maNipuri janara mEle
vaySNava prabhAva beLedubanda samayadalli, I lipiyannu biTTukoTTu,
adara badalige bengAli lipiyannu baLasuva krama rUDhige bantu.

Adare, I lipiyalli maNipuri bhASege avaSyavilladiruva halavAru
svara mattu vyanjana sanjYegaLiruva kAraNa, mattu A lipiyannu tamma
bhASege aLavaDisikoLLuva samayadalli maNipuri vidvAmsaru I


avaSyavillada sanjYegaLannella hAgeyE uLisikonDiruva kAraNa, avara
bhASeya indina baraha tumbA toDaku toDakAgide.

## vyAkaraNada kelavu vaySiSTyagaLu
vyAkaraNada maTTige bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva TibeTO-barman
bhASegaLu halavAru vaySiSTyagaLannu tOrisuttave. I vyAkaraNa vaySiSTya
gaLu vAkyaracanegAgi I bhASegaLu siddhapaDisikonDiruva viSiSTavAda
tantragaLAgiveyAda kAraNa, ivu I bhASegaLannADuva janara samskxti
yannU pratibimbisuttaveyendu hELabahudu. hAgAgi, I bhASegaLa
nnADuva janarannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLabEkendiddare, avara bhASe
gaLalli kANisuva I vyAkaraNa vaySiSTyagaLannU sariyAgi tiLidukoLLu
vudu avaSya.

Arya bhASegaLa hAge, I kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLallU nAma
pada mattu kriyApadagaLemba eraDu padavargagaLu mAtra kANisuttave.
Adare, guNapadagaLannu Arya bhASegaLu nAmapadagaLondige sErisu
ttaveyAdare, I kuTumbada bhASegaLu kriyApadagaLondige sErisu
ttave. udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli kxSNa: 'kappu' embudu ondu
nAmapada, Adare, TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida maNipuri
bhASeyalli mU 'kappu' embudu ondu kriyApada. samskxtadalli
kxSNa: emba padakke linga-vacana-vibhakti pratyayagaLannu sErisuva hAge,
maNipuriyalli mU emba padakke kAlapratyayagaLannu mattu akhyAta
pratyayagaLannu sErisabahudu.

vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyallU TibeTO-barman bhASegaLalli
kelavu vaySiSTyagaLannu kANabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, maNipuri bhASe
yalli baruva da emba saptamI vibhakti pratyayavannu kannaDada inda, ge
mattu alli emba mUru vibhaktigaLa arthadallU baLasalu baruttade.
ivugaLoLage vyatyAsavannu tOrisabEkiddalli, I pratyayadondige bEre
pratyaya illavE padagaLannu baLasabEkAguttade.

kannaDada vibhakti pratyayagaLalli annu embudannu baLasuvalli namage
svalpamaTTigina svAtantryavide endu hELabahudu. halavu sandarbhagaLalli
adannu baLasadiralU sAdhyavide: mane mArida mattu maneyannu
mArida embantaha vikalpavAda prayOgagaLannu kannaDadalli kANabahudu.
Adare bEre vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyalli intaha svAtantryavilla.


TibeTO-barman bhASegaLalli intaha svAtantryavannu heccina
vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyallU kANabahudu. idallade, vibhakti pratyaya
vondara prayOgavAgideyE, athavA illavE emba viSayada
AdhArada mEle, bEre kelavu artha vyatyAsagaLannU I bhASegaLalli
sUcisalu sAdhyavide. udAharaNegAgi, maNipuriyalli kannaDada annu
emba pratyayada arthaviruva bu emba pratyayavannu avaSyavilladalli
baLasidAga 'annu mAtra' emba artha baruttade (kAru emba
padadondige adannu baLasadiruvalli 'kArannu' emba artha baruvu
dAdare, baLasiruvalli 'kArannu mAtra' emba artha baruttade.)

vibhaktigaLa baLakeyalli innU halavAru vaySiSTyagaLannu I bhASe
gaLalli kANabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, angAmI nAgA bhASeyalli ginu
mattu nunu emba eraDu saptamI vibhakti pratyayagaLive. ivugaLalli
modalaneyadannu bahaLa ettaradalliruva sthAnavannu sUcisuvalli baLasa
bEku, mattu eraDaneyadannu bahaLa tagginalliruva sthAnavannu sUcisu
valli baLasabEku. udAharaNegAgi, bassinalli kuLite endu hELa
bEkAdAga, A bassu parvatada tudiyalli sAguttiddare angAmi bhASe
yalli ginu emba pratyayavannU, adu keLage kaNiveyalli sAguttiddare
nunu emba pratyayavannU baLasabEkAguttade.

TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida bODO emba innondu
bhASeyalli kriyApadagaLu tiLisuva ghaTanegaLa sthAna vaySiSTyavannu sUci
suvudakkAgi avugaLondige halavAru pratyayagaLannu sErisi hELa
lAguttade. udAharaNegAgi, ddA 'tinnu' emba kriyApadadondige
klAy emba pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'keLagininda mElakke tinnu' emba
arthavU, dda pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'nekki tinnu' emba arthavU, pru
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'madhyadinda kacci tinnu' emba arthavU, sler
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'badiyinda tinnu' emba arthavU, ddob
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'mElininda tinnu' emba arthavU baruttade.
I bhASeyalli intaha halavu bageya arthagaLannu koDaballa oTTu
innUra ayvattakkintalU jAsti pratyayagaLu baLakeyallive.

kannaDadalli barabahudu embudakke 'baruvudu sAdhya' emba
arthavU ide, 'baruvudakke oppigeyide' emba arthavU ide. idE
rItiyalli, barabEku embudakke 'baruvudu niScaya' emba arthavU
ide, 'baruvudu avaSya' emba arthavU ide. TibeTO-barman
bhASegaLalli I eraDu rItiya arthagaLannu sUcisalu bEre bEre
pratyayagaLannu illavE padagaLannu prayOgisalAguttade. hAgAgi,


drAviDa mattu Arya bhASegaLalli kANisuva I arthasandigdhate
TibeTO-barman bhASegaLalli kANisuvudilla.

namma dESada ISAnya gaDipradESadalli nAvu halavAru rItiya
tondaregaLannu anubhavisuttiddEve. allina janaru ADuva bhASegaLu
dilliya rAjakAraNigaLa bhASegaLiginta tIrA bhinnavAgiruvuvAda kAraNa,
avara anisikegaLannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLuvalli dilliya rAja
kAraNigaLu eDavuttiddAre. bahuSaH gaDipradESada tondaregaLige namma
rAjakAraNigaLu anubhavisuttiruva I bhASAviSayaka samasyeyU
ondu kAraNavAgiraballudu. I viSayavannu svalpa ALavAgi pariSI
lisuva avaSyakateyide.

## AsTO-ESiyATik bhASegaLu
bhAratadalli AsTO-ESiyATik emba hesarina I kuTumbakke sErida
bhASegaLu mukhyavAgi bihAr, orissA, mattu madhyapradESagaLa guDDa
kADugaLalli nelesiruva janaralli baLakeyallive. drAviDa bhASegaLannADuva
janara hAge, I bhASegaLannADuva janarU Aryaru bhAratakke valase
baruva modalE illi nelesiddirabEku. I bhASegaLalli ayvatteraDu lakSa
janara manemAtAgiruva santAli, mattu enTUvare lakSa janara mane
mAtAgiruva munDAri bhASegaLu mukhyavAdavugaLu.

I bhASegaLannu munDa mattu mOn-khmEr emba eraDu upa
kuTumbagaLAgi vingaDisalAgide. ivugaLalli munDa vibhAgakke sErida
munDAri, santAli, hO, khaDiyA, bhUmij, korku, sOrA
modalAda oTTu sumAru hadinenTu bhASegaLU, mOn-khmEr
vibhAgakke sErida khAsi mattu nikobarIs emba eraDu bhASegaLU
bhAratadalli baLakeyallive.

bhAratada horage baLakeyalliruva viyaTnamIs, khmEr (kambO
Diyan) modalAda bEre halavu bhASegaLU I mOn-khmEr
gumpige sEruttave. Adare, munDa vibhAgakke sErida bhASegaLu bhArata
dalli mAtra baLakeyallive. avannu mukhyavAgi dakSiNa munDa (sOra,
gOrum), korAput munDa (guthOb, remO), madhya munDa
(khaDiyA, juvAng), mattu uttara munDa (korku, santAli,
munDAri, korva, hO, ityAdi) embudAgi vingaDisalAguttade.

AsTrO-ESiyATik bhASAkuTumbavannu caynA, viyeTnAm moda
lAda bhAratada horagiruva pradESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva miyan


mattu itara miyAv-yAv bhASegaLondige, mattu thAy‌lEnDina
thAyi, lAvO, juvAng modalAda dAyik bhASegaLondige
sErisi, AsTrik emba doDDadondu bhASAkuTumbavannu kalpisikoLLa
bahudendu kelavaru vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

## vyAkaraNada kelavu vaySiSTyagaLu
I kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu halavu viSayagaLalli bhAratada itara
bhASegaLinda bhinnavAgive. udAharaNegAgi, munDa vibhAgakke sErida
munDAri bhASeyalli ellA padagaLU ondE padavargadalli baruttave.
endare, avugaLalli yAvudannu bEkiddarU nAmapadavAgi, kriyApada
vAgi illavE guNapadavAgi baLasalu sAdhyavide. udAharaNegAgi,
munDAri bhASeyalli 'mattu' emba arthavannu koDuva oDo emba
padavannu A arthadalli mAtravallade, vibhakti pratyayagaLondige 'hecci
navaru' emba arthadallU baLasabahudu, mattu AkhyAta pratyaya
gaLondige 'innomme mADu' emba arthadallU baLasabahudu.

munDAri bhASeyalli baruva bEre kelavu padagaLa arthavannu
pariSIlisidalli, adakkU itara bhASegaLigU naDuve iruva I vyatyAsa
spaSTavAdItu. adara heccina padagaLallU 'vastu (illavE viSaya)'
mattu 'adakke sambandhisida ghaTane' emba I eraDu rItiya
parikalpanegaLU hudugiruttave; idannu keLage koTTiruva munDAri
padagaLalli kANabahudu.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>munDAri pada</th>
<th>vastu</th>
<th>sambandhisida ghaTane</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>buru</td>
<td>‘parvata’</td>
<td>‘rASi hAku’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>gapa</td>
<td>‘nALe’</td>
<td>‘mundUDu’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>kummu</td>
<td>‘kaLLa’</td>
<td>‘kaddu kO’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>lutur</td>
<td>‘kivi’</td>
<td>‘kELu’</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

munDAri bhASeya innondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, idara kriyApada
gaLu tiLisuva ghaTanegaLalli bEre bEre kAryagaLigAgi toDagikoLLuva
vyaktigaLannu sUcisalu A kriyApadagaLallEnE AkhyAta pratyayagaLannu
baLasuva vyavastheyide.

udAharaNegAgi, dal 'hoDe' emba kriyApadavannu baLasuvu
diddalli, adarondige 'hoDedaddu yAvAga' embudannu mAtravallade,


## viSyada bhASegaLu
‘hoDedaddu yAru’, mattu ‘hoDedaddu yArige’ emba bEre eraDu
viSayagaLannU sUcisalu AkhyAta pratyayagaLannu baLasabahudu. I
bhASAvaySiSTyavannu amerikAda sAliS bhASegaLallU kANabahudu.

samskxta bhASeya hAge, munDAri bhASeyallU mUru vacana
gaLive mAtravalla, dvivacana mattu bahuvacanagaLeraDarallU kELuganannu
biTTu illavE sErisi hELuvante eraDeraDu sarvanAma rUpagaLive.
samskxtada kriyArUpagaLannu munDAri bhASeya kriyArUpagaLondige
hOlisi nODidevAdare, samskxtakkinta eSTO pAlu jAsti kriyA
rUpagaLu munDAriyalliruvudannu kANabahudu.

kannaDadalli alli mattu illi emba eraDu sthAnagaLannu nirdESisuva
sarvanAmagaLiveyAdare, munDAri bhASeyalli oTTu ombattu sthAna
gaLannu nirdESisuva sarvanAmagaLive. 'mAtanADuvavana hattira',
'dUra', mattu 'ivugaLa naDuve' emba mUru sthAnabhEdagaLannu
mAtravallade, ivugaLalli pratiyondU 'hattira', 'bahaLa hattira', mattu
'innaSTu hattira' embudAgi mUru heccina rUpagaLannu tOrisuttave.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbadallEnE mOn-khmEr emba upa
kuTumbakke sEruva, mattu mEghAlayadalli baLakeyalliruva, khAsi
bhASe munDa bhASegaLinda halavu viSayagaLalli bhinnavAgide. udA
haraNegAgi, khAsi bhASeyalli nAmapadagaLannu baLasuvAgalella u
'pullinga' illavE ka 'strIlinga' emba eraDu sarvanAmagaLalli yAvu
dAdarU ondannu avugaLondige baLasalEbEkemba niyamavide.

bahuvacanadallAdare, iveraDakkU badalAgi ki emba sarvanAmavannu
baLasabahudu. I sarvanAmagaLu lingabhEdavannu mAtravalla, aprANi
vAcaka padagaLondige bandAga avugaLa AkAra illavE gAtravannU
sUcisaballuvu (u sla 'cikka ele', ka sla 'doDDa ele')

## 5.2 ESyAda bhASegaLu
bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva bhASAkuTumbagaLAda inDO-Aryan
(inDO-yurOpiyan), draviDiyan, TibeTO-barman mattu
AsTrO-ESiyATik embavugaLige sErida bhASegaLu mAtravallade,
urAlik mattu alTEyik emba bEre eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida
bhASegaLU ESyAkhanDadalli baLakeyallive. ivallade, cukci-kAmcat


kAn, miyAv-yAv mattu dAyik emba innU mUru
kuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLU I khanDadalli baLakeyallive.

inDO-yurOpiyan kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLalli irE
niyan mattu ArmEniyan bhASegaLu ESyAda nayxtya bhAgadalli
baLakeyallive. drAviDa bhASegaLu bhAratadalli mAtravallade, pAkistAna
(brAhuyI), nEpAla (kuDukh), banglAdESa modalAda ESyAda bEre
kelavu dESagaLallU baLakeyallive.

TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida caynIs bhASe (nijakkU
idu mandArin, kenTonIs, vU, dakSiNa mattu uttara min, kEjA
modalAda halavu bhASegaLa ondu upakuTumba) ESyA khanDada ondu
mukhyavAda bhASe. idallade, I kuTumbakke sErida TibeTan mattu
barmIs emba inneraDu mukhyavAda bhASegaLU ESyAdalli baLake
yallive.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLalli bhAratada
horage ESyAdalli baLakeyalliruva bhASegaLella mOn-khmer emba
upakuTumbakke sEruttave. viyaTnamIs mattu khmer (kambO
Diyan) bhASegaLu ivugaLalli mukhyavAdavugaLu. intaha nUrayvattu
bhASegaLu ESyAdalli baLakeyallive.

thAyi, lAvO modalAda oTTu aruvattu bhASegaLannoLagonDa
dAyik kuTumba, mattu caynA, viyeTnAm, thaylEnD modalAda
dESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva miyAv-yAv kuTumba - iveraDannU
AsTrO-ESiyATik emba kuTumbadondige sErisi, AsTrik emba
doDDadondu bhASAkuTumbavannu sAdhisabahudendu kelavaru abhi
prAyapaTTiddAre.

mukhyavAgi yurOp‌nalli baLakeyalliruva yurAlik bhASegaLalli
samoyed emba upakuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu ESyAda yurAl
parvataSrENiyalli baLakeyallive. alTayik kuTumbadalli Tarkik,
mongOliyan, mancu-tungus mattu koriyan emba nAlku
upakuTumbagaLu sEruttave. ayvattu miliya janara manemAtAda
TarkiS bhASe ivugaLalli mukhyavAdudu. kelavara abhiprAyadante,
japAnIs mattu aynu bhASegaLannU I alTayik kuTumbadalli
sErisabahudu.


5.3 yurOpina bhASegaLu

yurOp khanDadalli mukhyavAgi inDO-yurOpiyan,
yurAlik mattu kavkESiyan emba mUru bhASAkuTumbagaLige
sErida bhASegaLu baLakeyallive. ivugaLalli inDO-yurOpiyan
kuTumbakke sErida ingliS, phrenc, jarman, spAniS, raSyan
modalAda bhASegaLannADuva janaru amerikA, AsTrEliyA, AphrikA
modalAda bEre bhUkhanDagaLigU valase hOgi allU vistAravAgi
haraDikonDiddAre. idarindAgi, ivattu jagattina oTTu janasankhyeya
lekkavannu hiDidalli, inDO-yurOpiyan bhASAkuTumbakke sErida
bhASegaLige modalaneya sthAna siguttade.

## inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLu
I kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLa sankhye nUrayvattakkinta jAstiyilla. I
bhASegaLannADuva janara mUla yurOp khanDavAgideyAdarU
modalige hattirada ESyA khanDakke mattu ittIcege itara ellA khanDa
gaLigU I janaru valase hOgi, ivattu iDI bhUmiyannE Akramisi
konDiddAre. I kuTumbakke sErida ingliS bhASe ivattu jagattina
bhASeyeniside.

sumAru mUru sAvira varSagaLaSTu hinde ivattina Tarkiyalli
baLakeyalliddu, anantara naSisihOgidda hiTTayT emba bhASe
inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLige sambandhisiddendU, mattu I
bhASeyannu inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLondige sErisi oTTAgi
inDO-hiTTayT emba innU doDDa bhASAkuTumbavondannu
sAdhisalu sAdhya vendU kelavaru vAdisiddAre.

inDO-yurOpiyan bhASegaLannu Sa-ka bhEdada AdhArada
mEle pUrva mattu paScima bhASegaLendu vingaDisuva krama baLake
yallittu. Adare kakAravannu SakAravAgi mADiruva bhASegaLa naDuve
kakAravannu uLisikonDiruva hiTTayT bhASeyideyembudannu kanDu
hiDidAga, I vibhajanege beleyilladAyitu. sadyakke inDO-
yurOpiyan bhASegaLannu inDO-irEniyan, jarmEnik,
slAvik, bAlTik, kelTik, iTAlik, modalAda oTTu hanneraDu
upakuTumbagaLalli vingaDisuvudu rUDhi. I upakuTumbagaLalli grIk,


ArmEniyan mattu albEniyan‌gaLalli ondondu bhASe (mattu avugaLa upabhASegaLu) mAtra ide.

## itara bhASegaLu
yurAlik kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLalli madhyayurOpinalli baLake
yalliruva sumAru hadinaydu miliya janara manemAtAda
hangEriyan mukhyavAdudu. idallade, phin‌lEnDinalli sumAru aydu
miliya janara manemAtAgiruva phinniS bhASeyU I kuTumbakke
sEruttade. esTOniyAda estOniyan, skEnDinEviyAda lAp,
karEliyan, mOrDvin modalAda I kuTumbada itara mUvattu
bhASegaLannADuva janara oTTu sankhye aydu miliyakkinta jAsti illa.
ESyAda uttara bhAgadallU I kuTumbakke sErida athavA sambandhisida
yukAghir, mAnsi modalAda bhASegaLive.

I bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare ivugaLa padagaLallella
svaragaLa sAmarasya kANisuttade. idakkAgi padagaLalli baruva svaragaLannu
pUrva mattu paSca emba eraDu gumpugaLalli vingaDisuva avaSyakate
yide. ikAra mattu ekAragaLu pUrva svaragaLu, mattu ukAra, okAra
mattu akAragaLu paSca svaragaLu. yAva padadallU pUrva mattu paSca
svaragaLu oTTAgi baralAravu. hAgAgi, I bhASegaLalli baruva pratyaya
gaLigella pUrvasvarayukta mattu paScasvarayuktagaLemba eraDeraDu rUpa
gaLiruttave.

udAharaNegAgi, hangEriyan bhASeyalli 'mEle' emba arthada
pratyayakke en mattu on emba eraDu rUpagaLive. ondu nAmapada
pUrvasvarayuktavAgiddare adarondige I pratyayada en emba rUpa
vannU (vidsen 'nIrina mEle'), mattu paScasvarayuktavAgiddare on
emba rUpavannU (lovon 'kudureya mEle') baLasabEkAguttade.

I bhASegaLalli vibhakti pratyayagaLa sankhye sAmAnyavAgi bahaLa
doDDadu. udAharaNegAgi, per‌myAk emba bhASeyalli 28 vibhakti
pratyayagaLive. I pratyayagaLu mukhyavAgi halavu bageya sthAnagaLannu
sUcisalu baLakeyAguttave. kannaDadalli inda mattu ge emba eraDu
asthAyi sthAnagaLannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLU, alli emba sthAyi
sthAnavannu sUcisuva vibhaktiyU ideyAdare, I bhASegaLalli halavu
bageya sthAyi sthAnagaLannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLive.


kavkESiyan vibhAgakke sErida bhASegaLalli heccinavU hindina
sOviyeT yUniyan‌nallidda kavkasas pradESadalli baLakeyallive.
ivugaLalli jArjiyan mukhyavAdudu. ab‌khAj, cecan, ghastAni,
dargvA, lej‌gi modalAda oTTu sumAru 37 bhASegaLannu I
vibhAgadalli sErisuvudu rUDhi. nijakkU I ellA bhASegaLannU oTTAgi
ondu bhASAkuTumbavendu parigaNisuvudakke sAkaSTu AdhAravinnU
doretilla. hAgAgi, kavkESiyan embudu ondu bhASAkuTumba
vennuvudakkintalU ondu prAdESika vibhajaneyendu hELuvudE lEsu.

I bhASegaLannu uttara mattu dakSiNa (kartEliyan) emba eraDu
gumpugaLAgi vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli uttarada bhASegaLalli kANisi
koLLuva varNagaLa sankhye sAmAnyavAgi bahaLa doDDadu. udAharaNe
gAgi, yubikh bhASeyalli oTTu 80 vyanjana varNagaLive. Adare I
bhASeyalliruva svaragaLa sankhye mAtra barE eraDu (ivu eraDu bageya
akAragaLu). I bhASeyalli u, o, i, e modalAda akArakkinta
bhinnavAda svaragaLilla.

kartEliyan bhASegaLalli vibhaktigaLa sankhye adhika. udAharaNegAgi,
lAk bhASeyalli oTTu 40 vibhaktigaLive. tabasAras emba innondu
bhASeyalli 46 vibhaktigaLive. idara kelavu upabhASegaLalli innU jAsti
vibhaktigaLive. ivugaLalli heccinavU bEre bEre sthAnagaLannu sUcisuvu
dakkAgi baLakeyAguttave. udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada saptamige badalAgi
sthAnada svarUpavannAdharisi, endare 'samataTTAda jAga', 'iLijArAda
jAga', 'mElmay', 'keLamay', 'khAli jAga', 'tumbida jAga', modalAda
bhEdagaLannAdharisi, I bhASegaLalli halavAru pratyayagaLannu baLasa
lAguttade.

## 5.AphrikAda bhASegaLu
AphrikAdalli oTTu sumAru ondUvare sAviradinda hiDidu eraDu
sAviradaSTu bhASegaLu baLakeyalliyendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. I bhASegaLannella AphrO-ESiyATik, naylO-saharAn,
nayjar-korDOphEniyan, mattu khoysAn emba nAlku mukhya
kuTumbagaLalli vingaDisabahudendu ivaralli heccinavarU abhiprAya
paDuttAre. AphrikAdalli I nAlku kuTumbagaLigU sErade pratyEkavAgi
uLiyuva bhASegaLU kelavive.


## Aphri-ESiyATik bhASegaLu
I vibhAgakke sEruva sumAru innUra naluvattu bhASegaLu AphrikAda
uttara bhAgadalli baLakeyallive. ivannu IjipTiyan, semiTik,
berber, cAdik, mattu kuSiTik emba aydu upavibhAgagaLalli
vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli kelavu bhASegaLannu omOTik emba
innondu pratyEkavAda vibhAgadalli sErisabEkendu kelavaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. I upavibhAgagaLalli IjipTiyan embudakke sErida bhASe
gaLella Iga aLidu hOgive. haLE IjipTiyan bhASeya barahagaLu
aydu sAvira varSagaLaSTu haLeyavu. adara ittIcegina prabhEdavendare
hadinAranE SatamAnada kOpTik bhASe.

semiTik kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLu arab dESagaLAda savdI
arEbiya, jOrDAn, irAk, isrEl, lebanAn, siriyAgaLallU,
sOmAliyA mattu ithiyOpiyAda heccina bhAgagaLallU, mattu
irAn hAgU Tarki dESagaLa kelavu bhAgagaLallU baLakeyallive.
akkADiyan embudu I vibhAgakke sErida ondu haLE bhASe.

nUru miliya janara manemAtAgiruva arEbik, enTu miliya
janara mAtAgiruva amhArik, nAlku miliya janara mAtAgiruva
tigrIniyA modalAdavugaLu I semiTik vibhAgakke sErida Adhunika
bhASegaLu. isrElina hIbrU bhASeyU idE vibhAgakke sEruttade.
kraystana kAladalli heccu kaDime pUrti naSTavAgi hOgidda I bhASe
yannu punarujjIvanagoLisi Adhunika ADaLita bhASeyannAgi mADa
lAgide. ivattu idannu baLasuttiruvavara sankhye sumAru mUru
miliya.

semiTik vibhAgakke sErida I bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare,
ivugaLa padagaLalli heccinavugaLallU mUru vyanjanagaLa ondu dhAtu
viruttade. I dhAtuvinondige kelavE kelavu svaragaLa vinyAsagaLannu
baLasuvudara mUlaka, I bhASegaLalli bEre bEre rItiya padagaLannu
mattu padarUpagaLannu sAdhisabahudu.

udAharaNegAgi, arEbik bhASeyalli k-t-b embudu 'bare'
embarthada ondu dhAtu. idannu bEre bEre svaravinyAsagaLondige
baLasi, kitAb 'pustaka', kAtib 'lEkhaka', kutubi 'pustaka vyApAri',
kataba 'baravaNigeyavanu', kitAb 'baraha', kuttAb 'prAthamika SAle'
modalAda padagaLannu sAdhisabahudu. idallade, ivakke bEre kelavu
vyanjanagaLannu sErisi, makkUb 'patra', miktAb 'Tayp‌rayTar',


makkab 'kacEri', makkaba 'granthAlaya', istriktAb 'hELi bareyisu',
iktitAb 'nOndAyisu' modalAda bEre halavu padagaLannu
racisabahudu.

I rIti, dhAtugaLa naDuvina arthavyatyAsavannu sUcisalu I bhASe
yalli svaragaLa avaSyakateyillavAda kAraNa, idara barahadalli sAmAnya
vAgi vyanjanagaLannu mattu dIrghasvaragaLannu mAtra bareyuva krama
baLakege bandide. hrasva svaragaLannu, padagaLa koneyalli baruva vyanjana
gaLannu, mattu ottakSaragaLannu cikkamakkaLa paThyapustakagaLalli mattu kurAn
nalli mAtra sUcisalAguttade.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbada kuSiTik emba innondu upa
vibhAgakke sErida somAli, oromO, aphAr modalAda bhASegaLu
suDAn, ithiyOpiyA, somAliyA modalAda dESagaLalli baLake
yallive. berber bhASegaLu morokko mattu aljIriyAgaLalli
baLakeyallive. cAdik bhASegaLalli havsA atyanta mukhyavAdudu. I
bhASeyannu manemAtAgi baLasuvavara sankhye sumAru hanneraDu
miliya, mattu eraDanE bhASeyAgi baLasuvavara sankhye sumAru
hadimUru miliya. I bhASe mAtravallade, burA, mArba moda
lAda bEre sumAru nUra ippattu bhASegaLU I upavibhAgadallive.
ithiyOpiyA mattu kenyAgaLalli baLakeyalliruva sumAru mUva
ttaydu bhASegaLu omOTik vibhAgakke sEruttave.

AphrO-ESiyATik bhASegaLa innondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, ivu
gaLa vAkyagaLalli sAmAnyavAgi kriyApada modalige baruttade. (kannaDa
dalli idu konege baruttade).

## naylO-saharAn bhASegaLu
nayjIriyAda kanuri, cAd‌na nayjer, kenyAda luvO modalAda
sumAru tombattu bhASegaLu I kuTumbakke sEruttave. I bhASegaLu
AphrikAdalli AphrO-ESiyATik mattu nayjar-kOngO bhASegaLa
naDuve vistarisive. suDAn mattu IjipTgaLalli baLakeyalliruva
nubiyan bhASegaLU I kuTumbakke sEriddu, ivugaLa barahagaLu
enTanE SatamAnadindalU uLisikonDu baralAgide; idakkAgi ivu
grIk lipiyannu baLasuttive.

I bhASegaLannu songhAy, pUrva suDAnik, mattu madhya
suDAnik embudAgi mUru gumpugaLalli vibhajisabahudu. I ellA


bhASegaLU vEda kAlada samskxtada hAge udAtta, anudAtta moda
lAda nAdavayvidhyagaLannu tOrisuttave. kelavu bhASegaLalli I vayvidhya
vannu vibhaktigaLa naDuvina vyatyAsavannu sUcisuvudakkAgiyU baLasalAgu
ide. pUrva mattu dakSiNa pradESada bhASegaLalli kriyApadavu vAkyada
modala padavAgi baruttiddu, avu adakkanuguNavAda bEreyU halavu
vaySiSTyagaLannu tOrisuttave.

## nayjar-koDOphEniyan bhASegaLu
AphrikAkhanDadalli baLakeyalliruva bhASegaLalli heccinavU, endare
sumAru eraDu sAvira bhASegaLalli ondUvare sAvira bhASegaLU
nayjar-korDOphEniyan kuTumbakke sEruttave. I kuTumbavannu
nayjar-kOngO mattu korDOphEniyan embudAgi eraDu
mukhya vibhAgagaLalli vingaDisabahudu; idallade, nayjar-kOngO
vannu paScima aTlAnTik, mAndE, gur, kvA, benu-kOngO,
pUrva aDamAvA modalAda bEre bEre upavibhAgagaLAgi vingaDisa
bahudu.

nayjIriyAda yorubA, suDAnina tegAli, senegal‌na phulakunda,
pUrva AphrikAda halavu dESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva svahili,
jimbAbveya SOnA, rvAnDA mattu yugAnDagaLalli baLakeyalliruva
kinyAr‌vAndA, dakSiNa AphrikAda julu ityAdi bhASegaLu I vibhAgakke
sEruttave.

AphrikA khanDada dakSiNa bhAgadalli haraDikonDiruva sumAru
aynUru banTu bhASegaLU I nayjar-kOngO upavibhAgakke sEru
ttave. I bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, ivugaLalli baruva nAma
padagaLallella eraDu angagaLiruttave; A padagaLa lingavannu sUcisuva
anga modalinadu, mattu adara arthavannu sUcisuva anga eraDa
neyadu. udAharaNegAgi, banTu emba I bhASegaLa hesarinalli ba
embudu ondu lingasUcaka pratyaya; adu manuSyarannu sUcisuttade.

I bhASegaLalli intaha hattu-hadinaydu lingasUcaka pratyaya
gaLiruttave. ivugaLalli kelavakke Ekavacana mattu bahuvacanagaLalli bEre
bEre rUpagaLiruttave. ivu vyakti, mara-giDa, jODi vastugaLu (kaNNu,
kivi, ityAdi), prANi, aprANi, cikka vastugaLu, ityAdi vargagaLalli
nAmapadagaLannu hancuttave. nAmapadagaLa angagaLAgi baruva I


## amerikAda bhASegaLu
lingabhEdavannu vAkyadalli baruva bEre halavAru padagaLU sUcisu
ttave.

## boysAn bhASegaLu
AphrikAda nayxtya bhAgada kalahAri marubhUmi pradESadalli baLake
yalliruva khU, nAma hoTTenTOT, sandAvE, hatsa modalAda
sumAru mUvattu bhASegaLu I kuTumbakke sEruttave. ivugaLa
nnADuva janaralli heccinavarU kuLLaru. hindina kAladalli ivaru
AphrikAda dakSiNa bhAgadallella haraDiddarendu tOruttade. Adare uttara
dinda banTu bhASeyannADuva janarU, dakSiNadinda Dac bhASeya
nnADuva vasAhatudArarU oTTige sEri ivarannu marubhUmige taLLi
ddAre.

OSTya, tAlavya, ghOSa, aghOSa modalAda halavu bageya
'klik'varNagaLiruvudu I bhASegaLa ondu prAmukhyavAda vaySiSTya.

## 5.5 amerikAda bhASegaLu
amerikA khanDagaLannu yurOpina janaru kanDuhiDiyuvudakkinta
modalu alli nUrAru bhASegaLannADuva janaru vAsisuttiddaru. uttara
mattu dakSiNa amerikAgaLalli oTTige intaha sumAru ondu sAvira
bhASegaLu baLakeyalli ddirabEku.

ivugaLalli halavu avugaLannADuva janAngagaLondige nASa
gonDive. innu halavu nASada hAdiyallive. ivugaLalli kelavannu sadyakke
baLasuttiruvavaru ibbarO mUvarO mudukaru mAtra. I rIti
bahaLamaTTige aLidu hOgi, Iga uLidiruva, AdarU SIghravAgi
aLiyuttiruva, sumAru 650 bhASegaLu I bEre bEre janAngagaLalli
ivattu baLakeyallive.

amerikAda eraDu khanDagaLalli haraDiruva I bhASegaLannella
eskimO-aleyut, nA-Dene, mattu amerinD emba mUru mukhya
kuTumbagaLalli sEruvante vibhajisabahudendu vidvAmsaru kelavaru
abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. I abhiprAyadante, eskimO-aleyut‌ge sErida
hattu bhASegaLu, mattu nA-Denege sErida mUvattamUru bhASegaLannu
biTTare uLiduvellavU amerinD emba bhASA kuTumbakke sEruttave.


## eskimO bhASegaLu
eskimO-aleyut bhASegaLu alAskA, grIn‌lEnD, saybIriyA
modalAda uttaradhruvakke samIpada pradESagaLalli baLakeyallive.
aleyut, yUpik, inuyit, alAskan modalAda bhASegaLu I
kuTumbakke sEruttave.

eskimO bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, ondu doDDa vAkya
dalli baraballa viSayagaLannella barE ondu padadalli aDakavAgi hELuva
krama I bhASegaLallide. Adare, idakkAgi A padadondige halavAru
pratyayagaLannu sErisi hELabEkAguttade. ondu ghaTaneyannu sUcisuva
padadondige yAru, yArannu, yAvAga, yAke, elli, yArigAgi A
ghaTaneyalli toDagisidaru embudannu tiLisuvudakkAgi I rIti halavu
bageya pratyayagaLannu kriyApadagaLige sErisabahudu. I kAraNakkAgi,
bhAratada munDAri bhASeya hAge, mattu amerikAda sAliSAn bhASe
gaLa hAge, I bhASegaLannU 'pOlisintheTik' bhASegaLendu parigaNisa
lAguttade.

## nA-Dene bhASegaLu
nA-Dene bhASegaLendare mukhyavAgi athabAskan emba upakuTumbakke
sErida navahO, apAcE, sArsI modalAda sumAru mUvattu
bhASegaLu, mattu ivakkinta bhinnavAda eyAk, haydA mattu tlingit
emba bhASegaLu. ivugaLalli eyAk bhASeyannADuvavaralli ivattu
(1996ralli) obba vyakti mAtra jIvantavAgiddAne.

uttara amerikAdalli yuTO-aj‌Tekan bhASegaLannu biTTare, ati
heccu bhASegaLiruva mattu ati heccu janaru baLasuva bhASA(upa)
kuTumbavendare, I athabAskan embudAgide.

## amerikan bhASegaLu
amerinD embudu amerikan inDiyan embudara sankSipta rUpa.
amerikA khanDagaLannu modala bArige talupida pAScAtyara tappu
kalpaneyindAgi, inDiyan emba hesaru ivarige bandideyAdarU
ivara bhASegaLigU bhAratada bhASegaLigU naDuve namage tiLidante
yAva sambandhavU illa. kenaDAdinda hiDidu, dakSiNa amerikAda
dakSiNada koneyavaregU I bhASegaLu baLakeyallive.janasankhyeya


maTTige I bhASegaLannADuvavaru dakSiNa amerikAdalli ivattigU
prabalarAgiddAre. eppattu lakSa janara mAtAgiruva kvecuvA bhASe
kolambiyA, yukaDOr, peru mattu bolIviyAgaLallU,
mUvattu lakSa janara mAtAgiruva guvArAnI bhASe parAgvE, brEjil
mattu arjenTInAgaLallU, hadinaydu lakSa janara mAtAgiruva
ayyArA bhASe peru mattu bolIviyAgaLallU, mattu hattu lakSa
janara mAtAgiruva nahuvAts bhASe dakSiNa meksikOdallU baLake
yallive.

idakke viruddhavAgi, kenaDA mattu uttara amerikAgaLalli I bhASe
gaLannADuva janara sankhye heccendare kelavu sAviragaLaSTu mAtra kANisu
ttade. dakSiNa amerikAdalli daTTavAda kADugaLidda kAraNa I bhASegaLa
nnADuvavaru pAScAtya vasAhatudArara gunDige sikkade tappisikonDu
iddudu, mattu uttara amerikAdalli kADu pradESa kaDimeyidda kAraNa
avaralli heccinavarU nASahondiddudE idakke mukhya kAraNa.

amerinD bhASegaLannu uttara, madhya, chib‌chAn-pEjAn,
AnDiyan, tukAnovan, mattu gE-pAnO-kArib emba Aru
upakuTumbagaLalli vibhajisi hELalu sAdhyavideyendu kelavara
abhiprAyavAdare, innu kelavara matadante, I bhASegaLannoLagonDa
bhASAkuTumbagaLa sankhye nUrakkintalU jAsti.

ivugaLalli kelavu bhASAkuTumbagaLannu heccinavarU oppikoLLu
ttAre. algOnkiyan, sAliS, kaDOvan, siyovan, irOkvo
yiyan, hOkan, penuTiyan, tanovan, yuTO-aj‌Tekan
modalAda kuTumbagaLu intahavu.

I bhASegaLa mattu bhASAkuTumbagaLa naDuviruva vayvidhyavannu
sankSiptavAgi baNNisabEkiddarU adu ondu doDDa pustakavE AdItu.
iDI vAkyada arthavannu ondu padadoLage tumbisaballa sAliSAn
bhASegaLinda hiDidu, caynIs‌na hAge padagaLalli svalpavU Antarika
racaneyE illadiruvantaha bhASegaLU I kuTumbadalli kANisuttave.

## 5. AsTrEliyAda bhASegaLu
AsTrEliyAdalli ellarU ingliS mAtanADuttArendu heccinavarU
bhAvisuttirabahudu; Adare, nijakkU ingliS mAtanADuva jana


AsTrEliyA khanDakke bandu nelesuva modalu, ingliS‌ginta tIra
bhinnavAgiruva innUru-munnUru bhASegaLannADuva jana alli nele
siddaru.

vasAhatugArarAgi banda ingliSara kAla tuLitakke sikki, I mUla
nivAsigaLalli heccinavarU Iga aLiduhOgiddAre. avarondige avaru
ADuttidda nUrAru bhASegaLU heccina maTTige aLiduhOgive. Iga
allondu illondu embudAgi, guDDagADugaLalli mattu marubhUmi
gaLalli mAtra kelavu bhASegaLu uLidukonDive. avugaLalli mundina
talemArina varege uLiyaballavugaLu ippattakkintalU kaDime.

AsTrEliyA khanDakke ingliSaru valase bandAga, endare sumAru
innUru varSagaLaSTu hinde, alli bahaLa kaDimeyendarU sumAru
mUru lakSa mUla nivAsigaLiddirabEkendu UhisalAgide. nijakkU
ivara sankhye idakkintalU hecciddiralu sAdhyavide.

avara daynandinada jIvana nisargadondige heNedukonDittu. tamma
parisaravannu svalpavU keDisade, adara ondu angavAgi badukuva krama
sAvirAru varSagaLindalU avaralli paramparAgatavAgi beLedubandittu.
tamma dinanityada avaSyakategaLige bEkAdaSTE AhAra mattu itara vastu
gaLannu avaru tamma parisaradinda AydukoLLuttiddaru. bEkAddakkinta
heccu sottugaLannu kUDihAkuva gOjigE avaru hOguttiralilla.
idarindAgi, avara parisara nASavAgade ellarigU txptiyanna koDu
tittu.

inglenD‌ninda mattu yurOpina itara dESagaLinda valase banda
janaru I mUla nivAsigaLa hAge alpatxptarAgiralilla. tamage eSTu
bhUmiyiddarU sAladu, eSTu sampattiddarU sAladu emba manO
bhAva avaradAgittu. tamma kAlakke mAtravallade tamma makkaLa mattu
avara makkaLa kAlakkU sAkAguvaSTu sampattannu kUDihAkidarU avarige
samAdhAnavilla. avara I uddESakke aDDa banda mUla nivAsigaLannu
ondO gunDininda suTTu hAkidaru, illavE phalavattAda bhUmiyannu
biTTu maraLugADinoLakke ODihOguva hAge mADidaru.

tamma jIvanakke hondikonDidda bhUmiyinda bErAda I
aLiduLida janAnga bahubEga naSTavAguttA hOyitu. ittIcegina
ankesankhyegaLa prakAra, AsTrEliyAdalli mUla bhASegaLannADuva janara
sankhye kaLeda nUru-nUrayvattu varSagaLalli mUru lakSaviddudu
mUvattu sAvirakkiLidide. avara heccina bhASegaLU nASada hAdiyallive.


yoln‌gu, vArl‌piri, mattu paScima marubhUmiya kelavu bhASegaLu
mAtra ivattu SAlegaLalli ingliS‌nondige paThyagaLAgive. intaha
bhASegaLa sankhye hattakkintalU kaDime.

AsTrEliyAdalli baLakeyalliruva mUla bhASegaLalli heccinavU
ondE bhASAkuTumbakke sEridavugaLirabEkendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. idakke apavAdavendare, miriyam emba pApuvAn bhASe,
mattu tAsmEniyAdalli baLakeyallidda, mattu Iga aLidu hOgiruva
bEre eraDu bhASegaLu.

AsTrEliyAda bhASegaLannu oTTu 26 upakuTumbagaLalli pratyEkisa
bahudu. ivugaLalli mAmA-nyungAn emba ondE ondu upa
kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLE AsTrEliyAda heccina bhAgagaLallU baLake
yallive. uLida 25 upakuTumbagaLige sErida bhASegaLella AsTrEliyA
khanDada uttara tudiyalli sangrahitavAgive.

## vyAkaraNada vaySiSTya
AsTrEliyAda I mUla bhASegaLalli sAmAnyavAgi a, i mattu u
emba mUru svaragaLu mAtra iruttave. ivakkinta bhinnavAda e mattu
o svaragaLAgalI, dIrghasvaragaLAgalI ivugaLallilla. idallade, I
bhASegaLalli svaradinda suruvAguva padagaLu aparUpa.

vyanjanagaLalli ga, ja, Da, da mattu ba emba aydu sparSagaLu mAtra
vallade, nAligeyannu hallugaLa naDuve irisi uccarisuva Araneya
dondu sparSavU ivugaLalliruttade. idE rIti Aru anunAsikagaLU
iruttave. Adare, ka, ca, Ta, ta, pa modalAda aghOSa sparSa
gaLAgalI, kha, cha, Tha, tha, pha modalAda mahAprANAkSaragaLAgalI,
illavE sa, Sa, ha modalAda USma vyanjanagaLAgalI I bhASegaLalli
kANisuvudu aparUpa.

I bhASegaLa sarvanAmagaLu Ekavacana, dvivacana, mattu bahuvacana
embudAgi mUru vacanagaLannu sUcisaballuvu. udAharaNegAgi,
dvirbal emba bhASeyalli baygu endare 'nAnu', bili endare
'nAvibbaru', mattu jana endare 'nAvu mUvaru' illavE 'jAsti jana'
emba artha baruttade.

idallade, uttama puruSa dvivacana mattu bahuvacanagaLalli madhyama
puruSayukta mattu madhyamapuruSarahita emba vyatyAsavannU I
bhASeya sarvanAmagaLu tOrisuttave. udAharaNegAgi, aylitya


endare 'nInu mattu nAnu' endU, jili endare 'ninnannu biTTu
nAvibbaru' endU artha baruttade. hIgeyE, jantu endare 'nInu
mattu nAvu (mUru illavE heccu mandi)' endU, jinnu endare
'ninnannu biTTu nAvu (mUru illavE heccu mandi)' endU artha
baruttade.

## hinde-munde, eDakke-balakke
sthAnasUcaka padagaLa baLakeyallU AsTrEliyAda bhASegaLalli kelavu
vaySiSTyagaLu kANisuttave. obba vyakti illavE ondu vastu ellide
embudannu tiLisuvudakke nAvu hinde-munde, eDakke-balakke,
mEle-keLage emba viSESaNagaLannu baLasuttEve. Ata maneya
munde nintiddAne, tengina mara maneya eDakke ide embantaha
vAkyagaLalli ivugaLa prayOgavannu kANabahudu.

AsTrEliyAda kelavu bhASegaLalli obba vyakti illavE ondu vastu
ellideyembudannu hIge innondu vastuvina illavE mAtanADuvavana
dxSTikOnada mUlaka tiLisuva badalu, pUrva-dakSiNa-paScima-
uttara emba dikkugaLa sahAyadindalEnE tiLisalAguttade.

gUgu-yim‌dhir emba bhASe intahadu. mEle koTTiruva eraDu
vAkyagaLu tiLisuva sangatiyannu I bhASeyalli dikkugaLa sahAyadinda
mAtravE (maneya pUrvakke, maneya paScimakke, ityAdi)
tiLisalAguttade.

citravondaralli kANisuva ibbaru vyaktigaLalli obbanu innobbana
balabadige nintiddAne ennalU I bhASeyalli sAdhyavAgadu. allU
nijavAda dikkannE tiLisabEku, mattu citravannu svalpa tirugisi hiDidare,
dikku badalAgiruvudannU sariyAgi aritu hELabEku.

I rIti cikka cikka vastugaLa sthAnavannU dikkugaLa sahAyadinda
tiLisuvudu namage tIra vicitra mattu bahaLa kaSTada kelasa endu anisa
bahudu. Adare, AsTrEliyAda I mUlanivAsigaLu marubhUmiyalli
sancarisuttirabEkAgideyAda kAraNa, avarige I rIti yAvAgalU
dikkugaLa ariviruvudu tumbA upayuktavAguttade. marubhUmiyalli
sthAna sUcakagaLAgi baLasalu mara, guDDa modalAda gurutugaLAvuvU
iruvudilla; hAgAgi, dikkina jYAnavondarindalE avaru yAvAgalU
tAvelli iruvevembudannu tiLidukonDirabEkAguttade.


## attebhASe
AsTrEliyAda kelavu bhASegaLalli atte, mAva, attige, bhAva modalAda
sambandhigaLondige mAtanADuvAga baLasuva bhASe itara sandarbha
gaLalli baLasuva bhASeginta tIrA bhinnavAgiruttade. eraDarallU vyAkaraNa
ondE; Adare, padagaLu mAtra bEre bEre. itararondige mAtanADu
vAga baLasuva padagaLalli ondannU I attebhASeyalli baLasalu sAdhya
villa.

udAharaNegAgi, dyarbala emba bhASeyalli sAmAnyavAgi 'horage
bA' ennalu mayin ennuttAre, Adare adara attebhASeyalli yil
vun ennuttAre; 'tinnu' ennuvudakke sAmAnya bhASeyalli dyang‌iu
ennuttAre, Adare attebhASeyalli yal‌miiu ennuttAre.

I viSiSTavAda attebhASeyannu ganDasaru tamma atte (henDatiya
tAyi), sose (magana henDati), attige (tAyiya sahOdarana illavE
tandeya sahOdariya magaLu) - ivarondigU, hengasaru tamma
mAva (ganDana tande), aLiya (magaLa ganDa), mattu bhAva (tAyiya
sahOdarana illavE tandeya sahOdariya maga) - ivarondigU
kaDDAyavAgi baLasabEkAguttade.

bEre kelavu sambandhigaLondigU (udA: ganDasara maTTige
tAyiya sahOdarana maga, mattu hengasara maTTige tAyiya sahO
darana magaLu) attebhASeyannu baLasabahudAdarU, idaralli kaDDAya
villa. uLidavarondige mAtra, I attebhASeyannu baLasabAradu;
sAmAnya bhASeyannE baLasabEku.

I attebhASeya ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare, adaralli baLakeyAguva
padagaLu bahaLa kaDime, endare sAmAnya bhASeyalli iruvudara kAlu
bhAgadaSTu padagaLu mAtra idaralli baLakeyAguttave. hIgiddarU, hELa
bEkendiruva sangatigaLannella adara mUlaka hELalu EnU tondare
yAguvudilla. I rIti padagaLa sankhye attebhASeyalli kaDimeyiralu
mukhya kAraNavEnendare, sAmAnya bhASeyalli baruva mUru-nAlku
padagaLige badalAgi, attebhASeyalli ondE padaviruttade.

udAharaNegAgi, attebhASeyalli 'nODu' embarthada immal
emba ondu padakke badalAgi, sAmAnya bhASeyalli vabal 'mEle
nODu', biDidsay 'eveyikkade nODu', gindal 'rAtri hottu
dIpada beLakinalli nODu', mamil 'gottAgada hAge nODu',
buDal 'obbana kaDege nODu' modalAda padagaLive.


I eraDu rItiya bhASegaLu dyarbal‌nalli haLabaralli mAtra uLi
diveyallade, taruNa-taruNiyara mattu huDuga-huDugiyara mAtinalli
uLidilla. I mUlanivAsigaLa itara sampradAyagaLa hAge, I bhASA
sampradAyavU naSisi hOguttide.

AsTrEliyAda mUlanivAsigaLa bhASeyalli kANisuva innondu
vaySiSTyavEnendare, avara samAjadalli yArAdarU sattare Atana
hesarannu hOluva pada avara bhASeyalli yAvudiddarU adannu
anantara uccarisuvantilla; hAge uccarisidalli Atana Atma avariru
vallige bandItemba nambikeyE idakke kAraNa. I sampradAyadindAgi,
avara bhASeya halavu padagaLu ondondAgi baLakeyinda hora
bILuttiruttave, mattu avugaLa jAgavannu bEre padagaLu Akramisu
tiruttave. Adare, ondu samAjadalli I rIti kANeyAda padagaLannu
pakkada samAjadalli kANabahudu.

## 5.7 OSiyAnAda bhASegaLu
pesiphik mattu hindU mahAsAgaragaLalli haraDiruva sAvirAru dvIpa
gaLalli vAsisuva janaralli sAvirAru bhinna bhinnavAda bhASegaLu baLake
yallive. I dvIpagaLalli kANisuva bhASegaLa sankhye jagattina oTTu
bhASegaLa SEkaDA naluvattaraSTAgabahudendu kelavaru lekka hAkiddAre.
ivannu mukhyavAgi AsTOnESiyan mattu inDO-pesiphik emba
eraDu bhASAkuTumbagaLalli vingaDisabahudu.

ivugaLalli AsTrEnESiyan bhASegaLu bahaLa vistAravAgi I
eraDu mahAsAgaragaLalliruva ellA dvIpagaLallU endare, AphrikA
khanDada hattiraviruva meDagAskar dvIpadinda hiDidu inDOnESiyA,
philipayns dvIpagaLannu dATi, munde pesiphik mahAsAgaradalliruva
havAyi dvIpagaLavaregU habbikonDiruvuvAdare, inDO-pesiphik
bhASegaLu nyUgini mattu adara suttumuttalina dvIpagaLalli mAtra
baLakeyallive.

Adare, AsTrEnESiyan bhASegaLella ondakkondu tIra hattirada
sambandhavannu tOrisuttive, mattu idakke viruddhavAgi, inDO-
pesiphik bhASegaLu ondE kaDe sEriddarU halavAru rItiya vayvidhya
gaLannu tOrisuttiddu, avannella ondE kuTumbadalli sErisi hELalu
sAdhyavE emba viSayadalli vidvAmsaroLage matabhEdavide.


## AsTOnESiyan bhASegaLu
maDagAskar‌na malagAsi, malayESiyAda malay, inDOnESiyAda
bahasA inDOnESiyA, jAvanIs, sunDanIs, mAdurIs, bAli,
philipayns‌na pilipinO (tagalOg), pOlinESyAda samOvan,
tahitiyan mattu havAyiyan modalAda oTTu ondu sAvira
bhASegaLu AsTOnESiyan kuTumbakke sEruttave. I bhASegaLannu
mukhyavAgi malayO-pOlinESiyan emba ondu doDDa upa
kuTumbadallU, atAyalik, tsavyik mattu payvanik emba mUru
cikka upakuTumbagaLallU sErisi hELabahudendu vidvAmsaru
abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

I kuTumbakke sErida sumAru innUrarinda munnUraraSTu bhASe
gaLu nyUginiyinda paScimakke baLakeyalliddu, ivannADuvavara sankhye
200 miliyadaSTide. nyUginiyinda pUrvakke idakkintalU jAsti,
endare sumAru munnUrarinda nAnnUrara varege bhASegaLiveyAdarU,
ivannADuvavara sankhye mAtra eraDu miliyadaSTu mAtra ide. 65
miliya janara jAvanIs, 20 miliya janara sunDanIs, mattu 10
miliya janara tagalOg (philipayns‌na bhASe) embavu I bhASegaLalli
janasankhyeya maTTige mukhyavAdavugaLu.

sAmAnyavAgi I bhASegaLalli baLakeyAguva varNagaLa sankhye bahaLa
cikkadu. udAharaNegAgi, mavori bhASeyalli oTTu hattu vyanjanagaLu
(k, t, p, ph, h, m, n, j, r, v) mAtra baLakeyallive.
Adare, svaragaLu hattu (hrasva mattu dIrgha svaragaLu sEri) ive.

malayO-pOlinESiyan kuTumbada ondu vibhAgavAda
OSiyAnik illavE melanESiyan bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTya
vEnendare, ivugaLalli nirdESaka sarvanAmagaLu 'mAtanADuvavana
hattira', 'kELugana hattira', mattu 'ibbarindalU dUra' embudAgi
mUru viSiSTavAda sthAnagaLannu sUcisuttave. bhAratadalli baLake
yalliruva kelavu TibeTO-barman bhASegaLallU, yurOpina
yurAlik bhASegaLallU intaha mUru rItiya sthAnanirdESaka
sarvanAmagaLannu kANabahudu.


bhASegaLa bagge nIvEnu balliri?

## inDO-pesiphik bhASegaLu
I kuTumbakke sErida bhASegaLa sankhye sAvirakke hattira ideyAdarU,
ivannADuva janara sankhye oTTu ippattu lakSakkinta jAstiyilla. mukhya
vAgi nyUgini emba ondE ondu dvIpadalli haraDiveyAdarU, I
bhASegaLu ondakkinta ondu tIra bhinnavAgiddu avannella ondE kuTumba
dalli sErisi hELabahudemba vAdavannu ellarU oppuvudilla.

bhAratada anDamAn dvIpadalli baLakeyalliruva kelavu bhASe
gaLannU I kuTumbadalli sErisabahudendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTi
ddAre. ivallade, Iga pUrti aLidu hOgiruva tasmIniyAda bhASe
gaLu, nyUginiya madhyabhAgadalli baLakeyalliruva bhASegaLu, paScimada
pApuvAn bhASegaLu, pUrvada bhASegaLu, vAyavyada bhASegaLu mattu
pesiphik bhASegaLu embudAgi I bhASegaLannu ELu vibhAgagaLAgi
hancalu sAdhyavideyendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

nyUgini dvIpadalli baLakeyalliruva oTTu ondu sAvira bhASegaLalli
mukkAlu pAlaSTu, endare sumAru 750 bhASegaLu pApuvAn emba
ondu vibhAgakke sEruttave. I bhASegaLa ondu vaySiSTyavEnendare,
ivugaLalli svatantra mattu asvatantragaLemba eraDu rItiya kriyApada
gaLiruttave. AkhyAta mattu kAla pratyayagaLalli heccinavU svatantra
kriyApadagaLondige mAtra baruttave.

## 5.8 muktAya
jagattinalliruva janarella ondE bhASeyannADuva hAgiddare bahaLa
oLLeyadu endu bhAvisuva mandi nammalli kelavariddAre. hIgAdalli,
bEre bEre bhASegaLannu kaliyuva kelasa tappabahudu mAtravalla,
bhASeya hesarinalli ivattu naDeyuttiruva nUrAru hOrATagaLU
illavAgabahudendu I janaru bhAvisuttAre.

Adare, nijakkU namage intaha EkarUpate bEkE embudannu
pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide. ellarU ondE rItiya baTTegaLannu
uDuva hAgAdalli, ondE rItiya sAmAnugaLannu baLasuva
hAgAdalli, mattu ondE rItiya giDagaLannu neDuva hAgAdalli halavu
bageya samasyegaLannu mattu tondaregaLannu kaDime mADabahudEnO


nija; Adare, idarindAgi namma jIvanadalli Iga kANisuva
vayvidhyateyE illavAgi, ellavU nIrasavAgaballudu.

idallade, kAla badalAdantella prapancadalli kANisuva jIvigaLalli
kelavu hosa kAlakke hondikoLLalu asamarthavAgi nASagoLLuvudannu
nAvu kANuttEve. yAva rItiya jIvi I rIti aLiduhOgaballudu,
mattu yAvudu uLiyaballudu embudannu nAvu avugaLa ivattina
naDateya illavE sAmarthyada AdhArada mEle nirdharisalArevu.
hAgAgi, jIvigaLalli kANisuva vayvidhyateyannu aLisi hAkidalli, munde
baraliruva ondu kAladalli uLiyabahudAda jIviyE illavendAgalu
sAdhyavide.

bhASeyalli kANisuva vayvidhyateyU idE rItiyadu. namma
jIvanadalli kANisuva itara vayvidhyategaLanteyE adU atyavaSya
vAdudu. ivattina avaSyakategaLannu pUraysalu ingliS illavE hindi
bhASe atyanta samarthavendu kelavaru bhAvisabahudu. Adare munde
baruva ondu divasadalli avugaLa badalu Iga tIrA keLamaTTadalliruva
guDDagADina janara ondu bhASe heccu samarthavendu siddhavAgalu
sAdhyavide. hAgAgi, bhASeya uLivE adaralli kANisuva vayvidhyateya
mEle avalambisideyendu hELabahudu.

bhASegaLalli kANisuva I vayvidhyateyannu aritaSTU bhASeya
svarUpa namage heccu heccu spaSTavAguttA hOguttade. Adare, I
viSayadalli nAvu tiLiyabEkAdaddu innU bahaLa jAsti ide. nUrAru
varSagaLindalU sAvirAru mandi samSOdhakaru ingliS bhASeya
mEle samSOdhanegaLannu naDesuttA bandiddAre; hAgiddarU, A bhASeya
kuritAgi ivattigU hosa hosa viSayagaLu horabaruttive. hIgiru
vAga, obbarO ibbarO samSOdhane naDesuttiruva itara bhASegaLa
pADEnu?

idallade, samSOdhakaru sAmAnyavAgi jAsti samSOdhane mADida
bhASeya svarUpavannE itara bhASegaLallU kANuttAre. samskxtada
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu kannaDadalli kanDa kannaDa vayyAkaraNigaLa avasthe
intahadu. tAvu abhyAsa mADuva bhASeya nijavAda svarUpavEnu
embudannu tiLiyalu ivaru innaSTu ALavAda samSOdhanegaLannu mADa
bEkAguttade. prapancadalliruva sAviragaTTale bhASegaLalli eSTannu I
rIti abhyAsa mADalu sAdhya?


bhASegaLa kuritu namagiruva ajYAna entahadu embudannu idu
spaSTavAgi tOrisikoDuttade. I ajYAnavannu nivArisalu nAvu
prayatnisabEku mAtravalla, AdaSTu maTTige bhASegaLa naDuviruva
vayvidhyateyannu uLisikoLLuvudakkU nAvu prayatnisabEku. kannaDada
upabhASegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsagaLu kannaDada SrImantikeyannu
pratibimbisuttave. A upabhASegaLalli ondu sari uLiduvella tappu
emba bhAvaneyannu nAvu toDedu hAkabEku. nijakkU kannaDada uLivu
I vayvidhyateyannavalambiside embudannu nAvu mareyabAradu.
